Name: PT Industri Kereta Api (Persero)
Description:
We Manufacture a Wide Array of Tailored Rolling Stock with Competitive Price.

Established on May 18th, 1981, INKA is the first fully integrated rolling stock and automotive manufacturer in Southeast Asia.  Our focus is to deliver high-quality products and services to our customers. We provide a wide array of products to meet our customer diverse requirements, as well as excellent after sales services to ensure our customer received the best transportation solution. Our products have spread and operated in many countries around the world.

For more information contact:
Factory and Head Office
Jl Yos Sudarso No. 71. Madiun. East Java. Indonesia. 63122
sekretariat@inka.co.id
+62 351 452271 

Representative Office
Jl Jend Sudirman Kav 2. Menara TASPEN lt3. Jakarta. Indonesia. 10220

+62 21 2514424

Name: Wabtec Corporation
Description: Wabtec is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services. Whether it's freight rail, transit, mining, industrial or marine, our expertise, technologies, and people - together - are accelerating the future of transportation.

Name: Talgo
Description:
Talgo is a leader in the design, manufacture and maintenance of high-speed and intercity trains, with industrial presence in Spain, Germany, Denmark, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan and the United States. Recognised worldwide for its capacity for innovation, unique and distinctive technology and reliability, the company has a team of more than 3,500 people in 11 countries.

Talgo is the main supplier of high-speed and very high-speed trains to Renfe, and the supplier of trains for the “Haramain” project between Mecca and Medina in Saudi Arabia. Talgo is also the manufacturer chosen by state-run companies in Germany and Denmark to decarbonise their mobility with up to 100 and 16 Talgo 230 Intercity trains, respectively.
Location: Las Rozas de Madrid, Community of Madrid

Name: Stadler
Description: International rail vehicle construction company, Stadler, is headquartered in Bussnang in Eastern Switzerland. Founded in 1942, it has a workforce of around 11,000 based in various production and over 40 service locations. Stadler provides a comprehensive range of products in the heavy and urban transport segments: High-speed trains, intercity trains, regional and commuter heavy rail trains, underground trains, tram trains and trams. Stadler also manufactures main-line locomotives, shunting locomotives and passenger carriages, including the most powerful diesel-electric locomotive in Europe. It is the world’s leading manufacturer in the rack-and-pinion rail vehicle industry.

Name: Colas Rail
Description:
Passion, Purpose, Challenge : at Colas Rail, we are driven by change, this is why our employees imagine each day a world where innovative and eco-friendly contribute to the well-being of each and the future of all. 
Joining Colas Rail means evolving at the heart of the challenges of tomorrow, with an international leader present in more than 20 countries, alongside passionate and demanding women and men, to achieve, together, the impossible.

Name: Transnet Engineering
Description: Transnet Engineering is the  engineering division of Transnet SOC Limited offering research, engineering, manufacturing and maintenance services and products to the rail industry across the globe and specifically the African continent. TE operates six main factories situated in major city centres in South Africa, with each factory serving as a central hub for satellite depots in each region. TE remanufactures and manufactures freight wagons, locomotives and passenger coaches, as well as the maintenance and servicing of these products. In addition, TE also manufacturers and maintains port equipment including haulers. Driven by the varying needs of our customers, Transnet Engineering is optimally geared to deliver customized solutions to enable our customers to unleash their full potential.

Name: Progress Rail, A Caterpillar Company
Description:
Our team creates lifelong customer relationships, supplying comprehensive rolling stock and infrastructure solutions for the global rail industry and setting the standard for excellence. We care about fostering the sustainable movement of goods and people for generations to come, and we know our customers care, too. Our strategic footprint ensures responsive, quality customer support all day, every day.

As a Caterpillar company, Progress Rail is one of the largest integrated diversified providers of locomotive, freight car and infrastructure solutions and technologies for the global rail industry. We provide advanced EMD locomotives, engines and technologies, railcars, trackwork, fasteners, signaling, rail welding and maintenance-of-way equipment, along with dedicated locomotive and freight car repair services, aftermarket parts support and recycling operations. Our team's deep industry expertise ensures a commitment to quality through innovative solutions.

Name: MERMEC
Description:
MERMEC is an Italian multinational company founded in 1970 and active in advanced technologies for rail transport (signalling, measuring trains and systems, electric traction, telecommunication), urban electric mobility and industrial application. The company HQ is in Italy with branches, offices, and facilities in 21 countries through which it provides project management, sales support as well as technical assistance to its customers worldwide. 
With about 2000 highly qualified employees (of whom, 1400 Engineers), MERMEC boasts an unmatched technical know-how that has allowed it to develop and market a well-structured portfolio of advanced solutions currently in use in 73 countries over the world.

Name: Harsco Rail
Description:
Harsco Rail, a division of Enviri Corporation, is a global supplier for railway track maintenance and construction. With a broad range of high quality equipment, cutting-edge technology, and worldwide support, Harsco Rail takes care of customers’ needs for virtually all major aspects of track maintenance and construction. Delivering innovation and performance, Harsco Rail meets the demands of the track every day.

At Harsco Rail, we have spent over 100 years morphing ideas into innovation. Through our four business lines – Equipment, Aftermarket, Contracted Services, and Technology – Harsco Rail is a valued partner throughout the lifecycle of track. From construction, to maintenance, to renewal, we offer the same innovative solutions and world-class service that our customers have relied upon for nearly a century.

With over 1,000 employees in over 50 countries, our team of motivated employees are crucial for our company’s success. Harsco Rail understands the importance of attracting qualified employees and providing them with the necessary tools for a long-term career. For more information about our job openings go to:
https://www.harscorail.com/careers.html

Name: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation Ltd
Description: www.delhimetrorail.com

Name: ROLLINGSTOCK
Description: Trends & key events of the worldwide rolling stock market. Official page of the ROLLINGSTOCK Agency.

Name: Colas Rail UK
Description:
Colas Rail is one of Europe’s leading suppliers of railway infrastructure services, we are award-winning specialists having constructed all forms of railways across Europe and the UK.
We specialise in: 
•	High Speed Lines
•	Light /Metro Lines 
•	Freight Operator
•	Track Laying, Renewal and Maintenance
•	Operation and Maintenance of On Track Plant 
•	High Voltage and Traction Power
•	Electrification & Signalling
•	Rolling Stock Refurbishment & Maintenance
•	Tramways
•	Multidisciplinary Projects 
•	Engineering 
•	Control & Communication systems

We work on some of the continent’s most high-profile projects, including the delivery of major enhancement and maintenance frameworks for Network Rail and are currently working on some incredibly exciting projects. We are also delivering major schemes overseas in North Africa, Asia and North America. 

At Colas Rail we look outwards to our customers, seeing things from their point of view, responding to their suggestions and anticipating their needs, while being committed to delivering on our promise to them, our employees, the people we work with and our stakeholders.

Developing people is key to our operational success, with 25% of our leaders progressing through our Graduate Schemes. The Trainee & Apprentice programmes we run are equally as important to closing the skills gap facing the industry.

At Colas Rail we believe the investment made in training and development is vital to maintaining competitive advantage and we are committed to utilising training and development to ensure that every possible opportunity is available to our staff.

To find out more about us, please visit our website www.colasrail.co.uk, or Facebook, Twitter and YouTube: Colas Rail UK.

Name: Faiveley Transport
Description:
In December 2016, Wabtec and Faiveley Transport merged to create one of the world’s largest public rail equipment companies.  Today, the company’s transit business continues to operate under the name Faiveley Transport, a global rail and bus leader that has been providing best-in-class solutions to the public transportation industry for 100 years.

Faiveley Transport designs, manufactures, markets and maintains a wide variety of advanced components, systems and services that enable customers to build and operate trains and buses that are safe, reliable and cost-efficient throughout their life cycle.

Regardless of the business or product line, Faiveley Transport continues to drive innovation across the transit industry. Whether it’s the launch of new products or ongoing improvements to existing products, Faiveley Transport understands our customers’ needs for energy efficiency, system reliability and lower costs.  And we are committed to helping our customers achieve these goals.

Find out more: www.wabtec.com

Name: VolkerRail Ltd
Description:
Since entering the construction market in 1935, VolkerRail has become one of the UK’s leading multidisciplinary railway infrastructure contractors.

With over 70 years’ experience in the heavy and light rail infrastructure sectors, we have built a successful track record of delivering high profile projects for both public and private sector clients, ranging from small contracts to joint venture and alliance projects in excess of £1bn.

We work in harmony and in partnership with all stakeholders, to ensuring we improve transport links across the UK, to help bring communities together; putting passengers first by delivering quality infrastructure safely and on time, whilst also leaving a positive legacy in the communities in which we operate. 

Our business is split between Major Projects and Specialist Businesses, who work independently, or collectively across all rail networks, including main line railways, branch lines, depots and underground and overground mass transit networks, including tramways and private industrial railways, delivery bespoke contracts to full major turnkey projects.

Whether working as a Tier one contractor for larger multidiscipline frameworks, as a partner in a joint venture or Alliance, or as a subcontractor to the wider rail sector, our teams of experts are specialists in:

•	Signalling and operational telecoms
•	Fixed, ballasted and embedded track construction, renewals and maintenance
•	Electrification and power – HV and LV
•	Piling and ground investigation
•	Track welding 

These specialisms cover the full project lifecycle, with in-house design teams to undertake detailed design work for signalling and power related railway projects.

We also have a plant division which owns and maintains a fleet of rail construction plant.

VolkerRail has a strong strong reputation as a high-performance company. Our company aim is to stand out from the crowd in everything we do by exceeding expectations.

Name: MEDHA SERVO DRIVES PVT LTD (MSDPL)
Description:
Established in 1984 and headquartered in Hyderabad, India, Medha is a global leader in railway technology specializing in electric propulsion suite of products ranging from traction motors, traction converters, auxiliary power converters, train control management system, energy optimization solutions, onboard rollingstock electronics, safety and signalling systems, and fully assembled bogies. Medha engineers trainsets and locomotives and builds them in collaboration with railcoach factories. Over the 40 years, Medha has expanded our rollingstock expertise to encompass heavy-duty, high-payload Road and Off-road Electric Vehicles, and into Marine domains.

To cater to our global clientele present in over 50 countries, we have offices and manufacturing facilities across India, Italy, Spain, Poland, North America, Brazil, and Australia. Our workforce exceeds 7500 dedicated professionals across the group. Medha adheres to stringent quality standards, including IRIS, CMMI L5, ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001, ensuring that our products and services meet the highest global standards. Medha’s signalling products are designed to CENELEC standards to meet SIL 4 safety specifications

Name: Škoda Group
Description:
Škoda Group is focused on the transport engineering industry, its key products include low-floor trams, electric locomotives, subway trains, suburban train units and trolleybuses, as well as traction motors or complete driving gears for transport systems. Škoda experts develop, produce and supply top products customised to the needs and wishes of its customers.

Member of PPF Group
www.ppf.eu

Name: CRRC Corporation Ltd.
Description: CRRC undertakes design, manufacture, testing, commissioning and maintenance of locomotives and rolling stock, including: electric locomotives, diesel-electric and diesel-hydraulic locomotives from 280 kw to 10,000 kw for mainline and shunting duties; high-speed trains of speed over 350 km/h; DMUs and EMUs for urban, suburban and regional transport; trams and light rail vehicles; metro cars and passenger coaches; as well as full line of freight wagons, such as covered wagons; open-top wagons for coal, ore, steel and timber; hopper wagons for grain, ore, fertilizer; flat wagons; double-deck container flat wagons; tank wagons for all types of liquid and chemicals; tipper wagons, schnabel and depressed center wagons, as well as track machinery.

Name: CAD Railway Industries Ltd.
Description:
CAD Railway Industries: Leading the Future of Rail Transportation ===

With over 45 years of excellence, CAD Railway Industries has established itself as a leader in the rail sector. Based in Lachine, Quebec, we specialize in delivering comprehensive repair and refurbishment services for locomotives, freight cars, passenger cars, and diesel engines. Our work ensures long-lasting performance, extending the life of rail assets by up to 20 years.

CAD has grown and expanded its business from coast to coast in the past decade.  In 2017, CAD strengthened its national reach by acquiring Calgary-based Caltrax Inc., Western Canada’s only independent rail repair services provider with already 3 locations.  

With 450 skilled employees and facilities strategically located across Canada, CAD Railway Industries is your trusted partner in maintaining rail transportation's safety, efficiency, and sustainability—keeping the industry on track for the future.

Name: Patil Group
Description:
Patil Group is the largest Railway Track component manufacturer and Track solutions provider to Indian railways. The company manufactures Concrete Sleepers, Track fastening systems, Railway turnouts, High speed Ballastless Track solutions, and provides welding services to Railways, urban metros and upcoming high speed Railway lines. The country has set-up more than 20 factories across India to manufacture Concrete sleepers, Track fastening components, welding and Turnouts. The company also offers Railway IIOT and diagnostic solutions through one of its subsidiary Apnatech.

The company's has been associated with Indian Railways for more than four decades. Over the years Patil Group has played its part in tiding over the transition from Wooden Sleepers to Concrete Sleepers and now to Ballastless track solutions, Fastening systems and composite sleepers. The company operates with a growth mindset and will be on quest for exploring new possibilities, making innovative products for its customers.

Name: AmstedMaxion
Description: A AmstedMaxion é hoje referência na fabricação e no fornecimento de fundidos ferroviários e industriais da América do Sul, atendendo aos mercados interno e externo, exportando para países da América do Sul, África e Estados Unidos. Com capacidade de produzir 30 mil toneladas de peças fundidas ao ano e 85 mil rodas ferroviárias por ano, a empresa utiliza tecnologia de ponta para produzir peças de 10 quilos a seis toneladas, em aço carbono e baixa-liga, atendendo setores de mineração, máquinas e equipamentos para construção civil, sucroalcooleiro e ferroviário. Produz uma diversificada linha de fundidos ferroviários e outros componentes, tais como: sistemas de choque e tração, pontas de viga central fundida, espelhos, travessas, laterais e hastes de ligação. Outro destaque são as rodas ferroviárias fundidas, produzidas em aço microligado e desenvolvidas com a exclusiva tecnologia Griffin, líder no mercado norte-americano, cumprindo todas as especificações e normas estabelecidas pelas mais rigorosas ferrovias do mundo.

Name: GBMX
Description:
A GBMX possui expertise em design e fabricação de todos os tipos de vagões de carga. São mais de 30 modelos com inovação em operação, manutenção, durabilidade, confiabilidade e segurança, com designs mais leves e aerodinâmicos que reduzem consumo de combustível e emissões. Atua na comercialização de truques de aço fundido para todas as bitolas e conta com uma linha especializada em serviços de reforma, adaptação e modernização de vagões e seus componentes.

Saiba mais no nosso site.

Name: Greenbrier Maxion
Description:
Originated from AmstedMaxion, established on October 22nd, 1943, Greenbrier Maxion is formed by a joint venture among Brazilian Iochpe-Maxion and North-Americans Amsted Rail and Greenbrier. Located in Hortolândia-SP, it develops and manufactures railway freight cars and bogies, also reforming, adjusting and modernizing freight cars and their components. It has an accessible and efficient production capacity, with expertise in freight car design, services and leasing.

Through AmstedMaxion, a foundry located in Cruzeiro-SP, it is the top reference in Latin America in developing and manufacturing steel wheels, railway castings for bogies and draft gears, parts for machinery and equipment for the civil construction, mining and sugar-ethanol sectors. The Greenbier Maxion brand, combined with Greenbier’s expertise and technology in freight car design, services and leasing, and Amsted Rail’s expertise in components, becomes the complete and integrated solution for the railway segment in South America, with global penetration and operations.

Name: STRESCON INDUSTRIES LIMITED
Description:
Strescon Industries Limited (SIL) is a leading manufacturer and exporter of various types of Pre-Stressed Concrete (PSC) Sleepers for the railway industry.
Strescon Industries Limited (SIL), runs it's PSC Sleepers business from Calcutta. During the last ten years, Strescon Industries Limited (SIL) has positioned itself as the industry leader in production of various types of Railway PSC Sleepers. 
The Products range includes:
Mono Block Concreter Sleepers
PSC Sleepers for Turn Out
PSC SEJ Sleepers
PSC Level X-ing Sleepers
Curve Sleepers
Wider sleepers
Sleepers as per RDSO Designs
Any types of Broad Gage Sleeper.
These are offered through a comprehensiv package of design, manufacture and unrivalled delivery service by Road and Rail. The factory being strategically positioned on a line-siding on the Howrah - Guwahati line. 
Using the Short Bench Production Method, the factory has a production capacity of 3,00,000 Sleepers a year to cater to the growing demand of PSC Sleepers in the country and adjoining Bangladesh.
Location: near farakka pubarun town ship, west bengal

Name: Vossloh
Description:
Vossloh is a globally active, listed technology company with a core focus on rail infrastructure: We provide an integrated offer for rail transportation, all from a single source. This includes unique, high-performance key products and complex systems such as track fastening systems, concrete ties, switch systems, crossings and the innovative services associated with the life cycle of rail tracks.

The experience gained over decades makes Vossloh a leading supplier for the construction and maintenance of the rail infrastructure. Vossloh is one of the market leaders in track fasteners and switch systems as well as North America’s and Australia's leading manufacturer of concrete ties. When it comes to preventive rail maintenance, Vossloh has a high-speed grinding technology that’s unique the world over.

Our customers are generally public and private railway companies, network operators as well as regional and municipal transport companies. They expect safe, economical, environmentally friendly and above all tried and tested products and services from one source, and are oriented towards the tried and tested: references, which Vossloh can prove for all applications worldwide – from heavy load to urban networks to high-speed lines.
The Vossloh Group is represented by around 80 Group companies in almost 30 countries. With nearly 4,200 employees, the Group generated sales worth €1,209.6 million in 2024. Therof 36 percent, which were achieved outside Europe.

Name: Stadler Valencia
Description:
Stadler Valencia somos un centro tecnológico industrial especializado en el diseño y fabricación de vehículos ferroviarios, con más de 125 años de experiencia. Contamos con más de 2.250 trabajadores dedicados al desarrollo de soluciones de movilidad sostenible eficientes, flexibles y adaptadas a las nuevas necesidades del transporte ferroviario. Somos el centro de competencia del grupo para locomotoras y vehículos ferroviarios para el transporte urbano.

Pertenecemos al grupo Stadler, con sede en Suiza, que cuenta con una plantilla que supera las 14.000 personas repartidas entre sus diferentes plantas de producción e ingeniería y sus más de 80 centros de servicios posventa. La extensa gama de productos incluye sistemas de señalización, trenes de alta velocidad, interurbanos, regionales y de cercanías, metros, tranvías y trenes-tram. También fabricamos locomotoras, coches de pasajeros y somos el fabricante líder mundial de vehículos ferroviarios de cremallera.

Name: Plasser India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Plasser India is a market leader in manufacturing the most technologically advanced machines for track maintenance, track laying and track renewal.
It is a subsidiary of Plasser & Theurer, an Austrian world leader in track maintenance technology.
The India operations started in 1965 and since then Plasser India has been playing an active role in "Make in India" and contributing significantly to India's infrastructure and mobility needs.

Name: voestalpine Railway Systems
Description:
voestalpine Railway Systems is the global market leader for railway infrastructure system solutions, offering top-quality products, logistics and services for rails, turnouts, fastening systems, signaling technology and monitoring applications.

We concentrate on developing smart system solutions for the rail infrastructure of tomorrow.

Founded on 160 years of experience and pioneering technical expertise as well as engineering knowledge, voestalpine Railway Systems’ products and services result in outstanding benefit to customers. That`s what we call “Performance on Track”: the greatest possible availability with the lowest possible life cycle costs. High mobility with maximum innovation and sustainability.

As a full-range supplier for all types of rail traffic (mixed traffic, high-speed routes, urban transport and freight traffic) we offer customized and future-oriented solutions to worldwide customers.

voestalpine Railway Systems operates around 60 production facilities and sales locations on all 6 continents: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/en/locations/ 

We are always looking for the best minds to help us providing maximum performance on track: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/en/company/job-career/

Legal Notice: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/en/legal-notice/

Name: The Greenbrier Companies
Description: The Greenbrier Companies is a leading supplier of rail transportation equipment and services, powering the movement of products around the world. Through wholly-owned subsidiaries and joint ventures, Greenbrier designs, builds and markets freight railcars in North America, Europe and Brazil. We are a leading provider of freight railcar wheel services, parts, maintenance and retrofitting services in North America through our maintenance services business unit. Greenbrier owns a lease fleet of railcars that originate primarily from Greenbrier's manufacturing operations. Greenbrier offers railcar management, regulatory compliance services and leasing services to railroads and other railcar owners in North America. Learn more about Greenbrier at www.gbrx.com.

Name: TDG Transit Design Group Inc
Description:
An industry leader in LED, OLED, and MicroLED main and emergency lighting along with energy storage devices for the interior and exterior of rail vehicles, as well as smart controllers and smart lighting ceilings since 1989.

TDG has facilities in Canada, France, China, India, Poland, the UK and the United States and are the proud developers of several LED innovations within the Rail Industry including Capacitive Storage / Capacitor based emergency lighting system, Hybrid Emergency Energy Storage Systems, and LCUs designed to meet all new APTA / FRA independent emergency power requirements, custom exterior lighting solutions including signature and headlights as well as offering systems with full compliance to EN 13272, GM/RC2531, JIS E4016, and other global lighting standards

We specialize in design and development of LED, MicroLED, & OLED lighting systems as well as firmware based energy storage devices & smart ceiling controls with in-house SMT and full manufacture capabilities worldwide.

Name: Strukton Rail
Description:
Our goal is to make rail transport a competitive option by offering attractive rail solutions. We do so with groundbreaking solutions in the field of rail infrastructure and rolling stock. 

We operate in various countries worldwide from our home countries the Netherlands, Sweden, Denmark, Italy  and Belgium, and our entity countries Australia and the US.

Name: DB Netz AG
Description: Die DB Netz AG ist das Schieneninfrastrukturunternehmen der Deutschen Bahn AG. Mit über 51.000 Mitarbeiter:innen ist sie für das knapp 33.300 Kilometer lange Streckennetz inklusive aller betriebsnotwendigen Anlagen verantwortlich. Pro Tag fahren auf der Infrastruktur der DB Netz AG im Schnitt 50.000 Züge.

Name: Amsted Rail
Description:
Amsted Rail is a globally integrated manufacturer. Railroads, as well as car builders, owners and leasing companies rely on us to provide components and innovative systems for freight cars and locomotives, repair and service, track maintenance, and location and condition monitoring. From the big picture to the finest detail, Amsted Rail is continuously improving the heavy haul landscape.

Industry leaders for more than 100 years, our experience, dedication and efficiency make it possible for railroads to haul heavier loads, over greater distances, with improved reliability and performance. Heavy haulers, the world over, depend on Amsted Rail to perform in the toughest service environments.

Amsted Rail is proud to be a part of Amsted Industries Corporation. A diversified manufacturer of highly engineered industrial components, Amsted Industries is a leader in the railroad, vehicular and construction markets. Privately held with manufacturing facilities in over 10 countries, Amsted Industries employs more than 17,000 people.

Amsted Rail Highlights:

-Largest Freight Car Component Manufacturer in the World
-Industry Leaders in wheels, bearings, side frames & bolsters
-Privately Held & Employee Owned
-Operations on Six Continents

Name: VolkerRail
Description:
Wij zijn VolkerRail: dé spooraannemer van Nederland. Met meer dan 1000 gepassioneerde collega’s werken we dag en nacht, binnen en buiten aan een veilige en duurzame railinfrastructuur.

Om ervoor te zorgen dat reizigers veilig van A naar B kunnen komen bouwen, onderhouden en vernieuwen wij het spoornetwerk. Deze werkzaamheden voeren wij uit door heel het land. Zo werken we van Amsterdam tot Venlo en Hoogeveen. 

Ook werken we aan tram- en metrolijnen, industriespoor, assetmanagement en innovaties. Dit doen we met ons moderne materieel, wat we zelf onderhouden in onze eigen werkplaats in Dordrecht. En daar zijn we best trots op!

Werken bij VolkerRail betekent dat je deel uitmaakt van een hecht familiebedrijf waar vakbekwaamheid, een goede sfeer en ontwikkeling centraal staan. Het is een plek waar we samen elke uitdaging aangaan, waar je mening telt en eigen inbreng wordt gewaardeerd.

VolkerRail is meer dan een werkplek, het is een plek waar je kunt groeien, leren én bijdraagt aan iets dat echt belangrijk is. We zijn toegewijd, innovatief en altijd in beweging, net als de treinen die op het spoor rijden.

Kom werken bij VolkerRail en maak samen met ons het verschil. Wij kijken uit naar jouw komst!

Name: TITAGARH FIREMA S.P.A.
Description:
Titagarh Firema is a large industrial reality in the Italian railway sector.

Since its birth, in the region of the first train in Italy, it has represented the locomotive of modern railway transport, designing and building rolling stock for the whole country.

The historic know-how and international values made Titagarh Firema becoming an example of Made in Italy excellence, research and innovation.

In 2015 Titagarh Group acquired Firema, which is now known as Titagarh Firema SpA (TF).
Since October 2022, the main shareholders of Titagarh Firema SpA include INVITALIA, the National Agency for Investment Attraction and Enterprise Development, a joint stock company owned by the Italian Ministry of Economy and Finance, with the aim of supporting the implementation of the new Business Plan and the company’s growth.

Name: CRRC MA
Description:
CRRC MA, a U.S. rail car manufacturer headquartered in Quincy, Massachusetts, has been awarded transit rail car contracts from Boston’s MBTA, Los Angeles Metro, Philadelphia’s SEPTA. CRRC MA has established two manufacturing facilities in the U.S., including a $95M investment in Springfield, Massachusetts and a $40M investment in Los Angeles, California. 

CRRC MA located the corporation’s North American manufacturing facility in Springfield due to its rich history in manufacturing and the City’s openness to partnership building through education, vocational training and job creation.  As a result of CRRC’s significant investment and growth, CRRC MA’s workforce comprises 320 employees. The manufacturing facility in Springfield employs 258 employees, including 177 union production employees. The Springfield workforce is underway with manufacturing 404 subway trains for the MBTA.  

The commitment to local employment and vocational training of the workforce remains priority.  As a result, all new-hire assemblers participate in a training program for the duration of their qualification process.  Massachusetts is the first state in the U.S. to have a registered Apprenticeship Program in rail car manufacturing.  CRRC MA has partnered with Springfield’s MassHire Hampden County Workforce Board and sheet metal and electrical unions 7 & 63 on the execution of a state approved Registered Apprenticeship program for mechanical production worker training in rail car manufacturing. 

The 1 year program for apprentices seeking careers in rail car manufacturing at CRRC MA Corp is equivalent to 2,000 hours of technical training and is combined with 150 hours of related technical instruction provided by the unions.  

With the return of manufacturing to Springfield, these jobs are career opportunities complete with a competitive wage package.

Name: Geismar Rail Industry Technologies & Services
Description:
For almost a century, teams from Geismar have been bringing their passion and expertise to the development of rail transport. Geismar designs and produces safe and clever solutions for the laying, maintenance and monitoring of railway tracks and overhead lines. #sustainablewaytorail 
As railway industry specialists, we are present all over the world, wherever there are rail networks – and that means conventional, urban and high-speed. We have the technological know-how and industrial base necessary to meet our partners’ specific requirements and to deliver on all of their projects.

Our ambition is to help build the future of railways: the safest, most efficient and sustainable way of transportation.


Depuis un siècle, les équipes Geismar contribuent avec passion et fierté au développement du transport ferroviaire.
Geismar conçoit et produit des solutions pour la pose, la maintenance et le contrôle des voies ferrées et caténaires.
Spécialistes du ferroviaire, nous sommes présents partout dans le monde où il existe des réseaux de transports classiques, urbains et à grande vitesse.
Nous possédons un savoir-faire technologique et une assise industrielle qui nous permettent de répondre à toutes les spécificités de nos partenaires et de mener à bien tous leurs projets.

Notre ambition est de contribuer à la construction du transport ferroviaire de demain : le plus sûr, efficace et respectueux de notre environnement.

Name: Rahee Group
Description:
Rahee Infratech Limited is a leading Railway Engineering Company based in India, operating in the field of Bridge Construction, Metro Rail Construction, Flash Butt Welding of Rails, Rail Turnout Systems and Rail Fastening Systems. Established in 1948, the group has grown over the last 76 years from a manufacturer of Railway track components to turnkey Railway infrastructure provider. 

The group has 9 manufacturing facilities, spread across the Eastern India around Kolkata/Bhubaneswar and Southern India around Hyderabad. In addition, there are several infrastructure projects executed & under execution across India.

Rahee takes up turnkey construction projects including sub structure and super structure work. Having successfully completed over 110+ Major Bridges and 300+ KM of Metro/Mainline Track Construction, Rahee is today one of the leading construction companies in the Railway sector. With a robust order book, Rahee is set to cross a milestone of INR1200 Crore turnover in 2025.

Name: Wabtec Passenger Transit
Description:
Wabtec Passenger Transit designs and manufactures a vast array of pneumatic, electronic and mechanical devices such as braking equipment, controllers, current collectors and couplers for the transit industry worldwide. 

Wabtec provides brake subsystems and related products for locomotives, freight cars and passenger transit vehicles; electronic train-control equipment; new switcher and commuter locomotives; coupling, door control and air conditioning systems for transit vehicles; and heat-exchange equipment for rail, marine, power generation, off-highway and industrial applications.

Name: Union Tank Car Company - UTLX
Description:
Union Tank Car Company (UTLX) is a leading manufacturer, lessor and maintainer of tank cars and other specialized railcars.  

The UTLX corporate headquarters are located in downtown Chicago. Our manufacturing plant is located in Alexandria, Louisiana, and our railcar repair facilities are positioned across the country.

UTLX is part of Marmon Holdings, Inc., a Berkshire Hathaway company. We are an equal opportunity employer. 

Visit utlx.com to learn more.

Name: Pandrol
Description:
Pandrol defines the industry standard across rail fastening systems and aluminothermic welding. We’ve created rail infrastructure in more than 100 countries with our products and services extending to designing, developing and manufacturing equipment to make constructing and maintaining railways more efficient. That means we’ve experienced just about every situation, problem, question and solution before.

At Pandrol we believe in quality above all else – a commitment that stretches from the products we make to the service we provide. We share our global knowledge so our partners can reach objectives quickly and efficiently. We invest as much time in developing our service and relationships as we do developing new solutions.

Name: Kinet Railway Solutions
Description:
Kinet Railway Solutions is an Indian manufacturer of electric passenger trains. The company was established to actively participate in the Vande Bharat project. Following an international tender, Kinet was selected to manufacture and maintain the Vande Bharat trains.

• 120 sleeper trainsets (1,920 cars)
• 35 years of maintenance

Our modernized factory in Latur, Maharashtra, and three maintenance depots in Delhi, Jodhpur, and Bengaluru serve as hubs of innovation and employment. Kinet's operations will create significant employment opportunities, drive socio-economic development, and stimulate ancillary industries across the country.

Name: Colas Rail Maroc
Description: En s'associant au projet de développement économique du Maroc, Colas Rail est devenu le partenaire des nouveaux projets d’infrastructures. Le gouvernement marocain a reconnu le savoir faire de Colas Rail en lui confiant la construction des tramways de Rabat et de Casablanca puis la réalisation de la première ligne à grande vitesse marocaine, sur 185 km entre Tanger et Kenitra.

Name: PROSE
Description:
We offer independent engineering and consulting services
with unique expertise in railway technology.

All our experts are solution enablers – our expertise lies in the development, optimisation, and operation of rolling stock. We want to take part in shaping the future with safe, sustainable, and comfortable transport systems and rail vehicles. We speak the language of railway technology and make sure to deliver you customised solutions. In brief, we meet your needs.

Let us shape tomorrow’s mobility!

Name: MERMEC STE
Description:
MERMEC STE is an international provider of signal solutions and technologies devoted to the safety, control and enhancement of railway infrastructure. MERMEC STE, headquartered in Genova, Italy, has served the railway industry as a leading provider of signal technologies, telecom networks and transport and energy systems for almost a century becoming one of the most complete, multidisciplinary, and innovative suppliers in the railway industry. 
The company designs, manufactures, sells, and services advanced signal systems and products. MERMEC STE’s modern solutions are important to the future of rail operations, and include state-of-the-art technologies, such as Multi-station Computer Based Interlocking, Centralized Traffic Control, Radio Block Centre, and Automatic Train Protection systems. In addition to systems, the company design and deploy Telecommunication Networks, Catenary System, Electrical Substation MV/HV, Power Supply Photovoltaic Systems, SCADA and Industrial Automation Solutions, Tunnel Safety Systems, Information to Passengers, CCTV and Intrusion Detection System 
MERMEC STE has been involved in the construction of all the Italian High Speed/High Capacity railway sections: Rome-Naples, Milan-Bologna, Turin-Novara-Milan, Bologna-Florence and Treviglio-Brescia. The company is currently involved in the completion of the new Milan-Genoa and Brescia-Verona-Vicenza sections, as well as in various rail modernization projects throughout Italy.

Name: Colas Rail Egypt كولاس ريل مصر
Description:
Colas Rail is the leading company in the French market for railway construction and maintenance.It is also a European and International leader in the design, construction and maintenance of rail and guided-transport infrastructure.
We play an active role in developing projects in the following areas: Permanent Way (slab track and ballasted), Electrification (sub-stations, overhead lines), Signalling, Control, Communications, Electrical and Power systems. 
This allows for the perfect integration of a complex transport system. Our areas of competence cover all types of rail transport, from tramways to high-speed lines

Name: TCDD Teknik Mühendislik ve Müşavirlik A.Ş.
Description: TCDD Teknik; %100 kamu sermayesi yöneten bir mühendislik şirketidir. 2017 yılında TCDD İşletmesi Genel Müdürlüğü, TÜRKSAT A.Ş. ve Ankara Büyükşehir Belediyesi’nin bir iştiraki olarak kurulmuştur: Mühendislik, müşavirlik, teknoloji, sinyalizasyon, enerji, sertifikasyon ve ölçüm alanlarında aktif faaliyet göstermektedir.

Name: Akiem
Description:
Akiem is one of the leading European providers of services to rail operators, manufacturers, and local authorities. The company offers a fleet of over 760 locomotives and 42 passenger vehicles, as well as solutions covering the entire rolling stock value chain. Akiem has more than 100 customers and operates in 22 European countries. The majority of its 450 employees are based in France, Germany, Poland, Sweden, Italy, Hungary, and the United Kingdom.

Akiem has a complete industrial ecosystem, certified ECM (Entity in Charge of Maintenance), which relies on a pan-European network of workshops and significant inventories of spare parts for the maintenance of the rolling stock supplied to its customers.

Akiem is owned by La Caisse (formerly CDPQ, Caisse de Dépôt et Placement du Québec), a global investment group strongly committed to the development of low-carbon infrastructure.

Name: SPII S.p.A.
Description:
Whereverwecan.
With its expertise in engineering and design SPII is able to solve the challenges of developing custom electrics for rolling stock subsystems. 
Whereverwecan.
We can offer our customers support in refurbishing and revamping both electronic and electro-mechanical subsystems and also for complete rail vehicles with certified HW and SW for diagnostic and control systems.
Whereverwecan.
The precise assessment of each and every need, the ability to work “to measure”, the consistent answer in terms of innovation and quality: this is what we offer every day at SPII, with solutions that have made us leaders in our sectors. 
Whereverwecan.
Solutions that clearly demonstrate our technological know-how.
Whereverwecan.

Name: Dellner - Train Connection Systems
Description:
Dellner is one of the world’s leading suppliers of Train Connection Systems, with 84 years of experience in the rail industry. Based in Falun, Sweden, with 17 subsidiaries around the world and more than 1200 employees globally, Dellner continues with its steady, robust growth in couplers, gangways, front hatches, dampers and crash energy management, as well as the service segment of the rail industry. 

Founded in 1941, we have years of tested, proven experience in producing safe and reliable train connections, and providing innovative, state-of-the-art and cutting-edge products for our customers.

Name: ROBEL
Description:
For more than 100 years ROBEL has been producing technologically exigent solutions for rail construction. Based in Freilassing, Bavaria the company delivers custom-made machines, systems and services for the construction and maintenance of track infrastructure facilities to 70 countries worldwide.  

In addition to a wide range of hand guided machines and equipment the ROBEL portfolio includes multifunctional track vehicles as well as mobile maintenance and loading systems for more security and effectivity on track.

All production processes, carried out in-house by a total of 600 employees, are EN ISO 9001 certified.

Extensive customer service – from inspection, repairs and modification over spare part management up to revisions and re-certifications – accompanies each ROBEL machine over the full product life. 

ROBEL. Great on Track.

Please contact us and learn more about our solutions for track construction and maintenance.

IMPRINT: https://www.robel.com/en/imprint-and-general-terms-of-business/

Name: m2 railgroup
Description:
m2 was formally established on 30 January 2004, and started business operations on 1 June 2004. We operate in the railway infrastructure maintenance sector, and our clientele consists exclusively of railway companies and the railway itself (Rete Ferroviaria Italiana SpA). 

The company’s legal and administrative headquarters is located in La Valle, within the Province of Bolzano. Our service company was the first one in Italy to offer protection of railway worksites through automated worksite security systems. We operate throughout the country, providing protection for railway worksites, and have succeeded in becoming the leading company within the sector at the national level.

After the first few years, having acquired so much experience in the field, m2 noticed that there was a great need for human resources in the railway and railway-equipment maintenance sector. As a result, m2 began to diversify its serviced, offering shipping companies their own technicians for the maintenance, repair, calibration and operation of machinery for railway maintenance. This sector has opened up various opportunities to m2 throughout Europe and the world. This was how a second area of business was born for m2: Technology. 

Our philosophy is also to try and stay cutting edge. Innovation is critical, and has now become the obligation of every business, whether railway or otherwise. Our group is thus always looking for new opportunities.

Name: JOSEF MEYER RAIL AG
Description:
Die JOSEF MEYER Rail AG, kurz JMR, ist in den Bereichen Instandhaltung von Güterwagen und Produktion von Schweisserzeugnissen an ihrem Standort in Rheinfelden tätig. 

Die Geschichte von JMR geht auf die Tradition der Josef Meyer Eisenbau Luzern zurück, im Jahr 1943 wurde eine Zweigniederlassung in Rheinfelden gegründet. Aus einem Unternehmen spezialisiert auf allgemeine Schlosserarbeiten und Fertigung von stationären Tanks für die Lagerung von Heizöl. 

Kurze Zeit nach der Gründung kamen die ersten Aufträge zur Instandhaltung von Güterwagen, bereits 1946 wurde der Entscheid zur Neuproduktion von Kesselwagen in Rheinfelden getroffen. Mit der Zeit spezialisierte sich das Werk ausschliesslich auf die Fabrikation von Güterwagen und Schweissbaugruppen. 

In den 90er Jahren, als die Liberalisierung im Eisenbahnbereich durchgriff, konnte mit der Instandhaltung von Schienenfahrzeugen ein weiteres Geschäftsfeld aufgebaut werden, welches nach dem Rückzug aus dem Neubau von Güterwagen im Jahr 2010 zum grössten Standbein der JOSEF MEYER Rail AG entwickelte. 

Die langjährige Erfahrung und das fundierte Fachwissen der engagierten Mitarbeitenden ermöglichten dem Unternehmen sich zu dem zuverlässige Partner für die Instandhaltung und Modernisierung von Schienenfahrzeugen wie auch der Fabrikation von anspruchsvollen Schweissbaugruppen zu werden. Neben den Einsätzen am Standort in Rheinfelden können kleinere Reparaturen und Begutachtungen Schweizweit durch die Mobile Equipen durchgeführt werden.

Name: Weichenwerk Wörth GmbH
Description:
Die Weichenwerk Wörth GmbH (WWG) ist ein im Jahr 2000 gegründetes Gemeinschaftsunternehmen der voestalpine Turnout Technology GmbH und der ÖBB Infrastruktur AG. Die voestalpine Turnout Technology Zeltweg GmbH, eine Tochtergesellschaft der voestalpine Railway Systems Gruppe, ist führender Systempartner im Weichenbereich. Ergänzt durch die Erfahrung der ÖBB agiert die WWG als Kompetenzzentrum, spezialisiert auf die Fertigung von Weichen, Komponenten, Isolierstößen und Produkten des Bahnoberbaus.

Als  Kompentenzzentrum sind wir spezialisiert in der Fertigung von Weichen, Komponenten, Isolierstößen und Produkten des Bahnoberbaus. In den letzten Jahren wurde das vorhandene Know How um Aktivitäten im Dienstleistungsbereich erweitert, hier ist die WWG Marktführer bei Weichenlogistikleistungen in Europa. Die Vorteile für die Kunden liegen in höherer Einbauqualität sowie kürzeren Streckensperren und damit verbundener höherer Gleisverfügbarkeit.

Die WWG zeichnet sich durch verantwortungsbewusstes Handeln in den Bereichen Qualität, Arbeitssicherheit, Umwelt sowie Familie & Beruf aus.

Name: Fabricated Metals
Description:
Established in 1955, Fabricated Metals is the trusted provider of OEM & custom metal fabrication solutions for the major railroad, communication, transit, data center, telecom and power industries. We specialize in, but are not limited to custom manufactured steel buildings and enclosures, junction boxes, battery cabinets, junciton boxes and steel foundations.

We have the facilities and capabilities to provide high production fabrication of any kind utilizing a variety of metals. We provide full service from engineering, to fabrication, and integration for our customers and quality is always our top priority. Fabricated Metals continues to push forward with quality and process improvements to further strengthen our commitment to superior product quality, our customers, and our position in the marketplace.

Name: Rail 1435 BV
Description:
Rail 1435 richt haar dienstverlening op projecten en ondersteuning in de railsector.

Deze dienstverlening bestaat uit:
- het integraal managen van engineering projecten/processen.
- het leveren van bouw(proces)begeleiding en coördineren van integrale uitvoeringsprojecten.
- het leveren van advies en ondersteuning in de Rail infra met specialisatie voor Baan & Spoor en Civiele constructies.

Daarnaast richt Rail 1435 zich op het ontwikkelen en uitwerken van innovaties in de Railsector. Denk hierbij aan handige tools om het proces te verbeteren of te optimaliseren.

Name: Amsted Canada
Description: Amsted Canada is an integral part of supporting our diverse, global manufacturing operations that produces industrial components.

Name: Aquitaine Rail
Description: AQUITAINE RAIL est une filiale du Groupe CASSOUS, acteur de premier plan régional en Nouvelle Aquitaine. Et, l’entreprise est spécialisée dans la construction et la maintenance d’installations ferroviaires fixes sur les réseaux ferrés nationaux ainsi que sur les embranchements industriels.

Name: Evertrak
Description:
Founded by US veterans, Evertrak is a leading innovator in sustainable railway solutions. We manufacture the Evertrak7000, a Glass Fiber Reinforced Composite railroad tie that outperforms traditional wood ties in strength, durability, and environmental impact.

Wood rots in years, but Evertrak lasts decades. As the only AAR M-1003 supplier of composite ties, we're trusted by Class 1 railroads with over 100,000 installations. Our mission is to transform plastic recycling and evolve centuries-old railway practices, replacing millions of creosote-soaked wood ties with our eco-friendly alternatives.

Evertrak is committed to:
- Environmental Stewardship: Sequestering tons of plastic and preventing deforestation
- Innovation: Providing sustainable ties that last decades without the hazards of creosote or CO2 emissions
- Community Support: Fostering dignity through the creation of living wage jobs

We're changing the future of railway infrastructure one composite tie at a time. 

For more information, visit Evertrak.com.

Name: SepsaMedha North America
Description:
SepsaMedha NA is the North American arm of Medha, a global leader in advanced railway technology and onboard electrical systems. Based in Ballston Spa, New York, we provide innovative solutions and comprehensive support to major railcar manufacturers, transit agencies, and operators across the United States and Canada.

What We Do

We specialize in the design, supply, and lifecycle support of key onboard systems including Auxiliary Power Supplies (APS), Battery Chargers, Vehicle Control Electronics, Driver Desks, and Passenger Information Systems. Our solutions are engineered for high performance, safety, and reliability in even the most demanding transit environments.

Local Presence, Global Expertise

SepsaMedha NA combines the strength of a global engineering with local manufacturing and responsive service. Our U.S.-based operations encompass project management, assembly, testing, field service, and aftermarket support, ensuring fast, dependable solutions tailored to our customers' needs. SepsaMedha NA also operates an aftermarket and repair center in Oceanside, New York.

Name: Infranord Norge AS
Description: Vi bygger fremtidens spor

Name: SDEL Transport en Commun
Description:
SDEL Transport en Commun est un établissement secondaire de SDEL INFI, société de VINCI Energies.

SDEL Transport en Commun est spécialisée dans la conception-réalisation de systèmes électriques basse tension et très basse tension en environnement ferroviaire.

Name: Franz Kaminski Waggonbau GmbH
Description:
Franz Kaminski Waggonbau GmbH is a railroad manufacture company based out of Germany.

Legal Notice: https://www.kaminski-hameln.de/impressum

Name: Itärata Oy
Description:
Itärata yhdistää Porvoon pääkaupunkiseutuun sekä tuo nykyistä suoremmat ja nopeammat raideyhteydet Kouvolan, Joensuun ja Kuopioon kautta koko Itä-Suomeen. Radan vaikutusalueella asuu 2 miljoonaa suomalaista seitsemässä maakunnassa.

Toimivat raideyhteydet itäiseen Suomeen vahvistavat elinkeinoelämää, asukkaiden liikkumista, turvallisuutta ja ympäristötavoitteiden toteutumista. Siksi Itärata on Tolkun rata.

East Railway (Itärata in Finnish) connects the city of Porvoo with the Helsinki metropolitan region and provides faster and more direct railway connections towards the East of Finland via Kouvola, Joensuu and Kuopio. More than 2 million Finns – over a third of the country’s entire population – live in East Railway’s area of influence.

Well-functioning rail connections are vital for maintaining and improving the business, liveability, safety, and environmental capabilities in the East of Finland.

The aim for East Railway is to enhance Finland’s connectedness within the European system of rail, air and maritime logistics. Additionally, improved logistics can be beneficial for safety and supply security aspects.

Name: GIAD Engineering Co. Ltd
Description: GIAD Engineering Co. Ltd. (GEC) is the newest member of GIAD Industrial Group (GIG), which is the biggest industrial group in Sudan and one of the biggest Industrial establishments in the African sub-Saharan region. The company works in the field of manufacturing Infrastructure Project’s equipment includes heavy machinery, Railways wagons, Earth moving equipment, and compact water treatment plants.

Name: Rautatieto Oy
Description:
Rautatieto Oy tarjoaa rautateiden turvalaite- sekä liikenteenohjausjärjestelmien johtavia asiantuntija-, toteutus- ja kunnossapitopalveluita sekä tietotaitoa liikkuvan kaluston ja radan yhteentoimivuuteen, rautateiden RFID-sovelluksiin ja rautatiesektorin turvallisuusjohtamisen prosesseihin. Rautatieto Oy:llä on myös mittava kokemus kiinteiden ja mobiiliverkkojen tietoliikennerakentamisessa aina suunnittelusta projektinjohtoon ja asennuksiin.

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

Rautatieto Oy provides market-leading expertise, implementation and maintenance services for railway control and signalling systems as well as know-how for wayside train monitoring systems (WTMS), RFID in rail and for railway safety management processes. Rautatieto Oy also has wide experience on both fixed and mobile networks covering design, project management and  construction.

Name: Compass Engenharia e Consultoria
Description:
A Compass Engenharia e Consultoria é uma empresa especializada do setor, atuante nos mais diversos seguimentos do mundo ferroviário. Somos a representante EXCLUSIVA da Electrans (Electrosistemas Bach S.A.) no Brasil, fundada em Barcelona em 1977, se dedica à indústria da sinalização ferroviária, alcançou com suas soluções reconhecimento mundial em sistemas de proteção de passagens de nível, sinalização ferroviária e de VLT, sistemas de detecção e sinais luminosos LED. 

A Electrans destaca-se por desenvolver uma linha de produtos própria, estando sempre na vanguarda tecnológica, sustentando a sua vantagem competitiva na capacidade de resposta às necessidades de cada cliente. O resultado, mais de 10.000 equipamentos em serviço hoje, sendo referência na indústria de sinalização como fabricante global de sistemas.

Name: Insys Digital Systems
Description:
Insys Digital Systems Pvt Ltd, part of The Insys Group (est. 1985), was established in 2014 to meet the dynamic and growing needs of the Railway Safety Signalling sector.
We specialize in the design and development of mission-critical safety systems, with proven expertise in SSDAC and HASSDAC. Our product roadmap includes advanced solutions such as MSDAC, FNMUX, RDPMS, VDU, and Electronic Interlocking (EI) systems—driving innovation in rail infrastructure.

Headquartered in Bengaluru, we operate from a 10,000 sq. ft. facility, with a cutting-edge 25,000 sq. ft. manufacturing unit underway at the KIADB Aerospace SEZ, reinforcing our commitment to world-class quality and scale.

Name: Racine Railroad Products UK
Description: Racine Railroad Products is a railroad manufacturing company located in Mount Pleasant, WI. We specialize in Maintenance-of-Way equipment. We have been designing, manufacturing and servicing quality Maintenance-of-Way equipment for the railroad industry since 1970. Commitment to our customers is our top priority. This means designing and manufacturing equipment with a heavy emphasis on safety, performance and reliability.

Name: TOYKA Elektromekanik Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Başlıca faaliyetleri, Termodinamik ve Hidrodinamik ünite tasarım, imalat ve anahtar teslimi kurulumudur. Başlıca faaliyet alanlarımız, Demiryolu atölye bakım ekipmanları, Buz çözme ve önleme sisitemleri, Kurutma tesisleri, Endüstriyel tesislerin tasarım ve kurulumu, Özel Mekanik tesisatlar, Enerji tesisleri, Çevre ve geri kazanım sistemleri otomasyon ve yazılım ile anahtar teslimi sistemlerdir.

Firmamızın rakiplerine göre en büyük farkı kalite politikasıdır. Firmamız kurmuş olduğu tesisler veya ünitelerin, çalıştığı sürece her türlü servis gereksinimlerini ve bakımlarını yakından takip ederek problemsiz ve yüksek verimde çalışmasını sağlamak için elinden geleni yapmaktadır.

Tüm bunlara ilave olarak müşterilerin ihtiyaçlarına göre çözümler üreten firmamız aynı zamanda Araştırma ve Geliştirme (AR-GE)’ye  önem vermekte olup, tasarım ekibi ile yeni teknolojileri yakından takip etmekte, genç ve dinamik kadrosu ile sürekli kendini geliştirmeye ve yenilemeye çalışmaktadır.

Müşterilerimizin ürünlerimizden beklentilerini karşılaması ve “kalite” imajının sürekli olarak sağlanması firmamızın ana hedeflerindendir.

Kalite anlayışımızın, diğer bir açısı iş sağlığı ve güvenliği olup, bunun için her türlü çalışma yapılmaktadır.

Firmamız İSO 9001-2015 (Kalite Yönetim Sistemi), İSO 14001-2015 / İSO 45001 – 2018 (Çevre Yönetim Sistemi) belgelerine sahiptir.

Name: HeiterBlick GmbH
Description:
HeiterBlick ist ein Spezialanbieter für kundenindividuell gestaltete Stadt- und Straßenbahnen. Unser Anspruch ist: innovatives Design, das Funktion mit Eleganz und höchsten Qualitätsansprüchen vereint. Unsere Fahrzeuge beruhen auf der bewährten und robusten Drehgestelltechnik, die auch mit sehr anspruchsvollen Strecken und Schienen zurechtkommt. Für den Betreiber heißt das, geringer Instandhaltungsaufwand und kostengünstiger Betrieb. Für den Fahrgast heißt das, höchster Fahrkomfort und überzeugendes Design.

Wir sind ein mittelständisches Unternehmen in Familienbesitz. Das bringt viele Vorteile. Langfristiges Denken, kurze Reaktionszeiten und effiziente Prozesse sind nur drei davon. Gegründet wurde HeiterBlick vor 100 Jahren im gleichnamigen Leipziger Stadtteil als Hauptwerkstatt der Verkehrsbetriebe. Auch heute noch ist der Firmensitz in Leipzig.

Name: Nexus Rail Engineering
Description:
Welkom bij Nexus Rail Engineering B.V.!

Treinbeveiligers van de toekomst! Dat is waar wij met Nexus Rail voor staan. Veilig onderweg en zorgen dat de veiligheid rondom het spoor in optimale staat blijft is onze expertise. Dit doen we door te adviseren, ontwerpen, testen en indienststellen. Check, check, dubbelcheck voor een spoor dat jou veilig van A naar B brengt.

Name: Cherokee Truck Equipment | A Division of ML Utilities
Description:
Cherokee Truck Equipment is your source for truck & utility vehicle equipment, parts service & more. Our Top Quality product offering includes everything from aerial man lifts,  buckets trucks, contractor vans,  garbage/refuse collection equipment, hi-rail gear ( for railroad applications), lift gates, lube bodies, salt spreaders, snow plows, street sweepers, truck mounted cranes (Telescoping & Articulating)  utility/service bodies, & plenty  more. 

Proudly part of the ML Utilities family, we've been a cornerstone in the truck equipment industry for over four decades. With two locations in Chattanooga, TN, we bring top-notch service and upfitting to the Southeast and beyond. Explore our offerings on our e-commerce platforms on eBay and Amazon, where quality meets convenience. Your journey to superior truck equipment starts here.

Name: Dahlrail
Description:
In all markets, Dahlrail is dedicated to helping partners and customers succeed by maintaining close relationships with all railway stakeholders. In order to close the value circle, Dahlrail offers top-tier local services and support to ensure that trains experience as little operational downtime as possible.

With more than 100 years of experience in the railway sector, Dahlrail brings hands-on experience focused on ensuring guaranteed operation of your rolling stock equipment in our markets.

Dahlrail’s robust railway industry network in Netherlands, Norway and Sweden provides the undergirding necessary to properly position our partners in their respective railway markets, resulting in maximised chances for success. We understand that delivery of the railway part or component is just the beginning of our relationship with our customers. In order to guarantee smooth and efficient operations over the lifetime of a rolling stock product, we cover ongoing service and support of the highest quality.

Name: Standard Steel, LLC
Description:
Standard Steel is a leading manufacturer of forged steel wheels and axles for freight railcars, locomotives and passenger railcars. It is the only producer of forged steel wheels for railcars and locomotives in North America.

Customers include major Class I railroads in North America, freight railcar builders, railcar and locomotive maintenance shops, the Amtrak national railroad, locomotive builders and regional transit authorities.

Standard Steel, LLC, and its affiliated companies were purchased by Sumitomo Metal Industries, Ltd. and Sumitomo Corporation in 2011, but the existing facility has been producing forgings since 1795. In 2012, Sumitomo Metal Industries, Ltd. merged with Nippon Steel Corporation to become Nippon Steel & Sumitomo Metal Corporation, the majority owner of Standard Steel.

Name: SAMAX Rail BV
Description:
Samax Rail is een jong en dynamisch bedrijf dat zich richt op het begeleiden en uitvoeren van kraan- en railgebonden projecten. Door onze contacten met gecertificeerde bedrijven in de kraanbaan branche kunnen wij u in alle fases van uw railprojecten ontzorgen en zorgdragen voor een vlekkeloze klus.

Wij zijn in alle disciplines thuis. Of het nu op een container kraan, bij container terminals, overslagbedrijf, distributie centrum, betonfabriek of scheepswerf is, de ervaring en kennis is aanwezig!

Name: ACS Railroad Solutions
Description:
Innovation Award Winner for Ground-breaking Idle Reduction Technology: Norfolk Southern's 2024 Thoroughbred Sustainability Partner Awards

Whether you’re a Class I, Regional or Shortline Railroad, you face an array of challenges in this hyper-competitive environment for freight transport. 

Getting the shipment from point A to point B as quickly and safely as possible is always the goal, but you’re under the gun to do more with less. Technology from ACS Railroad Solutions can help you navigate complexity and give you a competitive edge. 

Our product and service offering can directly impact many of the key value drivers for your railroad.

Our associate network is comprised of numerous life-time railroaders, totaling over 350 years of cumulative experience making trains run on time. 

Many of them are eRailSafe Badge certified, so you can be confident when we are on site, our associates are performing their roles safely and securely. We also have multiple associates that are members of the Locomotive Maintenance Officers Association (LMOA) serving on committees and in executive roles, making sure we are at the forefront of technology that reduces maintenance costs, improves locomotive productivity and drives sustainability initiatives.

Name: Scandinavian Track Group
Description:
STG (Scandinavian Track Group) är en ledande järnvägsentreprenör som berör järnvägsnätet i Skandinavien.
Vi rustar järnvägen för framtiden och skapar förutsättningar för en bra och hållbar samhällsutveckling.
Naturligtvis finns vi nära de som äger eller driver järnvägs- och spåranläggningarna.
Vi erbjuder underhåll, byggnation och konsulttjänster i form av lika utförandeentreprenader eller uthyrning av personal och maskiner.

Name: Grinsty Rail Limited
Description:
Here at Grinsty Rail we have over 50 years’ experience in the transportation industry with a very modest customer base. The company makes retrofit kits, provides an integration and retrofit service that enables the use of clean burning and renewable energy as the propulsion replacing polluting and expensive diesel fuel. This allows for a rapid and complete transition of the railway sector to renewable energy. Right now DIGAS serves locomotive operators with a pressing need to decarbonize their operations with hydrogen.

The company has deployed the first in the EU certified retrofitted diesel locomotives on gaseous fuel bringing the retrofit technology to the state of regulatory approved, widely available and practical solution for locomotive operators to comply with the stringent emission and CO2 footprint standards. For that DIGAS has received the special prize from Europe's Rail Joint Undertaking for Rail within the European Startup Prize for Mobility 2022.

Description:
Wabtec is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services. Whether it's freight rail, transit, mining, industrial, or marine, our expertise, technologies, and people - together - are accelerating the future of transportation. 

The Beena Vision range of vision-based wayside non-contact measurement and inspection technologies enable the automated, proactive monitoring of rolling stock condition, providing data feeds that can be processed to effectively assess rolling stock condition from component level to full train inspection. 

Using this comprehensive portfolio of on-board and wayside condition monitoring solutions, rail companies can improve operational efficiencies, increase safety, manage service levels and reduce costs. Name: Universal Signalling
Description:
Signalling. Simplified.

Universal Signalling is developing the next generation of digital signalling. We are a disruptive start-up, new to the Railway Industry in 2022 but with technology under development since 2018.

Our lab-demonstrated Universal Interlocking system is made of low-cost COTS components, which form modular, extensible and pre-assured building blocks containing all the rules of the route. Our digital signalling solution is robust, resilient and flexible, but most importantly it is rapid and low-cost to deploy. 
Our architecture shortcuts years - sometimes decades - of costly design, installation, testing and assurance activity. This means that as soon as the track is laid, trains can run and people can be kept safe. 

We are working towards our first two full-scale demonstrators at two UK test tracks, targeting light and heavy rail, with demonstration days to take place in 2024. If you would like to see how we have achieved the benefits above - follow this page, or register for a demo day spot on our website.

Name: Orgo-Thermit, Inc.
Description:
Orgo-Thermit, Inc. is part of the Goldschmidt Group. 

Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.

Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.

Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.

The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.

We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.

By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.

Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.

Name: Continental Railworks
Description:
Founded in 1997, Continental Railworks has become an industry leader in the manufacture and installation of highway-railway (hi-rail) conversion units, which permit normal road-going maintenance vehicles to travel on railway track.

Continental Railworks is located in Montreal, Canada, and is associated with an extensive network of hi-rail installation and maintenance companies throughout North America. Offering a full line of hi-rail equipment solutions, Continental has a model to fit anything from a full-size pickup to a heavy range of maintenance vehicles.

Continental also provides railway maintenance vehicle assembly, including bodies, cranes, hi-rail, hydraulics, lighting and electrical systems.

Our customers range from Class I Railroads to mining companies in Northern Canada to small construction or maintenance companies that have hi-rail needs.

Continental’s hi-rail products are renowned for their reliability, simplicity to deploy, ease of installation, light-weight and quick turnaround time in terms of service and parts. We are nimble and our team of engineers can design a product specific to your needs.

Name: Rhomberg Sersa North America
Description:
In 2011, Sersa Group purchased a small regional track maintenance company in Eastern Canada - Total Track. In 2014 Rhomberg and Sersa joined forces to become the international market-leading rail engineering and services Rhomberg Sersa Rail Group.

Over the last years, building on the Sersa investment, the Canadian operations made key strategic additions to the existing rail machine fleet, purchasing the first privately owned Plasser RM80 Ballast Cleaner in Canada and bringing the first Moesur specialized urban Grail grinders. These machines have shown dynamic market growth and penetration through the development of our dedicated operators and maintainers. In 2018, we commenced the first on-track rail milling machine in North America through our partnership with Linsinger.

In 2021 we acquired Balfour Beatty - Track Solutions business in the US and established our presence and operations in North America. The acquisition solidified RSNA as the leading provider of Production Ballast Cleaning services and track inspection products and services in Canada and the US.

Our service areas include Urban rail construction, Urban rail maintenance including rail grinding & milling, specialized machine maintenance and refurbishment, specialized track products, and high-production rail-bound track maintenance and material handling machines. 

Rhomberg Sersa North America has partnered with Remcan Projects, a leader in the provision of rail construction and maintenance services to develop a unique value proposition. Together we are redefining the end-to-end planning and delivery of track construction and maintenance work packages to Passenger and Freight Client railways, which is innovative and holistic in its approach which lowers risk, optimizes processes and delivery for improved quality, and delivers cost savings to our customers.

We are driven to deliver a better overall outcome for our Clients!

Name: Digital Railway Solutions (DRS) Alliance
Description:
SIMPLY EFFECTIVE INFRASTRUCTURE SOLUTIONS
The Digital Railway Solutions Alliance is a novel alliance of leading European railway track technology pioneers offering an open innovation ecosystem to increase the safety, efficiency and capacity of the world’s railway networks. It brings together best-in-class, technology driven companies, each with a determined focus on optimising railway networks utilising the latest advances in digital innovation, automatisation and data processing.

We create sustainable, cost-effective, convenient end-to-end solutions to increase safety, efficiency and capacity by:
   o	Leveraging digital innovation
   o	Combining the domain knowledge of all partners
   o	Creating overarching synergies for global partners and clients
   o	Optimising infrastructure through interconnectivity, predictive maintenance, downtime reduction & increased safety
   o	Fostering strong institutional relationships to benefit all partners and stakeholders

HOW IT STARTED
   o	In October 2021, DRS convened select providers of highly innovative services and products to address the #1 priority of the rail infrastructure industry: radically increased safety, efficiency and capacity. 
   o	Over two days, participants identified key issues to solve, created a shared vision and how to collaborate in form of a new alliance to drive digital, end-to-end solutions: the DRS Alliance. 
   o	From Nov 2021 to May 2022, in a series of deep-dive meetings, details of the new alliance were shaped.
   o	In May 2022, at the iaf expo, the first phase of DRS Alliance launched with 15 core companies actively involved.
   o We are now working to expand the DRS Alliance to an innovation platform driving seamless next-generation infrastructure solutions.
   o	Phase two will focus on strengthening end-to-end solutions for critical railway infrastructure in Europe.
   o	Starting in 2023, the DRS Alliance aims to reshape the future of rail mobility across the globe.

Name: Asociación Mexicana de Manufactura de Moldes y Troqueles
Description:
Los miembros fundadores de la Asociación Mexicana de Manufactura de Moldes y Troqueles en el verdadero interés de contribuir con el crecimiento de este segmento, aunado a la oportunidad de negocios que esto representa, estamos convencidos de haber llevado esta iniciativa privada a una realidad que permita contribuir en engranar los talentos productivos, creativos y humanos para conseguir una manufactura de mayor contenido local en México. Complementar capacidades y dar soluciones integrales en la producción de Moldes y Troqueles.

La constitución oficial de nuestra Asociación es el inicio de la labor entre empresarios para contribuir al crecimiento de este segmento de manufactura. Su presencia y participación suman de manera extraordinaria la relevancia de este evento tomando trascendencia en el estado de Querétaro por empresas de reconocimiento internacional.

Por iniciativa del presidente de Single Source Technologies, Eduardo Medrano, junto con varios fabricantes de moldes y troqueles, el pasado mes de octubre del 2014 se creó la Asociación Mexicana de Moldes  y Troqueles con el fin de apoyar a los fabricantes de moldes, además de promover el sector de producción local debido al gran mercado potencial que existe en México.

La AMMMT tiene sede en Santiago de Querétaro y entre sus planes de desarrollo están los programas de transferencia de tecnología con otros países, el desarrollo de clústeres y la ampliación del mercado de producción local de moldes.

Name: Vogel & Plötscher GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Vogel & Plötscher ist ein mittelständisches Unternehmen in Süddeutschland.

Unsere Geschichte:

Das Unternehmen wurde als Rudolf Vogel Feinmechanik gegründet und begann mit der Herstellung einfacher Messgeräte für den Gleisbau. Mit der Zeit wurde das Angebot durch multifunktionale Messsysteme erweitert, und Klaus Plötscher trat 1977 als Gesellschafter ein. Das Unternehmen wurde in die Vogel & Plötscher GmbH umfirmiert und hat sich durch die Entwicklung digitaler Inspektionssysteme, wie dem MessReg, einen Namen gemacht.
In den 1980er Jahren begann die Softwareentwicklung, die 2000 mit dem Aufbau einer eigenen Softwareabteilung weiter ausgebaut wurde. Seit 2003 erfolgt die Elektronikentwicklung im Haus, was eine flexible und kundenspezifische Produktion ermöglicht. Aufgrund des Wachstums wurde ein neuer Firmensitz in Breisach gebaut.
Das Unternehmen diversifizierte sich in die Entwicklung und Produktion elektrischer Traktionsantriebe, insbesondere in Axial-Fluss-Technologie, und wurde Mitglied der ROBEL Gruppe, die Anteile erwarb, aber Vogel & Plötscher weiterhin eigenständig agiert. Nach einer Insolvenz im Bereich der Statorenproduktion wurde diese übernommen, um die Versorgungssicherheit zu gewährleisten. Insgesamt hat sich das Unternehmen kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt, von präziser Messtechnik bis hin zu innovativen Antriebslösungen.

Sie benötigen ein Messgerät oder erste Informationen darüber ? Dann kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute über unsere Website. Den Link dazu finden Sie weiter unten.
