Description:
Our staff at Donfabs & Consillia, are experienced rail industry, engineering, emergency services and defense sector professionals. Our equipment is in use worldwide. 

We provide a bespoke service, researching, developing, testing and supplying equipment to meet with customer requirements and specifications worldwide. This is backed up by a support and servicing network.

From our facility in Shardlow, we design, manufacture and test our own equipment to the highest standards, always using the latest proven technology. Longevity and reliability are an important aspect of everything we develop. 

Our range of equipment includes: Track geometry, distance measuring, motorised rail trolleys, push trolleys, rail rescue trolleys, multi-functional trolleys, emergency services equipment, rail skates and ride comfort data gathering.

Emergency Response Vehicles (ERV’s) designed and manufactured by emergency responders and staff at DCL were deployed following the tragic events of 7th July 2005. They were deployed in both the response and recovery phases.

The 7/7 Review published: ‘The trolleys provided by the RART project for travelling along tube lines, worked extremely well at Russell Sq. Intended for single journeys, the trolleys were used to ferry staff and equipment for 39 consecutive hours, covering a distance of around 280 miles.’   

The ERV has been superseded by a more versatile, technologically advanced and flexible platform, which can be tailored to meet the changing needs of emergency service and industry responders. 

Please contact us at enquiries@consillia.com should you require further information about our service, or products.

Name: Dot System S.r.l.
Description:
Dot System is a well-established supplier of electronic boards and electronic products intended for use onboard railway and tramway vehicles. 

Mainly, Dot System develops, manufactures and delivers specific products for: the acquisition, processing and display of instrumental and diagnostic information; the assistance to the driving of vehicles, the communication on the MVB (Multifunction Vehicle Bus); the display of information to passengers; the interface between onboard control and management systems and the controlled apparatus (‘input and output’ modules); the and power electronics for the management of the doors of rail vehicles. 
Complete the offer from Dot System auxiliary products for service and security; low and medium power, power supply and many other. 

Moreover, Dot System, supplies electronic products on a ‘turnkey’ basis for the wide different needs in the railway field, from control to diagnostics, from the display to the management of systems and apparatus, up to communication and data transmission onboard and from onboard to the ‘land’.

Dot System offers also a comprehensive services, from the identification of the requirements to the definition of the specification; from the hardware and software development to the supply of fully assembled and tested pieces, going through all stages of testing, certification and formal validation usually required in the railway field.

Name: QEOPS Consulting
Description:
Empowering Energy Efficiency and Sustainability in Transportation

At QEOPS Consulting (Quantum Energy Optimisation and Propulsion System), our unwavering mission is to revolutionise energy efficiency in both freight and passenger transportation systems. In a world where sustainability and energy efficiency have taken centre stage, our commitment to this vital, forward-looking endeavour remains steadfast.

Leading the Charge in Energy Optimization and Decarbonization
QEOPS Consulting stands at the vanguard of energy optimization and decarbonization within the transportation sector. Our specialization lies in energy storage, auxiliary and propulsion technologies and innovative solutions that empower clients to achieve energy efficiency and sustainability goals at the quantum level.
Why Choose QEOPS Consulting?
- Profound Experience: With a remarkable 40-year history in auxiliary power and traction systems, and energy storage solutions across railways, electric buses, and aircraft, QEOPS Consulting is uniquely positioned to provide actionable recommendations and effective solutions.
- Quantum-Level Solutions: We delve deep into the energy efficiency to offer you cutting-edge solutions that enhance energy efficiency, setting new industry standards.
- Sustainability Focus: Our commitment to sustainability aligns seamlessly with the global shift towards greener, environmentally responsible transportation.
- Tailored Expertise: Whether you operate in freight or passenger transportation, our solutions are customized to meet your specific energy efficiency and sustainability needs.
- Decarbonization Leadership: As champions of decarbonization, we guide you in reducing your carbon footprint while maximizing operational efficiency.
Innovation in Propulsion: We harness the latest propulsion technologies to make your transportation systems more efficient, reliable, and eco-friendly.

Contact us to embark on a sustainable journey with enhanced energy efficiency.

Name: Cariboo Rail
Description:
We have the vision, knowledge, capability, and leadership style to take railroad projects from concept to completion. We are focused on all aspects of the rail industry including construction and maintenance projects, consulting, and all rail-related equipment and track materials. Since our inception in 2000, our unique passion and understanding of track infrastructure has exposed us to a broad spectrum of railroad projects including large industrial sites, bridges and tunnels, and Class 1 railroad production crews. Our team has decades of industry experience and are responsible for hundreds of miles of track work. Understanding the industry’s engineering standards allows our team to apply these specifications when building and maintaining safe railroad infrastructure. We demand the utmost quality for every project, large or small.

Driven to meet any railroad construction challenges in the competitive domestic and global marketplace, our team has risen to the geographical challenges of our projects, from mountain passes with steep grades and tunnels, to the flats of the prairies in temperature ranging from +30°C to -30°C. We value our relationships with our supplier and customer network; we are committed to having a positive impact; and we are respectful of the people and the environment that surrounds us. We strive to deliver on time, without harm and on budget.

Name: MERMEC FRANCE
Description:
MERMEC is an Italian multinational company founded in 1970 and active in the field of advanced technologies for rail transport (signalling, measuring train, electric traction, telecommunications), urban electric mobility and industrial application. The company is based in Monopoli (BA) - Italy and has international offices in 21 countries through which it can provide technical assistance to its customers worldwide.
With about 1,200 employees, MERMEC boasts an unparalleled technical know-how that has enabled it to develop and market a well-structured portfolio of advanced solutions currently in use in 71 countries over the world.
MERMEC is a member company of ANGEL, the high-tech holding that includes some of the most innovative Italian companies in the fields of transportation and mobility, space, aviation, cyber security, artificial intelligence as well as railway automation.

MERMEC France is the French subsidiary of the MERMEC group at the forefront of innovation. It is invested in French-speaking projects as well as in Research and Development. The company's headquarters are in Marseille, within a technology park that brings together engineering schools, numerous research laboratories and companies that promote industrial innovation. MERMEC France has a multidisciplinary team of qualified engineers based in Marseille and Paris, at the service of its French-speaking customers.
The main mission of MERMEC France is to help the headquarters to supply and maintain the products of the MERMEC group, in France and in French-speaking countries around the world.
In addition, MERMEC France is also a supplier of certain products for the group. In terms of Research and Development, it carries out numerous projects exploring innovative solutions to technical problems related to the rail market, but also to other industrial sectors, such as aerospace and maritime.

Name: Nordic Maskin & Rail / Malus
Description:
Nordic Maskin & Rail:
Hos Nordic Maskin & Rail er vi én af Danmarks førende entreprenører inden for banearbejde. Vi er en kvalitetsbevidst virksomhed, som har mange års erfaring med alle former for forskelligartet banearbejde. Som én af de fremmeste specialister, hvad angår produktion af jernbanespor, har vi tilegnet os unik viden og ekspertise, som vi hver dag anvender i vores daglige virke. Vi beskæftiger alle typer af banepersonale og har samtidig eget materiel, som er godkendt. Vi arbejder 24/7 i hele Danmark og har ikke behov for lang tilkaldetid.

Malus:
Malus er en dynamisk landsdækkende virksomhed med mange års erfaring inden for sikkerhedsarbejde på danske baner. Vores SR-uddannede personale arbejder dagligt sammen med mange forskellige entreprenører om løsningen af opgaver. Vi tilbyder tjenester som lokomotivførere, SR1-arbejdsleder, rangerleder, SR2-arbejdsleder, sportekniker, fagtilsyn spor og holdleder (kørestrømsafbrydelser). Derudover udlejer vi troljer, vogne (vogne med lift) og 2-vejs køretøjer.

Malus kan ligeledes tilbyde et tidligt og aktivt engagement i vores kunders projekter ved jernbanen. Vores medarbejdere har mange års erfaring og indsigt i drift og arbejde ved jernbanen og det betyder konkret, at vi kan tilbyde vores kunder meget konkrete og effektive løsninger til at håndtere en række af de problemstillinger man oplever ved arbejder på jernbanen. Når Malus hjælper vores kunder med at identificere og gennemføre billigere og sikre løsninger eller vi hjælper med at reducere risici i deres projekter ved jernbanen, så bliver det billigere for vores kunder at arbejde i, ved og på banen.

Name: ArendsRail B.V.
Description:
Wie ben ik?
Ik ben een enthousiaste en betrokken professional die de klantvraag altijd centraal stelt. Door mij te verdiepen in de kern van de vraag, vertaal ik deze naar concrete en haalbare oplossingen. Met mijn analytische vermogen, gestructureerde aanpak en uitstekende sociale en communicatieve vaardigheden werk ik doelgericht aan het realiseren van de juiste antwoorden.

Of de klantvraag nu breed of specifiek is, ik zoek altijd naar de beste oplossing, zet heldere lijnen uit en sla bruggen waar nodig. Naast mijn inhoudelijke expertise zet ik mijn leidinggevende kwaliteiten in om projecten binnen de gestelde kaders van budget, tijd en kwaliteit succesvol af te ronden. Dit doe ik vanuit mijn brede ervaring in de spoorbranche en mijn persoonlijke drive om het verschil te maken.

Als kleine onderneming heb ik de flexibiliteit om snel in te spelen op klantvragen en zo een optimale ondersteuning te bieden.

Doel
ArendsRail ondersteunt opdrachtgevers, ingenieursbureaus en aannemers bij zowel complexe als minder complexe spoorgerelateerde projecten.

Visie
ArendsRail streeft ernaar om door deze aanpak een waardevolle bijdrage te leveren aan de veiligheid en het comfort van de Nederlandse spoorwegen.

Description:
Holland is the industry leader in the field of flash-butt welding, not only in terms of available resources, but also in experience and dedication to continual development of new technology that enables us to adapt to the evolving requirements of the global railroad community. Our full portfolio of innovative Maintenance of Way services keeps Freight and Transit rail systems around the world running safely and efficiently with maximum uptime.

We have expanded our global leadership in flash-butt welding operations with Holland Rail Services Australia Pty Ltd (HRSA), based in Perth, WA.  We have invested in people, equipment and our best-in-class full service and support specifically designed for the Australian market. 

HRSA is hitting the Australian market as a single-source provider that engineers, builds, operates, supervises, maintains, and continuously improves its product and processes: .

• Above all else - 100% safety integration within design of welding units, maintenance of units, and operation of units. 
• Full capability to integrate our Mobile Flash Butt Welder (MFBW) into customer supported Maintenance Crews, Response Crews, Re-rail Crews, etc. for a complete welding solution. 
• A Single source for management of a MFBW fleet utilizing our integrated operational dashboard

Holland is the leader in rail FBW because our commitments to innovation and improvement are more than just buzzwords. Our Australian HQ is located in Perth, WA, where Holland welding equipment is purpose-built and
assembled specifically for the Australian market. Perth is also the home base of our Australian support team including a warehouse with replacement parts onshore. The full range of Holland’s capabilities and support are available all the time.

Name: RCS GmbH Rail Components and Systems
Description:
Als Systemlieferant der Schienenfahrzeugindustrie entwickeln und produzieren Wir großflächige faserverstärkte Kunststoffteile mit integrierten elektrischen, pneumatischen und hydraulische Komponenten, die nahtlos ineinandergreifen. Von Bugnasen mit integrierter Kinematik über einbaufertiger Sanitärmodulen bis hin zu elektrifizierten Führerständen – Wir liefern perfekt aufeinander abgestimmte Systemlösungen aus einer Hand.

Ihr Schienenfahrzeug ist beschädigt und Sie sind auf der Suche nach Ersatzteilen? Wir bieten Ihnen eine Schadensprüfung mittels Thermografie / Zerstörungsfreier Prüfung (ZFP) inkl. Reparaturkonzept und fertigen für Sie von der Schraube bis hin zu kompletten Baugruppen die nötigen Ersatzteile - und das für alle Bautypen.

Name: Kockums Industrier AB
Description:
Kockums Industrier is northern Europe’s leading manufacturer of specially designed railway wagons for freight transport. With 100 employees, the company has a turnover of SEK 315 million. Autolink, LKAB, Green Cargo, Auto Transport Service, EWS and the Swedish National Rail Administration are just some of our customers.
In June 2007, we acquired SweMaint. Possessing a well-developed network of strategically located workshops, SweMaint is Scandinavia’s leading repair and maintenance company in the freight wagon sector. The acquisition was an industrially logical leap forward in making freight transport by rail even more competitive. With almost 350 employees, the new company group will have a turnover of around SEK 700 million.

Name: VRS Railway Industry BV
Description:
VRS Railway Industry is een dochteronderneming  van Vialis. Al meer dan 130 jaar zijn we specialist in de ontwikkeling van spoorwegbeveiligingssystemen.

Onze expertise bestaat uit het ontwikkelen van producten en systemen voor railinfrastructuur, het assembleren en reviseren van deze producten en systemen, uitgebreid testen en het verlenen van services. Dat doen we met de beste mensen. Daarbij biedt onze unieke locatie in Houten de mogelijkheid om niet alleen alles te ontwerpen maar ook ter plaatse fysiek te construeren zodat we zelf uitvoerig kunnen testen. Daarom lopen we voorop: we investeren veel in Research & Development en zijn marktleider in Nederland.

Wil je bij ons werken? Check dan onze vacatures!

Innovatie

Bij VRS Railway Industry blijven we continu innoveren. Veiligheid en betrouwbaarheid zijn immers cruciaal in de wereld van het spoor. Als het gaat om overweginstallaties, seinen en wisselstellers, zijn we technisch toonaangevend in Nederland en ver daarbuiten.

Zo zijn bijvoorbeeld onze nieuwste generatie led-seinen beter zichtbaar onder alle omstandigheden en alle zichthoeken. Onze wisselstellers zijn pasgeleden aangepast voor nog betere prestaties onder winterse omstandigheden..

Verder ontwikkelen we momenteel een nieuwe overweginstallatie die voldoet aan de laatste internationale eisen. Deze is onder andere voorzien is van intelligente monitoring voor het melden van storingen en onderhoudsbehoefte; een ontwikkeling waarmee we een stap voorwaarts zetten in veiligheid en betrouwbaarheid..

Onze railspoel is aangepast voor de toepassing van aluminium bekabeling, waardoor de kans op koperdiefstal kan worden verkleind.

Meer info over ons vind je op www.vrsrail.nl

Name: Miri S.r.l.
Description:
La Miri S.r.l. si costituisce nel 2001 in forma di società di capitale, essendo transitata, nel corso degli ultimi quaranta anni, attraverso le forme di ditta individuale, prima, e società di persone, poi.
L'esperienza aziendale, nel suo complesso, ruota intorno a specifiche competenze nel campo dell'impiantistica, sia civile che industriale.
Nell'ultimo ventennio il core-business aziendale si è per lo più sviluppato intorno al settore ferroviario, con l'instaurazione di stretti legami di collaborazione con i maggiori player italiani di settore.
La grande professionalità e flessibilità unita alla comprovata e consolidata competenza nel settore Ferroviario permettono alla Miri S.r.l. di essere fornitore qualificato e consoliodato di:

- Trenitalia S.p.a. (Manutenzione di Primo Livello)
- Ansaldobreda S.p.a. (Assistenza in garanzia, Manutenzione di Primo e Secondo livello, Allestimento, Logistica)
- Trenord S.p.a. (Manutenzione di Primo Livello)
- Metronapoli S.p.a. (Manutenzione di Secondo Livello)

La Miri S.r.l. sempre attenta ai processi di miglioramento continuo delle propre competenze sia tecniche che di organizzazione aziendale è dotata delle principali certificazioni di settore:

- Gestione Qualità Aziendale conforme alla normativa UNI EN ISO 9001:2008
- Gestione Qualità Aziendale conforme alla normativa IRIS rev 02
- Gestione Qualità Aziendale conforme alla normativa UNI EN ISO 14001:2004
- Gestione delle Competenze conforme alla COCS 30.3 di Trenitalia (ANSF 4/2012)

Name: Hastec Rail
Description: Hastec Rail brings together over 65 years of industrial automotive and rail industry expertise. Providing innovative solutions, from initial concept through to design and manufacture, using the latest adaptive techniques, from our purpose built facility in the Midlands.

Description: IMF offers CAD design, computational expertise and technical consultancy services in areas such as railway engineering, cranes, lifting equipments and special machinery. The IMF team has access to the latest numerical tools to provide you the best optimised and innovative answers.

Name: Cima Riparazioni Ferroviarie S.r.l.
Description:
CIMA RIPARAZIONI FERROVIARIE, fondata nel 1945, con oltre 70 anni di esperienza ed una dotazione completa di impianti, macchine ed attrezzature, esegue, con competenza e professionalità, ogni tipo di intervento su veicoli ferroviari e parti degli stessi. La società, opera nel rispetto di protocolli di certificazione nazionali ed internazionali assolvendo pienamente alle esigenze di “security compliance” delle aziende clienti, essenzialmente gruppi multinazionali leader nel trasporto di merci e passeggeri e nella costruzione di veicoli ferroviari.
Cima Riparazioni Ferroviarie S.r.l è certificata e specializzata come I , II , III e IV funzione ECM; IL 20/01/2022 a seguito audit ha ottenuto ai sensi del regolamento UE n. 2019/779 il nuovo certificato IT/31/0122/1202 emesso dall’organismo di certificazione Bureau Veritas, che ha confermato un ulteriore certificato con validità fino a cinque anni su tutte le funzioni ECM.
Cima Riparazioni Ferroviarie S.r.l ha un sistema per la gestione della qualità certificato in accordo alla norma UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 (Cert. N° 50 100 3487 REV.011 valido dal 11/03/2022 al 28/11/2024) sul seguente campo di applicazione: progettazione e fabbricazione su specifica del cliente, di parti di rotabili ferroviari, sottoassiemi e componenti. Revisione, ristrutturazione e assistenza di mezzi ferroviari di trazione e materiale trainato (IAF 22, 17).
La società è anche certificata in accordo alla norma EN 15085-2 (N° 754-001 ITEN valido dal 01/09/2019 al 31/08/2022) con il seguente campo di applicazione:” Riparazione e manutenzione di veicoli ferroviari, componenti e carri merce in officina e “on site”, Costruzione e sotto assiemi”.
Cima Riparazioni Ferroviarie S.r.l per tutte le attività del proprio sistema ECM relativamente alle funzioni “A”, ”B”, ”C” opera nella sede di Via N. Caix 11/13, 46012 Bozzolo (MN). Pe quanto riguarda la Funzione “D” ,risulta operare sia presso la propria sede, sia per mezzo di officine mobili.

Name: COMAFER Srl
Description: Comafer è un' azienda specializzata in attività di progettazione, costruzione, manutenzione, revamping e assistenza di componentistica ferroviaria con focus su carrelli, travi di carico, sale montate e rotabili.

Name: Officine Opus
Description:
La Opus srl nasce nel 2004, all’interno di un progetto che vedeva la creazione di più realtà Aziendali collegate alla OMAELBA srl, specializzata in attività di manutenzione di Autocarri, Autobus, Rimorchi e Mezzi d’Opera operante dal 1981 su vari stabilimenti  in Livorno. 
Nel 2004, OPUS diventa Fornitore Trenitalia per il Gruppo Merci SER/002 (Attività di manutenzione corrente su carri merci), e inizia una continuativa attività di manutenzione nel settore Ferroviario presso vari siti di Trenitalia. In particolare presso lo OMV Trenitalia di Livorno, dove Opus ha allestito con attrezzature ed impianti di proprietà, un intero reparto di manutenzione di carrelli e rotabili ferroviari. 
Nel corso degli anni la società ha esteso la propria attività di manutenzione programmata su varie tipologie di rotabili e relative apparecchiature accessorie. Nello stabilimento interno di Interporto è presente un reparto attrezzato per la manutenzione di mezzi d’opera, carrelli ferroviari e metropolitani.

The Officine Opus born in 2004, within a project of Omaelba Group, specializes in the maintenance of trucks, buses, trailers and equipment Opera operating since 1981 in various establishments in Tuscany.
In 2004, OPUS becomes Supplier Trenitalia for the Group Goods SER / 002 (current maintenance activities and periodic revisions of freight wagons), and begins a continuous maintenance activities in the railway sector at various sites Trenitalia and private.
With a staff of over 108 employees, competent technicians for all types of railway maintenance, and equipped vans, 
During the years the company has extended its scheduled maintenance activities on various types of rolling stock and related ancillary equipment. Maintenance activities are carried out at the premises Opus and wherever there is need.

Name: KWD Kupplungswerk Dresden AG
Description:
Das KWD Kupplungswerk Dresden ist ein modernes, international agierendes Maschinenbauunternehmen, das sich auf die Herstellung von Kupplungen spezialisiert hat.

Qualität, Präzision, Innovation – mit modernster Technik entwickelt unser erfahrenes Team von Ingenieuren und Fachkräften maßgeschneiderte, innovative Lösungen für unsere Kunden. Spezialisiert auf die Herstellung von Kupplungen für Schienenfahrzeuge, leisten wir einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Förderung klimafreundlicher Mobilität. Darüber hinaus fertigen wir auch Kupplungen für Industrieanwendungen. 

Sicherheit, Respekt, Miteinander – als ein krisensicheres Unternehmen bieten wir unseren Mitarbeitern langfristige Beschäftigungsperspektiven und ein sicheres Arbeitsumfeld. Wir legen großen Wert auf offene Kommunikation und schaffen eine Atmosphäre, in der sich die Mitarbeiter wertgeschätzt und gehört fühlen, in dem ihr sie Potenzial ausschöpfen und ihr Wissen und ihre Fähigkeiten kontinuierlich weiterentwickeln können.

Name: Ameritrack Rail
Description:
Ameritrack Rail is a one-stop full-service rail contractor providing engineering and design services, new track construction and existing track maintenance. With over 20 years of experience and locations across the United States, Ameritrack Rail is well positioned to provide our industry leading best in class service to your rail track design, build or rebuild project.

Ameritrack Rail service offerings include:

-	Rail Engineering & Design
-	New Rail Construction
-	Facility Rail Expansion
-	Rail Track Inspection
- 	Rail Track Maintenance & Repair
-	24/7 Emergency Services

Ameritrack Rail is part of Marmon Rail, the industry leader in railyard services including railyard infrastructure management, industrial rail switching, transloading, locomotive service, railcar maintenance & repair, tank car manufacturing, leasing, and more. Together, we keep our world moving forward.

Learn more about Ameritrack Rail at ameritrack.com

Name: Advanced Rail Systems
Description: Advanced Rail Systems designs and manufactures cutting edge products for use in many railway applications, ranging from push button switch machines to our “fee-free” Pathfinder automation software. We pair industry leading products with quality support customers deserve.

Name: P. Arts Werken B.V.
Description:
Onze organisatie is gespecialiseerd in personele dienstverlening en detachering van technisch personeel voor infrastructurele werkzaamheden. Onze medewerkers beschikken over een uitgebreid scala handgereedschappen. Uiteraard zijn zij gecertificeerd voor de werkzaamheden die zij verrichten.

Grondverzetmachines
U kunt bij ons terecht voor de verhuur van alle soorten grondverzetmachines.

Spoorwerken
Onze ervaren en goed opgeleide medewerkers zijn inzetbaar voor nieuwbouw, regulier onderhoud en reparatie. Bij storingen of calamiteiten zijn zij direct 7 x 24 uur/week inzetbaar.

Glasvezeltechniek
Bij de realisatie van glasvezelbekabeling biedt ons bedrijf de breedst mogelijke ondersteuning, zowel bij graafwerkzaamheden als bij wegboringen. Daarnaast beschikken wij over HAS- en PoPmonteurs.

Grond-, weg- en waterbouw
We verzorgen aanleg van conventionele kabelwerken (CAI, telecom en elektra) en rioleringen. Ook zijn onze medewerkers beschikbaar voor alle bestratings- en aanverwante werkzaamheden. Zowel voor nieuwbouw, reparaties en renovaties.

Kwaliteit en veiligheid
Kwaliteit en veiligheid krijgen bedrijfsbreed continu aandacht. Certificeringen, onder andere de VCA** (Veiligheid Checklist Aannemers), Veiligheidsladder, NEN4400 en ISO 9001:2015 waarborgen die kwaliteit en veiligheid.

Procesbewaking
Ook voor onze interne bedrijfsorganisatie hanteren we de hoogst mogelijke kwaliteitsnorm. Veel aandacht gaat uit naar het eigen systeem voor procesbewaking, met als uiteindelijke doel de optimalisatie van kwaliteit en veiligheid.

Certificering
Certificering is van groot belang met het oog op continuering van de bedrijfsvoering. Door opleiding en training spelen wij continu in op de nieuwste eisen op het gebied van milieu en veiligheid.

Name: Professional Rail Solutions Ltd

Name: Unipar, LLC
Description:
Since 1980, Unipar has been a leading manufacturer and remanufacturer of components for EMD engine users in the rail, marine, and power generation industries. Specializing in internal engine components, Unipar offers high quality components and reasonable pricing and extreme reliability. All Unipar power assemblies, their sub-components, and water pumps are certified by AAR M-1003 Quality Assurance Programs.

Since our inception, we are the oldest continually operating aftermarket manufacturer and manufacturer of EMD power assemblies! Ask our staff more about our history!

Name: Premier India Agencies
Description:
Premier India Agencies (PIA), formed in 1992, was founded in the fast growing industrial city of Visakhapatnam in the state of Andhra Pradesh on the eastern coast of India. We are a trading and a consultancy company and have earned the reputation of being a specialist in the sector of Railway and Industrial Equipment Supply. Our main focus is on Railways, Metro Projects, Metal and Mining Industries. Over the years, we have established well in Steel, Indian Railways, Metro Railway & Aluminium industries. We are also involved in project handling related to our principal's equipment. 

We have strong business alliances with world-renowned manufacturers of equipment and we function as a Distributor or Agent for them in India, and also neighbouring countries. We are Head Quartered at Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh and have Registered Office at Kolkata. Besides, we have branch operations in New Delhi, Vadodara and Resident Representatives at important locations. 

We are in the process of expanding our sales network in India and neighbouring countries. Also, we are now making in-roads in Project Consultancy & Management with reputed overseas and Indian manufacturers in these sectors.

Our core strength is our long-standing experience coupled with innovation and excellent customer relations. We aim at being an important and reliable partner.

Name: Bahntechnik NRW e. V.
Description:
Der Bahntechnik NRW e. V. vereint mittelständische Betriebe, die  Fahrzeugkomponenten, Infrastruktur-und Leittechnik für die Bahnindustrie entwickeln, produzieren und vertreiben oder Dienstleistungen in diesem Bereich anbieten.

Ziel des Vereins ist es, die Branche der Eisenbahntechnik in NRW als bedeutende Wirtschaftskraft zu unterstützen und auszubauen. Dazu dient einerseits die intensive Netzwerkarbeit der Mitgliedsunternehmen. Andererseits sorgt der Verein durch Öffentlichkeitsarbeit und den Dialog mit Wissenschaft und Politik dafür, das hohe Innovationspotenzial der unterschiedlichen Eisenbahntechnologien zu verdeutlichen und zu nutzen.

Name: Kangni France
Description:
Kangni is an established door system solution supplier for railway transport, and clients include a portfolio of internationally renowned car builders such as Bombardier, Alstom and Siemens. The company boasts fully independent intellectual property rights and more than 280 patents in both China and abroad.

Headquarters Nanjing Kangni Mechanical & Electrical Co., Ltd. (Kangni) is an innovation-oriented enterprise specialized in research and application of mechanical and electrical technologies, and was listed successfully on the Shanghai Stock Exchange on August 1st 2014 (stock code 603111). The “Kangni” brand has been registered in countries such as China, the UK, France, Germany, Austria, Italy, the US and Russia, and has been identified as a China Famous Brand.

Kangni is primarily engaged in the R&D, manufacturing and maintenance of railway vehicle door system. In the China door system market, Kangni possesses more than 50% market share, while in terms of oversea markets, Kangni has cooperated with major car builders such as Bombardier, Alstom and Siemens to sell products all over the world, including France, Canada, Turkey, Singapore, Argentina, America, Saudi Arabia and Brazil. In addition, Kangni also provides other a full suite of related products such as interior fittings, power connectors, platform screen doors, new energy products for automobile industry and precision machining equipment.

Description: ŽOS Trnava, a.s. is the largest railway cars repair workshop in Central Europe. Production programm of the company includes also welded constructions of freight wagons, passenger coaches, trams and welded parts for general use.

Description: Die Grammer Interior Components ist spezialisiert auf die Entwicklung und Fertigung hochwertiger Metall-, Kunststoff- und Glaskomponenten für die Automobilindustrie. Name: RYKO
Description:
Jsme ryze česká, rodinná firma s více než stoletou tradicí, umíme revidovat a opravovat nákladní železniční vozy. Děláme to profesionálně, s nadšením, respektem a láskou. Najdete nás v Děčíně. Své služby ve špičkové kvalitě poskytujeme zákazníkům z celé Evropy. Dokud budou jezdit vlaky, budeme tu taky.
K našim přednostem patří třeba rychlé rozhodování, přehledné procesy, umíme naslouchat, reagujeme na podněty, problémy řešíme. Jsme stabilní, spolehlivý a slušný zaměstnavatel. O svých 350 zaměstnanců se staráme, vážíme si svých lidí a lidské práce. I díky tomu rosteme, rozvíjíme se, modernizujeme a daří se nám. U nás platí podání ruky, neslibujeme co nemůžeme splnit, jednáme na rovinu. Šikovní, ochotní a pracovití se u nás mají dobře.

Name: 4MADE a.s.
Description: 4MADE is a trading company that supplies components for railways. In terms of the date of establishment, we are a young company, however, our employees have many years of experience in the railway field. If you are interested in the products we offer, do not hesitate to contact us

Name: Caltrax Inc
Description:
Caltrax Inc. is the only full service independent railcar repair service facility in western Canada. Caltrax services all
 types of railcars. We have been in business since 1991.

Focused on continuous improvement, our vision is to be a recognized leader in the Railcar Industry and a trusted source for our employees, our customers and our vendors

Our mission is to consistently deliver the highest level of quality, safety, service and value to our customers and employees in the safest way possible as a leader in the industry.

We consistently strive to improve our quality of business, and facilitate growth and expansion of our repair services. We will always value our customers, our employees, innovative technology, a friendly atmosphere, and management’s commitment to overall excellence. We will maintain high business, ethical, safety and quality standards for the benefit of our customers and employees.

Name: DOORspec inc.
Description:
Based in Canada and located in the Greater Montreal area, DOORspec specializes in the design, manufacturing and development of door systems for the transit industry.

The DOORspec group comprises a team of highly trained engineers. All are experts in the transit field, offering a full range of mechanical, electrical, systems and software engineering knowledge specific to the transit industry. The DOORspec group provides turnkey solutions and product assistance for all door issues relating to trains used for transit. If it’s about train doors, metro doors, light rail doors or any other type of railcar door, at DOORspec, we have all the answers to your train door needs

Name: Aqurate Rail

Aqurate Rail combines decades of experience brought together across manufacturing, engineering and operating in rail for some of the worlds largest multinational rail and infrastructure providers.

In partnership with GOS Tools & Engineering, Aqurate Rail focuses on industry proven machines upgraded to provide our added unique perspective and expertise to further maintenance and enhancement efficiency and delivery.

Name: ISAF SA - San Electroterm Grup
PromeX Ltd.
Description:
PromeX are a trusted supplier of manufactured components to many of the major rail networks in the UK.  PromeX have comprehensive competence and capacity in the latest fabrication and machining technology to ensure that our customers have a single source for just a simple bracket or a complex manufactured & kitted solution.

This is the result of a comprehensive review and improvement of our management systems to ensure that all our processes and controls meet this required standard for consistent and high quality welding.  We are also certified to ISO 9001:2015, ISO 45001:2018 and ISO 3834-2.

Name: Dizayn Demiryolu ve Savunma Sanayi
Description:
Raylı Sistemler sektöründe yurtiçi ve yurtdışı pazarda üretmiş olduğu demiryolu makaslarda yüksek teknoloji ve mühendislik metodlarını kullanarak katma değerli üretim yaplılmasını sağlamaktır.
 
Yurtiçi Raylı Sistemler sektöründe üretmiş olduğu Demiryolu Makasların hergeçen güniçerisinde misyonları doğrultusunda AR-GE'sini yapmak ve ülkemizde henüz üretimi yapılmayan Demiryolu Makası ve Demiryolu Makası mangan göbeklerinin üremi gerçekleştirip Uluslararası sektörde seçkin bir aktör olmaktır.




KURUMSAL
 
Kurucumuz Sn. Cafer ORBAY tarafından 2004 yılında Ankara Ostim'de kurulan firmamız , ticari hayatının ilk yıllarında talaşlı imalat konusundaki tecrübesiyle ağır sanayi ve büyük ebatlı parçaların CNC tezgahlarda hassas talaşlı imalatı konusunda faaliyet göstermiştir.
 
 
2015 yılı itibariyle Anadolu Organize Sanayi Bölgesindeki 6000m2 kapalı , 5000m2 açık alana sahip ve yüksek teknolojik CNC makinalara sahip modern tesislerinde ükemizde hızla gelişme göstermekte olan Raylı Sistemler sekttöründe kullanılan Demiryolu Makası imalatını yapmaktadır.
 
 
Dizayn Demiryolu hergeçen gün modern CNC işleme, kontrol ve imalat teknolojisini ilerleterek Demiryolu Makası imalatı konusunda üretim yapmaktadır. Bu doğrultuda yapılan yeni yatırımları ile hertürlü Demiryolu Makası çeşitlerini üretebilmekte ve yıllık Makas imalatı kapasitesini arttırmaktadır.
 
 
Üretimini yapmakta olduğu Demiryolu Makaslarının Kalitesi yönünde şuanda ISO 9001 - 2008 Kalite sertifikasına sahip olan firmamız devam eden süreçte Uluslararası güvenliğe ve geçerliliğe sahip BUREAN VERİTAS kalite sistemini , üretmiş olduğu ürünlerin imalatında aktif bir şekilde kullanarak sadece ülkemizde değil Avrupa ve DÜnya çapında bilinirliğe ve üretmiş olduğu ürünlerin kalitesiyle bilinen Demiryolu Makası ve Makas Sistemleri imalatçısı olmaktadır.

Name: CRRC Datong Co. Ltd
Description:
CRRC Datong Co., Ltd (hereinafter referred to as CRRC Datong), as a core subsidiary of CRRC, mainly focuses its business on the research, manufacture, and maintenance of locomotives and rolling stocks for railway transportation， leasing of locomotives and rolling stocks, research and manufacture of core parts for railway equipment, active carbon, production and marketing of mechanical and electrical equipments as well as imports and exports. It has now grown into a research and manufacturing company specialized in railway transportation equipments, and an integrated supplier offering solutions at the request of customers.

Founded in 1954, CRRC Datong covers an area of 2,330,000m2 with over 6,000 employees now. It has passed ISO9001 quality management system, ISO14001 international environment standard, GB/T28001 profession security and health management system, and IRIS international railway standard certification, and achieved a pass — ГОСТ standard system certificate, which allows the products of the company to be exported to CIS countries. Being a high-tech company, research and development center engaged in engineering technology of electric locomotives in Shanxi Province, it has a national technology center, a national lab and measuring office as well as a R&D center specialized in HV electric technology built in Beijing.

After over 60 years oreform and development, CRRC Datong has witnessed the developing history of Chinese railway and built up a research, manufacturi and maintenance platform for electric locomotives with its reasonable plane layout, smooth process and advanced equipment. The HX2 locomotive series produced by CRRC Datong is an outstanding brand among the three types of AC transmission electric locomotives in China. Being integrated with cutting-edge technology in the manufacture of rail transportation equipment in China, its AC traction electric locomotives with different powers and axle arrangements, such as HXD2, HXD3, HXD2C, and new HXD2.

Description:

IRIS certified DTL’s well knitted and organized quality system, which take care of the customer needs by taking care of the customer requirement but exceeds their expectations at effective cost.

Name: Projector A/S
Description:
At Projector we know what is worth knowing about trains and train operation. We were actually born of the industry and on the whole, we have more than 400 years' experience in ensuring that our customers' trains and business keep on track. Our customers are international train producers, major operators and major maintainers and they are currently mainly in the Nordic countries, Europe and in the Middle East.

We are both a production and development company and work within many different fields such as wood, metal, electricity, electronics, construction, documentation, etc. In general, we are engaged in four main areas:

•	Projects
•	Service
•	Train parts
•	Support

Everything we do is about adding value to our customers through innovative thinking, knowledge, competence and long-time experience. At the same time, we do our work with orderliness, high quality throughout the value chain and with first class service. Whether the task concerns the development of new innovative solutions (e.g. our axle protector), renovating and servicing train material, developing and constructing train interiors or the day-to-day sale of spare parts, our first priority is the customer and their needs. We can do it all. We say "yes" and rarely "no" and if the solution does not already exist, we develop it together!

Name: PortaCo, Inc.
Description:
PortaCo Inc. is part of the Goldschmidt Group. 

Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.

Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.

Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.

The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.

We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.

By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.

Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.

Name: Upper Canada Railway Services (UCRS)
Description:
Upper Canada Railway Services (UCRS) is an Ontario based corporation and is a first class quality manufacturer and supplier of a wide array of assembly components and spare parts for locomotives, freight cars and passenger coaches.

Our services extend to: repairs and supply of equipment on UTEX and outright basis, technical support and training, and overhaul project management and consulting.

Our extensive technical knowledge, strong global ties to OEM manufacturers, combined with our field experience, allows UCRS to be a reliable source and a long term partner with first class railroads.

Our mission is to manufacture and supply assemblies and spare parts of the highest quality that meet or exceed the OEM designs and specifications. We also wish to do this at the most competitive price to help our customers maintain their rolling stock fleet at a fraction of the cost compared to OEM.

Our vision is to establish a long-term relationship with our customers through remarkable customer service and flawless after sales support. We strive to uphold an excellent reputation among our customers which will distinguish us from our competitors.

Our products are manufactured in compliance with (AAR-M1003) quality assurance program and supported by a comprehensive warranty policy that will bring a peace of mind to our valued customers.

Name: Association de Préservation d'Engins Ferroviaires Thermiques
Description:
L'Association pour la Préservation et la Restauration des Engins Ferroviaires Thermiques (APEFT) est une organisation dédiée à la sauvegarde du riche patrimoine ferroviaire, visant à préserver, restaurer et promouvoir des engins historiques, des infrastructures et des bâtiments associés au monde du rail.

Notre Mission
À travers nos efforts de préservation et de restauration, notre mission est de maintenir vivante l'histoire du transport ferroviaire thermique. Nous œuvrons avec passion pour sauvegarder des locomotives, des autorails, des wagons, ainsi que des infrastructures et des bâtiments ferroviaires, afin de préserver un témoignage tangible du passé ferroviaire.

Nos Activités
Préservation et Restauration : Nous entreprenons des projets de préservation et de restauration d'engins ferroviaires, garantissant qu'ils soient entretenus dans leur état d'origine ou restaurés selon des normes historiques rigoureuses.

Trains Historiques et Touristiques : Nous organisons des voyages en train historique, offrant au public une expérience immersive dans l'époque dorée du chemin de fer. Ces excursions permettent de revivre le charme et la nostalgie des voyages en train d'antan.

Visites et Expositions : Nous ouvrons nos portes au grand public en organisant des visites guidées de nos installations, ainsi que des expositions mettant en valeur notre collection d'engins ferroviaires restaurés. Ces événements offrent une occasion unique de découvrir l'histoire du rail et d'en apprendre davantage sur notre patrimoine ferroviaire.

Notre Engagement
En tant que membres de l'APEFT, nous sommes profondément engagés à préserver et à promouvoir l'héritage ferroviaire pour les générations futures. Nous croyons que la préservation de ces vestiges historiques est essentielle pour comprendre et apprécier l'impact du chemin de fer sur le développement économique, social et culturel.

Rejoignez nous !
Si vous partagez notre passion pour l'histoire ferroviaire et que vous souhaitez contribuer

Name: SIF- SOCIETE INDUSTRIELLE DES FONTES
Description:

Avec son usinage intégré, elle peut proposer un large panel de pièces brutes, usinées, et/ou assemblées, avec ou sans traitement de surface selon les besoins des clients.
Dotée des certifications qualité requises, la SIF est spécialiste des pièces techniques de sécurité, notamment pour le ferroviaire.
De la conception des outillages, à l'évolution des pièces, en passant par l'amélioration des process, la SIF offre à ses clients un accompagnement technique personnalisé (codesign, redesign) pour obtenir des solutions optimisées.
De nouvelles nuances de fontes (fontes à haut silicium, fontes résistant à des températures extrêmes jusque -50°C, fontes alliées) ont été développées par notre société.
Nos équipes sont à votre disposition pour devenir votre partenaire de vos projets fontes.

Misją Lucchini Poland jest dostarczenie produktów zgodnych z wymaganiami i oczekiwaniami Klienta w zakresie: dostaw kół monoblokowych i kół bosych, osi, montażu zestawów kołowych z maźnicami i reduktorami, w oparciu o normy krajowe i/lub międzynarodowe oraz specyfikacje techniczne i/lub rysunki dostarczone przez Klienta.

Niezwykle ważny jest dla nas ciągły rozwój i skoncentrowanie się na potrzebach klienta. Nasza misja możliwa jest do zrealizowania dzięki zaangażowaniu i odpowiedzialności naszych Pracowników, którzy nieustannie rozwijają swoje umiejętności techniczne oraz społeczne.

Lucchini Poland‘s mission is to provide products in accordance with the customer’s requirements and expectations in the field of: supply of monoblock and bare wheels, axles, assembly of wheel sets with axle boxes and noise dampening systems, complete passenger, loco and freight wheelsets overhaul based on national and / or international standards as well as technical specifications and / or drawings provided by customer.

Name: Australian Rail Technology Pty Ltd
Description:
After 30 years, two name changes and countless successfully completed projects Australian Rail Technology (ART) is still resolutely committed to helping customers achieve the most from their precious rail assets.

Over the years the company has built on its hard earned reputation as being the industry specialist for custom engineered products, or modification of existing systems to meet new requirements or improve reliability. 

With a reach across Australia and NZ, ART’s extensive product knowledge and expertise spans overhead wire (OHW), locomotive and passenger rolling stock, substations and signalling systems. Its unparalleled product knowledge and engineering expertise is on hand to meet the needs of existing and new customers.

ART’s range of equipment covers products manufactured by the company, value added solutions and the supply of general products and equipment. Manufactured OHW products include 1500VDC isolators, multi-position switches, earthing switches and motorisation. The Service and Repair division can refurbish, re-engineer or renovate all electrical and electronic train borne systems, including data loggers, master controllers, power control systems, power supplies, contactors & more, and the Engineering Division can project manage and deliver the most demanding rolling stock project, from concept to commissioning. 

Find us at www.ar-tech.com.au

Name: EC Engineering
Description:
Enter a green future with us!

EC Engineering has been active for over 20 years in the railway, aviation, automotive and e-mobility sectors. Apart from designing and simulating, we have two production plants located in Mielec and Podłęż.
Our staff consists of over 150 highly qualified engineers, who take care of the quality of the services we offer.
During our long-standing activity, we have designed many vehicles for the railway and aviation industries. EC Engineering has designed electric, diesel and hybrid locomotives and multiple units, trams, metros, passenger and freight cars, monorails. We can also boast of engineering projects for aviation.
You will meet our components in the world's fastest TGV train running in France. The pantographs we produce are mounted on trains, trams and trolleybuses in many Polish and European cities.
Our revolutionary Ride&Charge electricity pick-up is part of the change towards being eco-friendly. The electric buses it charges are environmentally friendly.

At EC Engineering, we focus on:
- CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT both in terms of products and staff.
- INNOVATION - as a research and development centre we have developed the Ride&Charge for electric buses, which was awarded the Technovation Award 2021.
- QUALITY we subscribe to. The success of EC Engineering is built on 250 people working in the design office and production facilities.
- PEOPLE by providing them with opportunities for continuous development. We are also willing to cooperate with technical universities by organising trainings for students or creating internship offers.

We are part of the changes that lead to a green, technologically advanced future. Create it with us!

Want to find out more?
Visit our website: ec-e.pl!

Empresa tradicional que, desde 2017, fabrica tubos em aço carbono com costura, podendo ser na condição direto da máquina (industrial) ou trefilado.

Name: PowerRail
Description:
PowerRail is a United States-based company, with additional locations in various parts of the world. CEO, Paul Foster, originally formed PowerRail in 2003 in Wilke-Barre, Pennsylvania. Today our Corporate Offices and Main Distribution Center are located in Exeter, Pennsylvania.

PowerRail is a certified AAR M-1003 distributor, manufacturer and remanufacturer of aftermarket locomotive parts, offering a wide range of products. We are North America’s leading aftermarket parts provider, supporting both EMD and GE locomotives. In addition to our broad locomotive line, we also provide products for Passenger Transit, Marine and Power Generation markets. 

Our offering of products includes New and Unit Exchange Remanufactured components to accommodate any budget. Backed by our extensive Engineering and Development Departments, we continually strive to provide Enhanced Products that reduce costs associated with field failures and downtime.

From Customer Service, Manufacturing, Quality & Technical Support, Inside & Field Sales, Warehouse & Shipping, PowerRail has only one goal in mind...your total satisfaction.

Name: SEKISUI FFU Railway Technology
Description:
Since our foundation in 1947, SEKISUI CHEMICAL Group (hereinafter "SEKISUI") has been a global leader in the manufacturing of synthetic products. We are dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for people worldwide and protecting the Earth's environment by pioneering advancements in residential and social infrastructure, as well as chemical solutions.

One of our innovative products, Fiber Reinforced Foamed Urethane (FFU) Synthetic Sleepers, was developed in collaboration with the Railway Technical Research Institute (Tokyo, Japan) in 1980. Designed as a replacement for traditional timber sleepers, FFU Synthetic Sleepers offer similar characteristics such as lightweight, strength, durability, and ease of handling. Additionally, being a synthetic material, they provide the benefits of plastic, including no water absorption, resistance to corrosion, and excellent chemical resistance.

With increasing regulations on preservative chemicals for treated timber sleepers and a growing focus on environmental protection, our FFU Synthetic Sleepers present an ideal solution for railway operators' track maintenance needs. Our product has been supplied to over 35 countries, and we aim to expand further, leveraging our technology and 45 years of experience in this field.

Name: Grupo Sagit
Description:
Empresa especialista na manutenção e entrega de vagões ferroviários e locomotiva, estando há mais de 8 anos no mercado e com mais de 10.000 vagões manutenidos e 1.000 entregues neste período. Executamos serviços in loco nas maiores ferrovias do país, tendo mais de 200 colaboradores espalhados pelas cinco regiões do país.E possuímos uma oficina própria localizada na cidade de Sumaré/SP que conta com infraestrutura de ponta, com pórticos, tratores, guindastes, área coberta e concretada para a execução dos serviços, bitola mista para a manutenção e entrega de qualquer tipo de vagão e mais de 1.000 equipamentos disponíveis, entre eles Single Car N1B, aparelho para teste dinamométrico, entre outros.
A Sagit também abriu recentemente a sua fábrica de montagem de sobre chassis na cidade de Paulínia/SP, em parceira com a Randon Implementos, a fábrica irá produzir todo tipo de sobre chassi, seja báu, carga seca, basculante ou frigorífico. A fábrica conta com insfraestrutura padrão Sagit, com mais de 18.000m² de área total, sendo 3.000m² de área conberta, contamos com pontes rolantes, empilhadeiras e todo o equipamento necessário para a produção de mais de 1.000 baús por ano.
Além disso, também fabricamos peças para implementos rodoviários e ferroviários, já foram mais de 2.000 peças fabricadas e vendidas pela Sagit, dos mais variados tipos para vagões e implementos rodoviários.

Name: CWA Constructions SA
Description:
Seilbahnkabinen aus der Schweiz für die schönsten Plätze der Welt. Als Mitglied der Doppelmayr Gruppe und weltweiter Marktführer produzieren wir jedes Jahr über 2'000 Kabinen. CWA steht seit 1939 für Zuverlässigkeit – von der Entwicklung über die Fertigung bis zum Service vor Ort.

Ropeway cabins made in Switzerland for the most beautiful places in this world. As a member of the Doppelmayr Group and global market leader, we manufacture over 2,000 cabins annually. Since 1939, CWA has always stood for reliability – from development and manufacture through to service on site.

Name: BODE Group
Description:
As a system supplier and partner to leading vehicle manufacturers, we develop customized door systems for rail and road vehicles. Our excellent service will support you for a lifetime.

We show our presence. We are available to our customers at seven international locations in Germany, Poland, the USA, Switzerland, the UK, South Korea, and Turkey. We have been implementing projects for customers all over the world since 1968. We ensure the success of our company worldwide with over 1,500 employees who are characterized by quality awareness, flexibility, creativity, and commitment. As BODE, we set the standards for vehicle door systems and fittings when it comes to development, production, and service.

Name: BRIMBLE
Description:
Brimble is an Australian-born rail maintenance contractor.

We modify existing track resurfacing equipment to create custom machines that rival the latest innovations from leading international manufacturers. Our extensive fleet delivers outstanding outcomes for rail operators Australia-wide because we’ve engineered them to be safer and more user-friendly than any currently on the market.

As innovators at heart, we’re here to be a driving force for rail technology and advancement in Australia and beyond. Discover our extensive fleet at brimble.com.au.

Description:

ENGManufacturer of special design wagons, components and provides locomotive modernizations.

Name: PLASSER IBÉRICA
Description:
Plasser & Theurer Ibérica, S. A. U. representa desde hace más de 50 años a Plasser & Theurer, empresa líder en todo el mundo en el desarrollo de maquinaria de construcción y mantenimiento de superestructura ferroviaria, a través de la venta de equipos y del servicio posventa para la Península Ibérica, principalmente.
Nuestras líneas de negocio relacionadas con los servicios posventa son: repuestos y consumibles, proyectos, formación y servicio técnico.
Todas ellas son vitales para el correcto mantenimiento de una maquinaria de alto valor añadido, como las que desarrolla Plasser & Theurer.
Esta maquinaria está diseñada para desempeñar trabajos de alta precisión y calidad, así como cumplir los requisitos de seguridad exigibles a una máquina ferroviaria.
Para poder garantizar el lema de rendimiento, precisión y fiabilidad en una máquina de este tipo, es necesario que se mantenga con materiales de primer nivel, atendida por personal experimentado y formado específicamente para este objeto.

Name: MERMEC Inc.
Description:
MERMEC Inc. is an engineering, manufacturing, and specialty services provider delivering comprehensive and innovative technologies to North and Latin American freight railroads, rail passenger transit systems, and steel works since 1994.

MERMEC Inc.'s portfolio includes track inspection cars, measurement and inspection systems, asset management software and specialty contracted services for both the railway and steel industries.

MERMEC Inc. is headquartered in Columbia, South Carolina where our team of engineers and specialists is engaged in research, design, production, and after sales support in order to bring long-term value to the North and Latin American customers.

Name: Technicentre Nouvelle-Aquitaine #TNAQ
Description: Le Technicentre Nouvelle-Aquitaine (TNAQ) rassemble les sites de Bordeaux, Limoges, Saintes, Hendaye et Brive-la-Gaillarde pour réaliser jour et nuit la maintenance des matériels en exploitation sur toute la région. Les interventions du TNAQ vont du dépannage réalisé en 1 heure suite à un signalement, jusqu’aux interventions nécessitant l’arrêt des matériels pendant plusieurs jours. Les opérations préventives sont programmées par périodicité kilométrique ou temporelle avec notamment le remplacement d’organes tels que bogies, pantographes, essieux…

Name: RAIL VIKAS NIGAM LIMITED
Description: RAIL VIKAS NIGAM LIMITED is a Railroad Manufacture company located in Plot No. 25, First Floor, August Kranti Bhawan, Bhikaji Cama Place, R. K. Puram, New Delhi, Delhi, India.

Name: SAFETY FER
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2010, SAFETY FER développe son savoir-faire et diversifie son activité dans le but de réaliser des prestations de sécurité et de signalisation ferroviaires de qualité.

Avec un effectif grandissant de plus de 120 salariés, nous effectuons nos différentes missions sur tout le territoire français.

   Perchage et Retour Courant Traction

Signalisation ferroviaire
