Name: A&K Railroad Materials, Inc.
Description:
A&K Railroad Materials, is the nation's leading supplier of new and used track materials. Headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, A&K has regional sales offices, satellite sales offices and a network of storage and distribution centers strategically located throughout the United States. Together, these offices and locations maintain the most extensive and comprehensive inventory of new, relay, and reconditioned rail and track materials in the nation.
   The reasons to choose A&K Railroad Materials are clear. A&K's team of rail specialists deliver the quality products you need on time and exactly right. They back up commitments with performance.
   Railroad professionals around the world know when they need it, A&K has it all. Such as fasteners from our own fasteners division, a trackwork manufacturing plant, continuous welding plant and fleet of CWR trains. We also travel the world for materials our customers need, buying and recovering about 500 miles of track every year.

Name: SATEBA Group
Description: Sateba is a European Specialist in Precast Concrete Sleepers and Infrastructure. Innovative solutions include vibration attenuation sleepers and bearers used on key projects including Crossrail in the UK, TGV in France and ICE in Germany.

Name: Strukton Rail A/S
Description:
Strukton Rail A/S er en jernbaneentreprenør, som opbygger og vedligeholder jernbanen med det mål at skabe en sikker, attraktiv og punktlig sportrafik. Den danske virksomhed indgår i den hollanske koncern Strukton Rail, som er en af Europas største jernbanevirksomheder med ca. 4000 ansatte fordelt i seks lande.

Strukton Rail er førende på forebyggende vedligehold og har udviklet avancerede målemetoder til at finde fejlene på infrastrukturen, før de forsinker togene. Kombinationen af Struktons brug af avanceret teknologi og geografiske bredde gør det muligt at tilbyde den bedst mulige løsning til hver en tid. Vi er anerkendte af vores kunder for vores høje troværdighed - vi agerer europæisk, men med en lokal tilstedeværelse.

Name: Nomad Tech
Description:
Nomad Tech was created as a Joint Venture by Nomad Digital, the global leader for high-availability wireless solutions to the transportation sector and EMEF, the Portuguese Railways company for rolling stock maintenance, to meet the explosion in the demand of solutions for reducing the Life Cycle Cost of the Rolling Stock.

Nomad Tech will further develop the combination of Nomad Digital existing market-leading fleet connectivity and EMEF as a global pioneer in developing and applying the most modern maintenance strategies and condition based maintenance solutions, as well as eco-friendly solutions, which provide significant cost saving solutions for the railway market, into groundbreaking new products and innovation for the railway and transport industry.

Name: Integrity Rail Products
Description:
Our company exists to bring customers and suppliers in the railway industry together. We represent and distribute products and services to the North American rail industry. Our product lines include:
tinbin TC2 vacuum excavator attachment - BSB Maschinenbau GmbH 
railroad excavator attachments - BSB Maschinenbau GmbH
EasyDrill directional drilling attachment

Name: Trackmobile LLC
Description: Trackmobile, a Marmon/Berkshire Hathaway company, is the leading manufacturer of bi-modal railcar movers, with more than 11,000 sold globally. The LaGrange, Ga.-based company created the railcar movement category in 1948 as a solution to specific customer needs in railcar switching. Trackmobile focuses on setting the standard for railcar movement equipment that is efficient, cost effective, safe, and easy to operate. While highly customizable for unique customer applications, Trackmobiles provide the best value with the lowest operational lifetime cost in the industry. For more information, visit www.trackmobile.com.

Name: Canray Ulaşım
Description: Yeşilova Topluluğu'nun alüminyum alanındaki yarım asrı aşan uzmanlığının demiryolu sektörüne yönelik adımlarla desteklendiği en genç üyesi olan Canray Ulaşım, 2018 yılında kuruldu. Yerli ve milli projelerde önemli sorumluluklar almasının yanında global demiryolu sistemi şirketleri için tavanlar, aydınlatmalar, hava kanalları, yan paneller, kaplamalar, yan duvar bağlantı parçaları ve bagaj rafları gibi tüm iç trim ve dış aksam bileşenlerin üretimini yapan Canray Ulaşım, raylı sistemlerde hafif malzemelerin önemini göz önünde bulundurarak bu amaca özel çözümler tasarlıyor. Canray Ulaşım; Avrupa, Asya, Afrika, Arap Yarımadası ve son olarak Amerika bölgesinde sağladığı önemli iş birlikleri ile dünya standartlarında hizmet vermeye devam ediyor. Yatırım ve ihracat atağıyla globalleşme sürecinde kısa zamanda emin adımlar atan Canray Ulaşım, demiryolu endüstrisine nitelikli ve yenilikçi çözümleriyle değer katmayı sürdürüyor.

Name: STADSBADER RAIL NV
Description:
Stadsbader Rail is a dynamic and ambitious contractor, proudly part of the renowned Stadsbader Group. We are a leading specialist in railway infrastructure, with a strong focus on track construction and catenary systems. We deliver high-quality services and solutions to ensure the efficiency and safety of railway networks. Our expertise covers a wide range of activities, including the construction and maintenance of railway tracks and the installation and management of catenary systems essential for rail electrification.

Our headquarters is strategically located in Enghien, at the heart of Belgium, close to Brussels. This central location enables us to operate efficiently and respond quickly to both clients and project sites throughout the country. We are proud to work with key public entities such as INFRABEL, NMBS, STIB, De Lijn, and TEC, as well as a variety of private clients with railway connections. With our extensive experience and technical expertise, we not only offer cutting-edge solutions, but also innovative approaches that contribute to the safety, reliability, and sustainability of the railway network. We are actively involved in the modernization of Belgium’s rail network, maintaining the highest standards of quality and safety in every project we undertake.

Name: Curry Rail Services
Description:
Curry Rail Services is a premier provider of manufactured products to the railroad industry.  Our Locomotive Division has extensive experience in engineering and manufacturing top-of-the-line products, on time, and at the most competitive rate.  Our shop has the capabilities of repairing and modifying locomotives and freight cars. 

CRS Freight Car Repair Division abilities include:
Rule 88 Rebuilds
Light Maintenance
Wreck Repair
Inspections
Full Exterior Paint Facility w/ Separate Blast Booth
Full Interior Paint/Coating Booth
Car Cleaning with non-toxic commodity
Lite to major modification program work
In-house engineering staff available to assist with any project

Name: Zephir S.p.A.
Description:
Zephir was founded in 1969, designing and manufacturing heavy-duty towing vehicles for industrial applications, from steelwork to intermodal terminals and airports.

In 1977, Zephir became the first world producer of an innovative tractor: the LOCOTRACTOR, a rail – road vehicle able to be on and off – railed from tracks, vastly increasing efficiency and reducing working costs.

After many improvements over the years, today the LOK range has 11 different models suitable for working in many areas, such as industrial plants logistic centers, interports and ports, rail deposits, and more.

In 1991 two new Electric ranges were created: CRAB (bimodal rail/road vehicles) and KUBO, innovative electric vehicles which could operate in small areas, such as tunnels, metropolitans railways, and railway workshops.

To adapt to market development and new customer requirements, Zephir has created the latest ranges: LOK E (electric bimodal rail/road vehicle) and LOK (Rail Only).

LOK E combines the first Zephir range (LOK) and the electric engine, guaranteeing high performance with low environmental impact.

In December of 2016, Zephir was acquired by Marmon Holdings Inc., to become a part of their Rail and Leasing Sector. Marmon is a Berkshire Hathaway company, comprised of 11 diverse industrial sectors and more than 125 autonomous manufacturing and service companies.

Beginning in January of 2019, Zephir became a pillar company in the newly-formed Global Railcar Mover Group. Today, as part of Berkshire Hathaway and Marmon Holdings, Inc.’s Global Railcar Mover Group, Trackmobile, Zephir, and LEAF Locomotive continually set new standards for railcar movement equipment with innovations in efficiency, reliability, safety, and ease of operation.

For any information zephir@zephir.eu

Name: Pandrol SA
Description: Pandrol SA (Pty) Ltd is the leading supplier of a wide range of high-quality railway products to the railways and mines of Southern Africa, including full technical backup service.

Name: Racine Railroad Products
Description: Racine Railroad Products is a railroad manufacturing company located in Mount Pleasant, WI. We specialize in Maintenance-of-Way equipment. We have been designing, manufacturing and servicing quality Maintenance-of-Way equipment for the railroad industry since 1970. Commitment to our customers is our top priority. This means designing and manufacturing equipment with a heavy emphasis on safety, performance and reliability.

Name: ROBEL Rail Automation
Description: Wir beschäftigen uns mit Entwicklung, Fertigung, Vertrieb und Service von automatisierten Instandhaltungs- und Messlösungen für Bahnbau- und Gleisinstandhaltungslösungen.

Name: ANX Grupo
Description:
Com estrutura própria, com mais de 70.000m² de área, localizada estrategicamente junto a um dos maiores polos petrolíferos do país localizados na cidade de Paulinia-SP, a ANX conta com ramal ferroviário próprio capaz de receber e enviar vagões e locomotivas para todo o Brasil.
Referência no setor ferroviário, desde a década de 90,  a ANX se destaca na manutenção e construção de  vagões e vias férreas, além de oferecer serviços  especiais relacionados à malha ferroviária, transportes  e equipamentos pesados. Em 2022 amplia sua gama de serviços graças a sinergia existente e entra no mercado de reforma de compactadores de lixo, reforma de maquinas linha amarela e aplicação de poliuréia.
Atuação diferenciada no setor de Facilities, contribuindo  com serviços especializados, qualidade e produtividade,  tornando as operações de seus clientes mais  competitivas e sustentáveis.

Name: Vossloh Tie Technologies
Description:
Vossloh is committed to serving North America railroads with track products that are safe, innovative, and cost effective. Our comprehensive offering of rail infrastructure products includes special trackwork, rail fastening systems, pre-stressed concrete ties, signaling and switch control products, and rail lifecycle services. Vossloh companies work closely to leverage this complementary product portfolio to provide our customers with better overall rail infrastructure solutions.

We are dedicated to providing enhanced service to the core North American railroad markets including Class I’s, transits, freight – regional, short line, industrial lines, and rail served facilities. Our experienced salesforces are organized to serve these railroad markets, utilizing the entire Vossloh product portfolio to provide comprehensive solutions for every type of rail infrastructure project. A complete solution from a single source, Vossloh offers the most in overall rail infrastructure investment.

http://www.vossloh-north-america.com/us/imprint/

Name: COMET Industries
Description:
Established in 1963, COMET started as a single company servicing, supplying, and installing the area’s railroad microwave communications network. A commitment to service built a strong reputation throughout the Midwest as a business partner trusted to find solutions. Our ability to keep pace with technology and recognize needs allowed us to continue delivering solutions to help our customers improve their operations.

Today, COMET Industries, Inc. and subsidiaries is comprised of four companies: COMET Rail Products, Inc., COMET Communications & Signal, Inc., COMET Electronics LLC., and COMET Port Services LLC. One of our business strengths is market diversity and being a prominent supplier to the rail and transportation industry for AEI communications, OCR technology, freight car parts, reconditioned truck casting material, and other related services. Where each company is slightly different with its own unique requirements, each is bound to one core value – service. Exceptional service continues the success for COMET and shapes our organizational culture with an attitude that brings continuity to our approach across all markets.

Please visit our website to learn more about our offerings.

Name: RL Components | CAF Group
Description:
CAF Equipment and Components is a key player within CAF Rail Services, the CAF Group´s services division, as a Centre of Excellence in Equipment and Components to address the challenges of the railway industry.

Our extensive experience has enabled us to develop a portfolio of products and services focused on the operational improvement of our customers' maintenance activities:

- Maintenance and improvement of Equipment and Components
- Supply and management solutions of Spare Parts
- Comprehensive solutions in Workshop Equipment
- Fleet refurbishment and Accident repairs

Each area has a distinctive value proposal, but all of them are aligned with our customers' key objectives: availability, life cycle cost optimization and safety.

Name: C.E.M.E.S. S.p.A.
Description:
C.E.M.E.S. S.p.A. - Costruzioni Elettroferroviarie - Meccaniche -Edili - Stradali.
Fondata nel 1933 a Sapri (SA), come ditta individuale da Salvatore MADONNA, la C.E.M.E.S. S.p.A. ha iniziato la propria attività nel campo delle opere elettriche e civili quando ancora gran parte della rete ferroviaria non era elettrificata. Nei decenni che seguirono il dopoguerra si cimenta nelle prime opere di elettrificazione ferroviaria diventando una delle più versatili aziende nel campo della manutenzione. Ha raggiunto il suo attuale assetto societario attraverso un lungo e costante processo di trasformazione e innovazione tecnologica che ha consentito di ottenere risultati qualitativi tali da farla annoverare tra le più qualificate imprese nel campo della elettrificazione ferroviaria, del trasporto dell’energia, della carpenteria media e pesante nonché nel campo delle opere civili.

STORIA
Fondata nel 1933 a Sapri (SA), come ditta individuale da Salvatore MADONNA, la C.E.M.E.S. S.p.A. ha iniziato la propria attività nel campo delle opere elettriche e civili quando ancora gran parte della rete ferroviaria non era elettrificata. Nei decenni che seguirono il dopoguerra si cimenta nelle prime opere di elettrificazione ferroviaria diventando una delle più versatili aziende nel campo della manutenzione.

Name: Knorr-Bremse Tinqueux - Systèmes Ferroviaires France
Description:
Créée en 1972, Knorr-Bremse Systèmes Ferroviaires France est la filiale française du groupe Knorr-Bremse pour la branche ferroviaire. Sa mission est de concevoir, vendre et maintenir les équipements et prestations associées pour l'ensemble des marques du groupe, durant toute la vie des matériels ferroviaires (tramway, métro, train régional, train de banlieue, train à grande vitesse, voiture passager, wagon). La société possède trois branches d'activité : la fourniture de systèmes de freinage, de portes et de climatisation, ainsi qu'une branche de services pour les activités de pièces de rechange, de révision et de maintenance. Elle génère un chiffre d'affaires d'environ 64 millions d'euros.

Vous pouvez consulter notre page concernant notre politique de respect des données personnelles : https://www.knorr-bremse.com/en/footer/data-protection/data-protection-declaration-knorr-bremse-ag/

Name: VNR Infrastructures Limited
Description:
VNR GROUP

VNR Group is focused on infrastructure contracting and development activities with specialization on railway infrastructure for the last 26 years. The group has been promoted by Mr. V. Narayana Reddy. The group presently operates through four entities / divisions:
VNR Infrastructures Ltd, the Group’s flagship company, specializes and focuses on infrastructure contracting activities namely rail signaling & telecommunication works, green field and brown field rail tracks, irrigation and aviation projects. The company has accumulated extensive experience of executing contracts for the construction of signals and telecommunications work for the Indian Railways for the last 26 years.
VNR Rail Infrastructures Pvt Ltd. is a rail infrastructure development company that focuses on Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) projects of Indian Railways. The company had bid for the re-development of New Delhi Railway Station in consortium with M/s. Morgan Stanley Infrastructure and the SAVE group of Venice, Italy. Our consortium led by M/s Essar Projects Ltd along with other members M/s Leighton and Gayarti Projects had participated in Reference for Qualification (RFQ) and technically qualified for Hyderabad Rail Metro Project. The company has recently entered into a MoU with M/s. Seoul Metro of South Korea to work jointly in bidding and executing metro projects in India and also undertake O&M works in rail based projects like metro projects and major railway sidings etc.
VNR Powertech Pvt Ltd. is in the process of setting up a 660 MW super critical thermal power plant near the Krishnapatnam Port, Andhra Pradesh, India.
VNR Logistics Pvt Ltd provides comprehensive integrated logistics services and solutions to iron ore exporting and coal importing Indian companies.

Name: Loram Maintenance of Way, Inc.
Description: Previously known as Georgetown Rail Equipment Company (GREX), Loram Technologies provides innovative solutions in track inspection, friction management, ballast profiling, and structural monitoring for the rail industry.

Name: Railway Tie Association
Description:
The Railway Tie Association was founded in St. Louis, Missouri in 1919. 

Our mission since 1919: To ensure that the engineered wood crosstie system continues to evolve and improve in order to remain cost-effective and to meet the ever-changing requirements of track systems around the world.

Name: Türkiye Vagon Sanayi A.Ş.
Description: GELECEĞİN TEKNOLOJİSİNİ GÜNÜMÜZE TAŞIYORUZ

Name: Strukton Rail Belgium
Description:
Strukton Rail NV is uw betrouwbare partner voor aanleg, onderhoud en vernieuwing van sporen, kraanbanen, seininrichting en bovenleiding. Dankzij onze eigen Survey & Engineeringsafdeling en expertise in optic fiber zijn we uniek in het Belgische spoorlandschap. Dit maakt ons dé aangewezen partner om u volledig te ‘ontzorgen’.

Strukton Rail SA est votre partenaire de confiance pour la mise en place et la rénovation des voies, des voies de grues, de la signalisation et des caténaires. Grace à notre propre division de survey et d’ingénierie, et notre expertise dans le domaine de la fibre optique, nous sommes uniques dans le secteur ferroviaire belge. Ceci fait de nous le partenaire désigné pour faire face à vos soucis.

Name: Brookville Equipment Corporation
Description: Brookville Equipment was established in 1918 and over its rich history has primarily been involved in the manufacture of rail mounted vehicles.  Brookville Equipment is an original equipment manufacturer strategically situated in four markets: underground mining and tunneling locomotives, commuter locomotives, freight locomotives, and streetcar/trolley cars.

Name: Omaha Track, Inc.
Description:
Omaha Track has been providing quality, reliable service to the railroad industry since 1983.  Formerly known as The Tie Yard of Omaha, we began business with three employees selling railroad ties to landscapers in Omaha, Nebraska.  Since that simple beginning, we have grown into the leading railroad material supply company and services contractor in North America.

Omaha Track provides products and services to Class 1 and Short Line railroads, rail contractors and industries across North America.  With our growth and expansion of services, we have “re-branded” the company and changed our name to Omaha Track to better represent all aspects of our business.

Omaha Track has the management, dedicated employees, insurance, bonding and financial resources to provide quality service to our customers year after year.  We are committed to remaining the industry leader by focusing on continual growth with our existing products and services, as well as expansion into new areas in the railroad industry.

To serve our customers more efficiently and to remain focused on their needs, Omaha Track consists of three separate operating divisions supported by our corporate office located in Omaha, Nebraska.

Name: AFF - Les Ateliers de Fabrication Ferroviaire
Description:
AFF specializes in the transformation, repair and maintenance of railway rolling stock: locomotives, passenger coaches, wagons and main components.

We offer our customers a complete range of services that is unique in the market: design and technical consulting, industrial operations, maintenance management and operations.

Our strengths: a close-knit team of skilled and experienced technicians in the design office and the production workshop, our ability to manage traditional techniques and innovate with modern technologies, and our ECE certification.

Name: NEOTEC Développement
Description:
La société NEOTEC a été fondée en 1991 en Midi-Pyrénées, région traditionnellement tournée vers les Hautes Technologies.
Grâce à son expertise dans l’étude, la conception et la fabrication de véhicules, d’engins spéciaux et d’organes de transmissions, NEOTEC s’est bâti au fil des ans une solide réputation auprès de divers grands constructeurs mondiaux. 
Dans le cadre de sa stratégie de croissance, NEOTEC est aujourd’hui devenu un constructeur à part entière et reconnu de par le monde pour la conception et fabrication d'engins Rail Route et d'équipement modulaires pour les travaux ferroviaires, de systèmes de transmission ferroviaire, d’engins pour l’aéronautiques et les lignes & réseaux.
Son savoir-faire et ses compétences permettent d’apporter aujourd’hui de la créativité à ses clients et d’offrir une palette de Produits et de Services efficaces et fiables.

Het laatste vertaalt zich in de praktijk onder meer in circulaire verpakkingen (ultimo 2023) en een uniek reststromen- en revisiebeleid (reversed logistics). 

Daarnaast ondersteunen en adviseren we rail engineers, tender- en productiemanagers, werkvoorbereiders, projectleiders en uitvoerders bij het ontwikkelen en toepassen van de meest efficiënte en duurzame projectoplossingen (ketenintegratie). We zijn extra trots op onze innovatieve, kostenbesparende smart solutions, die kunnen ontstaan door met onze klanten in een zo vroegtijdig mogelijk stadium van elk bouw- en onderhoudstraject mee te denken. Door het organiseren van kennisbijeenkomsten met technische specialisten van zowel opdrachtgevers, netbeheerders als leveranciers verhogen we in Nederland de kennis en inzichten binnen ons specifieke vakgebied van bovenleidingen.

Het motiveert ons dat onze klanten ons ervaren als een solide en persoonlijk betrokken partner bij het succesvol en zonder faalkosten behalen van hun eindresultaat: een hoogwaardig duurzame railinfra energievoorziening bij het aanleggen en onderhouden van een efficiënt en rendabel openbaar railvervoer. 
Neem contact op met onze collega’s specialisten Ilse van de Ploeg, Felix Wagenaar of Wim Kok. 
Benut onze vakkennis, service en meest complete voorraad en neem voorsprong in bovenleidingstechniek.

Name: REAL Power Supply Upgrade
Description:
As part of Network Rail's £1.2 billion East Coast Upgrade, we’re improving the power supply on the East Coast Main Line to enable faster, quieter and more environmentally friendly electric trains to run. The upgrade has already paved the way for the introduction of new trains, such as LNER’s Azuma and Hull Trains’ Paragon fleets.

Passengers will benefit from:
More seats, additional services and improved performance, and reliability.

The upgrade will be completed in two phases:
Phase 1
Phase 1 of the project began in 2014 and and was completed in 2020.

The following upgrades have already been completed:

Installation of 23 substations along the route laying 600km of new cabling
construction of foundations and structures to support overhead line equipment New 400kv connection to the main National Grid
Further upgrades are planned to increase resilience and reliability along the route. These upgrades include additional sub-stations, track based cabinets and feeder stations.

Phase 2
The Power Supply Upgrade powered forward into its second phase in September 2020, when a £216.2m contract was awarded to the Rail Electrification Alliance.

Phase 2 of the project involves the installation of feeder and substations along the route, capacity upgrades, new 132kv connection at Hambleton junction and upgrades to existing power supply connections.

This phase will deliver upgraded power to the East Coast Main Line railway 
 between Doncaster and Edinburgh and will include:

Installing 27 new traction substations
Installing 1000 km new cabling including feeder cables and telecoms cabling
Construction of supporting foundations and structures for substations and to support overhead line equipment
Introduction of 2 New Static Frequency Converter Compounds at 132kV supply connection points.

Alliance Partners include: Jacobs, J Murphy & Sons, Network Rail, Siemens 
Mobility, Systra & VolkerRail

Description:
As Canada’s comprehensive railway provider, Ronsco is proud to supply a gamut of solutions that scale with your needs.

Home to one of North America’s largest manufacturers of freight car axles and Canada’s leading Wheelshop, supplying rail freight, passenger and transit industries. An extensive 46-acre repair facility and mobile services spanning the country.

Individually these are achievements worth celebrating and proof of our clients earned trust. When combined our capabilities form a commanding level of service unrivaled in Canada.

Established in 1968 by two experienced railroaders that shared an entrepreneurial spirit, Ronsco entered the industry as a dropship parts distributor. The game changing inventions we make can help not only Bane NOR but also other railway infrastructure owners and railway infrastructure managers worldwide. Our patent in Norway is co-owned by Bane NOR. Patents in other markets is pending and fully owned by Railway Robotics with PCT application filled.

Description:

Historie úspěšné značky sahá do roku 1947, kdy byl ve Vídni založen "Institut für Technische Forschung und Entwicklung" zaměřený na vývoj a výrobu speciálních zařízení pro průmyslové firmy.

V roce 1997 koupil společnost IFE německý koncern Knorr-Bremse s tradicí sahající do roku 1905.

V České republice se historie společnosti IFE datuje se do roku 1996, kdy byla na základech společnosti Hády - Metall založena IFE-CR, a.s.

V současnosti v moderním závodě v CTP Modřice pracuje 680 zaměstnanců, s ročním výsledkem 20 tisíc dveří, 12,5 tisíc pohonů a 3 tisíce schodů jsme klíčovým výrobním závodem společnosti IFE.

Name: SKRail
Description:
SK Rail is a specialised supplier of preowned track construction and maintenance machines, mainly those which were manufactured by Plasser & Theurer and MATISA originally. Also SK Rail supplies construction and maintenance machine for the overhead catenary, both, rail bound and road/rail machines.
For construction & maintenance site logistics as well as for railway transport companies, private and industrial railway and work sidings SK Rail supplies preowned locomotives, from shunters and industrial locos from 120 – 1200 hp to mid range and big diesel locos from 1000 – 4000 hp.
Our service for industrial railways and work sidings also covers shunting vehicles and robots both new and second hand, road/rail or rail only, shunting gear such as scotches, wagon and track locks, re-railers, pushing road, shunting signals, etc. as well as brake shoes, both metallic as well as composite non-metallic, for locos and wagons.
Second hand wagons represent a growing share of turnover as well. Apart from typical wagons for construction and maintenance purposes such as ballast hopper wagons, flat wagons for transport of vrails, track panels and sleepers, dirt wagons for ballast cleaning machines etc., SK Rail also supplies special purpose wagons for transport of goods. Hydraulic and pneumatic tipping wagons for bulk loads of aggregates as well as tank wagons for the chemical and petro-chemical industry are part of the supply programme.
The parent company, SK Consulting GmbH, is proud to have a team of very experienced consultants for track construction and track renewal, for track construction and maintenance machines technology as well as for Locomotives and wagons. Also SK Consulting’s team for work sidings and industrial railways has an excellent record for modernising work and industrial railways and sidings.

Name: G.G.Tronics India Pvt. Ltd
Description: G.G.Tronics India Private Limited, established in the year 1991 and its headquarters situated in Silicon Valley of India Bengaluru, is engaged in the design, manufacturing, supply, and installation of electronic safety embedded systems for the railway transport sector. Our product line includes Single & Multi single Digital Axle counter SSDAC/ MSDAC for track section, Train collision avoidance system (KAVACH), [Fail safe electronic flasher] [ Fail saft electronic timer]. Our operations are currently spread across an area of 75000 sqft, with a state-of-the-art manufacturing setup that includes set up with leaded and fully automated surface mount technology production line, component assembly, Automatic PCB cleaning machine, semi-automated wave soldering machine. Our panel assembly facility can produce panels up to 42U, cabinets, and chassis of various sizes. We have highly skilled and talented research and development engineers who contribute to the design and development of new products with the goal of improving safety, performance, and efficiency. Independent/our Verification & Validation team thoroughly tests new product designs for safety and reliability. We have a specialized engineering service team who are experts in signalling & telecom designs, documentation of projects related to railway transportation. With over 400+ employees and 80 R&D professionals including on-the-ground experts, operating across PAN India. Our method complies with the CMMI Level-3, ISO 9001-2015, and CENELEC SIL 4 standards. G.G. Tronics is the first Indian firm to achieve product development with CENELEC 50159-part B Communication standard for open systems implemented, offering unique solutions in the safety application domain with the advanced safety embedded system technology.

Name: Hürlimann Railtec AG
Description:
Hürlimann Railtec AG is a young company that used an in-house innovation to enter the market in 2014. In the years prior to our founding in 2017, we developed a system for applying polyurethane binding agent, allowing ballast to be bonded with unprecedented precision. This allows a ballast bed shoulder to be bonded so precisely and evenly that it supports the highest “normal” regular traffic (reduced to speeds of 80 km/h). Its performance is outstanding.

Years of development accompanied by countless tests by rail operators in Switzerland and Austria have given us an absolutely unique, successful technology, subject to an international application with extraordinary favourable international serach report, established by the European Patent Officer, for obtaining worldwide strong patent protection.

We are currently performing work in Switzerland, Italy, and Austria. We have grown tremendously since 2017 and are looking for partnerships in other countries. Find out more about work we have performed under “References” and about the wide range of potential applications for ballast bonding under “Areas of application”.

Name: Dayton-Phoenix Group, Inc.
Description:
Since 1939, Dayton-Phoenix Group has been at the heart of heavy industry designing, engineering, and manufacturing electrical and mechanical solutions that keep railroads, mining operations, and off-highway equipment running at peak performance. Born from a proud tradition of American innovation in the heartland, we’ve spent generations solving the toughest challenges in the harshest industries.

Through decades of transformation, we’ve built a legacy of trust with OEMs and operators across North America and now, we’re expanding that reach across the globe. Today, as industries embrace cleaner, smarter systems, DPG leads the charge with cutting-edge electrification and hybrid solutions that reduce emissions, increase efficiency, and extend equipment life.

We’re not just keeping up… we’re building what’s next.

Name: CRRC ZELC Verkehrstechnik GmbH (CRRC ZELC EUROPE)
Description:

Since December 2015, CRRC ZELC EUROPE (headquartered in Vienna, Austria) has been responsible for all sales and marketing activities in Europe. The Vienna office serves as a platform for international contacts, technical exchanges and services. 

Innovative technologies, such as hybrid engines, and individual transport solutions remain our focus in the European market.

In addition to the construction of rolling stock vehicles, our service package also includes long-term maintenance and servicing of projects through our 4S shops.

CRRC ZELC EUROPE is committed to provide our customers with environmentally friendly products and services through the development of innovative technologies and green transport solutions.

Name: VIBGYOR INNOVATIONS PVT LTD
Description:
Vibgyor Innovations is a leading railway coach furnishing and modernization solutions provider, dedicated to transforming passenger coaches with superior design, engineering, and craftsmanship. We specialize in end-to-end furnishing, refurbishment, and component manufacturing for all types of railway coaches — ensuring quality, comfort, and reliability on every journey.
With a strong focus on innovation, safety, and sustainability, we deliver products that meet the highest railway standards, including EN 45545 compliance for fire safety. Our in-house design, manufacturing, and installation capabilities allow us to provide customized, turnkey solutions that align with the evolving needs of modern railways.
At Vibgyor Innovations, we take pride in our commitment to excellence, on-time project delivery, and customer satisfaction — making us a trusted partner in India’s journey toward railway modernization.

Name: AXO
Description:
AXO upgrades railway infrastructure with retrofit predictive maintenance technologies to reduce costs, increase safety, and boost productivity.

Our solutions inform about the condition of the infrastructure in real-time, allowing service teams to be dispatched according to demand. AXO's monitoring systems enable operators of railway infrastructures to detect and remedy weak points well in advance. In this way, they improve the availability of rail networks, extend the service life of the facilities and make the maintenance processes more efficient.

Name: Fa-Aço - Empresa de Ferro e Aço para Construção Civil
Description:
A FA-AÇO, é uma empresa com mais de 20 anos de experiência e atuação no mercado de aço para a construção civil. Trabalhamos com um sistema qualificado de corte, dobra e armação de aço capaz de agilizar o tempo de execução dos trabalhos e promover economia aos canteiros de obras, garantindo um excelente custo-benefício.

Nossa expertise e credibilidade nos tornaram referência para o setor na região da Grande São Paulo. Hoje, a FA-AÇO se destaca como uma das empresas do ramo que mais investe em tecnologia e inovação, com o objetivo de prestar um serviço de alto padrão de qualidade.

Com uma equipe altamente capacitada e um produto que se destaca pela qualidade, garantimos um atendimento customizado, de acordo com a necessidade de cada cliente, fornecendo o melhor e mais ágil sistema de armação de aço, com a referência e qualidade de produtos dentro das normas ABNT.

A FA-AÇO também trabalha com a comercialização de madeira de pinus, um material com excelente custo-benefício e proveniente de áreas de manejo sustentável. Mais do que uma distribuidora de aço para a construção civil, a FA-AÇO é hoje uma empresa capaz de oferecer aos seus clientes economia, praticidade e agilidade para obras de todos os portes.

Entre em contato conosco e saiba tudo o que podemos oferecer para a sua obra!

A sua obra merece o melhor. A sua obra merece FA-AÇO!

Name: Diversified Metal Fabricators, Inc.
Description:
Since 1972, DMF has been a family‑owned manufacturer of hi‑rail gear and rail‑equipment solutions — supplying railroads, contractors, OEMs, and transit systems across North America and beyond.

Our portfolio includes a full range of railgear and maintenance‑of‑way equipment: from light‑duty pickup‑truck conversions to heavy‑duty rail‑vehicle systems, excavator railgear, remote‑control systems, and beyond.

Built in the USA, every unit is engineered and manufactured in‑house using advanced CNC machining, welding robotics, and rigorous quality control — designed to withstand the demands of the railroad environment while delivering reliability and longevity.

Over the decades, DMF has delivered tens of thousands of units globally and supplied every Class‑1 railroad in the U.S., along with major freight carriers, short‑line railroads, contractors, and commuter systems across North America.

But DMF is more than a manufacturer — we’re a partner. Through responsive parts and service support, same-day shipping on standard parts, and a dedicated team, we keep our customers operational, safe, and efficient on‑track.

Name: Frateur - De Pourcq
Description:

We also specialise in crane and industrial track construction. Our activities cover anything to do with rails or tracks, whether large or small: from manufacturing and selling railway equipment or researching and developing tram systems to installing, replacing and maintaining train, tram, metro and crane tracks.

The passion for railways has been passed on from generation to generation and is expressed by means of a driven and specialised team.

Name: Lentorata Oy
Description:
Lentorata on uusi, suunnitteilla oleva 25 kilometrin pituinen ratayhteys, joka yhdistää Helsinki-Vantaan lentoaseman kaukojunaliikenteen piiriin. 

Uusi yhteys erkanee pääradasta Pasilassa ja kulkee lentoaseman kautta Keravan aseman eteläpuolelle Jäspilään, jossa se liittyy takaisin päärataan. Kaikkiaan 24 kilometriä Lentoradasta sijoittuu maan alle tunneliin.

Lentorata luo suorat kaukojunayhteydet lentoasemalle ja mahdollistaa nykyistä nopeammat junayhteydet lentoasemalle kaikkialta Suomesta. Nopeampien matka-aikojen lisäksi se tuo lisää raidekapasiteettia ruuhkaiselle Pasila–Kerava-välille, ja parantaa näin junaliikenteen toimintavarmuutta koko maassa sekä mahdollistaa junatarjonnan lisäämisen vuorokauden vilkkaimpina aikoina.

Lue lisää: lentorata.fi

The Airport Line is a new, planned 30-kilometre rail connection that will connect Helsinki Airport to long-distance train traffic.

The new connection separates from the Finnish main line in Pasila and runs through the airport north of Kerava to Kytömaa, where it rejoins the main line and the Lahti direct railway. A total of 28 kilometres of the Airport Line is located underground in a tunnel.

The Airport Line will create direct long-distance train connections to the airport and enable faster train connections to the airport. In addition to faster travel times, it will increase rail capacity on the congested Pasila–Kerava route, thus improving the operational reliability of train traffic and enabling an increase in train supply.

Name: CRRC Times Electric Australia Pty Ltd (CTEA)
Description:
CRRC is a global leader in sustainable transport and energy solutions, operating more than 20 production facilities worldwide—including our local manufacturing site in Morwell, Victoria. As the world’s largest supplier of rail transit equipment and the third-largest integrator of battery energy storage systems (BESS), CRRC plays a pivotal role in advancing decarbonisation technologies across industries.

With over 60 years of innovation, CRRC invests more than $445 million annually in research and development. Its portfolio includes 2,200+ patents spanning rail transportation, new energy power generation, power electronics, electric vehicles, industrial electrics, and marine engineering. This commitment to R&D drives the development of high-performance, future-ready solutions for a low-carbon world.

In Australia, CRRC is represented by CTEA. We specialise in the local manufacture of CRRC’s advanced propulsion, control, and renewable energy systems. Our team provides end-to-end project support and long-term operation and maintenance services—ensuring that global innovation is delivered with local expertise.

Name: Šinvoz d.o.o.
Description:
Šinvoz d.o.o. is a well-established company that has been operating since 1887. It specializes in the production of welded assemblies for the railway and other industries. Our services cover the entire production process, from planning and design to serial production and assembly of structural modules, components, jigs and tools. We are committed to delivering high-quality products and services to our renowned clients, and our products have been used in numerous projects around the world.
Apart from manufacturing, we also excel in the overhaul, repair, and modernization of railway vehicles, making us a leading regional provider in the industry.

Name: Maintenance of Way Equipment Services
Description:
As your go-to global marketplace for the purchase, sales, maintenance or lease of both new and used railroad equipment, Maintenance of Way Equipment Services brings a wide network of suppliers and buyers to the table to provide a cost-effective, comprehensive solution to meet our customer’s needs. We are passionate about the quality of service and goods provided to our clients. From rebuilding equipment to custom specifications, servicing equipment, and providing timely transport of products worldwide, we are dedicated to offering the most equipment options in the industry.  

Maintenance of Way Equipment Services was founded in 2018 to create a platform to bring worldwide customers to the used railway construction equipment market, MOW Equipment Services is building an online database to connect buyers and sellers globally.

Name: PantoInspect A/S
Description:
PantoInspect was the first company world-wide to develop an automated pantograph inspection system, in partnership with Banedanmark, the Danish railway infrastructure owner, around 2008. Today, PantoInspect is one of the world’s most recognized and respected brands, and a market-leading manufacturer and supplier of automated and real-time Wayside Pantograph Monitoring systems to the global Railway industry. We have supplied several pantograph monitoring systems to some of the world’s leading infrastructure owners and rolling stock operators such as Deutsche Bahn, RATP, Infrabel, Sydney Trains, Network Rail and TRA.

The PantoSystem is the state-of-the-art solution for automatic pantograph monitoring, using PantoScanners to reliably capture images and 3D scans of pantographs on high-speed trains, running up to 350 km/hour. 

Our system provides early detection of damages on carbon strips and other mechanical defects of pantograph heads, which prevents teardown of overhead wiring, eliminates operational disruptions and reduces maintenance costs.

Name: Graw (Goldschmidt)
Description:
P.U.T. GRAW sp. z o. o. is part of the Goldschmidt Group. 
Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.
 
Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.
 
Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.
 
The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.
 
We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.
 
By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.
 
Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.

Name: TÜDEMSAŞ
Description:
418.000 m2’lik toplam alanı, 110.000 m2’lik kapalı alanı, yaklaşık 1400 uzman personeli ile Ortadoğu ve Balkanlar’ın en güçlü sanayi kuruluşlarından biri olan TÜDEMSAŞ, ulusal demiryolu sektörünün faaliyet alanına giren ihtiyaçlarını karşıladığı gibi yurtdışına da Yük Vagonu ve Yedek Parçaları ile sanayi ürünleri ihraç etmektedir.

ISO 9001:2015 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi Belgesine sahip olan TÜDEMSAŞ, yük vagonu bakım-onarımı, her türlü yük vagonu ve yedek parça üretimi ile demiryolu ulaşımının gelişimine katkıda bulunmaya devam etmektedir.
Vagon Üretim, Vagon Onarım, Metal İşleri İmalat Fabrikalarından müteşekkil 3 ana üretim birimi ile bu birimlerin çalışmasında destek hizmeti sağlayan Bakım Onarım, Kalite Kontrol, Malzeme, ÜPK, Ar-Ge, Bilgi İşlem, Mali İşler, Ticaret ve Pazarlama, Personel ve Eğitim, Sağlık Sosyal İşler Daire başkanlıklarından oluşan 10 muhtelif daire başkanlığından müteşekkil bir organizasyona sahiptir. Şirket 1 başkan ve 3 üyeden oluşan Yönetim Kurulu tarafından yönetilir. Genel Müdür Yönetim Kurulu’nun da Başkanıdır.

Ülkemizin kalkınmasının ve gelişmiş ülkeler arasında layık olduğu yeri almasının ancak ve ancak sanayileşmekle olacağı bilinen bir gerçektir.

TÜDEMSAŞ da Türkiye’nin en önemli sanayi kuruluşlarından biridir. TÜDEMSAŞ dünyanın dev şirketleri arasında yerini almak ve dünya piyasalarında diğer şirketlerle rekabet edebilmek için kaliteli ve ucuz üretim yapmak zorunda olduğunun bilincindedir. Şirketin TS EN ISO 9001, TS EN ISO 14001, İSG OHSAS 18001, TS EN ISO 50001 standartları ile Avrupa Birliği normları doğrultusunda Yük vagonlarına ait imalat ve bakım-onarım alanında geçerli olan; TSI (Technical Specifications for Interoperability) Karşılıklı İşletilebilirlik Teknik Şartnamesi ve ECM( Entitiy Charge of Maintanance) Bakımdan Sorumlu Fonksiyon şartları ile uyumlu olacak şekilde yönetim sistemlerini kurmuş, dokümante etmiş ve sürdürmektedir.

Name: Medha Italy srl
Description: Medha Italy, the Italian subsidiary of the Medha Group, was born in 2018 from the acquisition of a historic niche company in power electronics, operating on the railway vehicles and trolleycars market since the 1980.  Medha Italy develops traction power and auxiliary services power electronic solutions, tailored to its customer requirements.

Name: American Railway Development Association
Description:
The American Railway Development Association (ARDA) is a not-for-profit educational trade association founded in 1906 to promote Economic Development, Real Estate Development, Technology, and Environmental Activities of North American Railroads. ARDA achieves this through the advancement of ideas and education of members to further promote the effectiveness of railway development.

ARDA encourages membership from all classes of railroads throughout North America. Members also include professionals from other associations, agencies, and railroad service partners that have a direct effect on rail business today. ARDA's membership variety provides a wide perspective on issues facing the railroad industry in the 21st Century.

ARDA's section structure and its events not only provide informative programs, but also allow members to network with their industry peers. ARDA members include representatives from all of the Class 1 railroads, several short line railroads, as well as professionals in real estate, economic development, environmental, engineering, legal, and other disciplines. ARDA events are excellent educational and networking opportunities!

Name: ΟΣΕ - OSE Hellenic Railways Organization S.A.
Description:
Ο Οργανισμός Σιδηροδρόμων Ελλάδος A.E. είναι διαχειριστής της εθνικής σιδηροδρομικής υποδομής και αρμόδιος για την εκτέλεση των αναπτυξιακών έργων υποδομής. Διαχειρίζεται, συντηρεί, λειτουργεί, εκσυγχρονίζει και επεκτείνει ένα σιδηροδρομικό δίκτυο πλέον των 2.200χλμ. κατά μήκος της χώρας.

Η λειτουργία του Οργανισμού αποσκοπεί σε δύο βασικούς στόχους:

Στην βελτιστοποίηση των πάσης φύσεως επιβατικών σιδηροδρομικών υπηρεσιών προς όφελος του επιβατικού κοινού και με στόχο να βρεθεί ο Σιδηρόδρομος στην κορυφή των μεταφορικών επιλογών του πολίτη.

Στην ανάπτυξη των εμπορευματικών συνδέσεων με στόχο να ενισχυθεί η ελληνική οικονομία με την ενίσχυση του διαμετακομιστικού έργου και των διευρωπαϊκών μεταφορών.

The Hellenic Railways Organization S.A. is a Group of Companies providing services, managing and maintaining the Greek railway infrastructure and carrying out the infrastructure development projects. It manages, maintains, operates, modernizes and expands a railway network extending over 2,200 km all over the country.

The Organization’s operation aims at two main targets:

Optimizing all types of passenger railway services in order to benefit the passenger public and make the Railway the citizen’s top mode of transport.

Developing freight connections in order to reinforce the Greek economy by improving the transit load and trans-European transport.

Name: voestalpine Turnout Technology Netherlands B.V.
Description:
voestalpine Turnout Technology Netherlands B.V. is al sinds 1893 dé Nederlandse specialist in bovenbouwmaterialen en wisselsystemen. Naast het ontwikkelen, produceren en leveren van bovenbouwproducten en wisselsystemen voor spoor-, tram- en metrolijnen, bieden wij tevens de oplossing voor al uw service vraagstukken. De Mobiele Baan Service levert 24/7 service en kennis voor alle werkzaamheden op en rondom het spoor. Doordat wij onze kennis en ervaring inzetten om innovaties in het spoor te realiseren, dragen we bij aan een betere infrastructuur.

Ons team bestaat uit meer dan 70 enthousiaste werknemers op de locaties Hilversum en Broek op Langedijk, waarmee we alle expertise op bovenbouwgebied gebundeld hebben in één bedrijf. Dagelijks is ons team op zoek naar vernieuwingen waarmee wij nog beter aan de wensen van onze spoorklanten kunnen voldoen. Kortom, wij zijn klaar voor elke uitdaging!

Name: NEOLOC
Description:
NEOLOC est une société spécialisée dans la location de Pelles Rail-Route et de Nacelles Rail-Route avec opérateur. Basée sur la commune de DROCOURT (62), elle intervient sur la France entière.

Voie ferrée, caténaire, signalisation, télécom, génie civil, terrassement, la connaissance des opérateurs NEOLOC de l’environnement ferroviaire et de ses métiers, permet une intervention calibrée à votre juste besoin.

Le parc NEOLOC est constitué de machines récentes toutes agrées par SNCF Réseau :

   - 19 Nacelles
   - 15 Pelles
   - 2 Engins spéciaux

La diversité du matériel permet de trouver le meilleur outil de production pour la juste intervention.

La jeunesse du parc couplée à une capacité d’intervention mécanique rapide garantit une efficience primordiale pour la réussite des projets.

Name: InnoWay Trieste
Description:
At InnoWay, we specialize in producing high-quality rail freight wagons. With a commitment to innovation and efficiency, our goal is to provide modular freight wagons that meet the diverse needs of our customers across all European gauges.
Our expert team leverages cutting-edge technology and industry best practices to deliver reliable and sustainable solutions in rail freight. Whether you are looking for customized components or fully assembled wagons, InnoWay is your trusted partner for high-performance rail logistics.
Join us on our journey to enhance the future of rail transport!

Name: MCML Projects Private Limited
Description: MCML Projects Pvt. Ltd. is (an ISO 9001- 2008 certified company) and has been associated with A.P's progress for over a considerable period of time and has a long-standing reputation for providing highly innovative and sustainable solutions for meeting the state's Rail, Road, Construction, Infrastructure and transport requirements. The company has full capabilities in engineering, project management, project execution, Irrigation projects, Automatic Fare collection – Installation, Testing and Commissioning, Signalling and Telecom of Rail Projects, Electrical – OH MAST Foundations and installations, Construction of High ways & Service Roads and Signalling Designing Projects.

Name: Maradilha Ferrovias
Description:
Nós somos a Maradilha Ferrovias, uma empresa brasileira especializada em fabricação e manutenção de peças e componentes para ferrovias. 
Desenvolvemos, planejamos e aplicamos soluções imediatas com praticidade, rapidez e qualidade em manutenção corretiva e preventiva, peças de reposição com garantia, além de visitas e liberações técnicas de vagões e locomotivas, com atendimento personalizado e humanizado.

Name: Rowe Hankins Ltd
Description:
Rowe Hankins specialises in innovative trainborne and wayside products and systems for the world’s railways. Working closely with rolling stock manufacturers, fleet operators, track owners and infrastructure contractors our experienced engineers have a long and successful track record of providing the highest level of service to rail projects worldwide.

In addition, we provide electro-mechanical and electronic products, service facilities to maintain, overhaul and repair circuit breakers, contractors and on-train monitoring and recording (OTMR) and Overspeed Protection Systems.

Name: ARCA CATENARIA
Description:
We are specialized in designing, developing and manufacturing hardware and fittings for overhead railway lines. We service the domestic and international railway electrification market and have been cleared as suppliers of the leading international railway companies.
 
We have an extensive catalog of standardized products, capable of responding to the demands of the conventional, high-speed and tramway sectors. An offer in permanent evolution that incorporates the most recent requirements and regulations. In addition, our organization is a specialist in developing customized solutions, ranging from the conception and engineering of the different alternatives, through prototyping, tooling, sampling, homologation and production, right to the final logistical implications of the project.

En ARCA estamos especializados en el diseño, desarrollo y fabricación de herrajes y accesorios para líneas ferroviarias aéreas. Damos servicio al mercado nacional e internacional de electrificación ferroviaria y hemos sido certificados como proveedores de las principales empresas ferroviarias internacionales.
 
Disponemos de un amplio catálogo de productos estandarizados, capaces de dar respuesta a las demandas del sector convencional, la alta velocidad o los tranvías. Una oferta en permanente evolución que incorpora los requisitos y normativas más recientes. Además, nuestra organización es especialista en desarrollar soluciones personalizadas, que van desde la concepción e ingeniería, pasando por el prototipado, utillaje, muestreo, homologación y producción, hasta las implicaciones logísticas finales del proyecto.

Name: SRC Industries, Inc.
Description: Railroad Materials & Equipment Supply

Name: Rail Services
Description: Rail Services è un'azienda specializzata nelle manutenzioni e riparazioni di materiale rotabile. La Rail Services opera sia nell'impianto di proprietà di Bari sia su tutto il territorio nazionale con una rete di squadre mobili. L'officina possiede un raccordo ferroviario di proprietà che facilita il trasporto di mezzi in manutenzione. La stretta collaborazione con GTS Rail, impresa ferroviaria del gruppo, garantisce un servizio autonomo e flessibile  con tracce quotidiane da e per Milano, Padova, Piacenza,Bologna, Pomezia e Marcianise. La manutenzione con squadre mobili - garantita dall'impiego di furgoni equipaggiati- assicura un intervento immediato e tempestivo da nord a sud.  L'officina è dotata di carro ponte e tornio in fossa servita da oltre 800 mt di binari raccordati. I principali servizi offerti sono la riprofilatura delle sale montate per locomotive, carri ed elettrotreni, lavorazione dischi freno, pick-up/delivery del materiale rotabile da e per Piacenza, Milano , Bologna e Padova, raccordo diretto con Bari Lamasinata, binari interni in fossa da 6 m ed estensione per ulteriori 25 m, disponibilità di sollevatori 4X15 ton e carroponte 16 ton.

Name: CRRC Qingdao Sifang Rolling Stock Research Institute Co., Ltd
Description: Qingdao Sifang Rolling Stock Research Institute Co., Ltd (hereinafter referred to as SRI), which is affiliated with China CRRC Corporation, is the specialized research institute of rail transit vehicle industry, and the important supplier of technologies and products of rail vehicle key systems.

Name: Te.Si.Fer. Srl
Description:
TeSiFer srl specialises in the design of railway signalling and telecommunication plants also for subways and trams. It has experience in design and installation both within Italy and worldwide.
It continues to expand traditional skills as well as acquiring experience in testing and commissioning of interlocking and ATP and ATC technologies.
It has developed software tools for simulation and project development together with software for intelligent management of BIM documentation and applications in the field of railway technology.
We are a group of over 50 motivated, qualified and enthusiastic people who come from the best universities and practices. We believe in dedication and new ideas that bring innovation.

Name: KAAF Rolling Stock Inc.
Description: KAAF develops and manufactures subsystems and maintenance machinery for rolling stock. It is fully specialized in the railway vehicles sector. Since its founding, it has developed many products with high added value due to R&D studies and commercialized all the products it has developed. Each work performed at KAAF serves as a stepping stone for the subsequent work, enabling continuous improvement and development. KAAF continues its economic and technological development with its commercialized and high-value-added products. KAAF aims to become a global pioneer and a playmaker brand in its sector with its expert employees who have gained many years of experience in railway vehicle design, production, and maintenance.

Name: Miller Ingenuity
Description: Miller Ingenuity is the leading expert in inventing, engineering, and delivering high-technology, safety-critical solutions for railway worker protection. With decades of industry knowledge, self-directed teams empowered to innovate, and a focus on operational excellence, Miller Ingenuity equips railway operators with the ability to mobilize passengers and freight with zero error. Miller Ingenuity’s products, led by the ZoneGuard suite, offer frontline defense solutions that benefit all functional departments of railway companies. From transportation to mechanical, safety to signal, and maintenance of way to track construction, we innovate to help you achieve excellence in everyday work through increased uptime, decreased risk, and overall peace of mind.

Name: Vancer
Description: Vancer Railway Group is a world leader in the design, engineering and distribution of maintenance-of-way (MOW) equipment and services to the rail industry. Our team of engineers, technicians, support personnel and industry experts are focused on creating solutions for the distinct needs of our railroad customers. At Vancer, we take great pride in keeping our ear to the track. We listen. We learn. And we are committed to finding successful rail industry solutions for many years to come.

Name: ERCI European Railway Clusters Initiative ASBL
Description:
Composed by 18 European Railway Clusters operating on 17 European countries, ERCI is the rail sector’s largest dedicated B2B networking organisation. 
Its goal is to bring customers, suppliers and supply chain opportunities together - from innovation to internationalisation.

Name: Stadler Service Nederland BV
Description: Stadler Service Nederland (SRS NL) houdt zich bezig met onderhoud van treinen voor klanten in Nederland. Wil je meer weten over wij wat doen? Ga dan naar www.werkenbijstadler.nl en lees er meer over.

Name: Wheelworx
Description: Wheelworx is a business built on faith, family values and unsurpassed experience. We strive to provide the customer with what they need, when they need it through integrity, honesty and unmatched customer service. Our industry leading quality program assures that our customers are getting the best possible wheelset to keep their cars rolling.

Name: SigTech Rail Consultancy Ltd
Description: SigTech Rail specialise in the signalling division of the UK Railway industry. We excel in Signalling Installation management, G110 / SMTH works. SigTech Rail are highly sought after for our expertise in plain line and S&C renewals.

Name: Assden S.A  de C.V
Description: Assden de CV specializes in developing technology for the railway transportation and energy sectors, leveraging over 20 years of experience in the metal-mechanical industry. They focus on manufacturing and maintaining equipment and components for the railway and energy industries. Additionally, the company represents international brands in Mexico. Assden Mobility, Assden International, and Assden Energy are some of the brands under their portfolio, showcasing a commitment to innovation and quality service in the sector.

Name: Arvin Tabriz Company
Description:
"Arvin Tabriz Company" with over 30 years of experience is the original Iranian manufacturer of parts, equipment and complexes for Railway Rolling Stock.

We have developed our leading position through a commitment to customer service, technical expertise, product innovation and a ‘can do’ philosophy.

Headquartered in Tehran, Iran and employs more than 300 people. Find out more: www.arvintabriz.com

Name: PITLOG Industria y Desarrollo S.L.
Description:
PITLOG S.L. desarrolla su actividad desde 2019. Se constituyó como una pequeña empresa con solo 12 trabajadores, y ha tenido un crecimiento exponencial ya que a día de hoy tenemos 8 centros de trabajo y somos ya más de 260 empleados en plantilla.
Nacimos tras la externalización de diferentes fases de producción de Stadler Rail. Y nos encargamos de la instalación de máquinas y equipos industriales, el ensamblaje, montaje e instalación de piezas, utillajes, elementos y cableado en tranvías, locomotoras y trenes.

Name: ETF Egypt
Description:
ETF designs, builds and maintains the national, private or urban railway networks on a daily basis.

Our mission is to develop safe and rapid rail mobility for people and regions. We bring proximity and expertise together to position ourselves as a 360º partner in rail transport projects.

Name: STM engineering
Description:
STM engineering is an Italian Design Studio specialised in the area of Railway, Mass transit and tramway vehicles. 
Challinging projects have been developed in Italy and worldwide, in cooperation with the major international Manufactures and Transportation Authorities. 
The mission of the company is to provide top level services, covering the "Full Development Process" including Styling Studies, Conceptual Design, 3D mathematical Models, Mock-up, Engineering and Industrial Studies including FEM/FEAM Calculations, Dynamic Calculation. Consulting and Maintenance support for rolling stock, including Rolling stock Maintenance Plans and Manuals, Admission Procedures for Track Maintenance Vehicles, ECM engineering, RAMS, CMS. Investigation into rolling stocks related accidents. Tender Documentation. Assessment of rolling stocks for technical admission process (support ISA) and CE Verification (supporting NoBo).

Name: Omega Industries, Inc.
Description: Omega Industries, Inc. is a family-owned business specializing in mainline railroad crossing supplies, dredging parts, and fabricated steel products. Founded over 40 years ago by Isidoros Garifalakis, the company has grown to employ nearly 200 people across four states. Omega is recognized for its quality workmanship and customer service, manufacturing concrete railroad crossings, track products, steel fabrication, and dredging components. With its main office in Vancouver, WA, and manufacturing plants in multiple states, Omega Industries is a prominent supplier in the United States.

Name: MG-VALDUNES
Magyar Vagon
Description:
"Modern Railway Vehicles for a Reliable Transport”

At Magyar Vagon, we are committed to providing modern rail vehicle manufacturing, repair, and maintenance solutions that cater to the unique needs of our domestic and international clients.

Our vision is to become a leading player in the rail industry, combining tradition with cutting-edge technology to shape the future of railway mobility. We strive to deliver high-quality, sustainable, and innovative solutions while upholding the highest standards of service and environmental responsibility.

With a team of dedicated experts, we aim to exceed expectations and contribute to a greener, more efficient future for transportation.

Name: Railroad Construction SAAR (RCS)
Description:
RCS, is a pioneer company in the field of Railways Constructions in the Middle East 
It is considered the Number One in North Africa , and one of The Best in the Gulf Area.

Name: Nabtesco Oclap S.r.L.
Description:
Nabtesco Oclap S.r.L. is a railroad manufacture company based out of Via Della Rimembranza 13, Piscina, Torino, Italy.
The core business of the Company is the development and production of equipments for public transport as door systems, platform screen doors, lift for PMR accessibility, brake discs.

Name: SERMANFER (Grupo CAF)
Description: SERMANFER, S.A.U se constituyó en 1998 como filial del Grupo CAF para dar servicios de garantía y mantenimiento de vehículos ferroviarios dentro del territorio nacional. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer un servicio de mantenimiento de los vehículos y sus componente mejorando la fiabilidad, seguridad, disponibilidad y confort de los mismos. La fuerte motivación de un equipo joven, dinámico y cualificado, junto con una dilatada experiencia en el sector ferroviario del Grupo CAF, han permitido aportar a la compañía los pilares esenciales de una empresa moderna en sus procesos y ambiciosa en sus objetivos.

Name: ÖzenRay Demiryolu
Description: Türkiye demiryollarında kalite ve ekonomik çözümler sunan firmaların temsilciliğini ve ticaretini yapmak için kurulmuştur. İzmir'de faaliyet gösteren şirket, 25 yıllık demiryolu tecrübesiyle büyümekte olan demiryolu sektörüne girdi.

Name: LAT Gruppe
Description:
Wir bieten vom Spezialtiefbau bis hin zur Sicherheitstechnik verschiedenste Dienstleistungen und Produkte rund um das Gleis sowie für den ÖPNV an. Um unsere Qualität kontinuierlich zu verbessern, lassen wir uns regelmäßig von Experten prüfen. Die LAT Funkanlagen-Service GmbH ist ISO 9001 zertifiziert, die LAT Fernmelde kann neben der ISO 9001 auch das Gütezeichen RAL-GZ 962/2 sowie diverse Präqualifikationsnachweise der Deutschen Bahn AG vorweisen. 

Leistungsportfolio & alle Referenzen: www.lat.de

-- 

LAT is a German, second generation family owned and operated firm for mobility related services, including (cable) construction for railroad tracks and passenger safety systems for public transport. The SME is managed by two sisters, and supplies a broad range of services and products from special civil- to safety engineering for every aspect of trackage, including signal-, construction- and video surveillance systems.

Name: TTM Rail
Description:
TTM Rail exist with the purpose of helping our customers keep their rolling stock moving reliably, efficiently, safely and sustainably.
 
Founded in 1997, we remain an Australian, family owned and operated company based in Melbourne, Australia. Having maintained our focus exclusively on rolling stock and related infrastructure or over 25 years, we have the expertise and experience to deliver results for our customers. 
 
We have positioned ourselves to be one of the preferred suppliers for engineering services within the rail industry Australia. We've achieved this by keeping our 'small' business style flexibility, agility and customer focus, with the right level of large organisation maturity, process and value add.

For further information, get in touch, drop in for a coffee, or visit our company website at www.ttmrail.com.au.

Name: Stadler Hungary
Description:
A Stadler több mint 80 éve gyárt vonatokat. A vasúti járművek gyártásában, karbantartásában és vasúti jelzőtechnológiában megoldásokat kínáló vállalatcsoport központja a kelet-svájci Bussnangban található. A Stadler mintegy 14.500 alkalmazottat foglalkoztat különböző gyártással, tervezéssel, és karbantartással foglalkozó telephelyein. A vállalat magáénak vallja a fenntartható mobilitás iránti társadalmi felelősséget, ezért kiáll az innovatív, a tartós és minőségi termékek mellett. A vállalat termékpalettáján a nagyvasúti- és városi közlekedési szegmensekben megtalálhatók a nagysebességű járművek, intercity-, regionális és elővárosi vonatok, metrók, könnyű vasúti járművek és villamosok. A Stadler nagyvasúti mozdonyokat, tolatómozdonyokat és személyszállító kocsikat is gyárt. A vállalat a világ vezető gyártója a fogaskerekű járművek piacán.

A Stadler Magyarországon 3 leányvállalattal rendelkezik. Budapesten található a társaság vezérképviselete, amely a cégcsoport magyarországi központjaként értékesítési és kommunikációs feladatokat lát el 2006 óta. 2007-ben kezdte el tevékenységét Pusztaszabolcson a cég karbantartó központja, amelynek feladata a hazánkban értékesített Stadler járművek szervizelésének irányítása. 2009 óta a cégcsoport gyártással is jelen van Magyarországon, Szolnokon a cégcsoport motorvonataihoz gyártanak alumínium kocsiszekrényeket. 2012 óta hazánkban található a Stadler egyik forgóvázjavító kompetenciaközpontja is, amely nem csak a cégcsoport által gyártott járművek forgóvázaiak felújításáért felel, hanem hazai projektek során forgóváz összeszerelést is végez.

Name: EFSA SA
Description: La société EFSA SA, forte de quelques 100 collaborateurs, est principalement active dans le monde de l’infrastructure ferroviaire et de la serrurerie au niveau du marché européen.

Name: MECATEAMEETINGS
Description: Du mardi 23 au jeudi 25 septembre 2025 sur la plateforme Mecateam de Montceau-les-Mines (71), MECATEAMEETINGS - L’EXPOSITION donnera lieu à une large exposition de matériels et d’outillages ainsi qu’aux désormais traditionnelles séances de démonstrations, avec un espace unique d’exposition de cinq hectares dont 1 200 m linéaires de voies ferrées : un environnement de chantier ferroviaire au plus proche des conditions réelles pour favoriser les contacts B2B !

Name: Berggruen Car Rentals Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Berggruen Car Rentals Pvt. Ltd. is a railroad manufacture company based out of 6th FloorNotan PlazaTurner RoadBandra (West), Mumbai, India.

Name: ELAR S.r.l.
Description:
Since its founding, ELAR has started operating in the execution of current and corrective maintenance on electric locomotives and carriages.

Over time, it has developed skills and competences at the organizational, managerial and logistical levels which make it possible to manage maintenance and interventions, even urgent ones, in the main railway hubs.

The high professionalism and the different specializations of ELAR's Team allow the company to be able to work with the major companies in the sector with their full satisfaction.

Name: DAXI - Is now part of Rail Europe Solutions
Thermit Italiana s.r.l.
Description:
Thermit Italiana S.r.l. is part of the Goldschmidt Group. Goldschmidt combines with its companies all the expertise which you need for the construction, maintenance, inspection and monitoring of your railway network. The unique global network of experts gives you access to the international range of products and services of Goldschmidt – at your location, with your local contact person and the power of the whole group. Special expertise, excellent technical equipment and highly qualified personnel allow Goldschmidt to comprehensively implement each task with a standard high quality level worldwide. 
Goldschmidt offers a comprehensive range of products and services worldwide for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway track, and inspection of your track infrastructure and its maintenance. 
Together with you, Goldschmidt masters all challenges of modern, railbound mobility – for safe, sustainable and long-lasting railways of premium quality. As with Thermit, Goldschmidt is also a pioneer in maintenance, inspection and digitalization and continues to improve processes and extend the service life of railways. Goldschmidt combines its extensive railway expertise and benefits from its global expertise and cross-disciplinary thinking to create tailor-made local solutions for you. The global presence of Goldschmidt gives access to its portfolio – with one goal: to lead your railway infrastructure into the future.

Name: Bohr Electronics
Description:
BY THE WORK, ONE KNOWS THE WORKMAN
Since 1957, Bohr Electronics has partnered with Class I, Regional, Shortline, and Passenger trains, providing a wide range of in-cab locomotive electronic and electromechanical products, parts, components, and repair services. We understand the importance of minimizing downtime with a vast inventory and capabilities, ensuring quick turnaround.

In 2023, we introduced specialized repair and remanufacturing services for high-speed circuit breakers, locomotive main controllers, and fuel transfer pumps. We won significant contracts for fully furnished electrical cabinets for locomotive rebuild programs.

EXTENDING OUR REACH 
In March 2024, Bohr Electronics acquired Central Railway MFG, enhancing our offerings in onboard and wayside electronics with a focus on data gathering, recording, networking, and communication. Our facilities in Chattanooga, TN, and Searcy, AR, house all these data management capabilities, reinforcing our commitment to quality as an ISO- and AAR-certified provider.

From rebuilt electrical cabinets to crew alerters, we extend your locomotive sustainability, offering comprehensive manufacturing, repair, and custom engineering solutions for your electrical and electromechanical needs. Our dedicated team ensures excellence and reliability, helping you stay in service.

WE’RE STOPPING OBSOLESCENCE IN ITS TRACKS 
Bohr Electronics champions efficiency and sustainability, aiding railroads in maximizing resource utilization and extending legacy equipment lifecycles. We contribute to a more reliable and well-maintained system through expert repairs and quality remanufactured products and components.

Partner with Bohr Electronics for sustainable, efficient railway solutions. Enhance your fleet's lifespan with our trusted products, expert services, and advanced data management devices.

MPEC provide industrial data acquisition units and analytical software designed for the unique railway environment. Our products can be thought of as a ruggedised remote control oscilloscopes or logic analysers.

Our products feature isolated analogue and digital inputs, power outputs, UPS, Ethernet / GSM / GPRS / 3G communications, HTTP / SOAP web server and comprehensive local touchscreen diagnostics in a compact package the size of a standard railway signalling relay.

A richly featured web-based replay and analysis system interfaces with our remote products to provide a true end-to-end condtion monitoring system that allows the user to improve the reliability, availability and maintainability of the railway infrastructure

Name: Goldschmidt Sweden AB
Description:
Goldschmidt Sweden AB is part of the Goldschmidt Group. 
Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.

Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.

Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.

The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.

We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.

By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.

Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.
