Description:
LA STORIA

Le Officine Ferroviarie Veronesi nascono nel 1901.All'inizio del nuovo secolo i fratelli Galtarossa fondarono l'azienda che, nel corso degli anni sarebbe diventata una delle più importanti realtà industriali italiane nel campo della progettazione e costruzione di materiale rotabile.

I PRODOTTI

- Revamping
OFV vanta un'esperienza decennale nella riparazione, revisione, ristrutturazioni, e modifiche di materiale rotabile: locomotive, carrozze viaggiatori, carri merci e rotabili di servizio

- Produzione di nuovo materiale rotabile
OFV ha gradualmente acquisito esperienza nella produzione di carrozze passeggeri. La fornitura a Trenitalia del treno double deck “Vivalto”, il più consistente programma di acquisizione di materiale rotabile per i treni regionali sul mercato italiano, ha fatto crescere visibilmente OFV consentendole di ottenere un’ottima reputazione.
Con la progettazione e lo sviluppo del progetto EMU “Panoramico”, un EMU a scartamento ridotto, OFV ha affrontato con entusiasmo il difficile mercato EMU e DMU. La scelta di un prodotto di nicchia è il primo passo di una strategia “a basso profilo” che mira a raggiungere obiettivi più ambiziosi.

Name: MONOCAB OWL
Description:
The MONOCAB is a rail vehicle that runs self-stabilised on just one track. This means that a single-track line can be used in both directions at the same time. The concept opens up completely new paths for rail mobility - and makes use of old routes, as it reactivates disused or unused lines.

The MONOCAB research project is a collaboration between the OWL University of Applied Sciences, Bielefeld University of Applied Sciences and Fraunhofer IOSB-INA. Under the overall project management of Prof. Dr Thomas Schulte, the current challenge is to prove that such rail vehicles can be realised safely, reliably and economically.

The Institute for Energy Research (iFE) at OWL University is the consortium leader of the project and is working with up to six employees on an interdisciplinary basis in the areas of design, aerodynamics, control engineering, simulation, drive technology, power electronics and control software. The active involvement of students in numerous sub-areas enables them to gain practical experience and promotes their scientific development. In addition, the inIT research institute and a teaching area of the interior design programme at OWL University are also involved in the project.

Name: RailSense Solutions Ltd
Description:
RailSense supply leading IoT technologies to operators, asset maintenance and infrastructure owners to provide solutions for the condition monitoring and predictive maintenance needs of track and railway infrastructure. 
RailSense enables you to easily optimise your rail infrastructure lifecycle costs and renewal strategies to maximise availability and operational efficiency. Intelligent and integrated asset performance monitoring across your network, from a partner you can count on.

Name: Kaykac Wagon Parts Co.
Description: We are manufacturing railway wagon and locomotive spare parts under international standarts since 1998. As a successfull Turkish company which manufactured first domestic locomotive turning bridge, forged brake triangle and brake cylinder, our vision is to produce imported spare parts and export them. Our company is manufacturing wagon and locomotive spare parts for global wagon and locomotive manufacturers. We are delivering spare parts to our foreign customers'adresses. In this way, a wagon manufacturer abroad, who orders spare parts to our company, focuses on assembly and R & D activities by getting rid of time consuming occupations such as correct raw material detecting, production, quality control, monitoring follow-up, customs clearance, transportation and so on.In addition, our company has 25 years of knowledge and experience in the sector and offers its customers economic and value-added solutions.

Name: CF Rail Services
Description:
CF Rail Services is a leading railcar repair and maintenance provider, offering quality running repair and program work for railroads, private car owners, lessors, contracts agents and shippers in North America.  

Its services include tank car services, railcar and locomotive repair, linings and coatings, railcar cleaning, testing and inspection services, a wheel shop and field services.  

CF Rail Services delivers the highest-quality repairs, speed and value to customers, while using technology to reinvent the industry.

Name: Fox Steel
Description:
Respaldados por 20 años de experiencia, Fox Steel, se ha distinguido en la fabricación y diseño de piezas para la Industria Metalmecánica.
Además de desarrollar nuevos proyectos a la medida para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes nos especializamos también en fabricar piezas y componentes para carros de Ferrocarril con un servicio integral partiendo de la placa en rollo hasta la entrega de partes que pasan por nuestros diferentes procesos en línea.

Contamos con grúas aéreas, montacargas y la capacidad de adaptarnos al mercado y a las necesidades especificas del cliente. Nuestra gente esta certificada para proteger el manejo de los materiales de alta calidad y asegurar la calidad a nuestros clientes.

Nuestra planta está ubicada estratégicamente en el norte de México en la región siderúrgica de Coahuila.

Esta proximidad con Estados Unidos nos ha permitido crecer a la par de las exigencias del mercado nacional e internacional y ha logrado consolidarnos como proveedor PREMIUM para varios de nuestros clientes.

Name: RIMEF SRL
Description: The company specializes in the overhaul, repair, design and construction of railway construction equipment. The experience gained in the field of railway mechanics forms the basis of the company's development plan, which involves the improvement of organizational processes and tools, the implementation in the production stages of new technological solutions, and the professional development of all members of the organization in order to meet the most demanding market requirements. The offerings range from overhauls and repairs in the workshop, 24/7 service operations through mobile workshops, modifications and regulatory adaptations of existing vehicles, to the design and construction of new vehicles. ECM's certification according to the Implementing Regulation (EU) 2019/779 allows it to offer customers the service of Responsible Maintenance Subject. The expertise and capabilities of the organization are constantly available to clients who can take advantage of technical advice in the procedural, regulatory and documentary areas.

We always keep in mind that processes we are using in manufacturing should be environment friendly. Concord Control Systems Limited is a Lucknow-based leading manufacturer of Electrical and Electronics Products for Indian Railways.

A BHT ENGENHARIA E MONTAGENS LTDA , é uma empresa de capital nacional, do GRUPO BEMON ENGENHARIA E MONTAGENS LTDA, atuante nos segmentos de Engenharia Elétrica,  de Telecomunicações e pequenas Obras Civis, especializada na execução de construções, instalações, montagens, reparos e  manutenções dos serviços pertinentes a estas áreas em todo território nacional, estando  sua sede localizada em São Paulo/SP.

Na área Metro Ferroviária realiza Serviços de Sinalização e Controle, Rede Aérea, Media Tensão, Baixa Tensão, Subestações retificadoras, Tração Elétrica, Iluminação de Pátios, Telecomunicações e serviços Atua também na área Petrolífera/Industrial nos segmentos de Telecomunicações via Fibra-Óptica e Instalações Industriais.

Realiza seus serviços atendendo aos rigorosos controles de qualidades de seus clientes, mantendo para isso seus  funcionários treinados e utilizando  equipamentos com tecnologia de ponta. 

•	MISSÃO:

We pride ourselves on providing a level of quality and service over and above our clients expectations. Our attention to detail and industry experience ensure that we understand our clients’ needs and provide an engineering solution unparalleled within the industry.

Name: Photon Laser Manufacturing GmbH
Description:
Founded in 1998 as a pioneer of laser beam welding, Photon has continually extended its portfolio, production capacities and level of expertise, enabling its clients to maximize on the benefits of laser beam welding and other innovative manufacturing technologies for their products.

- Extensive engineering and systems expertise from Germany
- Development, planning, management and manufacturing from a single source
- Owner-managed medium-sized company since 1998

- sustainable client relations
- A team of 300 experienced, dedicated employees


Photon wurde 1998 als Pionier im Bereich des Laserstrahlschweißens gegründet und hat seitdem sein Portfolio, seine Produktionskapazitäten und sein Fachwissen kontinuierlich erweitert, damit seine Kunden die Vorteile des Laserstrahlschweißens und anderer innovativer Fertigungstechnologien für ihre Produkte optimal nutzen können.

Name: E-RAILSPOT
Description:
E-Railspot Marketplace is the leading resource for facilitating e-commerce in the global railroad industry. We support buyers, sellers and shippers including procurement professionals, manufacturers, and suppliers through an innovative and robust online marketplace to create a “one-stop shop” to find everything you need spanning all segments. Whether it’s locomotive, rolling stock, track, signaling, large equipment, or safety, E-Railspot provides more choices at competitive prices through its creation of a central transactional hub for the worldwide market.
E-Railspot offers multiple ways to conduct buy-sell transactions including catalog listings of products and services, access to hard-to-find products via auctions, and the ability to create private or public RFQs. Once the transaction has been made, E-Railspot connects buyers and sellers to shipping partners to get real-time shipping and freight quotes. E-Railspot’s commitment to serving the railroad industry helps sustain long-term profitability through efficiency and trust.

Name: The Railway Shop
Description:
The Railway Shop – Industry Expertise, Quality Equipment

At The Railway Shop, we’re more than just a supplier—we’re a trusted partner to the railway industry. Since 2015, we’ve been committed to delivering specialist, high-quality railway equipment with the expertise to match.

With a team of industry professionals who have hands-on experience in engineering, project management, and site supervision, we truly understand the challenges faced by railway teams. That means when you call us, you're speaking to experts who know exactly what you need.

Over the years, we’ve grown into a leading national supplier, trusted across the industry for our exceptional service, competitive pricing, and fast lead times. It’s this commitment to quality and reliability that makes us the supplier of choice for so many in the railway sector.

We’re also proud to be the exclusive UK distributors of RailLight—the world’s first rail-mounted link lighting system, revolutionizing rail safety and efficiency.

 Specialist Equipment – Sourced from industry leaders
 Expert Knowledge – Real-world rail experience
 Unmatched Service – Competitive pricing & fast lead times

 Need reliable railway equipment? Let’s talk.
 Based in Knottingley, UK
 Visit us at www.therailwayshop.co.uk

Name: Metwest Engineering
Description:
Metwest Engineering has been providing engineering services in rail, road and power systems nationally for over 25 years. If you need anything to be made and supplied by an Authorised Engineering Organisation,  Metwest Engineering can handle it.
Metwest Engineering has a customer base including significant private and public corporations such as RailCorp, Downer EDI, Laing O'Rourke, John Holland and Leightons, to name a few.

Metwest Engineering is a specialist infrastructure supplier that has serviced the rail sector since 1987.

Metwest Engineering offers a range of products and services within the rail corridor. Metwest Engineering has three main manufacturing operations housed in over 15000 square metres of industrial land in Sydney. A steel fabrication facility enables the company to produce OHW structures, signalling components, OHW small part steelwork and various other rail components. The Precast Concrete Plant produces many rail specific components including signal/communications pits, cable pits, GLT, jersey barriers and hundreds of other associated precast railway components. The Hot Dip Galvanising Plant offers both centrifuge galvanising of smaller steel components and dip galvanising of longer steel parts. All galvanising is certified to AS4680.
 
OHW/structural steel fabrication and OHW small part steelwork (SPS)
Precast concrete pits including signalling cable pits, jersey barriers and signal bases.

Competitive Advantage
Rail/RMS prequalified and compliant
Inhouse design with own professional indemnity insurance
Onshore manufacturer that uses locally sourced materials
TFNW Sydney Trains store supplier
TFNSW Sydney Trains Steelwork Construction Panel member

Name: Noske Rail
Description:
With a wealth of experience in the design, manufacture, maintenance and overhaul of passenger car and locomotive HVAC equipment, Noske-Kaeser Rail & Vehicle is the ideal partner to deliver reliability and comfort to your end customers.

Our four values of Commitment, Collaboration, Sustainability and Adding Value reflect our belief that as we strive to be recognised as a market leader our people are key to our success, whether they are our own staff, customers, end users or suppliers and that environmental awareness and relationships are as important as the equipment we supply

Headquartered in Palmerston North, New Zealand, Noske-Kaeser Rail & Vehicle is a proud member of the LEEL Group of companies. 

With a strong reputation for technical excellence, equipment reliability in tough environments and a focus on our customers' needs, our reference lists includes equipment for trams, metros, regional and suburban trains, carriages, locomotives and special vehicles. Our customers include well known builders of passenger cars and locomotives as well as end users and operators.  

A strong long-term company history going back decades and a focused after sales philosophy means that we are committed to support you for the lifetime of the equipment with dedicated service centres and collaboration partners wherever our equipment operates.

Scope and capabilities include:
- Custom Design
- Full type testing 
- Manufacture
- Supply
- Commissioning 
- Full support for the life of the equipment

Name: DITECFER Distretto per le Tecnologie Ferroviarie, l'Alta Velocità e la Sicurezza delle Reti S.c.ar.l
Description:
"DITECFER District for Rail Technologies, High Speed, Safety & Security S.c.ar.l." is the leading railway cluster in Italy and one of the most dynamic at European level. 
Established in July 2014 as a limited liability consortium as 'spin-off' of the regional cluster of Tuscany Region created in 2011, nowadays DITECFER gathers 55 shareholders from 12 regions in Italy, of which 50 innovative companies of the rail supply industry, 2 resarch bodies and 3 industrial associations.
DITECFER acts as strategic and operational instrument to support their commitment towards: 
- R&D collaboration at National and EU level 
- Technological Transfer and Innovation 
- Collaborative Internationalization as Supply Chain both within and outside the EU
- Awareness-building and Upskilling on sensitive issues for the improvement of the Rail Transport 
- Training and Education of young talents on our territories, to become railway professionals of the future.

See more at: www.ditecfer.eu

Name: Overail
Description:
Overail S.r.l. is an Italian company specialised in designing and manufacturing high-performance precast concrete products for the railway industry.
The company was created from the takeover of Vianini Industria, a historic supplier of the Ferrovie dello Stato Group, by the Salcef Group, an international leader in railway systems.
Overail offers a wide range of products to meet the multiple needs of its customers. It produces concrete sleepers, ballastless track systems, tunnel segments and other concrete products.

Name: Diamond Rail Services
Description: We offer turnkey refurbishment, engineering and asset management services to train operating companies (TOCS), transport service providers, rolling stock leasing companies (ROSCO's) and infrastructure providers of all sizes.

Name: HollySys Rail
Description:
Founded in 1993, HollySys is a leading provider of intelligent solutions operating in fields of industrial intelligence, transportation intelligence and food & medical intelligence. 
In transportation intelligence, we strive for excellence in providing mainline railway, urban rail transit, and highway traffic with integrated solutions for the whole life cycle of rail control system, including system design, product R&D, manufacturing, testing and validating, engineering implementation and maintenance.

Name: voestalpine Signaling
Description:
voestalpine Signaling, a subsidiary of voestalpine Railway Systems, the global leader for railway infrastructure system solutions, specializes in turnout operating systems and rail asset monitoring technologies for standard railways, heavy haul, high speed and suburban traffic. The group which consists of technology-leading companies, offers a comprehensive product portfolio including innovative point machines, locking and monitoring equipment, system solutions for signaling as well as diagnostic and monitoring technologies.

voestalpine Signaling aims to enable its customers to achieve the highest possible levels of safety and efficiency when using their railway assets to transport people and freight. The company strives for this by providing innovative and sustainable overall concepts that fit the needs of the client, that is why voestalpine Signaling is considered a highly reliable partner for railway companies worldwide.

The group operates on a global scale from its offices in Austria, Germany, Poland, the UK and the US, and its branch offices in Australia and the Netherlands. Regional support centers and sales offices within the voestalpine group complement the worldwide network.

Name: SIRAIL S.r.l. - Electromechanical & Electronic Systems
Description:
IGM srl nasce nel 1992 ed è una delle prime società del territorio impegnata in progettazione, prototipazione, industrializzazione e produzione di apparati elettromeccanici ed elettronici. Attualmente IGM si propone come Produttore e come Integratore di Sistemi, ponendosi come Fornitore o Partner per la ricerca di soluzioni con qualità certificata e su misura del Cliente.

I prodotti realizzati vengono pertanto seguiti dalle prime fasi di realizzazione fino ad arrivare al servizio di assistenza post vendita, riuscendo quindi a soddisfare la crescente richiesta di ampliamento degli scopi di fornitura, con la flessibilità di un’offerta di prodotti customizzati e la presenza sull’intero territorio nazionale ed europeo.

Name: IRICO
Description:
Iranian Golden Goal Group (IGGG) with long-lasting experience and service as a general contractor with the aim of implementing constructional projects in the fields of:
oil, gas , petrochemical industries, steel manufacturing, railway transportation, construction and installing plants.

IGGG top managers, decided to buy 100% stocks of IRICO and become one of the affiliated companies of Group.

IRICO is a pioneer of design and manufacture different types of passenger coaches (such as regional passenger train, mass transit system, Light Rail Vehicle and Elevated Light Rail Transit) and freight wagons in Iran with production capacity of almost 200 units passenger cars and 500 Freight wagons per year.

Some of the IRICO's productions are : Regional DMU in contract with Hyundai Rotem, Metro cars and diffrent typpes of Freight wagons .

Name: SIELTE TRASPORTI SRL
Description:
BITFOX è una società a responsabilità limitata, i cui soci partecipano attivamente alla gestione delle attività.

Nata nel 2003 dalla collaborazione tra persone aventi esperienze in ambito ferroviario, aeronautico ed impiantistico è diventata, rapidamente, un punto di riferimento per l’area del nord-est Italia nell’ambito dell’installazione e manutenzione di impianti di segnalamento ferroviario.

Negli anni il campo di intervento si è esteso su tutto il territorio nazionale ed estero, includendo lavorazioni nel settore autostradale, aeroportuale, trasmissione dati, videosorveglianza, antintrusione, controllo accessi, fotovoltaico, edile e tecnologico in genere.

Al fine di soddisfare maggiormente le richieste dei Clienti in merito a flessibilità e rapidità di risoluzione delle problematiche si è adibita la sede storica della Società alla realizzazione di quadri elettrici, automazioni industriali e apparecchiature elettroniche ed elettromeccaniche.

Name: Irvia Mantenimiento Ferroviario
Description:
El 21 de Enero de 2008, Alstom Transporte S.A. y Renfe Operadora constituyeron IRVIA MANTENIMIENTO FERROVIARIO S.A., por un periodo de tiempo indeterminado.

El objeto social de la sociedad se corresponde con las actividades de servicios de mantenimiento integral de trenes e instalaciones ferroviarias, y el mantenimiento o reparación de toda clase de elementos industriales, electrónicos o mecánicos.

La constitución de IRVIA permite aprovechar las sinergias entre Alstom como constructor de trenes y Renfe Fabricación y Mantenimiento como organización industrial especializada en el mantenimiento de material rodante ferroviario

Name: Irmie Impianti srl
Description:
Founded in 1993 from Irmie, a Company historically operating in the railway sector for 50 years, Irmie Impianti is now a leading Company, at the forefront in the design, manufacture and installations of Test Benches and turnkey solutions for rail and metro applications. 
Our wide range of special equipment includes Test Benches for Bogies, AC/DC Motors, Brakes and Multivoltage Power Supply Systems to be installed in room or in container.
Our net of over 30 agencies all around the world ensures our local presence in the different territories, from a marketing service to an efficient after sales service. 
Becoming a worldwide Company did not mean giving up the Made in Italy reliability, but actually making it our strong point by combining it with a global mindset.
Our Company has always been committed to pursuing developments in the rail and electrical sectors.
Precision of results, attention to safety and technological innovation have always been our reference points. Only by constantly developing our skills and striving for maximum efficiency can we offer our clients top performance and present ourselves on the market as a completely reliable partner.

Name: Albayrak Makine Elektronik San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
1984 yılında küçük bir atölyede başlayan yolculuğumuzu, bugün raylı sistemler ve endüstriyel çözümler alanında güçlü bir mühendislik markası olarak sürdürüyoruz.
ALDOOR markamız ile 2006’dan bu yana metro ve tramvay hatları için Peron Ayırıcı Kapı Sistemleri (PAKS) geliştiriyor; farklı istasyon ve araç yapısına uygun yarım boy, tam boy ve kapalı sistem çözümler sunuyoruz. Ayrıca metro istasyonları için acil çıkış kapıları ve peron sonu kapıları ile güvenlik ve konforu bir arada sağlıyoruz.
Tüm tasarım ve üretim süreçlerimizde uluslararası güvenlik standartlarına bağlı kalarak ilerliyoruz. 2017 yılında PAKS ürünümüzün EN50126 / EN50129 normlarına uygun SIL3 Emniyet Bütünlük Seviyesi sertifikasyonunu tamamlayarak, bu alandaki güvenilirliğimizi tescilledik.

Bugün, “Kaliteli Üretim – Zamanında Teslimat” prensibiyle;
 Yerli mühendislik gücümüzü,
 İleri teknoloji makine parkurumuzu,
 Çözüm odaklı proje yaklaşımımızı,
bir araya getiriyor ve hem yurtiçinde hem de uluslararası pazarlarda güvenle tercih edilen bir çözüm ortağı olmayı sürdürüyoruz.

Güvenli Geleceğin Kapılarını Açıyoruz...

Erciyas Rail, one of Europe's leading manufacturers of rolling stock for various users; passenger and freight (liquid, container and bulk), we are fully integrated global provider of wagons, services and turnkey projects with decades of experience.

In order to serve both worlds, East and West, and to reduce the necessity of transportation vehicles of high quality we have to make the best use of our ideal location, highly educated workforce and our years of experience. It’s our job to create and innovate a wide spectrum of products and services that make life better, and to do so responsibly while consuming fewer resources. Our Purpose is to contribute to society through the development of superior, original technology and products that support the environment. Building on our legacy of innovation to boldly redefine the possibilities of freight transportation for next generations to come.

Name: MAQUIVIAS, S.A.
Description:
Maquivías was established in 1970 and from the beginning its object was the design and manufacture of auxiliary machinery and equipment used for renewal, maintenance and construction of railway tracks and catenaries.
Maquivías manufactures a wide range of portable machinery as well as heavy machinery and track vehicles for inspection and maintenance or track and catenaries.
The production process is flexible enough to adapt to customers and application needs.
Maquivías holds ISO 9001:2000, ISO 14001:2004 and OHSAS 18001as well as being homologated by DGF for the maintenance of rolling stock.

PRODUCTS:
MACHINERY FOR TRACK WORKS including all kinds of machinery for maintenance or construction or railway tracks as Giant Gantry Cranes, Rail Threader or light machinery like Coach Screw Drivers, Rail Drills or Manual Tamping Sets.
ROLLING STOCK including dresines for track and catenary, transformation for rail – road vehicles, wagons for different purposes and special vehicles designed in cooperation with our customers.

REFERENCES:
MAQUIVIAS is a preferred supplier to infrastructure owners and main contractors working on the railway tracks:
Adif, FEVE, Metro de Madrid, Acciona, FCC, Ferrovial, Comsa, Tecsa, Vias y construcciones, Azvi, OHL, Guinovart, Elecnor, Semi, Inabensa, Cobra

Description:
La   ELEN  è una società di progettazione, costruzione e manutenzione operante in vari settori del campo ferroviario:

IMPIANTI DI CONVERSIONE DELL’ENERGIA sottostazioni elettriche SSE e cabine MT/bt,   LINEE DI TRAZIONE ELETTRICA dalla redazione del piano di elettrificazione alla realizzazione completa della linea, IMPIANTI DI SEGNALAMENTO e TLC telefonici e trasmissione dati e OFFICINA MECCANICA per la riparazione e revisione di treni e mezzi d’opera circolanti su rotaia.

Name: ACX Construction Ferroviaire
Description:
La société ACX appartient au groupe ACIERINOX fondé le 1er Août 1990 à Emanville en Seine-Maritime par Marie-Laure et Benoit AVENEL.
 
ACX, constructeur de matériels ferroviaires, propose une large gamme de matériels innovants pour les chantiers urbains et ruraux.
 
L'objectif d’ACX est de proposer des machines avec des performances supérieures en matière d'innovation, de flexibilité, de rapidité et de capacité de levage. Conscients que les travaux dits publics sont différents des travaux ferroviaires, nous avons décliné une gamme spécifique répondant à toutes les attentes des professionnels du rail. 
 
Fort de notre expérience dans le domaine de la réparation d’engins Travaux Publics, notre équipe est constituée de monteurs avant tout mécaniciens et dépanneurs, parfaitement informés des problématiques des chantiers d’aujourd’hui et attentes des clients.
 
Notre unité de production est située en Normandie.

Name: UROMAC
Description:
Our company is today the result of UROMAC’s own development and the partnering with companies with long histories, going as back as 1940. After three generations UROMAC has become a specialist in machinery for demanding sectors like military, mining, forest, construction and railway.

UROMAC started activities in the 1940’s producing machinery for forest and agriculture applications.  In the 1970’s UROMAC entered into the construction sector producing 4x4 small loaders.

In 1991 the company entered a new era by partnering with URO Group and starting its first international expansion. URO Group is a dynamic and modern company focused on the design and manufacturing of multi-purpose off-road vehicles for a wide range of applications, either industrial or military. Thanks to this partnership UROMAC started producing 4x4 site dumpers and forklifts and expanding internationally into new markets like northern Africa and South America.
In the 2000’s UROMAC entered into the railway sector offering a complete range of railroad machines and vehicles for maintenance and construction of railway infrastructure, shunting, civil engineering applications, forestry and power and overhead lines.
UROMAC is the first complete manufacturer of this type of machines and vehicles specially engineered and designed for this function. UROMAC covers the whole process from design, manufacturing and delivery according to customer specifications and standard and regulations.

Name: Thomson Engineering Design Ltd
Description:
Thomson Engineering Design has been manufacturing specialised equipment for rail renewals and repairs since 1999 and in that time we have become the premier supplier of attachments for Road Rail Vehicles.  In 2017 we were proud to become part of Pipehawk PLC.

All of our products are designed and developed by our own Engineers, manufactured in our own factory and tested on our own calibrated test rigs and facilities.

Our design and manufacturing systems are certificated to ISO9001:2015 and our company has been verified under the Rail Industry Supplier Quailification Scheme (RISQS)

Quality, Safety and Reliability are our key goals and we are proud of our reputation within the UK rail industry and abroad. This is largely the result of our policy of continuous investment in state-of-the-art manufacturing and design facilities.

New products are being developed all the time and we welcome enquiries for innovative solutions.

Name: RIA Wales & Western
Description:
RIA Wales & Western represents 75+ RIA members across Wales and the South West of England.  

Rail in this part of the UK supports some 74,500 jobs and £3.6bn GVA (22,800 jobs and £1bn GVA in Wales; and 51,700 jobs and £2.6bn GVA in the South West).  

RIA Wales & Western activity will be informed and prioritised by the Leadership Group made up of RIA Members either located in Wales & Western region or with a significant presence in the area.

Name: Miri Spa
Description: La nostra è una storia di persone e di sogni,di vite e di passioni,di radici e di progetti!Abbiamo fatto,nel tempo,tesoro del nostro passato per fronteggiare le sfide del quotidiano e tentare di anticipare con umiltà il futuro.E la storia continua…

Name: CR Rail
Description:
CR Rail provides a professional, comprehensive rail construction and maintenance services to Corporate and Government clients throughout Australia. Our association with the rail industry spans many decades with some of our key employees having over 40 years rail experience. This has enabled CR Rail to establish itself as a specialist rail construction service provider to some of the largest rail operators in the country.

Our streamlined management structure places us in a very competitive position to offer rail engineering expertise. With a highly experienced and trained team able to be mobilized anywhere throughout Australia. CR Rail is committed to delivering all our projects and services with superior quality, cost effective workmanship, completed safely within time constraints, achieved through integrity, sustainability and innovation

Name: Amurrio Ferrocarril y Equipos S.A.
Description: Manufacturer of railway turnouts and crossings for a wide variety of applications, including High Speed, Heavy Haul, conventional, metro and tramway. We specialize in designing, producing, installing and maintaining unique solutions.

Description:

--
