le développement durable, un esprit familial, l'entraide.

Name: Woods Signalling Service
Description:
At Woods Signalling we provide quality services to the rail industry all over Australia. We specialise in signalling works including construction, maintenance and track support but can also provide Track Protection services. 

Visit our website for more information on our services including contact information.

Name: STATE RAILWAY OF THAILAND
Description: STATE RAILWAY OF THAILAND is a railroad manufacture company based out of 1 Rongmuang Road, PATHUMWAN, Bangkok, Thailand.

Name: Jindal Advance Materials
Description:
Jindal Advanced Materials (JAM) is a major supplier of composites in India. Currently supplying to a wide range of customized industrial applications including the Railways & Mass transportation, Defence & Aerospace sector among others.

Experienced in supplying a wide range of products including:-
FRP Interior Panels for Railways / Mass transportation clients
         Side Walls
         Ceiling 
         End Walls
FRP Modular Toilets 
Customized FRP based Industrial applications in Defence & Aerospace sector

JAM is a leading supplier for the Indian Railways as well as Ministry of Defence, GoI. JAM is based out of New Delhi, with production facility near Gurugram, Haryana

Name: Recam Laser International S.A. de C.V.
Description:
En Recam Laser dirigimos nuestros servicios al sector metal mecánico, susceptible a maquinar, soldar, doblar y darle forma al acero. Tenemos lo mejor en equipo humano y maquinaria, nuestra tecnología es la mejor del mundo.
Tenemos la experiencia, para cumplir con seriedad los plazos de entrega. Nuestros costos y calidad son inmejorables, por eso somos líderes en corte láser en México. Contamos con la tecnología de corte láser más avanzada del mundo y nuestro conocimiento en los procesos de transformación del acero es clave para la calidad de nuestros trabajos.

Name: Sistemas SEC S.A.
Description: Sistemas SEC S. A. es una empresa multidisciplinaria de ingeniería y obras que abarca, entre sus campos de acción, las subestaciones eléctricas, los sistemas de tracción en corriente continua, comunicaciones y fibra óptica, obras civiles y señalización ferroviaria, aportando e integrando la vasta experiencia de sus empresas matrices, SICE, ENYSE y CAM

Name: Rail Academy Bari
Description:
Rail Academy è il centro di formazione,
specializzato nell’organizzazione ed erogazione di corsi professionali in ambito ferroviario.
Il centro è una vera e propria accademia rivolta a tutti coloro che vogliono intraprendere la carriera in questo settore, ricoprendo uno dei tanti ruoli richiesti dal mercato.

Rail Academy garantisce una formazione completa a tutti coloro che vogliono entrare a far parte dei più qualificati operatori del settore ferroviario.

L’impegno di Rail Academy è rivolto a fornire la migliore preparazione professionale nelle conoscenze ferroviarie. Manovratori, macchinisti, manutentori dei veicoli e preparatori dei treni vengono formati secondo i nuovissimi standard qualitativi dei programmi didattici, avvalendosi di strumenti e metodi all’avanguardia e tecnologie innovative.

Gli allievi di Rail Academy provano sul “campo” quanto acquisito in aula, con attività laboratoriali ed esercitazioni presso importanti aziende del settore.

Name: Kovis Group
Description:
As a niche champion, KOVIS contributes to safer, more efficient and climate-friendly rail transport. We turn good ideas into a safe and sustainable future- for the benefit of passengers, the planet  Earth and business partners.
We are guided by the values of sustainability, innovative culture and design, safety, flexibility and efficiency. This has been recognized by our partners on almost all continents of the world. 
We have already convinced more than 160 customers in 43 countries. Among them are Siemens, Deutsche Bahn AG, VTG, Bonatrans, SNCF, ÖBB, Nedtrain, Alstom, Stadler, Škoda, TSA, Voith, ...
Our products contain close to 90 % of  secondary raw materials, with break discs being produced from more than 95% recycled materials. We will deepen our company commitment to sustainability in the future.
Thanks to our innovative culture, the reliable, 100% private, family-owned company has become a global niche player and a European niche champion.
Among others, we are the largest manufacturer of axle boxes for freight wagons in Europe. More than 550 different types of brake discs for all types of railway vehicles - from locomotives commuter train, trams & metros to high-speed trains have been developed and produced by KOVIS. With an innovative approach and a high-quality production process we create tailor made solutions for our customer as a producer of gearboxes, stator housings, flanges, consoles, swingarms,... 
Beside the parent company KOVIS, KOVIS GROUP also includes KOVIS LIVARNA, which produces high quality castings made from ductile and gray cast iron, KOVIS BP, where quality machining and final production of axle boxes for freight wagons is done and KOVIS TRANSPORTI, which provides logistical services and internal / external transport.
KOVIS will be a reliable partner that contributes to the promotion of green mobility in the future as well.
Good ideas create the future - safer, greener and less noisy.

Name: Stadler Praha
Description: Společnost Stadler vyrábí vlaky již 80 let. Poskytovatel řešení mobility v oblasti konstrukce kolejových vozidel, servisu a zabezpečovací techniky má sídlo v Bussnangu ve východním Švýcarsku. Více než 13 000 zaměstnanců pracuje v několika výrobních a technických závodech a na více než 70 servisních místech. Společnost si je vědoma své společenské odpovědnosti za udržitelnou mobilitu, a proto se zasazuje o inovativní, udržitelné a trvanlivé kvalitní výrobky. Sortiment výrobků v oblasti hlavních železničních tratí a městské dopravy zahrnuje vysokorychlostní vlaky, meziměstské vlaky, regionální a příměstské vlaky, metra a tramvaje. Společnost Stadler vyrábí také lokomotivy, posunovací lokomotivy a osobní vozy. Společnost Stadler je předním světovým výrobcem ozubnicových kolejových vozidel.

Name: KRUCH Railway Innovations
Description:
KRUCH RAILWAY INNOVATIONS 
is an Austrian R&D and production company for Railway Infrastructure, especially for the "overhead contact line & 3rd.rail": 
- hanger clamps, automatic tensioning devices, canilevers, ...
- energy flow simulations for public transport networks
- checkpoints for trolley bus current collectors

Kruch can look back upon a company tradition of almost 155 years with many different successes and major technological achievements.

The pursuit of perfection is reflected in our products that combine the best functionality with ease of use and offer an impressive potential to reduce life cycle costs.

We are looking for successful partnerships for the world-wide use of our systems.

Name: COET S.r.l.
Description:
COET S.r.l. was founded in 1962. 
During almost half a century of history the company has been growing and evolving designing and manufacturing various types of switching and sectionalising devices and the switchgears and systems that utilise such devices.
At present COET’s production includes different ranges of products for various applications:
 Switching and Disconnecting devices for Low Voltage.
 Switching and Disconnecting devices for Medium Voltage.
 Switching and Disconnecting devices for High Current.
 DC Switching and Disconnecting devices for Electric Traction.
 Electronic measuring and monitoring devices.
 Electric Traction Power Systems.
 Engineering

Conceiving and Design of products is totally self made with the support of the most up-to-date computerised systems of Electrical and Mechanical 3D CAD.
The Test Laboratory can perform functional and mechanical Endurance Tests, Temperature rise Tests with current up to 10.000A and Dielectric Tests with voltage up to 60kVrms and 400kV impulse using high precision measuring and recording instruments.

Since 1998 the company is certified ISO9001 and ISO14001 and all the products are type tested according to the latest International Standards.
The headquarter that includes offices, workshop and test laboratories for high current and high voltage, is located in San Donato Milanese, nowadays part of Milano, 10km from the city centre as well as from Linate Airport, adjacent to motorway city ring and close to the railway’s freight yard.

Total Area: 9000 sqm
Covered Area: 4900sqm
Offices: 600sqm

Name: SVI S.p.A.
Description: Costruzione e manutenzione di mezzi d’opera ferroviari

Name: D-RAIL Solutions
Description: We provide everyday status information regarding your railway. Get the relative condition of the railway, trend analyses and automated alarms; on tracks, track bed, catenary, third rail and ATC/ ERTMS balises. You don’t have to worry about any technical issues, complicated data or any maintenance of the system. Leave that to us.

Name: MORIS
Description:
MORIS Spółka z ograniczoną odpowiedzialnością działa na rynku wyrobów hutniczych od 1994 roku. Firma od wielu lat jest dostawcą szerokiej gamy i wysokiej jakości wyrobów hutniczych dla wielu segmentów rynku, w tym: kolejnictwa, przemysłu maszynowego, przemysłu konstrukcji stalowych, górnictwa, budownictwa i firm handlowych.

W ramach dywersyfikacji swojej działalności firma MORIS przeprowadziła innowacyjną inwestycję, która zaowocowała powstaniem Zgrzewalni Szyn Kolejowych w Chorzowie. Zakład ten jest jednym z najnowocześniejszych w Europie, a jego park maszynowy gwarantuje uzyskanie najwyższych wymaganych dla wyrobu parametrów, co zostało potwierdzone uzyskaniem certyfikatu Q2 wydanym przez DB.

Pełna automatyzacja procesów zgrzewania szyn kolejowych, ich prostowania oraz szlifowania zgrzein gwarantuje powtarzalność wyrobów gotowych o najwyższej światowej jakości.

W ramach posiadanego zaplecza magazynowego - nowoczesnej, wielonawowej hali magazynowej oraz zewnętrznych magazynów, MORIS ma możliwość składowania wyrobów gotowych na łącznej powierzchni 30.000 m2. Pozwala to na elastyczność, jak i stabilność dostaw.

MORIS jest licencjonowanym przewoźnikiem kolejowym. Spółka w ramach sprzedaży szyn oferuje również ich transport. Posiadany przez Spółkę specjalistyczny tabor kolejowy (wagony rozładowcze) oraz doświadczeni w jego obsłudze pracownicy zapewniają bezpieczny i szybki rozładunek.

W swojej ofercie handlowej MORIS posiada szeroką gamę wyrobów hutniczych, w tym pręty okrągłe, pręty płaskie, pręty kwadratowe, blachy, kątowniki, teowniki, ceowniki, kształtowniki górnicze, kształtowniki kolejowe, szyny kolejowe, szyny podsuwnicowe, szyny pośrednie, szyny tramwajowe oraz akcesoria kolejowe.

Spółka realizuje samochodowe przewozy krajowe i międzynarodowe w ramach udzielonej licencji. MORIS dysponuje obecnie ciągnikami siodłowymi marki Mercedes z naczepami służącymi do przewozu stali i wyrobów stalowych oraz szyn o długości do 35 m.

Name: Thermo King Rail HVAC Solutions
Description:
Thermo King has been serving the rail market for over 25 years. Both car builders and end users worldwide have learnt that they can depend on us not only to deliver durable, high performance units but also to support them throughout their operating life with our global network of Dealers. 

Our extensive range offers innovative solutions for the comfort of passengers and drivers on tramway, train and metro as well as light rail and locomotives.

Looking for some extra insights? How does active air purification prevent airborne particles from spreading? And how does automated air flow make the morning commute more comfortable? Trends, solutions, how-to’s and more: find your fresh supply of HVAC stories from rail and road.

Name: RIA North
Description: RIA North is championing a dynamic rail supply sector in the North of England, representing RIA members across the region. Rail in the North support £7.7bn in economic growth (GVA), 154,000 jobs and £2.5bn in tax revenue and is an essential industry in delivering the Government's build back better, decarbonisation and levelling-up agendas.

Name: De Wilde Spoorwegbouw
Vítkovické železniční opravny a.s.
Description: Zabýváme se zejména opravami nákladních železničních vozů a jejich dílů, ale také např. reprofilací profilu železničních dvojkolí na podúrovňovém soustruhu Hegenscheidt.

Name: McKenzie Valve & Machining
Description: At McKenzie Valve & Machining, we seek to supply our customers with the highest quality tank car valves, fittings and fabrications while providing industry best pricing and lead time.

Name: Reprocover
Description:
Reprocover is an innovative Belgian company that develops and produces precast solutions for rail, road and building infrastructures made from Reprocessed ThermoSets (RTS). In addition to the remarkable and proven mechanical properties of our product, our solutions promote the introduction of a sustainable circular economy.

Your Company & The Circular Economy?

► Reprocover collects your waste and gives it new life in products that will be of use to your company.

► Reprocover is able to work with you design any type of solution within its production process.

Name: ROBEL Italia
Description:
Da 150 anni ROBEL produce soluzioni tecnologicamente avanzate per la costruzione delle linee ferroviarie. Con sede a Freilassing, in Baviera, l'azienda fornisce macchine, sistemi e servizi su misura per la costruzione e la manutenzione dell’infrastruttura ferroviaria a 70 Paesi in tutto il mondo.  

Oltre a un'ampia gamma di macchine e attrezzature manuali, il portafoglio ROBEL comprende veicoli ferroviari multifunzionali e sistemi mobili di manutenzione per una maggiore sicurezza ed efficacia sui binari.

Tutti i processi produttivi, svolti internamente da un totale di 600 dipendenti, sono certificati EN ISO 9001.

Un efficiente servizio di assistenza cliente - dalle ispezioni, riparazioni e modifiche, alla gestione dei pezzi di ricambio, fino alle revisioni e alle ricertificazioni - accompagna ogni macchina ROBEL per tutta la durata della sua vita. 

ROBEL. Great on Track.

Contattateci per saperne di più sulle nostre soluzioni per la costruzione e la manutenzione dei binari.

Name: Kombud Group
Description: Kombud Group S.A. łączy dynamiczne firmy dostarczające rozwiązania cyfrowe dla branży infrastruktury krytycznej i przemysłu. Przez blisko 35 lat działalności Kombud Group zrealizował ponad 300 systemów stacyjnych dla kolei i metra oraz ponad 2500 systemów zabezpieczenia ruchu na przejazdach kolejowych. Komputerowe systemy Kombudu obsługują ruch na Centralnej Magistrali Kolejowej (CMK), stacjach warszawskiego węzła kolejowego, Linii Hutniczej Szerokotorowej a także obydwu liniach warszawskiego Metra. Ponad 700 pracowników, w tym 400 inżynierów tworzy, patentuje i wdraża nowoczesne rozwiązania przeznaczone dla metra i kolei, w oparciu o europejskie standardy ERTMS oraz ETCS. Należący do Grupy Rail-Mil Computers jest producentem systemu rmCBTC, który pozwala na automatyczny ruch pociągów oraz m.in. eurobalis, programatorów, koderów LEU oraz innych podzespołów elektronicznych. Spółka Metroprojekt zaprojektowała większość tuneli oraz stacji na I oraz II linii warszawskiego Metra, a także uzyskała pierwsze w Polsce pozwolenie budowlane dla tunelu Kolei Dużych Prędkości pod Łodzią.

Name: DESARROLLOS DE TECNOLOGIA AVANZADA SLU
Description:
D.T.A es una moderna empresa concebida en el año 2003 para cubrir las necesidades de mantenimiento y reformas técnicas avanzadas en el sector ferroviario, despuntando como una de las organizaciones corporativas líder en el Sector.

Cubrimos todas las necesidades del cliente, desde la puesta en servicio, pasando por el mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo, campañas de modificación, reformas de interiorismo, reformas eléctrico-mecánicas, asistencia en vía, gestión de materiales, I+D, hasta la formación del personal, siempre desarrollando nuestra labor con una prioridad absoluta en el cumplimiento de los requisitos del cliente.

Nuestra calidad contrastada se ve reforzada por la certificación IRIS (International Railway Industry Standard) obtenida en octubre de 2011, siendo la segunda empresa en obtenerla a nivel nacional dentro del ámbito del mantenimiento.

Además de dicha certificación IRIS contamos con la certificación de calidad ISO 9001, gestión medioambiental ISO 14001:2004, gestión de la seguridad y salud en el trabajo OHSAS 18001:2007.

Name: Aveng Rail
Description: Business unit that specialises in rail track construction and mechanised track maintenance, including Engineering

Name: Lucchini SA
Description:
Lucchini South Africa Pty (Ltd), a subsidiary of the Italian based Lucchini RS Group S.p.A  - is Africa's leading manufacturer of forged railway wheels, axles and wheelsets for locomotives, freight wagons and passenger coaches. 

With over 200 000 wheels supplied to date, we really do have a proven track record in serving the Sub-Saharan and Africa Railway market, via our 10 000 square metre facility located in Germiston, South Africa.

 Lucchini RS, is the first international forged wheel manufacturer to localise production in South Africa and is B-BBEE Level 2 certified. We specialise in the design, manufacture and supply of forged railway wheels, axles and wheelsets for locomotives, freight wagons and passenger coaches, covering all types of rolling stock from high-speed trains through heavy haul to light rail.

Our strength lies in our integrated production facilities which allow us to manufacture wheels from start to finish through our proven know-how and customer focussed approach

Name: SINTRA - une société EGIS
Description:
SINTRA est une entreprise spécialisée dans le domaine de la signalisation ferroviaire depuis plus de 25 ans. 

SINTRA a été créée en 1995 pour la réalisation d’activités de validations et d'essais en signalisation ferroviaire. En 2001, la société étend ses activités par la création d’un bureau d’études d’exécution agréé par la SNCF et en 2009, SINTRA est rachetée par EGIS Rail et devient l’une de ses filiales.

La société SINTRA est basée sur la commune de Bouc-Bel-Air (13) et possède également 3 agences à Paris, Lyon et Toulouse.

Le cœur de métier de SINTRA est la signalisation ferroviaire grandes lignes, métros, tramways, Clients Privés (réseaux portuaires, etc.), et s’organise autour de 6 types d’activités :
•	Gestion de Projet
•	Ingénierie des Systèmes
•	Ingénierie de déploiement (AVP-PRO, REA et DET)
•	Etudes d’exécution
•	Supervision de travaux et Vérifications techniques
•	Essais et Mise en Service

Nos compétences et la mise en place des processus qualité strict nous ont permis de travailler en étroite collaboration avec des gestionnaires d’infrastructures public tel que la SNCF, RTM, RATP, la Métropole Marseille Provence et des grandes sociétés telles que ANSALDO, ALSTOM,  THALES, etc…

Au fur et à mesure du développement de la société, les agréments SNCF pour la réalisation d’études d’exécution sont passés d’un seuil à 40k€ à un seuil illimité.  
En 2019, le chiffre d’affaires généré par SINTRA a atteint 5,4 millions d’euros pour un effectif de 49 collaborateurs (techniciens et ingénieurs). 

SINTRA est en mesure d’intervenir sur l’ensemble du cycle en V du développement d’un système dans l’ensemble de ses phases (de l’avant-projet  aux opérations de réception) et sur l’ensemble des couches constitutives d’un système de signalisation ferroviaire.

Name: Richard AG Murgenthal
Description:
Since over 100 years on the right track!
Richard AG Murgenthal is a reliable partner for railway accessory, machine and appartus construcion and customer specific projects.
Richard AG Murgenthal - the Swiss specialist for Pantographs, Circuit breaker (Main Switch with a vacuum-tube) and insulators as well as many more components related to the railway industry.
The Richard AG Murgenthal and its international appeal. As typical Swiss SMEs we work successfully around the world and our products are in demand and successful all over the globe.

The company Richard AG Murgenthal was founded in 1906. In 1913, the first pantographs for traction vehicles were built and delivered but it wasn’t until the 1940s that the company focused on products for traction vehicles.
The management system is certificated according to ISO 9001, IRIS (International Railway Industry Standard Revision 03, ISO TS 22163), ISO 14001 and OHSAS 18001.
Richard AG also has the welding certification according to EN 15085-2, CL1.

Name: Melvelle Equipment Corp
Description: Manufacturer of specialised portable rail maintenance equipment.

Name: PT Rekaindo Global Jasa (INKA Group)
Description: PT. REKAINDO GLOBAL JASA (selanjutnya disebut sebagai “REKA”) adalah perusahaan Indonesia yang dimiliki bersama oleh PT. INKA (Perusahaan manufaktur kereta di Indonesia), Nippon Sharyo Ltd (Perusahaan manufacture kereta di Jepang), Sumitomo Corporation (Perusahaan trading produk-produk Jepang) dan KOPINKA (Koperasi pegawai PT. INKA). Beralamat di Jalan Candi Sewu Nomor 30 Madiun, PT. REKA telah berdiri sejak 25 November 1998 berdasarkan akta pendirian nomor 61 tentang perseroan terbatas PT. Rekaindo Global Jasa. Bergerak di bidang jasa konsultan engineering dan support komponen kereta api, sebagian besar hasil produksi adalah untuk mendukung proses produksi kereta api PT. INKA (Persero) dan anak perusahaan terkait.

Name: Deutzer Technische Kohle GmbH
Description:
DTK GmbH performs worldwide measurement services for transport companies such as Rail, Metro, Tram and Trolleybus using own innovative developments.
These includes:
Acceptance tests of newly constructed lines, recurring inspections or
Support, assistance and solutions for specific problems on your network.
At present, more than 100 transport companies in 25 countries all over the world are in charge of DTK´s services.

DTK is your partner from the initial consultation over the quotation and the preparation and execution of measurement, as well as for the analysis and reporting and if necessary up to a software training to make own evaluations.
Also an adaption of a system to specific needs or a completely new development for a specific problem can be discussed with DTK . Please tell us your problem and DTK will offer consulting our in-house engineers and software developers a customized solution for your task.

Name: Arterail
Description:
Arterail est un fournisseur de services pour les propriétaires de matériel roulant ferroviaire et les opérateurs. Arterail est spécialisé dans l'optimisation du cycle de vie du matériel roulant.

Evolution de parc matériel roulant

Arterail propose aux autorités organisatrices du transport et aux opérateurs ferroviaires un accompagnement dans les choix à leur matériel roulant.
Nous assistons la prise de décision et l'exécution par l'apport de nos méthodes et de notre expertise technique.


Rénovation, révision et modernisation de matériel roulant

Arterail propose un ensemble de prestations qui couvre toutes les étapes d'une rénovation de matériel roulant : pré-études, ingénierie, réalisation dans nos ateliers ou ceux de nos clients.


Soutien à la maintenance

Arterail propose une palette complète de prestations de soutien à la maintenance : optimisation de l'organisation, formation, fourniture de pièces

Name: F.I.S.A. Fabbrica Italiana Sedili Autoferroviari S.r.l.
Description: A LEADING COMPANY FOR THE PRODUCTION OF RAILWAY SEATS AND INTERIORS.

Name: TSG - Track Solution Group
Description:
Track Solution Group est un des acteurs incontournables dans les domaines ferroviaire et industriel. Entreprise familiale regroupant plusieurs entités spécialisées, notre engagement envers la sécurité, l'innovation et la performance nous a permis de bâtir une solide réputation dans ces secteurs. Notre force réside dans la puissance d’un grand groupe alliée à l’agilité et à la proximité d’une PME familiale.

Avec plus de 40 ans d’expérience, Track Solution Group intervient en France et à l'international. Certifié MASE et ISO, Track Solution Group intègre des standards rigoureux en matière de qualité, santé, sécurité et environnement (QHSE).

Track Solution Group se distingue par sa mission de fournir des services de haute qualité tout en respectant des normes de sécurité strictes. Nos deux pôles d'excellence — le ferroviaire et l'industrie — permettent d’offrir des solutions sur mesure.

Name: DB InfraGO
Description: Die DB InfraGO AG gestaltet die Zukunft der deutschen Eisenbahninfrastruktur. Seit dem 1. Januar 2024 bündeln wir die Kräfte der DB Netz AG und der DB Station&Service AG in einer gemeinwohlorientierten Infrastrukturgesellschaft. Mit über 61.000 Mitarbeiter:innen schaffen wir die Grundlage für die Mobilität von heute und morgen.

Name: YM İDİS Engineering
Description: Yapı Merkezi İDİS (İzleme Denetim & İletişim Sistemleri) A.Ş. Yapı Merkezi’nin karayolu ve raylı sistemler ulaşım endüstrisinde; yenilikçi, uygun maliyetli ve ödüllü projeler sunma yeteneğini ve bu alandaki uzmanlığını güçlendirmek amacı ile 2012 yılında kurulmuştur.

Name: Stadler Deutschland
Description:
Seit über 80 Jahren steht Stadler für den Bau hochmoderner Züge und ist weltweit als Anbieter umfassender Mobilitätslösungen im Schienenfahrzeugbau, bei Service und Signaltechnik bekannt. Mit Hauptsitz im ostschweizerischen Bussnang und insgesamt 13 Standorten in Deutschland hat sich Stadler zu einer globalen Kraft in der Branche entwickelt.

Unsere Leidenschaft für Schienenfahrzeuge geht über deren Bau weit hinaus und spiegelt sich in unserer Rolle als Schweizer Weltmarke wieder, die sich in einem der spannendsten Zukunftsfelder unserer Zeit bewegt: der nachhaltigen, individuellen Mobilität. Über 14.000 engagierte Mitarbeitende weltweit arbeiten an mehreren Produktions- und Engineering-Standorten sowie über 80 Servicestandorten. Ihr Ziel ist es, maßgeschneiderte und innovative Lösungen rund um Schienenfahrzeuge zu entwickeln und mit langlebigen Qualitätsprodukten einen bedeutenden Beitrag zur Mobilitätswende zu leisten.

Name: TÜRASAŞ
Description:
Türkiye Raylı Sistem Araçları Sanayii AŞ (TÜRASAŞ) 1894 yılında Eskişehir’de ‘Anadolu-Osmanlı Kumpanyası’ adıyla kurulan atölyede faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Ülkenin doğusunda kullanılan raylı sistem araçlarının tamir ve bakımlarının bu bölgede yapılabilmesi için 22 Ekim 1939’da Sivas’ta kurulan ‘Cer Atölyesi’ ile şirketin etki alanı genişletilmiştir.  Şirketin bir diğer kolunu oluşturan Adapazarı Atölyesi ise 25 Ekim 1951’de hizmete açılmıştır. TÜRASAŞ sahip olduğu teknik alt yapı, bilgi birikimi ve iş tecrübesiyle her türlü lokomotif, yolcu vagonu,  yük vagonu ve raylı sistem araçlarına ait yedek parça üretimi ile demiryolu araçlarının tamir, bakım ve revizyonunu yapmaktadır. 
Merkezi Ankara’da bulunan TÜRASAŞ Genel Müdürlüğü Sivas, Eskişehir ve Adapazarı olmak üzere 3 bölge müdürlüğünde faaliyet yürütmektedir. Farklı ihtisas alanlarına göre organize edilen bölge müdürlüklerinden Eskişehir’de yeni nesil elektrikli, dizel ve hibrit lokomotifler; Adapazarı'nda her türlü yolcu vagonu; Sivas’ta yük vagonu imalatı gerçekleştirilmektedir.

Name: Stadler US
Description: Stadler will update you about new contracts in the US, corporate and product news and anything of interest for the enthusiastic US rail community.

Name: CITAL SPA
Description:
Pour assurer un transport moderne et efficace et soutenir le développement de l'industrie ferroviaire en Algérie, Cital a été développée entre Alstom, EMA et Ferrovial.
Ses activités englobent l’assemblage et la maintenance des Matériel Roulants Ferroviaires et les systèmes de transport par tramways.

Name: Loram Maintenance of Way, Inc.
Description: Loram is a leading supplier of track maintenance, inspection services and infrastructure optimization services and equipment in North America and around the globe. We provide comprehensive maintenance of way services to all Class I railroads and many short line, transit and commuter railroads.

Name: Holland, L.P.
Description:
Since our founding in 1935, Holland has pioneered delivering comprehensive and progressive transportation solutions. With the largest fleet of MobileWelders on the globe, we are proud to be the industry leader in flash-butt welding. With the introduction of HAMR service for special trackwork and our thermite welding teams, we offer solutions for every rail welding need.

We design, manufacture, operate, and maintain our equipment, allowing us to be the most efficient and the most innovative. From track measurement devices and rail trains to load securement products and rail car prepping services, we strive to be a true solutions partner to the rail industry.

As a subsidiary of Curran Group, we have the backing of 100 years of leadership to support our continued innovation.

Name: Progress Rail Brasil
Description:
Nosso time cria relacionamentos duradouros com nossos clientes, fornecendo soluções abrangentes de material circulante e infraestrutura para a indústria ferroviária global, estabelecendo um padrão de excelência. Nos preocupamos em promover o movimento sustentável de bens e pessoas para as próximas gerações e sabemos que os nossos clientes também se preocupam. Nossa estratégia garante suporte ágil ao cliente e de qualidade durante todo o dia, todos os dias. 

Como uma empresa Caterpillar, a Progress Rail é um dos maiores fornecedores integrados e diversificados de material circulante, soluções de infraestrutura e tecnologias para a indústria ferroviária global. Fornecemos locomotivas, motores e tecnologias EMD avançadas, vagões, trilhos, fixadores, sinalização, soldagem de trilhos e equipamentos de manutenção de via Kershaw, juntamente com serviços dedicados de reparo de locomotivas e vagões de carga, suporte de peças de reposição e operações de reciclagem. A profunda experiência da nossa equipe no setor garante um compromisso com a qualidade por meio de soluções inovadoras.

Name: Colas Rail APAC
Description:
Since 2011, Colas Rail in Asia has been a key player in Southeast Asia's railway sector, starting with the Kuala Lumpur Kelana Jaya LRT extension. As part of the Colas Rail Group, we are known for our reliability, competitiveness, and innovation in general railway systems.

Our expertise covers LRT, Mass Rapid Transit, Metro, conventional lines, and high-speed lines over 320km/h. We excel in System Integration, including track, power supply, signalling, overhead catenary system, depot equipment and maintenance vehicles.

Our commitment to safety, quality, integrity, teamwork, and respect drives our success. We aim to enhance mobility and connect people through our projects, such as the Putrajaya Line (MRT2) and Kelana Jaya Line Extension in Kuala Lumpur, Jabodebek LRT in Jakarta, , Hanoi Metro Line 3 in Vietnam, and Bukit Panjang LRT Power Supply replacement in Singapore.

We are currently engaged in major projects like the Metro Manila Subway and the North-South Railway Extension. These initiatives underscore Colas Rail's dedication to enhancing public transportation infrastructure in the Philippines, fostering sustainable and efficient mobility solutions.

Join us in pioneering railway excellence and modernizing Southeast Asia's rail systems.

Name: AnsaldoBreda
Description: AnsaldoBreda is the Finmeccanica company specialized in the construction of technologically advanced rolling stock. Reliability and Responsability, Innovation and Sustainability are the core values on which AnsaldoBreda lies its roots to meet the challenges of rail transport. AnsaldoBreda has subsidiaries in the USA and Spain, and also in Norway, Denmark, Greece, Morocco, Taiwan, Turkey and Sweden.

Name: Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Budapest
Description:
The Budapest site of the rail vehicle systems division of Knorr-Bremse Group operating since 1995 is the world’s largest manufacturer and developer of railway braking systems with sales totalling over HUF 100 billion (around EUR 300 million) in 2018. It was named Company of the Year 2019 by Figyelő Top200.

Residing in Budapest the company employs 1800+ professionals – including 400 engineers – who develop and manufacture high-tech bogie equipments, brake controls, and air supply systems used all over the world to stop and operate trains, superfast trains, trams and subway cars. In Hungary, our high-quality products ensure safety of traffic when travelling by CAF trams, Flirt railcars, KISS double-decker trains or the subway cars on metro line M3 in Budapest.

Knorr-Bremse Budapest executes group-level projects in product innovation, software and hardware R&D, warehouse services and hosts the East-Central European centre of global procurement. 

The company is renown among university students for its highly popular scholarship and internship programs which help professional development. The company supports local communities, education, environment protection, sport and charity initiatives through its Local Care program.

Name: HaslerRail AG
Description:
Founded in 1887 as a part of Berne’s biggest non-government employer, the Tachymetry Division of Hasler AG Bern has since then written a history of excellence. Soon after its foundation, its products were in use all over the world as epitomes of reliability, quality and precision.

In the late 1980’s, the Tachymetry division was sold to Sécheron SA, a Geneva-based railway electronics’ manufacturer.

Today, the Sécheron Hasler Group is privately owned - with a clear long-term strategy to sustainably develop the business internationally.

Still today, 125 years after its creation, HaslerRail AG and its collaborators are committed to developing and producing high-quality products and solutions for our railway-industry customers. One of our major goals is to contribute to our customers’ success – every HaslerRail AG collaborator from Sales to After Sales Service is committed to provide best possible work.

Name: GCF GENERALE COSTRUZIONI FERROVIARIE SPA
Description:
GCF - Generale Costruzioni Ferroviarie is a landmark of excellence in the railway infrastructures, electrification and signalling sector.
In over 70 years of operations and experience, it has consolidated its role on the Italian railway market and strengthened its presence on a European and international scale. 

It has ten offices in Italy and nine international branches - today a landmark for clients and partners who find in GFC an operating model capable of offering extremely high productivity, safety and quality standards.
Services, experience and quality work have earned GCF the trust of major Italian and foreign clients which operate in the railway and tram industries for equipment, electrification and signalling projects.

Our Strengths 
•	1.000 items of machinery
•	2.344 employees

Our Assurances 
•	10 offices in Italy
•	9 offices abroad
•	690 mln euro consolidated financial statements

Our Competitive Edge 
•	500 mt/h of new track
•	1000 mt/day of new line

Name: EMD (Electro-Motive Diesel)
Description:
Progress Rail, a Caterpillar company, designs and manufactures EMD rolling stock products and services for global railroad customers. Our products include new, used and remanufactured locomotives, transit units and freight cars, with parts, component reconditioning, repair and leasing services.

We are a premier employer within the rail industry, with products and services represented in over 100 countries around the world. With operations in the United States, Australia, Brazil, Canada, China, Germany, India, Italy, Mexico, South Africa and the United Kingdom, we are continually expanding our footprint. Becoming a part of the team means becoming a part of a rich heritage and a bright future in our global marketplace.

Our goal is to recruit, hire and develop a skilled workforce to meet the challenges of the future. Within Progress Rail, there exists a wide range of rewarding assignments and career paths. Our greatest strength and advantage in the marketplace is our commitment to our customers and our people.

Name: WEGH Group S.p.A.
Description:
WEGH Group is a leader in the design and construction of solutions for the railway industry, with more than 530 customers in over 40 Countries. 
Through its 5 production plants and its foreign branches, WEGH Group is firmly established in its reference markets and is able to meet the requirements of the international market. 

WEGH Group product lines are: 
•	design and production of plants for track systems, 
•	design, production, laying and maintenance of railway, tramway and underground track system, 
•	production of concrete sleepers, turnout bearers, slabs and railway bridges, 
•	signalling and rolling stock systems, 
•	design and production of plants for precast elements

Name: SPL POWERLINES UK&I
Description:
SPL Powerlines UK&I is a leading multi-disciplinary infrastructure specialist, offering end-to-end delivery across both rail and energy sectors with capabilities that set us apart in highly regulated environments. Our energy infrastructure expertise spans HV/LV distribution up to 132kV, transmission systems up to 400kV, substation design and build, BESS installation, and renewable energy connections. What differentiates us is our ability to integrate these services seamlessly with decades of rail electrification experience, ensuring assured engineering, safety discipline, and consistent delivery performance. 

We operate one of the industry’s most comprehensive fleets of rail and construction plant, supported by in-house logistics, haulage, welfare, and 24/7 maintenance, enabling rapid mobilisation and fully controlled project execution. Our design and consultancy teams provide multi-disciplinary engineering across civils, OLE, cable routing, and substations, combined with advanced digital engineering, BIM, CDE management, surveying, and full systems engineering and assurance—ensuring compliant, efficient, and right-first-time outcomes.

Name: Greenbrier-Europe
Description:
Greenbrier-Europe is one of the leading manufacturers of freight wagons and bogies, operating all over Europe and abroad, with facilities in Poland, Romania and Turkey.

With a history dating back to 1882, what we stand for and our values have always been safety, quality, respect for people, customer satisfaction and respect for the environment. We are committed to providing high-end freight wagon and bogie manufacturing, innovative engineering, repairs and refurbishments, customer service. We have a capacity of more than 5000 units/year, three engineering offices with great know-how and experience with one of the largest product portfolio with approved designs.

Name: HÜBNER Group
Description:
As a global system supplier for the mobility industry, for manufacturing and for life sciences and research applications, the HÜBNER Group is the worldwide leader in gangway systems for buses and railway vehicles (Mobility), a prominent solution provider for rubber products, plastics technologies and elastomer-coated industrial textiles (Material Solutions) as well as a rising supplier for applications in the field of laser, terahertz and high-frequency technologies (Photonics). The HÜBNER Group employs more than 3,300 people around the world. In addition to the headquarters in Kassel, Germany, HÜBNER has built up more than 25 locations around the world in the preceding years and decades.

Als globaler Systemanbieter für die Mobilitätsbranche, für Industrie, Life Sciences und Wissenschaft ist die HÜBNER-Gruppe weltweit führend im Bereich Übergangssysteme für Busse und Schienenfahrzeuge (Mobility), anerkannter Lösungsanbieter für Gummi-Produkte, Kunststoff-Technologien und elastomerbeschichtete Industrietextilien (Material Solutions) sowie Lieferant für Anwendungen in der Laser-, Terahertz- und Hochfrequenztechnologie (Photonics). Insgesamt beschäftigt das Unternehmen weltweit über 3.300 Mitarbeiter. Neben dem Hauptsitz in Kassel hat HÜBNER in den vergangenen Jahren und Jahrzehnten über 25 Standorte rund um den Globus aufgebaut.

Imprint: www.hubner-group.com/en/imprint/
Privacy Policy: www.hubner-group.com/en/privacy-notice-linkedin/

Name: Super Metal
Description: Super Metal is specialized in development of railway and road rail solutions for railway maintenance and construction. Project development according to the characteristics and needs of each client.

Name: Loram South America
Description:
A Loram South America é uma subsidiária ligada a Loram Maintenance of Way, empresa ferroviária especializada em prestação de serviço e fabricação de máquinas de manutenção de Via Permanente, localizada nos EUA.

Líder no fornecimento de serviços e equipamentos de manutenção de via da América do Norte, atendemos ferrovias Classe I, além shortlines e transporte de passageiros.

Estamos há mais de 60 anos no mercado e hoje possuímos uma das maiores frotas de equipamentos de via permanente na América do Norte, mais de 250 máquinas e de 1.500 colaboradores distribuídos pelo mundo.

Name: MEDHA Mobility Australia
Description: Established in 1984, MEDHA is a renowned multinational technology company operating in the rail-road-marine mobility space. We design and manufacture Rolling Stock Propulsion systems, Bogies, Train sets and Railway Signalling Systems in the rail sector, and complete EV propulsion kit, control systems and chargers for commercial road vehicles. Rolling stock and EV powered by MEDHA are running in over 15 countries, and our electrified fleet of buses have cumulatively crossed operating over 42Million Km. As part of sustainability focus, we have electrified diesel locomotives and are currently building a hydrogen train that will soon be commissioned to undergo trials. Medha Mobility is the Australian subsidiary of MEDHA Servo Drives Pvt Ltd.

Name: A. Stucki Company
Description:
A. Stucki Company, established in 1911 by Arnold Stucki, is focused on the engineering, reconditioning, machining and manufacturing of railcar parts, railcars, and industrial parts. Arnold Stucki, a talented Swiss engineer who had moved to America shortly before the turn of the century, thrived in the rail industry and authored “Steel Car Design,” a landmark reference guide. In the company’s early days, the side bearings Mr. Stucki designed to stabilize rail cars became an industry standard. By the 1950s, almost all North American railroads had converted to Stucki roller side bearings. In more recent years, Stucki has focused on growth and diversification, acquiring accomplished suppliers of machined components, springs, bearings and other products, as well as critical remanufacturing and logistics services. The expansion program has broadened Stucki’s product and service capabilities and added tremendous value to long-term customers within and beyond the rail industry.  

At A. Stucki Company, we pride ourselves on our ever-growing, progressive roots. We value innovative individuals who exude qualities such as integrity and commitment.  Our foundation rests on success, hard work, initiative, and an environment that promotes growth and continuous improvement.  You will find at Stucki a casual yet professional business environment with a strong leadership team comprised of individuals who are approachable and supportive.  We seek dedicated and enthusiastic talent who can help us transform our vision into reality.  

Please get in touch with us if you are interested in learning more about A. Stucki Company and our current employment opportunities.  If you represent a business and are interested in our industry, we would love to be able to service your company or partner with you on your future business needs.

Name: Parallel
Description: Parallel develops autonomous, battery-electric rail vehicles to convert freight from truck to rail. Our technology enables railroads to serve new markets, decongest highways, and reduce shipping costs and pollution. We provide a safer, more efficient, and sustainable alternative to short-haul trucking, seamlessly integrating with existing rail operations and powering the future of freight.

Name: Plasser American Corporation
Description: Plasser American Corporation is a world-class manufacturer of Railway Track Maintenance Equipment, and is actively engaged in all sectors of research, design, production, marketing and customer service to provide Plasser know-how and standard of quality for our customers.

Name: Progress Rail Signaling S.p.A.
Description: Founded in 1958 in Pistoia, Italy, as ECM, Progress Rail Signaling has been servicing the railway infrastructure for well over sixty years in a constant pursue of innovation and cutting edge technology. Leader in producing power supply Units for railway and stations, signalling systems with LED technology, Automatic Train Protection Systems, ERTMS both trackside and trainborne subsystems. Its Computer Based Interlocking system is a powerhouse of scalability and flexibility, managing hundreds of miles of railway from one central control room. Progress Rail Signaling, part of Progress Rail, a Caterpillar company,  offers complete signaling solutions under the ECM brand for any railway infrastructure need all over the world.

Name: Rhomberg Sersa Australia Pty Ltd
Description: Rhomberg Sersa Australia is the Australian operating division of the Austrian-based Rhomberg Sersa Rail Group.  We are world leaders in rail track design, construction and maintenance, providing for the life cycle of today’s rail networks through a complete range of innovative, mechanised rail construction and maintenance process solutions. With a team of highly-experienced local rail professionals, Rhomberg Rail aims to encourage and drive a culture of service excellence and develop best-practice relationships with our clients.

Name: Frauscher Sensor Technology India
Description: Frauscher Sensor Technology provides the world’s most reliable field elements for train detection and wayside object controlling. Additionally, our portfolio includes software-, connectivity- and data transmission solutions combined with data-based, smart life cycle services. With locations and partners all over the globe, we guarantee a strong supply chain and optimal customer support. Together, we form the trusted foundation operators need to run their rail networks with confidence.

Name: Wi-Tronix
Description:
By enabling continuous improvement with a powerful combination of connectivity, analytics, alerts and more, Wi-Tronix is empowering freight, passenger and transit system railways to improve safety, increase efficiency, and enhance service reliability.

We deliver advanced IoT platforms that provide actionable information and insights on how rail networks are performing in real-time. Cloud-based data security, business intelligence such as fuel monitoring and refueling optimization, and 24/7/365 customer service set Wi-Tronix apart. We combine edge processing with Visual Intelligence, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning to detect and interpret actionable Information.

The Wi-Tronix team is passionately committed to its global vision of saving lives and ensuring the most efficient and reliable movement of goods and people throughout the world. Find out more about Wi-Tronix at www2.wi-tronix.com or contact us at sales@wi-tronix.com.

Name: Rail Labs
Description:
Rail Labs is a technology-first company dedicated to augmenting railway safety through advanced digital solutions, detecting infrastructure risks for enhanced global rail safety.

At Rail Labs, we perceive these challenges as opportunities for innovation, driving us to push the boundaries of what is possible in railway safety technology.

Name: Railway Supply
Description:
Railway Supply information portal is made for railway professionals and is the most effective communication tool in the railway business environment.

We analyze news from the railway sector of Azerbaijan, Armenia, Belarus, Bulgaria, Hungary, Georgia, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Poland, Romania, Russia, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan, Ukraine, Estonia. Modern technologies, current and future projects, tenders - the Railway Supply platform is a source of information for companies interested in finding business partners.

The railway market is becoming more active and dynamic, we strive to provide the reader with the latest news from trusted sources, as well as our own materials from our editorial team.

Our readers: railway authorities; departments, branches and structural divisions of railways; procurement and marketing departments of the enterprises of mining, petrochemical, metallurgical, agricultural industries; railway workshops and railway divisions of factories and plants; sea and river ports, stevedoring companies; railway forwarders; urban railway transport; railway track construction and maintenance companies.
Our products and services:
Railway Supply magazine
Railway Supply EXPO magazine
Railway Supply BRAND
RWS Market
RWS E-Newsletter

Name: Readypower Group
Description:
Readypower offers a comprehensive range of plant and equipment for hire to the construction and railway industries in the UK. We have the largest fleet of rail MEWPs in the UK, plus a huge variety of plant machinery up to 35 tonnes to cater for your needs.

Based in the South of England, but operating nationwide from our strategically located depots, Readypower is able to provide a comprehensive service throughout the UK for those seeking local supply or regional and national contracts alike.

We hold a full Plant Operating Scheme (POS) license with a dedicated POS department to help you with your On-track Plant (OTP) needs and lift plan / OTP Plan provision.

Name: FreightCar America, Inc.
Description:
FreightCar America---the home of the aluminum railcar, is proud of its heritage of building and designing railcars. And we have good reason. FreightCar America has been manufacturing quality railcars since 1901. The generations of employees responsible for creating its reputation for quality have made FreightCar America the largest North American manufacturer of aluminum railroad freight cars used to haul coal. FreightCar America now uses its design knowledge, enhanced production facilities, and unequaled experience in aluminum railcar building to expand its product line and provide cost benefits to customers.

Quality at FreightCar America is not just an idea---it's the high degree of excellence every FreightCar America employee is focused on achieving. FreightCar America is committed to building quality cars for its valued customers. 
 Our commitment to customer service at FreightCar America begins with the first customer contact and extends through the life of the railcar.  Customer focus has been the key to our success. FreightCar America's Customer Service Department is  highly qualified and experienced to help with any of your service requirements.

Toll Free Customer service: 800.458.2235

Name: Hyundai Rotem USA
Description: Hyundai Rotem USA is a global leader in high-tech mobility solutions, connecting the world through sustainable innovation. With over 40 years of expertise, we’ve supplied advanced rolling stock—from high-speed trains to light rail vehicles—to 38 countries worldwide, including Metrolink in Southern California.

Name: Strukton Rail Sverige
Description:
Tillsammans utvecklar vi en hållbar järnväg för ett hållbart samhälle.
Vi är en av de största och äldsta aktörerna i järnvägsbranschen och har många och långa uppdrag. Vi erbjuder trygga anställningar där du är en del av framgången. Oavsett konjunkturer eller oro i världen står järnvägsbranschen stark och vi med den. Vi bidrar till en hållbar framtid genom att bygga ny järnväg och underhålla den vi redan har. Vi säkrar att spåranläggningar håller god standard – i dag och i framtiden. Strukton Rail ingår i en europeisk järnvägskoncern som, förutom i Skandinavien också är etablerad i Nederländerna, Belgien, Tyskland och Italien. I Sverige är vi cirka 1 000 engagerade medarbetare och omsätter drygt 2,6 miljarder kronor.

Name: Total Rail Solutions
Description:
Total Rail Solutions (TRS) is no longer operating as a business and no longer exists.

The business has been acquired by Readypower Group, and is now a fully integrated part of the Readypower business.

For information on Readypower Group, please head to www.readypower.com

Name: ERTMS Solutions
Description:
Over the past 15 years, ERTMS Solutions has grown to become an industry leader in railway testing, maintenance and systems integration. Known, most notably, in the European Railway Traffic Management System (ERTMS) world, we continue to work closely with key actors in the railway sector, such as Manufacturers, Rail Infrastructure Managers and Operators. We do this to ensure that we continue to bring our commitment to innovation and out-of-the-box thinking to the evolving needs of the industry. In doing so, the company has successfully delivered on its mission to facilitate the optimisation of maintenance, testing, commissioning and IT railway integration through our combination of software and hardware solutions.

Through all our work we ensure that our products remain highly exportable as we expand our reach to assist clients facing the same challenges all over the world. In every step of our expansion and growth into areas across Europe, Asia and Oceania, we have prioritised quality of outcome, often by providing tailor-made solutions for each country.

ERTMS Solutions is also a proud member of SlashKernel, a group created and run by Software Engineers that is founded on principles of the value of unconventional approaches, supporting new ideas and maintaining work life balance that is centred around fun and authenticity.

Interested in finding out more about ERTMS Solutions? Contact us at info@ertmssolutions.com or call us +32 2 612 41 70.

Name: Greenbrier México
Description:
Con más de 25 años de presencia en México, Greenbrier México se dedica a la manufactura de vagones de ferrocarril con los más altos estándares de calidad y excelentes tiempos de entrega; somos los lideres en fabricación de carros de ferrocarril de Norte América.

Contamos con tres plantas de manufactura, Greenbrier Sahagún localizada en CD. Sahagún, Hidalgo, Greenbrier Tlaxcala ubicada en Tetla de la Solidaridad, Tlaxcala y Greenbrier GIMSA con sede en Cd. Frontera, Coahuila.

Todas nuestras plantas tienen como prioridad el Respeto a las Personas, la Seguridad, la Satisfacción al Cliente y la Calidad

Name: Maharashtra Metro Rail Corp Ltd.
Description: Maharashtra Metro Rail Corporation (Maha Metro) is a joint venture between the Government of India and the Government of Maharashtra, each holding an equal stake. The organization is tasked with implementing metro rail projects across Maharashtra, excluding the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Maha Metro oversees the development and operation of metro systems in cities such as Nagpur and Pune, aiming to provide safe, reliable, and environmentally sustainable public transportation. The corporation operates under the legal frameworks established by the Metro Railways (Construction of Works) Act, 1978; the Metro Railways (Operation and Maintenance) Act, 2002; and the Railways Act, 1989.

Name: Marcopolo Rail
Description: Somos uma unidade de negócios do Grupo Marcopolo, focada em modais sobre trilhos para melhorar a experiência de vida por meio da mobilidade de alta capacidade, com velocidade, segurança, eficiência e conforto.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: IM.A.F. S.R.L.
Description: IM.A.F. Costruzioni is a construction company that operates in the railway and civil sectors.

Name: Sigma Rail Systems Pvt. Ltd.
Description: SIGMA RAIL SYSTEMS PVT. LTD. is an associate company of Texmaco which is a diversified conglomerate with four major industry verticals- Agriculture, Engineering & Infra, Lifestyle & Real Estate and Services and is a USD 3 billion Group. We are RDSO approved sources for ALTPRO make MSDAC and other equipments.

Name: Socofer France
Description:
Established since 1920 and  formerly named : “Etablissements Billard”, Socofer splits its activities in 4 distinct sectors :
> Infrastructure : design and manufacturing of self-propelled, towed or modular units, designed for track, catenaries, and railway infrastructure maintenance
> Traction : design and manufacturing of low to medium power, railway traction units
> Services : Maintenance services (preventive or corrective) and complete overhaul, modernization and re-powering of railway rolling stock
> Outillages : design and manufacturing of special devices to optimize manufacturing and maintenance processes of railroad units or equipment (Turning devices for vehicle frames, bogies and traction motors, maintenance platforms, workshop Lorries)

Name: Doppelmayr Cable Car GmbH
Description:
Doppelmayr Cable Car (DCC) defines efficiency for the passenger transportation industry and is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company, organized as a corporation in Austria as a wholly owned (100 %) subsidiary of the Doppelmayr Group. Doppelmayr Cable Car uses cable propulsion technology in the creation of Automated People Movers, or APMs. As a trusted supplier of custom APM systems, Doppelmayr Cable Car offers comprehensive services, from design, creation, and installation to maintenance and operation. The products of Doppelmayr Cable Car are suitable for distances up to 9 km (5.6 miles), depending on anticipated system characteristics, such as the location of stations, alignment, and headway requirements. Typical applications include airports, city centers, amusement parks, inter-modal connections, railway/light rail/metro feeder systems, campuses, resorts, and small downtown network solutions with continuous movement technology. The products’ market strengths include high reliability and lower initial and life cycle costs. The signature technology and individualized engineering of Doppelmayr Cable Car practices yield flexibility in: 

- System designs
- Rapid installations
- Outstanding aesthetics
- Greater environmental responsibility 

The Doppelmayr Group is the technology and market leader in ropeway engineering. To date, the group has built 15,100 installations worldwide.

Name: Colas Rail Infra Services
Description:
Colas Rail Infra Services (CRIS) est une filiale de Colas Rail, créée en 2015, dont le cœur de métier est la mise en sécurité des chantiers ferroviaires. 

CRIS regroupe les prestations suivantes : annonce humaine des circulations / Dispositif d'Annonces Portatif Radio ou DAPR (en développement) / pose et repose des IES / prestations TTX (en développement) / Perchage caténaire (en développement) / sécurité ferroviaire en ligne fermée.

En France, SNCF Réseau, le gestionnaire du réseau d’infrastructure ferroviaire externalise de nombreuses prestations de mise en sécurité des chantiers : l’annonce des circulations, la gestion des trains travaux, des mobiles travaux et des trains travaux sur les lignes fermées pour travaux en l’absence de circulation commerciale, et d’autres missions de sécurité. CRIS est spécialisé dans ces métiers. 
Nous disposons ainsi de plusieurs qualifications de SNCF Réseau pour opérer ces métiers. De nouveaux métiers sont également en développement toujours dans le domaine de la mise en sécurité des chantiers.
Nous disposons d’une implantation régionale pour répondre au mieux aux sollicitations de nos clients.

Name: Powerlines Group
Description:
The Powerlines Group is an international business group active in the fields of RAIL, ENERGY and eMOBILITY. In the rail segment the Group designs and constructs overhead line systems for local mass transit and mainline transport, standard rail routes and high speed sections. Customers are provided with overhead catenary systems and components compliant with international norms - all from a single source. The range of services stretches from consulting to engineering and project planning, delivery and installation, to quality control, final inspection and maintenance. Powerlines also develops innovative components and complete systems for rail electrification.
Many years of experience, excellent knowledge of the business and a modern vehicle and equipment pool enable the Powerlines Group to meet a multitude of market requirements.
In the ENERGY segment the Powerlines Group designs and installs high-voltage transmission lines for energy providers. 
In the eMobility segment Powerlines provides fully-customised solutions for bus and truck depots. We are your partners for all aspects of e-mobility – from concept development, assembly and installation, to servicing your operational charging infrastructure.

www.powerlines-group.com

Name: Consisa Engenharia
Description:
A Consisa Engenharia está no mercado desde 1979, atuando no setor Ferroviário, com grande experiência em serviços de Superestrutura e Infraestrutura, sendo ainda especialista na área de Saneamento, que engloba construção de adutoras, ETAs, ETEs e afins, além de Construção Civil em geral.

Visando a excelência na prestação de serviços, a satisfação dos clientes e o bem estar de seus colaboradores, a Consisa tem se tornado uma empresa de referência nos setores em que atua, objetivando a melhoria contínua, aderindo sempre às novas tecnologias e prática de novos processos.

Name: New York Air Brake
Description:
As an innovative leader, New York Air Brake has been serving the rail industry since 1890. Through the years, our basic philosophy has reflected a deep respect for the customer, and a commitment to providing quality products at a cost-effective price. New York Air Brake's participation in ISO 9001, and our corresponding certification, echoes a company-wide spirit. From management, to administration, to engineering, to the production floor, quality is an ever-present compass.

Recent years have seen a major expansion in engineering resources dedicated to bringing new technology to the marketplace. We have made significant capital investments in new facilities, machining centers, and test equipment, while increasing efficiency by utilizing highly focused teams in our manufacturing processes.                              .

Name: McCulloch Group
Description:
Established in 1992, McCulloch Group are specialists in railroad solutions. Our bespoke and patented machines eliminate manual handling and improve the accuracy and productivity of installations.

With our technology, worldwide rail track maintenance and construction projects are completed in less time with reduced operational costs.

Name: EuroMaint
Description:
Euromaint supplies innovative and customised solutions for optimal vehicle availability, with a customer focus throughout the value chain. Through safe, effective and sustainable maintenance solutions we lay the foundations for smarter travels and transports.

Euromaint is a proactive partner, providing our customers with sustainable and reliable solutions to continuously advance rail mobility in the Nordics, contributing to a more connected and sustainable world for future generations.

Name: Generale Costruzioni Ferroviarie Elettriche S.p.A.
Description:
Generale Costruzioni Ferroviarie Elettriche S.p.A. (G.C.F.E. S.p.A) is the Italian engineering and contracting expert with the capability and proven experience to deliver transport electrification pro-jects nationally and internationally.

Thanks to our long and successful history in the rail industry, we are well positioned to understand and meet the needs of a wide variety of rail customers across the entire project life cycle: from design to procurement, installation and commissioning of turnkey projects for traditional and High Speed railways, mass transit and light rail systems.

We provide our clients with state-of-the-art engineering and design ser-vices, qualified experts and efficient operational approaches aiming at offering innovative technological solutions that are safe and long lasting. Our technologies include power supply, catenary, power lines, SCADA, telecommunication, automation and control systems, electro-mechanical installations and auxiliary systems, safety automatic earthing systems for contact lines in tunnel. 

We are technology partners in developing the Italian High Speed Rail, members of the Consorzio Saturno, with over 600 km of high speed lines in operation. For many years we have been collaborating with the Italian Railway Network (RFI) in the renewal and maintenance of operating rail-way lines, helping ensure the efficiency of the entire national railway system.

Our roots date back to 1926, when the then newly established SAE (Società Anonima Elettrificazione) starts electrifying the Bolzano - Brenner double-track railway line.

Name: Swietelsky UK
Description:
Everything is on track

70 years of continuous experience in rail infrastructure construction makes SWIETELSKY one of the leading railway construction companies in Europe. We work worldwide with our modern equipment, led by excellent, specialised staff.

Name: Scheuchzer SA
Description:
Seit über 100 Jahren erbringen wir Höchstleistungen auf dem Gleis, damit der Bahnverkehr rollt. Dabei setzen wir auf Gleisbaumaschinen, die perfekt auf das Schweizer Bahnnetz abgestimmt sind. 1931 haben wir die ersten Stopf- und Schotterreinigungsmaschinen erfunden, heute fokussieren wir bei der Weiterentwicklung unserer Maschinen und unserer Arbeitsweise auf die Digitalisierung, innovative Technologien und nachhaltige Prinzipien. So ermöglichen wir unseren Kunden massgeschneiderte Lösungen, um die Erfolgsgeschichte des Schweizer Bahnverkehrs weiterzuschreiben.

Depuis plus de 100 ans, nous fournissons des prestations complètes de grande qualité sur la voie ferrée et développons des machines ferroviaires parfaitement adaptées au réseau suisse. Pionnier de l’entretien et de la réfection mécanique des voies ferrées, nous nous concentrons, aujourd’hui, sur la numérisation, les technologies innovantes et les principes de durabilité pour perfectionner nos machines et nos méthodes de travail. Nous offrons, ainsi, à nos clients des solutions sur mesure afin de perpétuer l'histoire à succès du transport ferroviaire suisse.

Name: SITAV S.p.a.
Description: SITAV S.p.a. is a Railroad Manufacture company located in CORSO BRIGATE PARTIGIANE 2, CAIRO MONTENOTTE, Savona, Italy.

Name: RAILONE
Description:
The PCM RAILONE Group has been manufacturing concrete sleepers and track systems for urban transit and long-distance rail transportation for over 60 years. The technology leader also offers its expertise in the fields of engineering and plant construction. Its customer-driven innovations fulfill the highest quality standards and are installed around the world.

The PCM RAILONE Group is comprised of several companies and eleven production facilities with a presence in Germany, Saudi Arabia, Spain, South Korea, Hungary, Turkey, the United States, and India. It maintains annual capacities of over 5 million track sleepers and 840,000 linear meters of turnout sleepers.

Name: RailTechnology

Description: Integral Maintener of Railway Rolling Stock: Preventive Maintenance, Corrective Maintenance, Accident Repairs, Major Repairs or Modifications. Entity in Charge of Maintenance (ECM).

Name: Sperry Rail Inc.
Description: For nearly a century, Sperry Rail has been a pioneering force in advancing Rail Health, ensuring the safety, reliability, and integrity of global rail infrastructure. Through our proprietary sensor technology and software, we are a leader in rail flaw detection, significantly reducing the risk of rail failure by conducting the most comprehensive assessment of rail condition available. Sperry partners with railways spanning over 30 countries across six continents.

Name: EXPO Ferroviaria
Description:
EXPO Ferroviaria is Italy’s only exhibition for railway equipment, products and services. 

For companies seeking a share of the business created by developments in the country’s large national rail network and its growing number of city transport systems, EXPO Ferroviaria provides an essential and unique opportunity.

The next edition will take place from 30 September to 2 October 2025 at Rho Fiera Milano.

EXPO Ferroviaria is dedicated to all areas of railway technology. In addition to the manufacturers in the main areas of technology of rolling stock and rail infrastructure, signaling and communications, the exhibition is a showcase for suppliers of many other specialized products, including equipment for vehicle maintenance, ticketing systems, electronics and cables for railway applications.

EXPO Ferroviaria is organized by RX, world leader for rail show management. The company’s regular successful events include SIFER in Lille, France.

RX Privacy Policy: https://privacy.rxglobal.com/en-gb.html

European leader in development, design and production of freight wagons and bogies.

Name: Vossloh Fastening Systems
Description:
Vossloh’s Fastening Systems business unit is a worldwide leading provider of rail fastening systems, which are used in more than 100 countries. The screw-fastened and maintenance-free elastic systems are suitable for all applications: ballasted and slab tracks, mainline and conventional lines, high-speed lines, heavy haul and local transport. Over 50 million tension clamps leave Vossloh’s production sites in Europe, Asia and North America every year.

Imprint: https://www.vossloh.com/en/imprint/

Name: Swietelsky Construction Company LTD
