Name: Rail Vision Ltd
Description:
Rail Vision is the leading provider of obstacle detection & classification systems in the railway industry. 

With the company’s unique cognitive sensor fusion technology, based on advanced electro-optic sensors, artificial intelligence and deep learning, Rail Vision systems detect objects on and along the tracks from a distance of up to 2 kilometers – in real time, as well as in all weather and light conditions. 

When an obstacle is detected, the system sends visual and acoustic alerts in real-time to both the driver and the command-and-control center. 

Tailormade to meet every customer’s specific needs, the systems are available for Main Lines and Shunting Yards, as well as Light Rail Vehicles (LRVs) operating in urban environments. In addition, Rail Vision offers a range of optional complementary features based on collected and analyzed data: Image-based Navigation, GIS Mapping and Predictive Maintenance.

Name: Global Rail Group
Description:
Rail knowledge driving innovation • We curate, pool and transfer rail knowledge to drive the success of the railway system and innovate global mobility for future generations

About Global Rail Trust
The Global Rail Group group passionately contributes to the success of the railway system by providing knowledge and consulting services. We promote growth and drive innovation for local, regional and global rail infrastructure managers. By curating, pooling and transferring unique rail knowledge, Global Rail Group, jointly with original equipment manufacturers, suppliers, construction companies and infrastructure operators, secures and brokers relevant expertise to shape and innovate global mobility for future generations. Learn more: www.global-rail-group.com

Name: COMPIN FAINSA
Description:
COMPIN FAINSA | Global Leader in Bus & Railway Seatings and interiors Design and Manufacturing

As a global leader in the railway & bus industry, COMPIN FAINSA excels in designing and manufacturing high-quality seatings and interiors for transportation systems. Our commitment to innovation, sustainability, and reliability has positioned us as a crucial player in the global railway & bus landscape.

Our Mission: Redefining railway & bus excellence by providing cutting-edge comfort solutions that meet the complex needs of the industry.

Technical Expertise: With decades of experience, we master every aspect of design and manufacturing, from safety to operational efficiency.

International Reach: Our products and services are recognized worldwide, strengthening railway & bus interiors and seatings in many countries and contributing to the growth of sustainable transportation.

Strategic Partnerships: We collaborate closely with our clients to understand their specific needs, ensuring tailor-made solutions that exceed their expectations. This is applicable for brand new products and after sales services.

Sustainability at the Core: We are committed to shaping a sustainable future by developing environmentally-friendly solutions, contributing to the growth of a more eco-friendly transport.

Join us to be part of a dynamic team that pushes the boundaries of the railway & bus industry. Together, we are shaping the future of global transportation. 

#COMPINFAINSA #RailwayTransportation #bus #Innovation #Sustainability #SeatPerfection

Name: Gemco Rail
Description: As part of ASX listed Engenco Limited, Gemco Rail Pty Ltd has been a well-known supplier of quality products and service to the rail sector for many years. Building on this solid reputation and experience, the business specialises in providing fleet management services to national rail operators and in the manufacture, refurbishment, and overhaul of rail equipment. Gemco Rail provides wagon and locomotive schedule and ad-hoc maintenance services and manufactures custom designed and engineered new and refurbished wagons, bogie component parts, and associated rail equipment. Gemco Rail also supplies a broad range of rail track maintenance equipment and parts.

Name: Fer Expert
Description:
L’esprit toujours orienté vers le client, Fer Expert est la solution à tous vos besoins en termes de sécurisation et suivi technique de chantiers ferroviaires.

La qualité de nos prestations réside dans la volonté de notre entreprise à produire un niveau de sécurité optimal. Ceci repose sur une direction expérimentée qui décline un management de la sécurité rigoureux et exigeant, ainsi que sur nos agents sélectionnés pour leurs compétences et leur comportement exemplaire vis-à-vis de la sécurité.

Nous sommes en permanence à votre disposition aux coordonnées reprises plus haut.

Name: edilon)(sedra
Description:
edilon)(sedra is an international supplier of insulating rail systems and noise & vibration reduction systems for high speed, heavy rail, tram & light rail systems, metros and crane applications.

As an added value, system solutions provider we support you in the design and application fields of tunnels, bridges, level crossings, stations & stops, urban slab track systems, depots, washing plants and industrial & crane tracks. 

We add value to your project with:
•	design and development of rail fastening solutions
•	application & engineering support services
•	consulting on technical and practical issues
•	training for, supervision on, or installation of edilon)(sedra systems

The ballastless track systems of edilon)(sedra have been a well-known standard in the international rail market since the early 1970s.

Name: Firema trasporti
Description:
Basing on more than 90 years of experience in the rolling stock business, FIREMA reached important positions in Italian and International market with a new company profile .
FIREMA is involved in the national and international market sectors of rolling stocks business, managing with its own resources the whole product/service lifecycle through strategic guidelines that meet the actual industrial plan concerning with new product/service requirements, consequently technological research and innovation.

CORE BUSINESS
Rolling Stock: design, manufacture, maintenance and refurbishment

Equipments (traction and auxiliary system): design, manufacturing, maintenance

Wireless Data Transmission Systems: development and application of radio connection & Train to Wayside

Name: Railhead Corporation
Description:
With three divisions in one, Railhead Corp. is a multi-faceted organization, working hard to keep our costumers moving both safely & securely. We specialize in safety equipment for the railway & airline industry; mobile video surveillance; and high-quality air tools for the automotive, industrial, assembly, & heavy-duty aftermarket. 

Our divisions include K&E Railhead, Railhead Vision Systems and K&E Tools. 

K&E Railhead is the most recognized and trusted name for safety lighting in the rail industry. We specialize in the highest quality & most energy efficient blue lights, LED’s, & track signs. All of our products have been developed by railroaders for railroaders, and are built in compliance with the proper FRA regulations.

Railhead Vision Systems offers digital video solutions for the transportation industry, with customized mobile video surveillance for freight railroads, commuter rail, &  fleet vehicles. Products: DVRs, cameras, video management, GPS, wireless, event recorder integration and accessories. 

K&E Tools has specialized in the sale and service of superior-quality air tools for over 30 years. We offer our customers and distribution partners one of the best values in the air tool business, as well as a guaranteed parts availability. 

Throughout each of our three divisions, Railhead Corp. maintains the highest level of quality and care. We bring innovation to transportation, working closely with our customers to find the solutions that work best for them.

Name: National Steel Car Ltd
Description:
North America's Freight and Tank Car Builder.

National Steel Car is a company rich in history, a history that has influenced the evolution of the railcar, as we know it today.

Since its founding in 1912, National Steel Car has continuously designed and manufactured freight cars to meet the ever-changing requirements and standards of the railroad industry.

Today, our Hamilton, Ontario facility stands proudly as the largest and most modern "single-site" rail car plant in North America.

Our - best in class - freight and tank cars are manufactured on one of five (5) fully integrated assembly lines. Each line employs extensive use of state-of-the-art manufacturing and finishing processes including robotics, CNC parts fabrication and semi-automated assembly. 

Through a process of continuous improvement, we ensure the National Steel Car brand continues to be valued and trusted by our customers.

This is not just another goal. It is our way of life.

We are the only railcar company certified ISO 9001:2008, a testament to our dedication and pride in workmanship. In addition, the company has been honoured with the TTX SECO award on a continuous basis for over a decade.

Name: Goldschmidt
Description:
Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.

Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.

Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.

The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.

We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.

By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.

Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.

Name: KIEPE
Description: KIEPE is a globally active supplier of electrical systems for the leading rail vehicle and bus manufacturers with subsidiaries in Austria, Canada, Italy, Switzerland and the US. The company offers efficient solutions and ecologically sustainable concepts for low-emission public transport with environment-friendly electrical equipment for tramcars, light rail vehicles, metros and regional railways as well as for battery buses, trolleybuses and in-motion charging (IMC) buses. KIEPE provides charging systems for various applications. In the bulk goods industry, KIEPE is an innovative provider of safety and monitoring devices for the bulk industry.

Name: Bhilai Engineering Corporation Limited - Foundry & Fabrication Division
Description:
“Bhilai Engineering Corporation – Foundry & Fabrication Division” as an integral part of the BEC group companies. The division has three manufacturing units @ Bhilai & Raipur in the state of Chhattisgarh, India. All manufacturing facilities/infrastructures meet the statutory safety & environment requirement and are always ahead of time.
Our offering includes:
•       Engineering Analysis & Product Part Development
•       Tooling & Fixturing Design – Manufacturing
•       Manufacturing Solutions: Foundry – Fabrication – Machining – Assembly
•       Testing & Prototyping
•       Installation & Commissioning
•       After Sales - Services
The foundry shops manufacture special steel castings in Mn- Steel, Alloy Steel & Carbon Steel with a single piece weight as 6.5 Metric Ton. The unit is located at Bhilai (CG). The annual  installed capacity is 12K.
The fabrication shops are equipped with a covered shed of almost a kilometer. It can handle a single piece weight of 50 tons. The facility has specialized welding solutions, covered painting & shot blasting booths & open space to take up heavy and larger assemblies.
The machine shop is equipped with CNC / NC machine tools. to cater to the needs of Cast & fabrication items / sub-assemblies.
We have manufactured technological equipment & performance products for the Steel, Mines & railways since the year 1960.

Name: Vapor Rail, une compagnie Wabtec
Description:
Trusted partner of the public transit industry over the last hundred years, Vapor Rail, a Wabtec company  has long since earned worldwide recognition. Thanks to the creativity and innovative thinking of its work force, its adaptability and commitment to quality, the company has carved an enviable reputation. 

In the beginning
Back in 1914, Vapor Rail manufactured boilers for the rail and sea transport industries. With the intense urbanization and rapid industrialization of the mid-20th century, countless new technologies emerged. They diversified its activities to adapt to the new reality of intra-urban and intercity transport.

The growth
Today, Vapor Rail is the leader in the design, development, prototyping, manufacturing and distribution of door systems for metros, and air conditioning system accessories for commuter trains and passenger trains. 

To date, over 200,000 train and metro doors allow passengers easy access in and out world-wide. Designed and developed at its head office of St-Laurent, in Quebec, those doors and passenger access systems are a source of pride for the 200 employees who work there. 

Our production facility, located in Plattsburgh, New York, employs 120 persons who assemble door systems and air conditioning accessories. 

The future
Vapor Rail's goal is to give the riding public a comfortable and predictable experience such that their travel is only positively impacted by our equipment. To achieve that, we will continue to invest in R&D, staff training and process improvements. We want to continue to entice Car Builders to use our products and Transit Authorities to specify our products.

We are on track for another century…

Name: voestalpine Railway Systems Nortrak
Description:
With a legacy spanning 160 years, voestalpine Railway Systems Nortrak proudly stands as North America’s leading designer and manufacturer of special trackwork for the railway industry. As part of the voestalpine Railway Systems' global network, we are dedicated to shaping the future of rail solutions through quality products and services including rails, turnouts, fastening systems, signaling technologies, and monitoring solutions.  Operating with a presence across Canada, the US, and Mexico, we uphold a deep commitment to the well-being of our people, global mobility, sustainability, and innovation.

Our belief in systems solutions guides us to develop products and services thinking about the end-to-end system to achieve the greatest possible reliability, availability, maintainability, and safety, with the lowest life cycle costs. This dedication extends beyond mere operational metrics. Our goal is not to meet industry standards, but to exceed them—pioneering solutions that set new benchmarks in railway technology. This is what we call "Performance on Track". 

As one of the most sustainable forms of transportation, we believe in the future of the railroads contributing to the global mobility landscape, impacting millions of lives. We specialize in delivering customized solutions, ensuring the efficient and sustainable movement of passengers and goods across extensive railway networks throughout North America.

Our people are the foundation of our success. Skilled and motivated individuals shape our culture demonstrating our core values of Respect, Responsibility, Curiosity, Courage, Passion, and Diversity each day. This commitment is more than shared values; it extends to shared responsibilities for safety and quality, showing genuine care for one another's growth and development, and commitment to our customers.

Follow our LinkedIn page for updates, industry insights, and career opportunities. Reach out and let's discuss how your journey can align with ours.

Name: French Federation of railway industry
Description: The French Federation of Railway Industries (FIF) has 84 direct members and over 600 indirect members through its clusters. The rail industry generates annual sales of over 5 billion euros in France and abroad. FIF brings together the entire French rail industry through its various business clusters: rolling stock manufacturers, rail equipment suppliers, track and signalling manufacturers, digital technology clusters and maintenance, retrofit and modernization clusters. Recognized both by public authorities and by all users, players and decision-makers in the railway system, FIF represents the rail industry in France. Its main missions are to establish a framework and favorable conditions for the creation of value within the French rail industry. FIF therefore works actively to support the development and growth of the rail industry in the national and international context, by highlighting its strategic challenges and promoting effective collaboration between the various stakeholders and players in the entire rail industry.

Name: Loram UK Ltd
Description: Loram UK Ltd. offers a complete range of rolling stock engineering, maintenance and restoration services, RISAS approved bogie line, plus advanced track focused infrastructure services, rail grinding and innovative maintenance of way carried out from our 100,000 sq. ft. of service facilities located in the Derby at the RTC Business Park. We are uniquely qualified to support both vehicular and on-track engineering and maintenance needs for the industry across the UK and internationally. That’s the Loram difference.

Name: voestalpine Track Solutions Netherlands B.V. (voorheen Railpro)
Description:
voestalpine Track Solutions Netherlands B.V. (voorheen Railpro) ondersteunt beheerders en aannemers bij de aanleg en onderhoud van de railinfrastructuur. 

Meewerken aan een beschikbaar en veilig spoornetwerk prikkelt de creativiteit en zet aan tot de ontwikkeling van innovatieve oplossingen. Oplossingen die alle te maken hebben met een unieke combinatie van spoorbouwmaterialen en logistieke concepten.

Name: FTS Rail
Description: FTS Rail develops cutting-edge innovations for the rail industry, built with the track worker in mind. Our battery-powered maintenance tools—designed around the Milwaukee battery platform—are lightweight, portable, and built to withstand the demands of everyday railroad work. We’re also a leader in dynamic load railway inspection technology, providing real-time, continuous monitoring of track health to help prevent failures before they occur.

Name: SAINI
Description:
SAINI Group of Companies, headquartered in Mumbai, India, and established in 1975, is a prominent leader in engineering and manufacturing. Our flagship entity, SAINI ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING PRIVATE LIMITED, offers a diverse portfolio of products, solutions, and services, including the manufacture of rail-road equipment and special-purpose motors.

SAINI HEAVY PRIVATE LIMITED specializes in the complete rehabilitation of electrical rotating machines and also supplies varnishes and resins.

Product Portfolio:

Motorised Truck Assembly
AC/DC Traction Motors
Traction Alternators
Engine Room Blowers and Motors
Compressor Motors
Auxiliary Motors/Alternators
Motorised Bogie
Smoothing Reactors
Special Purpose Motors

Name: AŽD
Description:
The AŽD Praha company is a significant and all-Czech producer and supplier of signalling, telecommunication, information and automation technologies. It is mainly focused on the rail and road transport field including telematics and other technologies. The company ensures research, development, design, production, installation, reconstruction and maintenance of devices, systems and pursues capital equipment in these main fields:

- railroad transport
- metro and factory line operations
- telecommunication, information and radio systems
- telematic applications
- road signalization and parking systems
- new telephone and telecommunication systems for controlling railroad transport and for informing passengers

The products that our company produces exploit the best edge cutting technologies and processes. Nearly 700 employees are employed in the AŽD Praha company. Thanks to its longstanding tradition, since 1954, the company has a leading position among other suppliers in its field.

Name: Strato, Inc.
Description: Strato, Inc. develops and manufactures quality products for the railroad and transit industry. Our products meet Association of American Railroads (AAR) requirements, we are certified and operating to the AAR M-1003 Standard, and our Quality Management System is ISO 9001:2015 certified. We currently employ over 150 people, including a team of 24 engineers, at our facilities in New Jersey, Texas, New York, Mexico, India and China.

Name: SRT
Description:
SRT operates on the global rolling stock market for railway infrastructure construction and maintenance.

We offer integrated solutions and handle the whole production cycle in-house: from design and construction to sale and rental, including maintenance and after-sales service. Thanks to constant investment in research and innovation, we guarantee our customers high-performance products that meet the industry’s many and varied needs, helping to improve the efficiency and safety of railway works to deliver sustainable mobility, with a constant commitment to excellence in operation.

Name: voestalpine Railway Systems JEZ
Description:
Nos dedicamos al diseño, fabricación, suministro y mantenimiento de cruzamientos y aparatos de vía para el ferrocarril.
...
We are dedicated to the design, manufacture, supply and maintenance of crossings and track layouts.

Name: OFC SPA
Description:
Filial de las empresas francesas ETF (grupo Eurovia, Vinci) y Colas Rail (grupo Colas, Bouygues), OFC es una empresa 100% chilena.

La empresa está especializada en construcción y mantenimiento de instalaciones ferroviarias fijas en redes nacionales de ferrocarriles, redes de transportes urbanos (metro, tranvía) y conexiones industriales. 

Esta amplia gama de competencias técnicas abarca el campo de las vías, la ingeniería civil ferroviaria y las catenarias.

OFC está a cargo del mantenimiento de las vías y tercer riel de las líneas 1,2,5, 4 y 4ª del Metro de Santiago.

Se encaregará del suministro y montaje del proyecto de extensión de la línea 2 y de la nueva cochera Vespucio Norte del Metro de Santiago.

Name: Mercitalia Shunting & Terminal
Description:
Mercitalia Shunting & Terminal S.r.l. è una società del Gruppo FS Italiane, a socio unico soggetta alla direzione e coordinamento di Ferrovie dello Stato Italiane S.p.A. con Sede Legale a Genova.

La società è in grado di soddisfare le esigenze del cliente attraverso il presidio completo del ciclo produttivo, dalla fase di progettazione, realizzazione e manutenzione di raccordi fino all’offerta di servizi di movimentazione e manutenzione del materiale rotabile; si occupa della gestione e dell’esercizio di inland terminal intermodali.

La società offre anche alle imprese ferroviarie una serie di servizi, quali aree per lo stoccaggio delle unità di carico, smistamento dei carri ai magazzini raccordati, lavaggio e bonifica per tankcontainers, silos, cisterne.

I terminal gestiti dalla società sono posizionati strategicamente sul territorio nazionale: Milano Smistamento, Roma Smistamento, Pomezia Santa Palomba, Marcianise. L’attività viene svolta avvalendosi di attrezzature all’avanguardia e continuamente rinnovate per poter assicurare la migliore qualità di servizio.

Name: Stadler Polska
Description:
Stadler buduje pociągi od 80 lat. Firma oferuje szeroką gamę produktów w segmencie transportu szynowego. Należą do nich pociągi dużych prędkości (SMILE), intercity, regionalne i podmiejskie (FLIRT, KISS, WINK), a także metro i tramwaje (TANGO, TramLink, CityLink, Metelitsa, Variobahn). Produkuje również wagony pasażerskie oraz lokomotywy liniowe i manewrowe – między innymi najmocniejszą elektryczno-spalinową lokomotywę w Europie. Stadler pozostaje światowym liderem w produkcji pojazdów szynowych z napędem zębatym. 

W Polsce Stadler zatrudnia ok. 1400 pracowników – ponad 1000 osób w zakładzie Stadler Polska w Siedlcach, niemal 250 w zakładzie Stadler Środa w Środzie Wielkopolskiej, a także zespoły serwisowe w Warszawie, Łodzi i Sochaczewie. 

Stadler Polska w Siedlcach produkuje pociągi, tramwaje i wagony metra, w Stadler Środa w Środzie Wielkopolskiej powstają pudła tramwajowe, Stadler Service Polska w Warszawie, Łodzi i Sochaczewie odpowiada za serwis pojazdów dostarczonych naszym Klientom.

Stadler nieustannie rozwija działalność na polskim rynku budując wartość dodaną w regionie i branży - rozbudowuje zakłady, tworzy atrakcyjne miejsca pracy i poszerza paletę produkowanych pojazdów szynowych o kolejne typy. 

Stadler to firma oparta na innowacjach. Dzielimy się naszym międzynarodowym know-how i wspólnie z lokalnymi partnerami produkujemy w Polsce nowoczesne pojazdy na najwyższym europejskim poziomie. Jakość, niezawodność oraz niskie koszty eksploatacji naszych produktów pozwalają nam z sukcesem realizować projekty dla najbardziej wymagających Klientów.

Name: Pilbara Rail Maintenance
Description:
Pilbara Rail Maintenance (PRM) is a 100% Australian owned and operated business delivering safe and cost-effective rail construction, maintenance and civil solutions for mining and civil companies and contractors in Australia. We are one of the largest privately-owned rail companies in Australia and our management team has over 50 years of combined experience in the rail industry.
We have an extensive fleet of top of the line specialist rail machinery (we have the largest fleet of bespoke Liebherr Hi-rail equipment in Australia) and civil equipment and an experienced workforce capable of delivering complex projects. We take pride in working closely with our clients to ensure we deliver quality, on-time results.

Name: Cruzaço Fundição e Mecânica
Description: Fundada pelo Dr. Thomaz Melo Cruz, a Cruzaço iniciou suas operações em meados do ano de 1987. Ocupando uma área construída de aproximadamente 48.000 m², possui modernas e bem equipadas instalações industriais. Sua capacidade nominal é de 2.500 t/mês de peças de aço fundido, com peso unitário de até 20.000 kg. Estrategicamente localizada às margens da Rodovia Dom Pedro I, em meio à moderna malha rodoviária, a Cruzaço está a cerca de 80 km da Cidade de São Paulo, relativamente próxima dos principais centros industriais do país.

Name: RSP Ltd
Description:
Rail Signalling and Power Limited are a leading provider of signalling and power products and services.

A RISQS Registered company we have a range of Network Rail accepted products.

With offices in Saltash, Cornwall we employ a multi-disciplined team of IRSE licensed Designers, Verifiers, Installers and Testers and are uniquely structured to be able to provide a full range of services from full design, build and test of signalling schemes from GRIP 3 to 8 right through to specialist signalling and power design resource available at competitive hourly rates.

Name: L2MRail
Description:
IISc startup-L2M Rail is a DeepTech startup, born out of the prestigious Indian Institute of Science (IISc), with a bold mission to make Indian railways accident-free by 2030. 

At the core of our company lies a relentless drive for innovation, where we design cutting-edge technologies that address the most pressing challenges in rail safety and operational efficiency.

We take pride in our deep roots within the scientific community, having been seed-funded by IISc, which allows us privileged access to its world-class laboratories, resources, and expertise. Our team is composed of brilliant scientists, engineers, and professionals from renowned institutions like IITs and IISc, each bringing a wealth of knowledge and a passion for engineering excellence.

Name: The Orange Train Wash
Description: The world's most agile modular train cleaning system has arrived. With Orange Train Wash, rolling stock is cleaned efficiently ay a rate of one carriage every 30 seconds. Say goodbye to dated and inefficient cleaning systems. Say hello to Orange Train Wash.

Name: INOPLAST B.V.
Description: Inoplast is your complete supplier for Infrastructure, Ground, Road and Water Construction and Railinfra. We offer you a wide range, a large stock and we have our own production hall. We are located at Spieghelweg 4 in Leusden, 250 meters from the A28. Here we have our own terrain of 7000m2.

Name: Deri Automation Srl
Description: Componenti per i settori elettrico ed elettronico nell’automazione industriale e nel settore ferroviario.

Name: Siebens Spoorbouw
Description:
Siebens Spoorbouw is uw partner voor het vernieuwen, inmeten en onderhouden van uw rail- en kraanbaaninfrastructuur. 
Vanuit onze thuisbasis in Hemiksem voeren wij reeds decennia lang tal van opdrachten uit voor industrieklanten en voor de overheid :
- Vernieuwen van sporen
- Plaatsen, inmeten en onderhouden van kraanbanen
- Studie en predictief onderhoud
- Montage- en laswerken
Flexibiliteit en efficiëntie zijn de speerpunten van onze dienstverlening, zonder daarbij het familiale karakter van het bedrijf te verwaarlozen.
Met duurzame innovaties, domeinkennis en doorslaggevende technologische kennis kunnen wij u volledig ontzorgen.

Name: Electric Motor Services, Inc.
Description:
Electric Motor Services, Inc. (or EMS) repairs, rebuilds, re-manufactures, and re-engineers all electro-mechanical rotating equipment and provides replacement services for rotating electrical equipment customers. The EMS facility is a fully integrated operation complete with teardown, cleaning, machine shop, motor winding, fabrication, and electrical testing run station equipment. Our primary operation is located in a modern, state-of-the-art 45,000 ft² building at 6350 Indianapolis Blvd - Hammond, IN 46320. EMS is proud of our supporting staff that consist of sales, engineering, quality control, mechanical, machinist, electrical technicians, and customer service representatives to assist in the meeting of all customer requirements. 

Our mission is to provide superior products and services with on time delivery to our customers, while maintaining a safe working environment.

It is the policy of EMS and its employees to provide superior quality, customer service, and workmanship to all customers. EMS employees are committed professionals who take part in continuous process improvement and provide ultra-reliable services that our customers can depend on to make their businesses run successfully. EMS strives to build a culture based on integrity, excellence, entrepreneurship, and attention to detail. Our ability to achieve this depends on communication, teamwork, accountability, and employee involvement at all levels. 

Electric Motor Services, Inc. is committed to the highest standard of quality for all products and services we provide. Along with providing the utmost quality of products, we believe that our level of customer commitment is what has allowed us the privilege to rebuild for and sell equipment to our customers for over 35 years. Electric Motor Services backs our commitment to offering the best quality and customer service to our customers by reinvesting annually in our re-certification process with the Association of American Railroads.

Name: KONI Axtone Italia
Description: Koni e Axtone sono società del gruppo ITT operanti nel settore della componentistica  ferroviaria. Specializzate nella produzione di elementi di sospensione e sicurezza quali molle, ammortizzatori, respingenti e accoppiatori , Koni e Axtone sono presenti a livello mondiale nelle maggiori piattaforme ferroviarie.  Grazie a più di 1.000 dipendenti nel mondo, 10 siti produttivi e 4 centri di ricerca, Koni e Axtone garantiscono massimi livelli di sicurezza, comfort e innovazione sulle reti ferroviarie di oggi e di domani.

Name: TRADINSA INDUSTRIAL | CAF Group
Description:
Desde hace más de 15 años, TRADINSA INDUSTRIAL forma parte del Grupo CAF, aportando una sólida experiencia y recursos en el sector ferroviario. Nos enorgullece ser un centro de excelencia en mantenimiento de media vida y reparación de accidentes, diseñado para enfrentar los desafíos de la industria ferroviaria.
 
Nuestro objetivo es claro: ofrecer soluciones efectivas y eficientes que optimicen la fiabilidad, seguridad, disponibilidad y confort de los vehículos ferroviarios. Contamos con un equipo joven y dinámico, respaldado por la vasta experiencia del Grupo CAF, lo que nos permite implementar procesos eficientes y alcanzar metas ambiciosas.
 
Nuestras principales líneas de negocio incluyen:
            Mantenimiento Media Vida
            Peritación y Reparación de Accidentes
            Mantenimiento de Bogies y Enganches
 
Estamos comprometidos en ofrecer soluciones innovadoras y efectivas que respondan a los desafíos del sector ferroviario y garantizar la satisfacción de nuestros clientes.

Name: ASF-K de Mexico
Description:
ASF-K de México is a cornerstone of Amsted Rail’s global manufacturing footprint, located in Ciudad Sahagún in Hidalgo, Mexico. With over 2,000 employees, our foundry manufactures all structural components for freight bogies and end-of-car castings. 

Driven by purpose and pride, our workforce is committed to transparency, sustainability and progress. Our people-first culture encourages every member of our team to prioritize a safe working environment, pursue continuous professional development and find fulfillment in their roles. We put the health, safety and well-being of our employees first by creating an atmosphere where every individual feels valued, supported and engaged. 

Amsted Rail is one of the leading global providers of railcar systems and components, offering a broad array of advanced solutions for the freight, transit and telematics technology sectors. Car builders, lessors, fleet managers and railroads have relied on our expertise for generations as we collaborate to make rail transportation more reliable and efficient.

Name: Parametric
Description: Parametric develops autonomous, manufacturer-independent measurement solutions that help reduce noise, energy consumption, and material across rail track networks and on vehicles.  Talk to us if you are facing challenges at the intersection between vehicles and infrastructure that are difficult to solve. Our data driven, AI enhanced solutions are made to find the needle in the haystack

Name: Abtus Ltd
Description: Abtus specialises in both Defence and the measurement & maintenance of rail-track and associated infrastructure. We offer a design & manufacture service and offer a a range of products covering a range of disciplines including laser scanning devices, track Geometry, structure clearance, gauging, overhead line equipment and rail surveying. Abtus' products are helping to maintain the rail infrastructure across the globe. Our defence products are currently in use on the majority of UK naval vessels including HMS Ark Royal and HMS Ocean and fighting vehicles such as Warrior

Name: CAF Locomotive Solutions
Description:
PROPULSION SOLUTIONS for electric and diesel-electric LOCOMOTIVES.
Best-in-class Traction Motors, Inverter Cabinets, Gearboxes and Fleet Analysis Digital solutions.

Our background within the #CAF Group, one of the largest rail vehicle manufacturers with more than 100 years of experience, allows us to offer the precise integration of our components in a one-stop shop

Name: IMATEQ France
Description: IMATEQ is one of the leading providers of maintenance services for rolling stock. This joint venture between Vossloh Rolling Stock France and Socofer was created in December 2015.

Name: MRD Rail Technologies Pty Ltd
Description:
Safer operations. Fewer failures. More reliable journeys.
For 30+ years, MRD has delivered remote condition monitoring, earth leakage detectors, automated relay testers, and safety and test equipment to support the signalling maintenance teams of rail networks worldwide.

Get in touch to discuss how we can support your network.

Name: RailNovation
Description: RailNovation is an industrial investor in the area of sustainable transport systems.

Name: Modern Manufacturing
Description:
Manitoba, Winnipeg | Eudora, Kansas

Being the exclusive supplier to some of the largest class 1 railways in North America, Modern Manufacturing represents superior quality signaling equipment and accessories. Our continuous investment in technology, research, and design ensures our ability to deliver rail solutions that add value to your business. With four decades of experience serving the railway and industrial sectors, we understand the challenges that face your company each and every day.

Name: voestalpine Railway Systems Australia
Description: voestalpine Railway Systems Australia Pty Ltd is the world market leader in turnout technology for railways, metros and tramways. Operating in Mackay, Queensland and Bathurst, New South Wales, the team at voestalpine Railway Systems Australia has blended this international success with their own innovation and client-base knowledge to provide a service and product range of unparalleled craftsmanship and quality.

Name: SAKARYA VAGON SANAYİ A.Ş.
Description: SAVASAŞ is able to manufacture, maintain and overhaul of various type of rolling stock vehicles.

Name: York Rail (York Railroad Construction Inc.)
Description:
York Rail is a railroad construction and maintenance company based in the Hamilton Ontario region and is currently serving many Class 1 railroad companies in multiple Canadian provinces.

With management personnel and crews that have over 30 years of experience York Rail is growing rapidly and will cater to needs of any railroad clients.

Please check this website regularly to see updates on our projects and personnel.

Sincerely,
York Rail Management

Name: Antinozzi Srl
Description: La Antinozzi Srl è una azienda specializzata nella progettazione, realizzazione e manutenzione di reti di telecomunicazione, impianti di segnalamento ferroviario, impianti BT/MT

Name: Rolling Stock Consortium (RSC)
Description: Créée par l’association d’experts reconnus dans l’environnement ferroviaire et par un solide réseau de prestataires clefs, RSC se positionne comme un nouvel acteur de transformation et maintenance innovant du matériel roulant.

Name: Ing. De Aloe Costruzioni S.r.l.
Description:
La Ing. De Aloe Costruzioni s.r.l. nasce nel 1984 per iniziativa dell’Ing. Antonio De Aloe, come azienda specializzata in lavori ferroviari, rendendosi autonoma dalla azienda paterna, già da decenni attiva in questo settore. 
L’impresa ha svolto inizialmente l’attività di manutenzione ordinaria e straordinaria all’armamento sulle linee di RFI nella zona del Trentino Alto Adige, acquisendo la necessaria esperienza e affidabilità, operando dapprima in lavori di rifacimento di piani di stazione ed in seguito in lavori di rinnovo di binari in piena linea. Nella stessa zona ha operato per i committenti locali, realizzando per la Provincia Autonoma di Trento il nuovo scalo intermodale di Roncafort e il riammodernamento della linea Trento Primolano, e per la Provincia Autonoma di Bolzano il ripristino della linea Merano Malles e il riammodernamento della linea Fortezza San Candido. Dopo essersi attrezzata per operare su linee a scartamento ridotto, ha eseguito, in presenza dell’esercizio ferroviario, il rinnovo pressoché totale della linea della Trento Malè (circa 45 km), compreso i piani di stazione, e realizzando, in collaborazione con imprese di costruzione generali, importanti lavori di prolungamento (circa 15 km) della linea stessa o varianti di tracciato per interramento. Essendosi particolarmente attrezzata nel campo dello scartamento metrico, l’impresa ha in seguito lavorato all’estero su linee a scartamento ridotto, in particolare in Francia, gli ammodernamenti di circa 25 Km della linea ferroviaria Chemins de Fer de Provence nella Valle del fiume Var, di circa 60 km della linea ferroviaria Le Blanc-Argent nei pressi di Romorantin-Lanthenay, di circa 15 km della linea ferroviaria Saint Gervais-Martigny nei pressi di Chamonix, con tratti in pendenza fino al 90 per mille; in Svizzera, per conto della Ferrovia Retica , la ristrutturazione della stazione di Tirano; in Belgio, lavori di rinnovo della linea Tramway Touristique de l ‘Aisne.

Name: De Witte - Vandecaveye
Description:
De Witte-Vandecaveye is al enkele decennia actief in de elektriciteitssector. Wij zijn actief op verschillende terreinen zoals algemene elektriciteitswerken met VCA-certificatie, verlichtingsinstallaties, spoorwegtechnieken en no dig solutions. Bekijk onze mogelijkheden en wij bieden graag een oplossing, ook voor uw specifieke wensen. Met een doorgedreven service en kwaliteit spelen wij op heel wat terreinen van deze branche. Ook voor buitenwerken met spoorwegkranen, rupskranen en mini - graafmachines kan u op ons een beroep doen. We streven er dan ook naar zoveel mogelijk diensten in één pakket aan te bieden, met als specialisatie: spoorwegtechnieken.
 
Eén van onze grote troeven is dat we alle transport in eigen beheer kunnen uitoefenen, wat zorgt voor een erg vlotte service naar onze klant.

Name: Knox Kershaw Inc.
Description:
Headquartered in Montgomery, Alabama, Knox Kershaw Inc. is the leading designer and manufacturer of railroad maintenance equipment, serving both U.S. and international markets. Knox Kershaw offers a wide range of specialized machinery, including ballast regulators, snow fighters, brush cutters, tie and bridge cranes, kribber adzers, double brooms, yard cleaners, personnel and material transporters, tie inserters, switch undercutters, and specialty equipment. The company also provides remanufacturing services for ballast regulators, yard cleaners, and other maintenance-of-way (MOW) equipment.

With three generations of expertise, Know Kershaw Inc. has been dedicated to meeting the needs of customers worldwide, supported by a global network of sales and service representatives. Known for its quick delivery of parts for KKI machines and other manufacturers’ equipment, the company also offers operator and maintenance training for a variety of MOW equipment.

Name: GREENLANDER
Description: We specialize in developing 4x4 Expedition Vehicles made entirely from Natural Fibre Composites (NFC), providing the perfect marriage between performance and sustainability. By leveraging the technological expertise of GREENBOATS and the scalable manufacturing capabilities of the CIRCULAR STRUCTURES Platform, we aim to redefine the 4x4 vehicle landscape for the environmentally conscious consumer.

Name: RENOWN RAIL WELDING LIMITED
Description: RENOWN RAIL WELDING LIMITED is a railroad manufacture company based out of 33A HIGH STREET STONY STRATFORD, MILTON KEYNES, BUCKINGHAMSHIRE, United Kingdom.

Name: Laxyo Energy Ltd.
Description:
LAXYO, an Engineering Company established in mid 2007, with amalgamation of sister concerns, is meeting the Niche of industrial houses. With the Commitment; We, the energy people…., LAXYO is offering excellent value added professional services in multiple engineering fields to industrial houses. 

A combination of well planned outsourcing of relevant services to LAXYO and gainful utilization of available in-house resources, can reduce operational cost of the industrial houses and they can be free from day to day worries, concentrate on formulation of plans to achieve corporate goals and contribute significantly to fulfil `VISION 2020` conceived and projected by our honorable Ex President Mr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

Name: DLRR
FDG ING s.r.l.
Description:
Attività rivolta a veicoli ferroviari, metropolitane, tranviari e filoviari.

·         Compilazione procedure di prove di tipo, di serie e loro validazione – per conto del settore testing

·         Commissioning

·         Assistenza in garanzia durante il servizio passeggeri presso i committenti in Italia o Estero

Name: MSV Metal Studénka, a.s.
Description:
In the production of forgings and railcar components, MSV Metal Studénka is the direct successor of the former wagon plant of Studénka founded in 1901. Today, MSV Metal Studénka is one of the largest suppliers to UIC wagon manufacturing and maintenance industry in Europe. Since 2013, the company has become a part of Jet Investment, a Czech investment group traditionally specializing in well-established Czech and CEE companies. 

MSV Metal Studénka is the only European producer with complete portfolio of sub-assemblies. We are one of the leading producers of screw-coupling, draw-hook, draw-gear, buffer and wide range of forgings. We deliver our products to all major wagon builders, operators, leasing companies and maintainers. With large share of our customers we have a long standing relationships. We deliver to majority of European countries, North Africa and Middle East, with export reaching over 80% of revenues.

The hart of MSV operations is our forging and pressing division with both hammers and presses. We control all major production steps – material cutting, forging and pressing, heat treatment, machining, blasting, paint shop, tools production and laboratory & testing, which is a guarantee of our high quality and operational flexibility. Majority of our products meets strict certification requirements of our customers and European institutions.

Our mission is a loyal service to all customers. The Company endeavours to keep its customers by continuously improving the quality of products supplied for reasonable prices. We are committed to further strengthen our position of a leading European manufacturer of railcar subassemblies and die forgings for railways and other industries. Here, we rely on a motivated team of employees, the knowledge and expertise of which guarantee successful future.

Name: Ferrovías Astur
Description:
Ferrovías Astur is a company in the railway sector dealing with the design, manufacture, repair and maintenance of rolling stock. 
From the start with the aim of designing and manufacturing catenary maintenance vehicles, Ferrovías Astur has consolidated itself as a versatile company capable of responding to all kinds of project within the scope of self-propelled vehicles. 
Our technical team tackles from the inclusion of the latest technological innovations in newly built vehicles to the repair, rehabilitation and improvement of any railway rolling stock.

Name: Lennings Rail
Description:
Lennings Rail is the pre-eminent track work contractor in Southern Africa.
Lennings Rails is focused on the development, construction, rehabilitation and maintenance of regional track work systems. Highly experienced and competent engineers, project managers and skilled personnel ensure that projects, no matter how large and complex, are delivered to specification within agreed time frames.

The company owns and operates an extensive fleet of track maintenance equipment geared to undertake all aspects of track construction, rehabilitation and maintenance. In general, the machines are locally built in our workshops, east of Johannesburg.

In addition to track construction and maintenance, we manufacture various types of prestressed concrete sleepers for mainlines and sidings, ranging from 18.5-ton to 30-ton axle loads, as well as a range of precast electrification masts and poles.

Our core values of safety, accountability and honesty are entrenched in the way we do business. We work as a team and pride ourselves on continuously learning from our experiences, thus being able to offer innovative solutions to our clients.

Lennings Rail is focused on training, developing and empowering employees, and is committed to social investment in our areas of operation to ensure the long-term sustainability of our business.

Name: Aldon Company, Inc.
Description:
In 1904, when Aldon Company was established, our market was limited to the railroads, many of which were headquartered in Chicago. Over the many decades since then, our market has expanded to include rail-using industrial firms in more than 300 different kinds of industries.

Aldon can provide all the basic rail safety and track repair products that you need in your rail yard.

Our Vision is to become the principal manufacturer and supplier of products to the rail-using industry.

Our Mission is to provide outstanding customer service with a wide variety of solutions to ensure that your rail yard runs efficiently.

Contact us today:
847.623.8800 | aldonco.com | e-rail@aldonco.com

Name: Rosenqvist Rail
Description: We design, manufacture, and sell equipment to streamline construction- and maintenance work of railways. Our smart solutions enhance productivity, reduce working hours, and improve safety for those working within the railway industry.

Name: RAIL-BOTIC TECH
Description:
Criada em 2020 por um sócio investidor da Railpod, a empresa Rail-Botic Tech é a representante exclusiva dos produtos e serviços da RailPod no Brasil.

Possui um laboratório de teste, em Curitiba-PR, para oferecer aos clientes brasileiros agilidade e personalização no treinamento para uso dos produtos e atendimento pós-venda. Oferece suporte técnico local e acesso a peças de reposição.

Tem como missão agregar valor aos produtos da Railpod através de canal direto em língua portuguesa, para conveniência de seus clientes.

Name: Kodiak Rail
Description:
Kodiak Rail delivers thermal protection solutions purpose-built for the North American rail industry.

We manufacture heat shields, exhaust blankets, exhaust components, and winterization products that keep rail operations safe, reliable, and efficient. Our products are engineered to withstand extreme conditions, extend component life, and reduce downtime—so crews can focus on moving what matters.

Name: Wickedride Adventure Services Pvt Ltd.
Description: Wickedride Adventure Services Pvt Ltd. is a railroad manufacture company based out of No. 1881, 39th Cross, 11th A mainJayanagar 4th T Block, Bengaluru, India.

Name: Kyosan Europe sp. z o.o.
Description:
Kyosan Europe Sp. z o.o. jest firmą córką wiodącego japońskiego producenta systemów sygnalizacyjnych, Kyosan Electric Manufacturing Co., Ltd. 

Od momentu założenia w 1917 r. Kyosan Electric Manufacturing rozwija działalność w dziedzinach takich jak „systemy sterowania ruchem kolejowym”, „systemy sterowania ruchem drogowym” i „systemy konwersji mocy”, w oparciu o wartości „bezpieczeństwa” i „niezawodności”. 
W szczególności system sygnalizacji kolejowej Kyosan ma ponad 100-letnią historię i wciąż ewoluuje wraz z rozwojem kolei japońskich i technologii. Dziś technologia Kyosan jest wysoko ceniona nie tylko w Japonii, ale także na całym świecie. 

Kyosan Europe Sp. z o.o. is a subsidiary of Kyosan Electric Manufacturing Co., Ltd., which is a leading manufacturer of signalling systems in Japan. 

Since its founding in 1917, Kyosan Electric Manufacturing has been developing businesses in fields such as “railway signalling systems”, “road traffic control systems” and “power conversion systems”, based on “safety” and “reliability”. 
In particular, the railway signalling system has a history of more than 100 years and has continued evolving along with Japanese railways and cultivating its technology. Today, Kyosan’s technology is being highly evaluated not only in Japan but also around the world.

Name: Safetrack Australasia
Description:
Safetrack Australasia, a West Australian Company, supplies the Railway, Water/Wastewater, Oil/Gas and Construction Industries with Lightning Protection, Railway Machines, Rail Tools, Measuring Instruments and Industrial Supplies throughout Australia & New Zealand. 


We contribute with great technical know-how and a high level of service and strive for a close and long-term collaboration with our customers, users and other partners. 

Another important business area is the connection of cables in the Railways, Earthing and Cathodic Protection Industries.

With connection methods such as Pin Brazing, SafeBond and SafePlug, SafeGrip & SafeShunt.

Safetrack Australasia can satisfy customers needs for modern systems for cable connection, in which they are the leading manufacturer.

With an emphasis on customer service, our innovative efforts allows us to continue offering quality products at a competitive price and lead time.
To meet our clients ever changing needs, DLL manufactured obsolete and newly engineered replacement parts, utilizing the latest standards of manufacturing methods to provide continued support for custom products and those no longer supported in the market.
All parts are manufactured by DLL consistent with OEM standards.

Description: Milwaukee Composites, Inc. (MCI) designs and manufactures patented phenolic products for mass transit vehicles. MCI phenolic composite products are lightweight, firesafe moisture resistant and maintenance free.  Now in our 25th year, we are proud to say that our products have never failed.  Our company has supplied over 8.5 million square feet of floors, ceilings and doors in more than 20 U.S. states and across three continents. Clients include Brookville Equipment, Bombardier, Kawasaki, Siemens, London Underground, New York Transit, Chicago Metra and Gillig.

Name: IH Systems Sp. z o.o.
Description:
IH Systems Sp. z o.o. was established to implement specialized projects in rapidly growing industry segments. The company's main focus of development is the railroad machinery sector. Our leading product is bi-directional machines that run on both roads and railroads. In addition, the company installs PROLEC systems for construction and railroad machinery from various manufacturers. These systems are not only characterized by a high level of technology, but also provide an additional level of safety for machine operators and users.

 Firma IH Systems Sp. z o.o. została powołana w celu realizacji projektów specjalistycznych w dynamicznie rozwijających się segmentach przemysłu. Głównym kierunkiem rozwoju firmy jest sektor maszyn kolejowych. Naszym wiodącym produktem są maszyny dwudrogowe które poruszają się zarówno po drodze jak i torach kolejowych. Poza tym firma zajmuje się montażem systemów PROLEC do maszyn budowlanych i kolejowych różnych producentów. Systemy charakteryzują się nie tylko wysokim poziomem technologicznym ale zapewniają także dodatkowy poziom bezpieczeństwa dla operatorów i użytkowników maszyn.

Name: Framafer
Description: La société FRAMAFER a été créée le 9 septembre 1960 sous la dénomination MECANOPLASS avec pour objet d’assurer la vente et le service après-vente des engins de marque PLASSER & THEURER en France, puis en zone francophone. Elle devient FRAMAFER, Société Française de Construction de Matériel Ferroviaire, en 1978, lorsque l’entreprise développe une activité de construction en plus de ses activités initiales, sur son site de Béning-lès-Saint-Avold. Avec plus de 60 ans d’existence, FRAMAFER est un acteur principal dans la construction d’engins de travaux ferroviaires ; son champ d’action s’étend de la France aux pays francophones d’Europe et d’Afrique. L’entreprise est également société partenaire du groupe autrichien PLASSER & THEURER, leader mondial de la branche d’activité.

Name: ELH Waggonbau Niesky GmbH
Description:
Die ELH Waggonbau Niesky GmbH kann auf eine langjährige Firmengeschichte zurückblicken, davon fast 100 Jahre im Schienenfahrzeugbau. 

Auf einer Produktionsfläche von rd. 37.000 qm entwickeln und fertigen unsere hochqualifizierten und erfahrenen Mitarbeiter Güterwagen für Spezialanwendungen und den Logistikbereich auf der Schiene sowie Rohbauten aus Aluminium und Stahl für den Personenverkehr. Ergänzt wird unser Portfolio durch Komponenten für die Schienenfahrzeugindustrie, wie z.B. innovative, lärmarme und instandhaltungsfreundliche Drehgestelle oder Baugruppen in Stahl, Edelstahl- oder Aluminiumausführung. Moderne CNC-gesteuerte Fräs- und Bohrwerke, Brennschneide- und Abkantmaschinen sowie Schweißroboter gehören zu unserem Maschinenpark. 

Durch unsere Innovationsfähigkeit sowie die Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit unserer Produkte gehört die ELH Waggonbau Niesky GmbH zu den führenden Güterwagenherstellern in Europa. Alle Fahrzeuge und Drehgestelle werden speziell auf die jeweiligen Einsatzfelder und die individuellen Anforderungen unserer Kunden zugeschnitten, erprobt und zugelassen und befinden sich auf dem neuesten Stand der Technik.

Name: Precision Rail and Mfg.
Description:
Precision Rail and Mfg., Inc. is an ISO-certified Tier 1 supplier of precision machined products.  Our Company provides machined products to many Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEM) in a variety of industries, including Agriculture, Construction, Mining and Wind Energy. 

We do more than just provide machining services to our customers.  Our Manufacturing team collaborates with your design engineers early in the manufacturing process to understand your goals and objectives and provide product solutions (such as tooling and fixture design, material management flow and other supply chain services) which help you to drive down costs and ensure an efficient product supply chain.  Using the latest technologies in the manufacturing process, such as utilizing our Palletech machining systems to reduce set up costs, we provide the total package – tooling, prototyping, preproduction lots and ongoing production requirements.   We will help you manage your overall product costs while delivering component parts to you As Promised, On Time and On Budget.

Precision has also become the world’s largest and only ISO 9001:2015 producer of rail car retarders in North America.  These clasp and inert retarders (whether pneumatic or hydraulic powered) are built with the same machining knowhow as our machined OEM components.  Our rail products are deployed and trusted by every Class I railroad in North America as well as railroads in South America and other worldwide locations.  This equipment plays an important role in efficiently moving rail traffic in railroad classification yards.    

Our on-site railroad product engineers include designers, mechanical engineers and electrical engineers as well as technical support professionals, all work together to provide product support and customer service for our rail products which is second to none.

We invite you to discover how our 50 years of experience can help you with your product needs.

Name: CRRC Times Electric USA, LLC
Description:
CRRC Times Electric USA, LLC (abbr. TEUSA), established in 2005 with offices in Erie and Chicago, always provides components for industrial and transportation industry. TEUSA won the bid of LA project in 2017 and will provide propulsion, APS and MDS system to Metro cars. TEUSA built localization factory in LA and TEUSA will provide more and more job opportunities in LA.
Parent company CRRC Times Electric Co., Ltd., (abbr. TEC) is a leading propulsion system provider for locomotives, mass transit vehicles and EMUs. TEC has engaged in R & D, manufacture and service in the fields of propulsion systems, vehicle control systems, signaling system, and other key components for over 50 years. TEUSA provides core electric components and propulsion, APS and MDS system to rail transit market and MDS and focusing on providing professional solution and service.

Name: Glova Rail A/S
Description:
Glova Rail A/S is a key player in the supply of vacuum toilet systems for trains, as well as engineering partner for new build and refurbishment projects within the railway segment.

The demands to the environment have forced the railway operators to move away from the open toilet systems and to use systems with retention tanks. Among the most popular sanitary systems for trains today is the vacuum toilet, been able to withstand the pressure chock waves generated in tunnels, or transport the waste over longer distances. 

Glova Rail A/S is also an important player in supporting sanitary systems in daily operation in terms of spares and service for third party products like Evac, Temoinsa, Semvac, Frensistemi and Dowald Werke.

Within the field of railway toilet systems Glova Rail A/S is now a high end producer of systems.

Description:

The headquarter Nanjing Kangni Mechanical & Electrical Co., Ltd. (Kangni) is an innovation-oriented enterprise specialized in research and application of mechanical and electrical technologies, and was listed successfully on the Shanghai Stock Exchange on August 1st 2014 (stock code 603111). The “Kangni” brand has been registered in countries such as China, the UK, France, Germany, Austria, Italy, the US and Russia, and has been identified as a China Famous Brand.

Kangni is primarily engaged in the R&D, manufacturing and maintenance of railway vehicle door system. In the China door system market, Kangni possesses more than 50% market share, while in terms of oversea markets, Kangni has cooperated with major car builders such as Bombardier, Alstom and Siemens to sell products all over the world, including France, Canada, Turkey, Singapore, Argentina, America, Saudi Arabia and Brazil. In addition, Kangni also provides other a full suite of related products such as interior fittings, power connectors, platform screen doors, new energy products for automobile industry and precision machining equipment.

Name: Recycling Consultants
Description:
At Recycling Consultants, we know there's a lot of hassle often associated with scrap. That's why we do everything we can to take those issues off your plate. Whether we're providing rail take-up, brokering your materials for the best price possible, or transporting your scrap off-site to the mill quickly and under deadline, Recycling Consultants will do whatever is necessary to fit your needs.

We believe strong businesses are rooted in relationships that are tried and true. You see, we’re committed to our suppliers when they have a surplus of scrap to unload. And we’re committed to managing that scrap for our buyers in a way that will lower their bottom line. Fueled by optimism, we’re long-term relationship people. Just as any opportunity begins with a handshake, we believe it needs to end with one, too.

We’re Recycling Consultants and our team has been in the scrap business for nearly 25 years.

RAILSHINE is a leading global player in the development and sales of machinery, equipments and working methods for professional users within the railway industry.

You look for highly reliable products, stay with us, … Stay on track !

Name: L&W Industries
Description:
L&W is a vertically integrated manufacturer and distributor of signaling and communication solutions for the rail industry. With over 50 years of experience, L&W delivers mission-critical products with a focus on safety, reliability, responsiveness, and long-term value creation.

Our sales, engineering, and manufacturing teams operate with a unified focus: providing high-quality, tailored solutions that align with customer operations and project objectives. We are committed to continuous improvement through investments in technology, talent, and flexible processes designed to meet the evolving needs of the industry.

In 2024, L&W expanded into a new manufacturing facility to support continued growth and customer-focused innovation.

In addition to manufacturing, L&W maintains a rail-specific distribution network that ensures reliable access to critical components and systems—delivered with precision and speed.

With a legacy of performance, a commitment to safety, and a forward-looking mindset, L&W remains a trusted partner for rail and transit infrastructure.

Name: Bluebell Railway plc
Description:
Bluebell Railway is a heritage railway and tourist attraction in Sussex. It was one of the first preserved heritage lines in the country, resulting in one of the finest collections of vintage steam locomotives and carriages – many of which were preserved straight out of service from British Railways.

The Bluebell Railway now runs steam trains across 11 miles between Sheffield Park and East Grinstead, stopping at Horsted Keynes and Kingscote.

Name: Nordic Maskin & Rail

Vi er en kvalitetsbevidst virksomhed, som har mange års erfaring med alle former for forskelligartet banearbejde. Som én af de fremmeste specialister, hvad angår produktion af jernbanespor, har vi tilegnet os unik viden og ekspertise, som vi hver dag anvender i vores daglige virke. Description: voestalpine Signaling Poland Sp. z o. o. (former voestalpine Signaling Sopot Sp. z o.o.) is a subsidiary from voestalpine Railway Systems, the global leader for railway infrastructure system solutions. The engineering company, focused on continuous development, technical and organizational progress, innovation, implemented in close and constant contact with the customer and his needs. The company cooperates with many scientific centers and research institutes, as well as takes an active part in scientific conferences and publishes its solutions to technical and scientific problems. Our company deals primarily with the production, integration, installation and service of equipment and systems to improve the efficiency and safety of rail and road transport.

Name: Goldschmidt Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
Goldschmidt Australia Pty Ltd is part of the Goldschmidt Group. 

Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.

Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.

Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.

The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.

We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.

By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.

Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.

Name: Association Ouvriere Des Compagnons Du Devoir Du Tour De France
Comep Srl
Description:
La COMEP s.r.l. fondata nell'anno 2003, inizia a svolgere la propria attività in campo elettrico/elettronico nel settore ferroviario, per il quale cura direttamente la costruzione, l'assemblaggio ed il montaggio della quadristica.
In tale attività acquisisce profonda conoscenza tecnica, che consente di sviluppare specifiche competenze anche nei settori dei collaudi, del controllo e della messa in servizio di componenti elettrici/elettronici .
La COMEP srl nel 2006 è stata accreditata nell'albo fornitori di Trenitalia per l'attività di manutenzione corrente su locomotive elettriche presso impianti di Trenitalia ed attività di revisione, ripristino ed installazione impianti elettrici ed apparecchiature di bordo di rotabili ferroviari.
Nel pacchetto clienti COMEP sono presenti società leader nel campo ferroviario quali Hitachi Rail Italy spa, Titagarh Firema spa, Spii spa, ed in precedenza fino all'assorbimento nelle nuove compagnie AnsaldoBreda spa, Firema Trasporti spa, Circumvesuviana srl, MetroCampania NordEst srl.
L'azienda, sempre più lanciata verso soluzioni tecnologiche avanzate, ha investito considerevoli risorse umane ed economiche nel campo ottico/energia, nel cui comparto dal 2008 ha visto crescere la propria attività. In tale settore, ed in particolare per giunti e terminazioni su cavi energia M.T e B.T., giunti e misure con OTDR su cavi ottici terrestri e sottomarini dispone di personale altamente qualificato che svolge attualmente la propria attività in campo internazionale per primarie aziende del settore. Tra i maggiori clienti sono presenti aziende leader nella produzione ed installazione di cavi terrestri e sottomarini quali Prysmian Cavi e Sistemi Italia, P.C.S. Italiana.

Description:
At Lewis Bolt and Nut we are continuously working to take the railroad fastening industry to the next level by exceeding the expectations of our customers with top quality fastening products, the fastest service available, and knowledgeable, prompt communication. 
We strive to build products that improve performance, save time and ultimately reduce maintenance costs. In addition, we are recognized as the industry leader in engineering, quality, testing, and machining. We have unmatched service in the design and production of fasteners and forgings.

Name: OLKOL Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Olkol sp. z o.o. świadczy usługi w zakresie naprawy i modernizacji taboru kolejowego, a w szczególności lokomotyw elektrycznych. Spółka powstała w 2015 roku i prowadzi działalność na terenie dawnych Zakładów Naprawczych Taboru Kolejowego (ZNTK) w Oleśnicy.
Podstawową działalnością przedsiębiorstwa jest kompleksowy serwis taboru kolejowego wraz z pełnym odbiorem komisarycznym i dozorowym. Olkol sp. z o.o. zatrudnia wysoko wykwalifikowaną kadrę pracowniczą z długoletnim doświadczeniem w zakresie modernizacji, napraw i bieżącego utrzymania taboru kolejowego co gwarantuje Klientom wysoką jakość świadczonych usług. Posiada także dokumentację konstrukcyjno-technologiczną w zakresie napraw taboru kolejowego, w tym zwłaszcza lokomotyw elektrycznych serii EU/EP 07, EP08, ET22.
Olkol sp. z o.o. specjalizuje się w naprawach rewizyjnych (P4) i głównych (P5) lokomotyw elektrycznych do obsługi ruchu towarowego i pasażerskiego. Wykonuje również usługi przeglądowe lokomotyw elektrycznych na poziomie P1, P2 i P3.
W trakcie serwisu taboru kolejowego Olkol sp. z o.o. wykonuje między innymi weryfikację i kompleksową naprawę zestawów kołowych, silników trakcyjnych, aparatury i maszyn pomocniczych z lokomotyw elektrycznych.

Name: Wavetrain Systems AS
Description:
Wavetrain Systems AS 

Wavetrain have developed a state-of-the art product based on sound wave signals using a multi-sensor installation that is concentrated on a railroad crossing. The technology makes it possible to detect trains directly at a level crossing without the use of cables several km in each direction.  The result is a robust and reliable warning and safety solution for level crossings. This solution provides substantial savings for clients compared to other systems, without compromising on quality.

Wavetrain Level Crossing Protection (WLXP)

The Wavetrain Level Crossing Protection is a system for detecting approaching trains at level crossings and activating warning indicators (lights and sounds).

The system is based on signals generated in the rails by approaching trains, and uses the specific signal profile associated with trains for detection. The advantage of the Wavetrain Level Crossing Protection is that all components are installed in the vicinity of the level crossing, normally within 15 meters. The Wavetrain Systems does not require long distance cabling between the level crossing and the sensors, as the prevalent conventional solutions do. All components are either under ground or inside fixed enclosures; this secures less violation and theft of materials and goods. Theft of cabling is a rising problem for railway authorities today, and our system design prevents this.

Mechanical packings and gaskets have, after all, slowly evolved into “commodity type” products that are almost generic in nature. Many of the suppliers of these items will come with good credentials; records of cost savings for customers, quality products and good service.

Like these competitors, Master Packing & Rubber Company also has a fine record of accomplishments and testimonials. But there is something else that we bring to the marketplace – commitment to our customers.

We want our customers to know that we take their needs and problems seriously. That is why we are in business. We make no apologies. We are in business to be faithful and successful and we believe that it takes a day to day dedication to make it happen.

This is a technical business and we believe we have a thorough knowledge of it. But that is not good enough. We know that we must constantly earn the right to serve you. People will come back to do business if the price is fair, the quality high, and the service is what you have a right to expect.

We are committed to this way of doing business. We hope that there may be an opportunity to serve you in the near future.

En aceros inoxidable: utilizamos aleaciones AISI 304 y 316 dependiendo de las exigencias técnicas de la pieza y con distintos tipos de acabado (mate, satinado y pulido).

También trabajamos aleaciones para mecanizados, laton,etc..

Name: HisWay Labs
Description:
We are developing the next generation of IoT rail sensing.  Our patented smart sensor technology, TrackView, gives railway operators real-time information on rail events and insight into track condition and operation.

TrackView accurately monitors rail integrity and train position by using the railway tracks as the sensing medium.

The self-contained, solar-powered, IoT device is 'light-touch' with low installation costs and no extensive track side cabling or equipment requirements.

TrackView reduces the risk of derailments, increases rail uptime and provides real-time train detection.

Name: Green Rail
Description:
The basic goals of the Green Rail Association:
- the use of the European Green Deal as a tool to fulfill the association's purposes
- active cooperation on the introduction of emission-free and energy-efficient rolling stock, which will be environmentally friendly and economical
- reducing energy consumption and emissions produced in connection with the transport of passengers and goods by rail
- solving the problem of reducing the energy and emission intensity of railway rolling stock
- focus on the development of zero-emission and energy-efficient rail transport and the development of infrastructure for zero-emission rail transport
- promoting the common interest in including current electric zero-emission vehicles as supported investments aimed at reducing energy consumption and emissions
- a platform for the creation and exchange of technical information on clean/emission-free vehicles, cooperation and, where appropriate, opposition to technical standards
- presentation and application of common interest for the creation and subsequent approval of favorable legislation, which will also enable the development of emission-free energy-efficient rail transport
- support and application of common interest in the creation of adequate financial resources, or the introduction of such financial models that economically cover ecological and emission-free transport
- positively oriented promotion of emission-free energy-efficient rail transport, incl. positive impact on the public

Name: Trainload Limited
Description:

We also specialise in loading and unloading of Bitumen (Asphalt)

We supply two types of systems to move the rail wagons or cars, these being a Buffer Wagon System or a Trolley (Mule) system. Different track layouts can be accommodated, including with switches (Crossings/Turnouts).

Our shunting systems are robust and can replace old Shunters, that are too costly to keep maintaining, and are a fraction of the cost of a new Shunter.

We can supply Rail only machines, Road/Rail machines, and Robot type machines. These can all be operated either with a driver or by remote control.

Our team have vast knowledge of the rail sector, and have designed and installed many systems to clients' worldwide.. 

Based in the UK, the company supplies to a wide range of differing industries from oil refineries through to petro-chemical industries and material handling depots throughout the world, and has an excellent track record for delivery and commissioning the precise solution to meet their clients' requirements.

Name: Weighwell Engineering Ltd
Description:
Since its formation in 1988, Weighwell has been trusted and respected throughout the world for its engineering skills, expertise and innovation. This is combined with a total commitment to quality, reliability and service. Today at Weighwell we continue to build on this rich engineering heritage by delivering state-of-the-art technology and advanced solutions for train weighing equipment.

Our Portable Train Weigher (PTW) is a train weighing system that has revolutionised the train weighing industry due to its universal application and portable design. The ability to install the PTW into a variety of track gauges and railtypes allows our system to be used within the Rail Freight, Commuter and High Speed industries. Our PTW can weigh trains either statically or weigh in-motion without altering track foundations, thus providing prominent time and cost savings.       

Our static train weighing systems are intuitively integrated with our industry leading ptwX software and have an accuracy of +/- 1%, this has proved invaluable throughout the world for train manufacture and train maintenance depots. Our ptwX software can provide instant weight information across the individual wheels, bogies and total rail vehicle. This allows depot managers to make alterations to rolling stock to ensure balanced loads and meet quality control regulations. 

Our in-motion train systems have been used on international and national infrastructure projects and have a distinctive advantage over fixed installations. Our systems can be taken to the ‘rail’ and relocated for convenience (installation time is approximately 15 minutes), this has been of benefit to those that are operating temporary sites and interim projects.
