Name: ELPA Ltd., Railway Friction Management
Description:
OVER 300% EXTENTION OF RAIL/WHEEL LIFETIME
The technology reduces maintenance costs of a single railway curve by 10.000-100.000 € per year. Average lateral wear of rail gauges (and corresponding wheel flanges) in a tight curve decreased by up to three times. The technology reduces overall lifecycle cost of ownership. Payback periods of investing into trackside technology can be as short as 2 years.
 
UP TO 99,9 % RAILWAY FRICTION NOISE REDUCTION 
Typically, friction noise in curves is reduced by 9-18 dBA (or 88% - 99%). The noise generated by railway brakes on hump yards can be reduced by up to 30 dBA or 99,9% - the perceived noise can be almost completely eliminated. No other technology can achieve comparable results. With every 3 dBA reduction the power of the noise drops by 50% and humans perceive the noise to be 50% lower.

REDUCED VIBRATIONS
Vibrations stemming from the wheel-rail interface impact negatively bearings and other parts of the rolling stock. The vibrations are transferred to the infrastructure and further to the buildings nearby the track. The introduction of the technology has a positive impact on the lifecycle of the infrastructure and life quality of the inhabitants living nearby the track.

HIGHEST SAFETY: BRAKING DISTANCES ARE NOT COMPROMISED 
At the core of the technology are Composite Hardly-Fluid Compounds (CHFC) with over 40% of solid particles. They work both as top of rail friction modifier and as rail gauge lubricant. They represent a technological discontinuation of the use of potentially dangerous railway lubricants. CHFC composite materials do not react with rain. Adhesion levels have been tested on a large dynamometer by Deutsche Bahn and the results were evaluated as very good. This has later continuously been proven in nature. Braking performances are not compromised using CHFC, not even in rainy conditions.

DELLNER BUBENZER Group is a global leader in the design and manufacturinge of braking  and hydraulic systems for the material handling, crane and hoist, container handling, mining, marine, industrial, offshore, oil and gas, and wind energy sectors. Name: BouwplaatsCatering
Description:
BouwplaatsCatering is medio 2017 opgericht door Kelvin Nel. Het idee is ontstaan tijdens zijn opleiding Toegepaste Psychologie aan de Hogeschool van Amsterdam, waarvoor hij onderzoek deed naar het stimuleren van veiligheidsgedrag op het spoor. Naast zijn studie werkte hij als ZZP-er in de bouw voor verschillende aannemers. In de weekenden draaide hij mee als spoorbouwer op een aantal toonaangevende projecten. Altijd in gesprek over eten (zijn grote passie) merkte hij hoe belangrijk, ook zijn collega's wat extra zorg bij de bijzondere projecten vonden en dat er vooral behoefte is aan verse maaltijden, goede broodjes, lekkere koffie  en warme soep. In contact met de aannemers bleek er op het gebied van catering vooral behoefte te zijn aan een centraal punt en een vast contactpersoon  om dit te realiseren.

Wat begonnen is met catering bij kleinschalige spoorprojecten, is uitgegroeid tot een bedrijf dat op verschillende locaties en langdurige buitendienstellingen de volledige catering verzorgt bij veel toonaangevende projecten.
 
Kennis van (spoor)bouw, passie voor koken en het streven naar perfectie in bereiding, bezorging én afstemming vormen samen het succes van BouwplaatsCatering.

•studio migliorie per veicoli ferroviari
Il nostro stabilimento è inoltre disponibile per il ricovero e la manutenzione dei treni durante le ore notturne. 

L'azienda si inserisce in una zona prevalentemente agricola, centro di svincoli stradali e ferroviari.
Svolgendo la propria attività di riparazione di veicoli ferroviari, l'azienda ha trasferito nella zona una cultura imprenditoriale rivolta allo studio e allo sviluppo delle professioni tecniche, con aggiornamento continuo del personale, anche attraverso scuole interne di formazione.
Ha inoltre sviluppato una notevole flessibilità organizzativa che le consente di soddisfare, nel tempo, le diverse richieste della clientela.

Name: STEP d.d.
Description:
With a rich heritage dating back to its establishment in 1976 as integral units within Željezničko-transportno preduzeće (ŽTP) - Railway Transport Company Sarajevo, STEP d.d. stands as a proud torchbearer of a remarkable tradition in the realm of railway infrastructure development. Our journey commenced with the founding of "SITEL," "MEP," and "ELPOS" – dedicated entities meticulously shaping the railway landscape of their time.

Legacy of Innovation and Progress:

For over four decades, our legacy has been etched by an unwavering commitment to advancing railway infrastructure. The historical significance of "SITEL," "MEP," and "ELPOS" under the umbrella of ŽTP (Railway Transport Company) Sarajevo has laid the foundation for STEP d.d.'s evolution as a prominent entity in the field. Throughout the years, our teams have relentlessly pursued innovation, excellence, and ingenuity, contributing significantly to the growth and modernization of railway systems.

Transition to Independence:

In the year 2000, a new chapter dawned upon us as we embraced our identity as an independent economic entity. This marked a pivotal moment in our journey, allowing us to steer our course with increased autonomy and vigor. The privatization process empowered us to expand horizons, optimize operations, and forge strategic partnerships, all while preserving the invaluable expertise inherited from our predecessors.

Our Vision and Mission:

Today, as STEP d.d., we remain steadfast in our commitment to the development, enhancement, and modernization of railway infrastructure. Our vision is guided by a relentless pursuit of excellence, sustainability, and technological innovation, ensuring that we remain at the forefront of industry advancements. Through our mission, we endeavor to uphold the proud tradition of our founding units, fostering progress that not only honors our past but paves the way for a dynamic future.
Location: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: Nuovi Progetti srl
Description:
Un’impresa edile e ferroviaria: la tua idea sui binari giusti.
Rinnovare ed investire in nuove soluzioni e tecnologie per accrescere l’efficienza e la competitività è un’impresa. La nostra impresa. Nuovi Progetti è un’azienda operante nel settore edile e ferroviario, specializzata nella realizzazione e manutenzione di opere civili SOA e costruzioni ferroviarie RFI. Tra le nostre attività principali:

opere civili e su linee ferroviarie, interventi di armamento ferroviario, installazione degli impianti per la trazione elettrica, restauro e risanamento conservativo di edifici storici, progettazione, esecuzione e manutenzione di grandi infrastrutture (strade, autostrade, ponti e viadotti).

Come lo facciamo
Nuovi Progetti: l’innovazione nel nome, nel nome dell’innovazione.
Progettare, ristrutturare o creare dal nulla opere civili o ferroviarie: in tutti i progetti e le attività edili, la nostra impresa di costruzioni ha investito sulla qualità, piuttosto che sulla quantità. Ciascuna opera commissionata da enti pubblici o privati è sempre caratterizzata da un solido leitmotiv che definisce il nostro know how. La cura meticolosa dei dettagli, lo studio oculato del campo di intervento, la gestione attenta dell’investimento prescelto dal cliente: ogni sforzo ed ogni operazione non tradiscono il rigoroso rispetto della progettualità. È per questo che, da impresa edile radicata sul territorio emiliano, abbiamo esteso i nostri campi di intervento al territorio nazionale e possiamo auspicare ad un’ulteriore crescita oltre confine. È per questo che abbiamo l’innovazione nel nome e nella testa. Innovare fa parte di noi: è un’attitudine mentale, il cardine di tutti i nostri Nuovi Progetti.

Da quando lo facciamo
La storia di un nuovo progetto che parte da lontano.
La società Nuovi Progetti nasce ufficialmente nel 2011 dall’affitto del ramo d’azienda di un’impresa operante fin dal 1981 nel campo edile e ferroviario. Nonostante la giovane età, sono stati sufficienti pochi anni per

Name: q4pm project management / member of quattron group
Description:
Die q4pm project management GmbH ist mit den Unternehmen quattron management consulting GmbH, tectum-q GmbH und VIA Consulting & Development GmbH zu einer integrierten quattron GmbH verschmolzen. 

Die Leistungen der q4pm project management GmbH bleiben bestehen und sind fortan u.a. im Geschäftsbereich „Project Management, Engineering & Business Services“ der quattron GmbH zu finden.

Die q4pm project management GmbH engagiert sich im internationalen Projektmanagementgeschäft bei der Realisierung moderner Eisenbahn- und komplexer weiterer Infrastrukturen. Unser aufstrebendes Unternehmen ist Teil der dynamischen quattron group und im Schwerpunkt für die Bahnbranche tätig.
 Gemeinsam mit unseren Auftraggebern arbeiten wir daran, dass aus Investitionsvorhaben Truly successful infrastructure projects werden – mit überzeugenden Ergebnissen und breiter Akzeptanz. Diesen Anspruch verfolgen wir mit unserem integrierten q4pm Projektmanagement-Ansatz.
Unsere Kunden profitieren von den Synergien, die aus dem abgestimmten Zusammenspiel von Ingenieurskönnen und Managementberatungskompetenz mit unserem umfassenden Erfahrungswissen zur operativen und strategischen Steuerung großer internationaler und komplexer Projekte resultieren.
q4pm übernimmt die ganzheitliche Steuerung von Großprojekten auf nationaler wie internationaler Ebene, in der Kombination mit unabhängiger Managementberatung und veränderungsbegleitender Kommunikation. q4pm bietet dafür ein umfangreiches Leistungsspektrum rund um das integrierte Projekt- und Programmmanagement insbesondere für die Ausrüstung von Bahninfrastrukturen mit komplexen Systemen, wie z.B. Leit- und Sicherungstechnik, technische Ausrüstung oder Tunnelbauten. Mit dem Hintergrund langjähriger internationaler Erfahrung können wir unsere Leistungen wirksam mit einer strategischen vorausdenkenden PM- und Steuerungsberatung verknüpfen.

Name: HYPERION 管理公司 Verwaltung GmbH
Description: Alle unsere Produkte haben eines gemeinsam- sie erhöhen die Verfügbarkeit des Netzes, sind nachhaltig und berücksichtigen stets die systemische Interaktion der Gewerke. Dieses nicht, weil es „IN“ ist, sondern weil es uns stets wichtig war, dass die Bahn fahren kann, seit 1958. Und Fahren bedeutet keine Betriebsunterbrechung und somit mehr umweltfreundlicher Transport, mehr Wirtschaftlichkeit, weniger Verspätungen. Das funktioniert natürlich nur durch Sperrpausenoptimierung, Langlebigkeit und systemisches Denken, über Betriebsjahrzehnte. Daher ist unser Leitspruch auch, dass die (Instandhaltungs-) Baustelle die wirtschaftlichste, ruhigste und arbeitstechnisch sicherste ist, die gar nicht erst stattfinden muss. Das schont Kapazitäten, Personale und die Nerven aller Beteiligter- und Planungssicherheit gibt es auch noch obendrauf. Heutzutage reduzieren wir durch unseren Ansatz auch Feinstäube, Co2 und erhöhen die Verfügbarkeit des knappen Rohstoffs Schotter.

Name: Speno Rail Maintenance Australia Pty Ltd

SRMA’s involvement began in Australia in 1969 when the first “grinding train” commenced work. 

SRMA now specialises in local design, manufacturing, service provision, Rail Grinding, Switch Grinding, Ultrasonic Inspection, Track Geometry and Track Inspection Technologies while consistently evolving and improving. The focus is to constantly and measurably lead innovation in the key areas of specialist track maintenance technologies and service provision, customised to deliver cost effective solutions.

All SRMA machines are manufactured here in Australia.

Customer satisfaction and our commitment to the highest standards of service and products is backed by our BVQI accreditation and compliance with ISO9001.

SRMA is driven by safety and a passion to add value to our clients to exceed their expectations.

Name: SAARSTAHL RAIL
Description:
Filiale de la Société Saarstahl - Groupe SHS - Stahl Holding Saar.  

Le site de Hayange a été inauguré en 1892.  Propriété de la famille de Wendel, l’usine de Hayange en Lorraine était dès l’origine destinée à la production de rails. Elle a intégré en 1999 le groupe Corus , est devenu Tata Steel France Rail en 2010, British Steel France Rail en 2016, Liberty Rail Hayange en 2020, puis Saarstahl Rail en 2021.
Grâce au savoir-faire des femmes et des hommes du laminoir à rail de Hayange et à d’importants investissements - plus de 50 M€ ces dix dernières années - 300 000 tonnes de rails peuvent être livrées par an sur les cinq continents.

Comment ne pas évoquer notre fierté d’être le fournisseur des rails de la Ligne à Grande Vitesse Est européenne ?

Name: Greenbrier TLAXCALA
Description:
Greenbrier Tlaxcala tiene como misión producir los mejores carros de carga de ferrocarril en un ambiente seguro, mejorando el entorno y bienestar de los trabajadores para superar las expectativas de nuestros clientes. Gracias al liderazgo en la mejora de calidad, asegurando tiempo de entrega y reduciendo nuestros costos de operación, somos la mejor opción en el ramo, dejando huella en los proveedores, la comunidad y la familia de los colaboradores.

The Greenbrier Companies nació en 1919 como una empresa fabricante de acero en Portland, desde entonces, hemos evolucionado hasta convertirnos en un líder mundial de fabricación en transporte y servicios de carga. Dentro de la amplía huella de producción en México, en 2015 abrimos la Planta 3 de fabricación en Tlaxcala, donde los primeros vagones fueron la góndola y el carro tanque.

Los pilares clave de nuestra identidad y éxito están arraigados en nuestros principios de operación: Seguridad, Calidad, Respeto por las Personas y Compromiso por la Satisfacción del Cliente, los cuales conforman a The Greenbrier Companies en una empresa de clase mundial, consolidada como fabricante de carros de ferrocarril, ocupando uno de los primeros lugares como proveedores de transportación de equipos y servicios de la industria ferroviaria Norteamericana, actualmente desarrollamos operaciones en Europa, México, Canadá y los Estados Unidos. Empleando a más de 10,000 personas.

Railcare provides customised services and products that provide real value. Whether it is strengthening railway infrastructure, delivering transport solutions, or transforming machines and locomotives, we cater to your needs.

We understand railways and recognise the importance of high delivery reliability. This is our strength – and your peace of mind.

Railcare Group (publ) is listed at Nasdaq Stockholm.

Name: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd. (Official)
Description:
Rolling Stock
Texmaco has been consistently the best performer in the Industry & stood out as the market leader. One out of every four freight cars running on Indian rail-roads has rolled out of Texmaco Works. These comprise both conventional & custom-built wagons, catering to diverse requirements, such as Petroleum. Chemicals, Cement, Alumina and Transformers etc.
Currently, the company has taken the lead in turning out the New Generation, Commodity-Specific and High Payload Freight Cars in Stainless Steel construction for Indian Railways.

Steel foundry
Texmaco has the largest Steel Foundry in India with an installed capacity of 30,000 Tonnes per year manufacturing primarily Railway castings. It holds a license from ASF-Keystone, U.S.A for manufacturing of Ride Control Bogies, Foundry Facilities and quality systems are certified to International Quality Standards ISO 9001:2008 and AAR M-1003.

Railway EPC
Texmaco is today emerging as leading Railway EPC player in India, after the merger of Kalindee Rail Nirman into the Texmaco portfolio and gaining majority stakes in Bright Power Projects India Pvt Ltd. Texmaco is currently executing many projects for Delhi Metro Rail Corporation, Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation and Lucknow Metro Corporation are to name a few. Additionally many international projects and Indian Government’s Line of Credit projects are executed by Texmaco’s Railway EPC division

Traction & Coaching
Texmaco Rail and Engineering Ltd successfully completed the construction of Bhairab Railway Bridge, designed to carry 25 T axle load, across River Meghna in Bangladesh. The contract was bagged by Texmaco in July 2015 from Government of India as part of the $1 billion line of credit to Bangladesh. The 1 kilometres long bridge plays an important role in upgrading the 320km Dhaka-Chittagong railway corridor to double lines. The Bhairab Railway Bridge connects Ashuganj in Brahmanbaria, close to Bangladesh's border with India, and Bhairab Bazaar.

Name: ΕΡΓΟΣΕ Α.Ε. / ERGOSE S.A.
Description:
ERGOSE SA manages the modernization projects of OSE's railway lines and facilities co-funded by the European Union Programs, as well as projects financed solely by national funds.

Pursuant to Law 3891/2010, "Restructuring, rationalization and development of the OSE Group and TRAINOSE" (article 4), ERGOSE's responsibilities now include, in addition to the management of the projects for the modernization of OSE's Greek railway network, the provision of services involving the planning, development, support, management, design, supervision and construction of all kinds of projects to third parties in Greece and abroad.

It also has the possibility to cooperate with Greek and international companies in order to participate in construction and modernization projects of the Railway Network in countries abroad, since it possesses substantial knowhow and expert technical personnel.

As part of the above, a main objective of ERGA OSE is the Company's extrovert nature and the utilization of the high level knowhow it has accumulated for the past 20 years as a result of project management in Greece.

Name: Scomi Engineering Mumbai Monorail
Description: Scomi Group Berhad is a global service provider that is based in Selangor, Sabah, Malaysia and is mainly involved in oil & gas, transport engineering and marine transportation

Name: Unipromet d.o.o.
Description:
Founded in 1989 as a private family-owned company, Unipromet has grown into a regional leader in the production, delivery, and installation of road safety equipment, noise protection panels, steel seam pipes, vertical traffic signage, and solar mounting structures. Today, the company employs more than 650 people – the driving force behind its quality and continued success – and achieves an annual turnover of €102 million.

Unipromet operates two modern factories covering 60,000 m² of production halls and 220,000 m² of land. The Kraljevo facility specialises in the production of steel seam pipes and vertical signage, while the Čačak plant manufactures guardrails, aluminium noise protection panels, pedestrian and wire fences, and solar constructions, including carports.

For over three decades, Unipromet has been producing and installing safety barriers certified according to European EN 1317 and international standards such as ASTRA (Switzerland) and NF (France), exporting to more than 30 countries worldwide. Membership in Gütegemeinschaft Stahlschutzplanken e.V. and Studiengesellschaft Stahlschutzplanken e.V., along with continuous quality control by TÜV, BASt (Germany), and DTC (Switzerland), ensures compliance with the most demanding global requirements.

Our dedication to quality is confirmed through CE marking and ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certifications, guaranteeing that our products meet the highest standards of quality, environmental protection, and occupational safety.

From a clear vision of one man in 1989 to today’s international success, Unipromet has remained faithful to its values - combining tradition, innovation, and responsibility to build a safer and more sustainable future made of steel.

Name: Vossloh Rolling Stock
Description: For efficient and environmentally friendly freight transportation in Europe

Name: Plasser Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
Plasser Australia is a member of the Plasser & Theurer group of companies. The company was incorporated and commenced manufacture of railway machinery in Australia in 1970. The decision to locate the Australian manufacturing facility in Sydney was clearly in recognition of the importance of servicing the New South Wales railways, our largest customer and user of Plasser equipment. Having manufactured and supplied some 600 pieces of equipment for the Australian and New Zealand railway networks since 1970, a long and mutually beneficial relationship clearly exists between Plasser and the various Government and private rail organisations. 

Since the very beginning of mechanised track maintenance, Plasser & Theurer has been at the forefront of technical developments, many of which have been in direct response to the ever-increasing demands by our customers for greater productivity, improved safety, higher quality of work and reduced costs. The strength of our organisation lies in the on-going focus on technical development. As a result, we have the capacity and vast resources to provide cost-effective solutions to all manner of permanent way maintenance problems. 

Plasser & Theurer’s long association with the rail industry in Australia commenced in the early 1960’s when mechanised maintenance was first introduced to the New South Wales and Queensland Government-owned railways as well as the private mining railroads of the Pilbara region of Western Australia. 

In 1980, the company moved to its present location at North St. Marys, with rail siding access to the New South Wales standard gauge rail network. The modern workshops were specially designed for the manufacture and after sales support of all machines in the Plasser range. All three gauges of the Australian mainline systems (i.e. 1067, 1435 and 1600 mm), are cast into the factory floor, although machines of other, smaller gauges are also manufactured.

Name: Gök Yapı San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description: Gök Yapı produce freight wagons in accordance with TUE and UIC criteria since 2008.

Name: ADRIAFER
Description: Da oltre 20 anni, Adriafer lavora per la creazione di un sistema integrato tra i terminal marittimi del Porto di Trieste, gli hub terrestri e la rete ferroviaria nazionale, realizzando collegamenti efficaci tra tutte le aree di interesse dell’Autorità di Sistema Portuale del Mare Adriatico Orientale e il Nord-Est Europa.

Name: Elsitel
Description:
ELSITEL offers innovative engineering solutions to electromechanical systems in industrial and transportation sectors and particularly focuses on railway signaling, telecommunication and electrification systems.

Its head office is located in Ankara and ELSITEL has acquired an international dimension with its branches in Jeddah and Tbilisi.

ELSITEL adds value to transportation projects, starting from the planning and design stage, and all through project management, construction, subsystems realization, interface management, systems integration, installation, test & commissioning, operation and maintenance processes. ELSITEL eliminates integration and interface problems which can occur due to different sub-contractors and/or suppliers and so prevents loss of time and money in the multidisciplinary complex projects.

ELSITEL carries out the following activites within its business scope:
- Project management,
- Engineering services,
- System solutions,
- Execution / Installation,
- Integration of sub-systems (superstructure, signaling, communication, 
  electrification),
- Maintenance and repair services.

With its qualified technical staff experienced in signalling, electrification and communication systems, ELSITEL also develops domestic value-added products.

Name: PBH Rail Group
Description:
PBH employs a dedicated specialist survey team operating throughout the UK.

Our team of professionally qualified staff provide a full spectrum of survey support services, from simple & complex railway surveys right through to 3D Aerial Surveys.

Our Survey Services Include:

UAV Surveys
3D Aerial surveys captured by drone technology

3D High Definition Laser Scanning
Buildings/Structures/Vehicles & Specialist opportunities (Static & Trolley deliverables).

GPR & Utilities Surveys
Detection & tracing of all underground services.

Measured Building Surveys
Inclusive of floor plans, sections, structural analysis and elevations.

Control Networks
High precision 3D networks & existing network
checking capabilities (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary & TMG installation & 3D coordination)

Coordinated Topographical Railway/Highway Surveys
High quality 1” Total Station surveys with data output in the required format (Design/DVS/As-Bulits & Multi-Discipline deliverables)

Detailed S&C Railway Surveys
Various S&C layouts & complex area specialists.

Hallade & Levels Surveys
Traditional surveying processes
(Versines measurements & Theodolite straight etc).

Overhead Line Height & Stagger Surveys
Our Internal OLE design team are able to carry out OLE condition surveys and are experienced in all types of Overhead Line.

Gauge Clearances Surveys
Routescan/Lasersweep technology & platform gauging surveys.

Name: INVEHO
Description:
INVEHO a company at the service of rail freight!

Design, construction, overhaul and repairs within industrial sites or mobile teams, INVEHO accompanies the life of industrial wagons up to the revaluation! For more than 60 years, each of INVEHO 's sites has contributed every day to ensure the safety, efficiency and ergonomics of equipment used to transport various industrial products                   
 ( containers, coal, steel, aggregates, food products, petroleum products, specialty chemicals and gases).
A business dynamic that focuses on customer satisfaction, the well-being of employees and the respect of its partners. Multi-site, multi-skilled teams at your service to move rail transport forward !

Name: CRRC ZHUZHOU ELECTRIC CO., LTD. (CRRCZE)
Description:
General introduction

Through over 50 years’ adherence to innovation and quality, CRRC Zhuzhou Electric CO., Ltd has evolved from a traction motor workshop of Tianxin Locomotive under the Ministry of Railway in 1961 to a primary subsidiary of CSR Group in 2010. Following the merger of CSR and CNR in 2015, our company is listed as one of the top 10 among CRRC’s 40 primary subsidiaries. Headquartered in Zhuzhou, the railway transportation hub of China, our company enjoys great momentum of development at home and abroad by establishing 5 manufacturing bases in Zhuzhou, Inner Mongolia in north China, Jiangsu in east China, Chengdu in southeast China and Guangzhou in south China to radiate all major markets in China. Up to now we have 4200 employees and the sales revenue soars up to 6.54 billion RMB in 2015.

Business scope

Our company is mainly engaged in three business activities, railway traction motors and transformers, wind power generators and industrial electric motors.

Name: HÖRMANN Vehicle Engineering GmbH
Description:
Als ein weltweit agierender Engineering-Partner bieten wir zuverlässig Gesamtfahrzeugkompetenz für Schienenfahrzeuge und Entwicklungs-Know-How für Straßenfahrzeuge von der ersten Idee bis zur Serie.

Wir sind Leichtbauprofis und Netzwerker und verstehen uns als wichtiges Bindeglied zwischen Fahrzeugherstellern und Fahrzeugbetreibern. Bei uns bekommen sie maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Schienenfahrzeuge, Sonderstraßenfahrzeuge und Motorräder - Alles aus einer Hand!

Wir sind Systemintegrator und bringen bewährte Systeme und technische Lösungen unterschiedlichster Hersteller zusammen, um die kundenspezifischen Anforderungen der Fahrzeugbetreiber zu erfüllen.

Unsere Partner kennen und verbinden uns mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung bei der Fahrzeugentwicklung und mit einer abwechslungsreichen Firmennamen-Geschichte. 
Als Engineering-Geschäftsbereich zunächst innerhalb der HÖRMANN-Rawema GmbH und ab 2003 als eigenständiges Unternehmen HÖRMANN Engineering GmbH waren wir bis 2009 Bestandteil des Firmenverbundes der HÖRMANN-Gruppe in Kirchseeon.
Viele Geschäftspartner kennen uns aus der Zugehörigkeit zur Konzernsparte Voith Industrial Service als Voith Engineering Services GmbH von 2009 und 2016. Nach dem Verkauf der Konzernsparte durch Voith gelangten wir 2017 nach der Zwischenstation als Leadec Engineering GmbH wieder zurück in die HÖRMANN-Gruppe und firmieren seit Juni 2018 als Hörmann Vehicle Engineering GmbH.

Name: Sherwood Electromotion Inc.
Description: Sherwood Electromotion Inc. (SEI) is a leading independent provider of assembly, overhaul and manufacturing services for propulsion systems equipment and electrical rotating apparatus for Rail, Mass Transit and Wind Industries. SEI is a family owned and operated company that has been in business for over 40 years. As a company we are committed to providing our clients with outstanding quality, integrity and, value.

Name: Wabtec Faiveley Nordic AB
Description:
Wabtec Faiveley Nordic är en systemleverantör till den internationella järnvägsindustrin. Företaget grundades för över 100 år sedan och är en av de ledande aktörerna inom den nordiska tågbranschen. Som serviceleverantör tillhandahåller vi, utöver cirkulära tjänster/produkter till tågbranschen, bland annat elektrifiering och logistikoptimering av hamnar. Vi är dessutom världsledande leverantör av blockbromsar och bromsregulatorer som exporteras till många olika typer av tågprojekt globalt. Företaget har idag 200 anställda verksamma inom försäljning, projektledning, konstruktion, utveckling, tillverkning, service och underhåll samt supply chain & inköp, ekonomi, HR och kvalitet. Företaget åtnjuter en fin tillväxt sedan flera år och omsätter idag över 500 MSEK.

Wabtec erbjuder ett brett produktsortiment bestående av olika delsystem för tåg, industriella lösningar, loktillverkning samt underhållsservice till kunder runtom i världen. Wabtec Corporation har sitt huvudkontor i Pennsylvania, och har idag ca 27 000 anställda.
Hållbar utveckling, miljövänliga och högteknologiska lösningar för dagens och morgondagens tåg karakteriserar verksamheten.

Vill du skicka in en jobbansökan till oss? Då är du välkommen att maila den till hr.lkr@wabtec.com

Name: CAF MIIRA - Beyond Wheelset Solutions
Description:
CAF MIIRA is a global reference in the supply of comprehensive solutions for rolling gear in the railway sector. We provide state-of-the-art engineering, manufacturing, and maintenance solutions for complete wheelsets and portal axles including gearboxes for all kind of train types, as well as services like technological assessment, inspections, and life cycle optimization analysis. 

MIIRA is moving towards sustainability as it is one of our strategic axis, along with continuous optimization and competitiveness of its solutions, meeting our clients requirements and ensuring their satisfaction.

Name: Ingeniería y Control Ferroviario
Description:
INGENIERÍA Y CONTROL FERROVIARIO S.A.,ICF, arise with the aim of providing innovative technological response in some specific areas of the railway, mainly in the area of Level Crossing within the railway signalling. In this area, our vocation is betting heavily on engineering and innovation, constantly releasing new products that improves and optimize existing technology solutions.

ICF operates primarily within the rail sector, with experienced professionals at level crossings and signalling. The staff consists of 90% of engineers (industrial and telecommunications) which share the functions of Management, Engineering, Development and Project Management.

ICF's customers are the spanish railway administrations and major railroad technology companies in private sector. ICF has collaborated on international projects providing its customers a full service at ad-hoc projects.

Name: BONATRANS GROUP a.s.
Description:
Lidské zdroje jsou ve společnosti BONATRANS GROUP a.s. vnímány jako jediné zdroje, které představují trvalou konkurenční výhodu každé společnosti a které zároveň ovlivňují a podmiňují využití zdrojů ostatních. Pouze lidé představují nevyčerpatelný zdroj energie a možností pro trvalý růst a zlepšování. Skutečnou hodnotou společnosti BONATRANS GROUP a.s. jsou její zaměstnanci odborně připravení a motivovaní k dosahování firemních cílů.

Personální politika společnosti, která vychází ze strategických cílů BONATRANS GROUP a.s., si klade za cíl trvale budovat takový systém personální práce, který povede k identifikaci zaměstnanců s firemními cíli a očekáváními firemních zákazníků a zároveň nabízí možnost seberealizace a osobnostního růstu pro každého zaměstnance.

Společnost BONATRANS GROUP a.s. si klade za cíl být atraktivním zaměstnavatelem, který svým zaměstnancům nabízí stabilitu a perspektivu zaměstnání, sociální výhody, partnerský přístup a možnost odborného růstu. Od svých zaměstnanců pak očekává profesionální přístup k práci, spolupráci při realizaci firemních cílů a maximální snahu o neustálé zlepšování všech procesů na všech úrovních.

Name: MONT-ELE SRL
Description:
Da oltre 40 anni, sviluppiamo tecnologie e sistemi elettrici, elettromeccanici, elettronici e di automazione per i settori energia, trasporti, industria ed ambiente.

La specializzazione e la ricerca dell’eccellenza ci hanno spinto ad offrire un servizio completo che comprende: ingegneria, costruzione, messa in servizio, assistenza e manutenzione.

Per garantire massima affidabilità e personalizzazione, progettiamo le apparecchiature ed i sistemi completamente al nostro interno, grazie anche ad uno staff di grande esperienza e valore, che segue corsi di aggiornamento specialistici.

System Integrator: con le nostre soluzioni siamo presenti in tutto il mondo, per portare energia sicura nella vita quotidiana di milioni di persone.

Inoltre, la capacità di industrializzare il prodotto, le collaborazioni con grandi società di contracting, con manifatture nazionali ed internazionali, e l’aggregazione di fornitori di servizi ingegneristici e di manufatti, ci permettono di avviare sinergie per la gestione dei progetti più complessi.

Name: Vossloh ETS  BV
Description: Supplier of products and services in the rail sector. With a team of inspired and committed employees, we have many years of experience in developing and delivering innovative, sustainable systems for Train, Tram, Metro and Industrial tracks as well as crane tracks. We work closely with renowned producers to offer you products and solutions that not only increase safety and availability around the track, but also contribute to low Life Cycle Costs. We also think along with you to ensure that processes for implementation run more efficiently, so that you as a customer can save time on both maintenance and new construction work. Mutual trust and commitment contribute to the success of a long-term cooperation.

Cegelec a.s. is a  subsidiary of VINCI Energies, specialised in the design, manufacture, test, supply and maintenance of traction systems for tramways and trolleybuses, as well as of energy systems for the eMobility.

Cegelec a.s. je specializovaná dceřiná společnost společnosti VINCI Energies, která se zabývá návrhem, výrobou, zkouškou, dodávkou, údržbou trakčních systémů pro tramvaje a trolejbusy, jakož i pro specializované systémy pro eMobility.

With continuous growth annual revenue of the company has reached to Rs.750 million in current year.

Name: Miner Enterprises, Inc.
Description:
For over 100 years, Miner Enterprises, Inc. has supplied the railroad industry with quality manufactured and engineered railcar components. Founded in 1894, the W.H.Miner spring draft gears filled a special need during the railroads’ transition from wooden frames and the standardization of draft gear pockets, automatic couplers and braking systems from approximately 1885 to 1919. 

W.H. Miner Division has since grown to include draft gears, discharge gates and mechanisms, side bearings, and brake beams. The current company is a result of the 1968 purchase of W.H. Miner Company and Enterprise Railway Equipment. It has become one of the industry's most experienced gate manufacturers and also manufactures mechanisms for coal, ore, and ballast unloading. In 2000, Miner continued its expansion of high quality product offerings with the purchase of Buffalo Brake Beam, manufacturing the highest quality brake beams in the industry. 

W.H. Miner is a major supplier of freight car components to the railroad industry. Our customer list comprises all Class I and Class II railroads worldwide, freight car builders, private-car companies, leasing companies, and contract freight car repair shops. Miner has sold its products in 56 countries and recently won its second award for excellence in exporting, from the Department of Commerce.

Our experienced staff of engineers and technicians is knowledgeable, innovative, and committed. They work closely with sales and marketing to provide quality products that meet or exceed customer needs and the changing needs of the marketplace. A research and development department recognized for excellence throughout the railroad and transportation industries supports engineering.

Name: RT Vision Technologies Pvt Ltd
Description: We are a leading manufacturer and prime supplier of major signalling and telecom equipments to Indian railways. Holding a pride of consistent growth till date by valuing our customers and running ahead of the latest technologies through our strong innovative efforts, we are progressive towards providing most reliable, stable and cost efficient solutions and services to the major landmarks of Indian industrial economy.  We also work for our other esteemed clients like  Metro, Mono rails, Telecom, Defence, oil and Gas etc. by providing them high end  hardware , and software integrated solutions  employing most cost efficient and reliable processes and technology. Name: ARIA - African Rail Industry Association
Description:
Following growing concern that South Africa’s transport resources were not being utilised in the most effective manner, the African Rail Industry Association was established initially as an independent transport industry support group in October 2000.
 
The organisation has gone on to become an export council recognised and supported by the Department of Trade, Industry and Competition. As well as, an active lobbying vehicle for industry with all relevant stakeholders in addressing the numerous challenges and barriers to entry the industry faces.

ARIA provides independent, objective and technically sound information, advice and expertise to enable decision-makers, interested and affected parties, and other stakeholders to make an informed decision.

Name: Atlantic Track & Turnout Co.
Description: Atlantic Track & Turnout Co. is a railroad manufacture company based out of 400 Broadacres Dr, Bloomfield, New Jersey, United States. http://www.atlantictrack.com

Name: AZURAIL
Description:
La société AZURAIL est une entreprise spécialisée dans l’expertise, l’entretien et le renouvellement de réseaux ferroviaires, basée sur la commune de Coustellet à proximité d’Avignon. 

AZURAIL propose aussi des expertises et conseils ciblés. La société dispose d’équipes pluridisciplinaires reconnues dans le domaine ferroviaire pour réaliser des opérations de Maintenance et Travaux Ferroviaires.

Name: Swedtrain
Description: Swedtrain är branschorganisationen för industrin och lärosätena som levererar lösningarna för framtidens järnväg. Vi arbetar för en långsiktig och hållbar utveckling av järnvägsindustrin där våra medlemmar bidrar med innovation, kompetens och teknik i framkant.

Name: Cranemasters
Description:
Emergency Derailment
Specializing in emergency services, railway maintenance, load adjustment and heavy equipment recovery has led us to become industry innovators, custom building our cranes to handle any situation – from hi-rail to swampland, locomotives to super-heavy cars – minimizing scheduling delays and damage to rolling stock and rights-of-way.
Track Construction/ Engineering
Cranemasters constructs, maintains, repairs or dismantles track on main lines and in industrial sidings and yards. Call us for an estimate to handle the whole project or any part of it. We can restore your line quicker than you think is possible.
Railcar Repair
Whether it's an open-line running repair or routine maintenance, an emergency call or not, Cranemasters has the experienced personnel trained on the right equipment and ready to roll.
Crane Construction and Remanufacturing
In house design and manufacturing of equipment to serve the railroad industry, including Hi-rail, Rail bound, and over the road machinery.

Name: CWE Ltd
Description:
Established in 1966, CWE is a RISAS accredited supply and maintenance partner to the rail industry. Our services cover both machining and fabrication, to provide complete lifecycle management of your rolling stock. From technical design and reverse engineering of key parts through to non-destructive testing and obsolescence management, we have the expertise you need to help you keep your fleet on the network. 

EN 15085, ISO 3834-2 and BS EN ISO 9001:2015 certified, RISAS certified and RISQS approved, working towards BS EN ISO 14001, BE EN 18001. 

CWE Limited is a Member of the Rail Forum Midlands

Name: EKE-Electronics Ltd.
Description:
EKE-Electronics is a Finnish high-tech company based in Espoo, near Helsinki, specialising in Train Control and Management Systems (TCMS). Founded in 1986, we have nearly 40 years of experience in the railway industry. As a family-owned business with Mitsubishi Electric as a minority shareholder, we combine advanced electronics and software to enhance train operations worldwide.

With a team of 100 professionals from around 20 nationalities, we operate globally, helping customers build and operate smarter, safer trains. Our Train Control and Management Systems (TCMS) solutions support train manufacturers, operators, and integrators with system integration, automation, communications, diagnostics, and safety enhancements.

At EKE-Electronics, we pride ourselves on our extensive expertise in designing and manufacturing SIL safety applications. With a proven track record, we have successfully developed systems up to SIL 2.

PRODUCTS & SOLUTIONS: EKE-Electronics provides modular solutions for Train Control and Management Systems (TCMS) and Safety Applications ensuring reliable train operation, monitoring, and safety across modern and legacy fleets. Multiple systems can be integrated into a single rack, optimising space and efficiency. 
•	Train Control and Management Systems (TCN Gateways, Vehicle Control Units, RIOMS, Event Recorders, Application Software, Remote Diagnostics)
•	Automatic Selective Door Operation
•	Hot Axle Box Detection
•	Lateral Acceleration Monitoring
•	Vigilance Control System

MAKE OR BUY: Whether you prefer to develop in-house or rely on our expertise, EKE-Electronics offers the tools and support to help you succeed with 5 delivery models to meet your requirements.

Name: SOMARAIL - Track Solution Group
Description:
Société familiale spécialisée dans le secteur du ferroviaire et des voies de roulement : 

- Travaux  ferroviaires (maintenance, pose neuve, implantation géométrique)
- Travaux  sur rail de pont roulant (maintenance, reprise géométrique, pose neuve)
- Travaux sur voie de roulement (maintenance, reprise géométrique, pose neuve)
- Soudure aluminothermique ( sur tout type de rail)
- Traction Service 
- Contrat de maintenance pluriannuels de réseaux ferrées 

Somarail s'efforce de répondre favorablement et rapidement à l’ensemble des demandes clients, veillant à bien considérer l’ensemble des prérogatives et contraintes du dossier (plafond budgétaire, environnement de travail, accès, délais etc… Notre conduite travaux est en mesure de se rendre sur votre site (France et Etranger) afin de vous rencontrer et étudier avec vous les travaux a réaliser. 


Filiales : / SOMARAIL SUD (Port de Bouc)/ SOMARAIL  EST (Ay sur Moselle)/ SOMARAIL ALGERIE (Annaba)

Name: Railway Equipment Company
Description: Railway Equipment Company manufactures high quality Gas Hot Air Blowers, Crossing Gate Arms, Battery Chargers and Remote Asset Monitoring & Control Systems designed for the exclusive use of railroads and transits. We are dedicated solely to this business and no other.

Name: MESEA
Description:
MESEA, dédié à la maintenance ferroviaire en France, engage sa mission et s’implante durablement entre Tours et Bordeaux.
Impliquée depuis la phase de conception de la ligne à grande vitesse Sud Europe Atlantique, MESEA entretiendra la ligne pendant toute la durée de la concession, soit jusqu’en 2061.

Name: MAÏA RAIL
Description:
Créée en 2010, MAÏA Rail est spécialisée dans les métiers du ferroviaire.

En Travaux comme en Sécurité ferroviaire, MAÏA Rail réalise des chantiers dans la France entière.

Name: Molinari Rail Group
Description:
Molinari Rail Group is a consulting, engineering and manufacturing company in the transportation sector. Molinari Consulting Ltd. founded the subsidiary Molinari Engineering GmbH with domicile in Schwaz, Austria, which took over the former engineering team of the Jenbacher Werke/Integral Verkehrstechnik from Connex Transportation Austria.

The over 50 years old tradition in rail vehicles construction at the location of Jenbach is being continued. Business locations of the Molinari Group focus on Switzerland and Austria with subsidiaries in Germany, Italy, Turkey and Malaysia. The company comprises more than 100 permanent employees in Europe and holds up on a network of specialized railway engineers and transportation experts from all over the world. The company is offering the following system and service solutions:

CONSULTING
• Tender and bid support
• Market and feasibility studies
• Export support
• Fleet management
• Workshop audits
• Build supervision

ENGINEERING
• Comprehensive design of railway vehicles
• Systems engineering
• Mechanical and electrical system integration
• RAMS & LCC analysis
• Electrical schematics
• Requirements management

ANALYSIS
• Feasibility studies and optimization
• Proof of structural integrity
• Crash analysis
• Planing and evaluation of tests
• Analysis of welded designs
• Simulation of railway vehicle dynamics

MANUFACTURING
• Complete mechanic and electric subsystems
• Generator sets, traction units
• Car bodies, bogies and various components
• Crash components
• Workshop infrastructure
• Workshop and manufacturing equipment
• Transfer of technology

Name: MFD Rail
Description:
As a team of experienced intermodal specialists, MFD Rail supplies the European combined transport sector with a modern and homogeneous railcar fleet. Based in Rotkreuz, Switzerland, MFD Rail is one of the best capitalized and most sustainable scale-ups in the industry and is committed to providing its customers with the highest level of support, technological availability and service. 

MFD Rail leases quiet, safe and high-quality intermodal railcars, combined with flexible and transparent leasing and maintenance concepts. As the preferred alternative on the rental market, MFD Rail reduces dependencies on existing service providers and modernises their customers' fleets. In this way, the leasing company actively supports the modal shift from road to rail in Europe. 

MFD Rail is growing in an environmentally conscious, energy-efficient and climate-neutral way and supports climate stability with a fully circular, digital and green fleet.

www.youtube.com/@mfdrail

Name: Movinter S.p.A.
Description:
Con oltre 20 anni d’esperienza, Movinter è un consolidato punto di riferimento nel settore delle forniture ferroviarie sia per le carpenterie, leggere o pesanti, sia per tubazioni e impiantistica.
Esperienza, professionalità e continui aggiornamenti tecnologici sono le carte vincenti che hanno portato l’azienda ad essere la prima scelta dei più importanti player del settore.
Movinter vanta un’area produttiva di 36000 m2, di cui 17000 coperti.
L’azienda realizza componenti di carpenteria e tubazioni lavorando sulle specifiche esigenze di ogni cliente. Ha scelto di investire in risorse umane ed innovazione tecnologica, potendo contare oggi su software gestionali d’avanguardia, in grado di assicurare efficienza produttiva e riduzione delle esigenze in magazzino.
Scegliere Movinter significa scegliere il partner ideale nella gestione di grandi commesse. Il nostro obiettivo quotidiano è soddisfare ogni richiesta del cliente, offrendo un servizio competitivo e di qualità, assicurando massima puntualità.
Movinter fornisce un servizio d’eccellenza perché investe nella certificazione delle competenze, nello sviluppo della professionalità e nell’implementazione tecnologica al fine di garantire la sicurezza e la verifica dei processi produttivi.

Name: Ansaldo Trasporti
Description:
A historic Italian brand, represents and encompasses a heritage of creative and innovative ideas that have always accompanied the decisive phases of the railway sector. Committed to the design, construction, installation, integration, management, and maintenance of turnkey railway and metro transport systems, Ansaldo Trasporti represents a new business model. A company ready to interpret the needs of the new public transport scenarios with railway and metro research and innovation-oriented projects and solutions.
Synergistic and interactive, it transfers the development of projects and services to partner companies' production fabric, characterized mainly by a defined and measurable result that, by transferring value to the customer, represents the real objective of interrelated activities.
To safeguard this heritage and mark a new era of the famous Italian brand is Gesa Industry, which, through new and important investments, has signed an agreement with Ansaldobreda S.p.A. for the acquisition of the brand and is now at the helm as the total shareholder of the new company.
The company Ansaldo Trasporti was created with the aim of representing a "global service company" in the rail and tramway sector.

Name: Speno International SA
Description:
Speno International specialises in rail maintenance worldwide. Activities include a full range of services from research and development through to the construction and operation of the machines needed for:

    * grinding and re-profiling of tracks and points
    * measuring rail surface faults and profiles
    * checking for internal rail flaws with ultrasound

The company is also involved in the development of all the related equipment through close cooperation with its two plants in Italy (Mecnafer in Mestre, for grinding trains; ASI in Marcon, for the production of grinding stones).

Speno operates on all five continents, maintaining rails on lines used for all types of railways, including underground railways, tramways, heavy -haul trains and high-speed trains.

    * SN EN ISO 9001 since 1995
    * SN EN ISO 14001 since 2007
    * BS OHSAS 18001 since 2007

Name: SepsaMedha
Description:
SepsaMedha is a Spanish technology company specialized in the design, manufacture and marketing of equipment for trains, metros and trams.

The company is composed of two divisions: Power Electronics (design and manufacture of static power converters and battery chargers) and On Board Systems (design and manufacturing of PACIS, control systems and other embedded systems). 

SepsaMedha is part of the Indian Railway Technology Group Medha Servo Drives Pvt. Ltd.

Name: Loram Rail Maintenance India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Loram Rail Maintenance India Pvt Ltd is a premium railway maintenance services and manufacturing company.  We are privately held and very employee-centric in our culture and daily operations.  

Loram is a leading supplier of track maintenance services and equipment. We provide maintenance of way services to Class I and short line railroads, transits, and commuter rails. We are one of the largest fleet of maintenance of way with 123 machines located in 16 different countries.

Safety:
Safety is intertwined in all of our core values. Loram is a proud recipient of the NRC Contractor of the Year award in safety.

Expertise:
Our strong knowledge base gets us to the root need faster, helping us deliver advanced equipment, innovative solutions, and unrivaled customer service to maintain and maximize railway infrastructure.

Our Values:
We integrate our Core Values into everything we do and every decision we make to ensure the safety of our workers, the purpose of our mission and a never-ending commitment to putting our customers first.

Environment:
Loram is proud to be LEED certified. We've also made substantial progress in addressing environmental issues unique to rail grinding starting with lower fuel consumption, fewer emissions and cleaner air.

Vision:
Loram will be respected globally as the leader in the railway infrastructure markets we serve.

Mission:
Our people deliver advanced equipment, innovative solutions, and unrivaled customer service in a safe and reliable manner to maintain and improve railway infrastructure.

Name: Catedra Stadler Rail Valencia
Description:
Stadler Rail Valencia S.A.U es una empresa líder en el diseño y fabricación de vehículos ferroviarios.  Estrechamente unida a la historia del ferrocarril y con el aval de más de un siglo de experiencia en el sector, la empresa diseña locomotoras diésel – eléctricas, duales y eléctricas, para el transporte de mercancías y pasajeros de larga distancia y también tranvías, tren-tranvías y metros para un transporte sostenible urbano.

La Cátedra Stadler con la Universidad Politécnica de Valencia tiene el objetivo de acercar las técnicas y modos de funcionar de una empresa líder en construcción de maquinaria ferroviaria a la Universidad. De esta manera se pretende facilitar la transición de los egresados de la UPV a la industria y ayudar a cerrar el hueco entre industria y Universidad. Con este propósito se pretenden organizar, entre otras, las siguientes actividades:
        - Seminarios y cursos ferroviarios.
        - Conferencias técnicas.
        - Premios a la excelencia académica.
        - Realización de Trabajos Fin de Grado (TFG) y Trabajos Fin de Master (TFM) en distintas áreas del ámbito ferroviario: fluido dinámica, estructuras, dinámica, eléctrica, control y  software, etc.        
        - Convocatorias de Premios de Diseño: interiores de tranvías y tren-tranvías,  áreas para personas de personas de movilidad reducida, áreas funcionales como portaequipajes, asideros, etc.
        - Convocatorias de Premios de al Mejor TFG/TFM

Name: BBM Railway Solutions
Description:
OFFICINE MECCANICHE BBM SPA was established in 1965 as a manufacturer of fabricated parts for the steel, energy and marine industries. We are currently working with the most important European companies in these fields. 

BBM’s mechanical division operates as a SUBCONTRACTOR by welding and machining single parts, ranging from sizes medium to large, along with complete machine assembly according to customer drawings and specifications. While our focus has been mainly on the steel industry since 1965, in the last years we have been more and more oriented to the energy, aerospace and automotive markets, supplying the main players worldwide. 

From our experience working in the heavy engineering sector, in 1987, we decided to expand our business by creating a “Railway Division”. Today, we are well-known all over the world and considered to be one of the leading companies in this sector.

Our main products are:

- Presses
- Bogie Testing Stands
- Lifting and Handling Systems
- Testing Equipment
- Special Equipment

Thanks to a highly qualified and committed staff, we are able to manage the entire manufacturing cycle. From design to final installation and after-sales service, we provide high-quality products and services tailored to suit customer requirements.

Nowadays, with a production area of 6.600 m2, we employ more than 120 experienced staff members in both offices and workshop facilities.

BBM is certified to ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018, Green Energy Supply, ENWHP and our welding process is qualified according to UNI-EN-ISO 3834-2, EN 1090-2.

Name: Thermit do Brasil Ltda
Description:
A Thermit do Brasil faz parte do Grupo Goldschmidt.
Goldschmidt é um grupo familiar de empresas  que opera globalmente no setor de infraestrutura ferroviária.
Junto com nossos clientes e parceiros, estamos moldando a mobilidade ferroviária do futuro com produtos e serviços para a união de trilhos, construção moderna de vias ferroviárias, além de inspeção e manutenção de infraestrutura de trilhos.
Desde a invenção do processo Thermit por Hans Goldschmidt em 1895, temos sido pioneiros no campo da união de trilhos. Hoje, trens e ferrovias de todos os tipos ao redor do mundo operam em trilhos continuamente soldados por Goldschmidt. Isso porque nosso processo de soldagem Original Thermit permite uma excelente conexão de qualquer tipo de trilho.
As soluções inteligentes de inspeção da Goldschmidt possibilitam um diagnóstico detalhado das condições dos trilhos como base para a manutenção preditiva – para uma infraestrutura de trilhos e veículos ferroviários sustentavelmente econômica e confiável.
Também estabelecemos padrões na área de manutenção: com produtos avançados, soluções digitais e serviços comprovados pela nossa experiência em projetos globais, a Goldschmidt restaura redes ferroviárias ao seu melhor estado.
Ao trabalhar em estreita colaboração com nossos clientes em novos desenvolvimentos, obtemos insights importantes para refiná-los e otimizá-los. É assim que desenvolvemos produtos e serviços que oferecem soluções reais.
Seja para operadores de redes ferroviárias, empresas de construção de trilhos e ferrovias ou empresas de transporte municipal – nossos clientes sempre podem contar conosco. Com produção mundial, vendas, produtos e serviços estão disponíveis de maneira local, assim como o suporte de nossos contatos.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Bolkesteijn Rail B.V.
Description:
Bolkesteijn heeft zich in de loop der jaren ontwikkeld tot een betrouwbaar en innovatief bedrijf in de grond-, weg-, water-, en spoorbouw, actief in heel Nederland en ook daarbuiten, zoals in Frankrijk en Duitsland. We staan 24/7 klaar voor zowel geplande werkzaamheden als calamiteiten.

Wij hebben ons gespecialiseerd in diverse aspecten van de infrastructuur, waaronder machinaal bestraten, perronbestrating, talud-, dijk-, en oeverbekleding, natuursteenbestrating, riolering en grondwerk. Daarnaast voeren we onderhouds- en calamiteitencontracten uit.

Naast onze specialisaties zijn we ook uw partner voor een breed scala aan infra gerelateerde werkzaamheden. Wat ons onderscheidt, zijn projecten met uitdagende planningen waarbij efficiëntie en snelheid centraal staan.

We staan bekend om onze expertise en betrokkenheid in de branche. We zijn trots op onze flexibiliteit en vermogen om snel en effectief te reageren, zelfs in situaties waar iedere minuut telt.

Ons vaste team en flexibele netwerk door heel Nederland, uitgerust met standaard diploma’s zoals VCA, DVP, GPI, en BHV, stellen ons in staat om onze beloften waar te maken. Daarnaast beschikken we over een eigen materieel park.

We begrijpen dat werken onder tijdsdruk nooit ten koste mag gaan van de veiligheid van onze medewerkers en andere betrokkenen. Daarom stellen we ruim van tevoren gedetailleerde planningen op.

Hoewel certificeringen zoals VCA**, ISO9001, SEB, BRL9334 & NIWO voor ons standaard zijn, zien we het behalen van de CO2 Prestatieladder niveau 5 en Safety Culture Ladder trede 4 in 2024 als onze onderscheidende kracht.

We gaan voor duurzame groei en innovatie, met passie voor uitdagende werken!

Name: Dual Inventive
Description:
We believe in the railway system!
Dual Inventive sees the railway system as the transportation mode of the future. We strongly believe in the further development and utilisation of the railway system. Technology and innovation are our driving forces.

Dual Inventive develops and produces technology products that serve to make working on the railway infrastructure safer and more efficient, to maximize rail capacity, and to improve the reliability of the railway infrastructure.

Our conviction: Everything is connected wirelessly and monitored in real-time, managed from the cloud – Ubiquitous Rail.

Ubiquitous = present, appearing, or found everywhere.
Pronounced as: /juːˈbɪkwɪtəs

We value being…

- Revolutionary: We are innovative and have the courage to deviate from existing solutions. By using new :’bɪkwɪt s/technologies, existing problems concerning workforce safety and rail capacity are solved in a better way.

- Reliable: We produce reliable technology products. Reducing the human factor in critical processes to create high-end safe and protected work areas is one of our missions.

- Co-inventive: We work in co-creation with passionate professionals on the basis of reciprocity, openness and trust. Our innovations are created through collaboration with and being open to a variety of partners and new technologies.

Name: Usisteel
Description:

A conquista do selo ISO 9001 certifica a qualidade de toda a nossa operação. 
Trabalhamos com fundição e usinagem em ferro, aço, alumínio, cobre, bronze e suas ligas, além de polímeros, sendo que todas as etapas são acompanhadas por times de engenheiros com conhecimento e domínio em peças complexas e de alta exigência técnica. 

Localizados na Rota do Minério, em Serra (ES), atendemos há quase 30 anos as principais empresas do segmento ferroviário e mineração.

Name: Greenrail Group
Description: Greenrail s.r.l. is an Italian company that designed and patented an innovative and eco-friendly railway sleeper made up of an inner core in concrete and an outer shell obtained from a mix of recycled plastic and rubber collected from ELTs (End of Life Tires). Compared to concrete sleepers, Greenrail reduces the cost of maintenance of lines, contributes to reduce noise and vibration levels, and increases sleeper's lifespan. Also, it is designed to incorporate within it any type of systems such as a photovoltaic panel for solar energy harvesting, data transmission systems for the control of safety and telecommunications and many other, which makes Greenrail a revolutionary product in the railway sector.

Name: GEISMAR ITALIA SPA
Description:
GEISMAR ITALIA SPA è un'azienda specializzata nella progettazione, costruzione, vendita e revisione di macchine per la manutenzione ed il rinnovamento del binario e della linea di contatto.

È una società appartenente al gruppo multinazionale GEISMAR ( www.geismar.com ), ed è conosciuta anche con il precedente nome DONELLI DIMAF SPA, con cui ha operato fino al 2018, quando ha assunto l'attuale denominazione.

La gamma dei suoi prodotti, integrata da quella del gruppo GEISMAR permette di offrire alla clientela un programma di vendita completo:
• macchine e materiale per manutenzione e rinnovamento del binario
• apparecchi di misura elettronici dei parametri geometrici del binario
• accessori di posa del binario, di manutenzione e di trasporto

L’obiettivo è acquisire una maggiore visibilità sul mercato italiano, grazie al contatto diretto con la clientela che si divide in 4 grandi categorie:

• le amministrazioni ferroviarie nazionali ed estere, siano esse pubbliche o private;
• le metropolitane e le aziende tranviarie;
• le imprese di armamento ed elettrificazione;
• i general contractors.

GEISMAR ITALIA SPA ha sempre dimostrato grande interesse per l'innovazione tecnologica dei propri prodotti e per la cura degli aspetti legati alla qualità degli stessi.

Name: Bemo Rail BV
Description:
Since its foundation in 1970 Bemo Rail has grown significantly and has developed into an expert in the field of rail, crane track, railway technology and rail-related internal means of transport recognized all over the world. 

Started as a trading company, Bemo Rail decided – after much demand from the market – to develop its own shunting installations in 1984. Six years later the production activities were expanded with the assembly of crane tracks. Since then Bemo Rail consists of two departments: Rail Technology and Shunting Technology.

In 2006 we moved to a new and larger premises in Warmenhuizen, in the Northwest of Holland. The combination of a modern office, a logistically well-equipped production facility and high educated employees makes it possible to execute our products and services qualitatively, efficiently and quickly, with a good price/quality ratio.

Our vision
•	Render durable and customer-specific services by professional and multi-purpose teams.
•	Remain prominent in the market for rail constructions worldwide.
•	Remain involved in the initial stage of projects, which results in qualitative, price-conscious and practical solutions.
•	Become market leader for shunting systems and shunting locomotives, with functionality optimally related to price.
•	Be distinctive in upgrading and modernizing existing locomotives.
•	Using durable materials and methods is embraced as a principle by Bemo Rail.

Because of the growing demand from the Far East we desided to open an office in Singapore in 2013, named Bemo MMP Rail Systems Pte. Ltd. Nowadays our organization is more than ever able to work flexible, quickly and completely fulfilling our customers’ wishes all over the world!

Name: INFRARAIL/SPA
Description: Infrarail acronym for (the National Railway Infrastructure Construction Company) in Arabic: شركة منشآت السكة الحديدية, is an Algerian public company specialized in the construction of railway infrastructure, civil engineering works, production of aggregates and prefabricated concrete elements.In 2007, the company held 70% of the market share of the railway works and 30% of the market share of the prefabrication and production of concrete and aggregates

Name: Midland Manufacturing
Description:
Since 1951, Midland has been dedicated to supplying the most reliable valves and level-measurement devices for the railroad market. With an innovative approach to engineering simple designs that meet the most demanding needs, Midland continuously leads the way in shaping the technological evolution of railroad tank car transportation equipment that’s safe, reliable and easy to use and maintain. 

Five decades of real-world experience have resulted in a manufacturing company that anticipates the industry’s needs and delivers superior products that help protect workers and the environment. This is Midland’s legacy of quality. It starts with intuitive product development that answers the needs of the market without compromise, and continues through Midland’s innovative engineering design process. Precision lean manufacturing, using only the highest quality materials, is employed in a flexible, world-class production environment, assuring on-time delivery of your product. Midland’s rigid quality control standards, utilizing statistical process control, promise reliable product performance. Every valve and level measurement device is thoroughly tested. After testing, critical components are serialized prior to shipping, making them easily traceable for life. Thanks to Midland’s focus on quality and safety, our products meet (and typically exceed) Association of American Railroad (AAR) regulations.  

Midland is ISO 9001:2008 certified and an AAR Category F registered facility.

Name: Online Railcar Decals and Screen Printing
Description: Online Railcar Decals and Screen Printing brings your railcar ordering online, by phone, email or P.O., tailored for your convenience. Our transparent pricing and exceptional customer service sets us apart from other decal providers. As 23-year-veterans of decal manufacturing, we know the importance of quick and accurate service. It's our specialty! Our knowledge of industry needs, our understanding of industry compliance and our desire to streamline processes for customers makes us the premier provider for all of your decal needs.

Name: Naledi Ringrollers (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Naledi Ringrollers is one of the largest forging companies in the Southern hemisphere with the most powerful and technologically advanced manufacturing facility on the African continent.
Naledi manufactures to international and custom specifications railway tyres suitable for applications such as tram,metro,mainline, locomotives,rail refurbishment vehicles, industrial and mining.
Ringrollers are forged to custom specifications seamless rings suitable for applications and industries such as riding rings, slew bearings, renewable energy, civil engineering, mining and industrial.
Ringrollers forged to custom specifications flanges suitable for applications such as wind energy industries, harbour dredging operators, turbine, pressure vessels and petro-chemical and civil industries.
Ringrollers forged wheels is ideally positioned to cater for the railway sector and the suitable applications such as freight rail, passenger rail and locomotives.

Name: Temoinsa
Description: Products and services offered by TEMOINSA are destined to Railway Car Builders in projects for equipment of new rolling stock or Railway Administrations in Refurbishment and Modernization projects of second-hand vehicles.

Name: RTG Rail Services LTD
Description:
RTG GROUP OFFERS A ONE-STOP SHOP RANGE OF BUILDING, MAINTENANCE, RAIL, MANPOWER AND ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES.

We are one of the fastest growing providers of specialist support services to the rail, utility, construction, and environmental sectors nationwide.

We work with some of the UK’s largest construction companies and developers, as well as rail networks, utility providers and public sector bodies.

Modern infrastructure projects demand modern, dynamic support services and RTG Group provide a best practice approach to safety, productivity and customer service ensuring excellence throughout.

Name: Westcode Inc - A Unipart Company
Description: Premier supplier of high quality rail systems. Westcode provides individually designed rail systems from its ISO certified factories strategically located in the US and in Europe. With over 15,000 air conditioning units in the field, and over 23,000 door systems, Westcode is a major player in the rail transit sector in it's chosen markets

Name: Gürmak Demiryolu
Description:
Rail Fastenings 
Pre-Stressed Concrete reinforcement steel wires (PCCP wires)

Name: MATISA Australia Pty Ltd
Description: MATISA strives to be a 100% reliable partner to our customers, our personnel and our suppliers in order to deliver products which fully meet the rail networks’ requirements.

Name: PLASSER ESPAÑOLA, S.A.
Description:
Plasser Española, S. A. representa, desde hace 40 años, a Plasser & Theurer, empresa líder en todo el mundo en el desarrollo de maquinaria de construcción y mantenimiento de superestructura ferroviaria, a través de la venta de equipos en España y del servicio posventa para la Península Ibérica.

La maquinaria de Plasser está diseñada para desempeñar trabajos de alta precisión, calidad y rendimiento, así como cumplir con los requisitos de seguridad exigidos por las distintas administraciones ferroviarias. Nuestra prioridad es alargar la vida útil de nuestras máquinas y sistemas gracias a un servicio posventa eficiente formado por personal experimentado. 

Nuestros principios son:

1. Rentabilidad a través de la calidad

2. Las innovaciones crean nuevos beneficios

3. Parte de un sistema con futuro

4. Único fabricante con un programa completo

5. Servicio & asistencia en todas las regiones del mundo

Name: OptiFuel Systems
Description:
OptiFuel Systems is a solution provider designing and manufacturing zero emission products and services in the hard-to-abate transportation and industrial markets, specifically in rail, marine and power generation.

OptiFuel works as a systems integrator with strategic partners to engineer innovative technology that is low-risk, modular, and has flexible fuel options consisting of affordable renewable natural gas (RNG) and hydrogen fuels. Products include switcher and line haul freight locomotives, RNG and hydrogen tenders, stationary and mobile refueling systems, and mobile and stationary standby and emergency generators.

Services include sales, leasing, long-term maintenance, and refueling services. Customers are expected to achieve heightened reliability, reduced lifetime maintenance costs, minimized downtime, optimized horsepower, and an impressive up to 30% enhancement in fuel economy. OptiFuel’s Total-Zero RNG-electric locomotives and hydrogen-electric locomotives are EPA certified as zero NOx and PM emissions and have achieved FRA concurrence.

Name: Vossloh Beekay Castings Ltd.
Description: Vossloh Beekay Castings Ltd. is a Railroad Manufacture company located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh, India.

Name: Hayes Manufacturing Company
Description: Custom Fabrication, Machining, Blast and Paint facility, hydraulic mobile crane fleet

Name: Wabtec Track IQ - Rolling Stock Asset Monitoring
Description:
Track IQ has a global reputation for being specialist manufacturers, suppliers and maintainers of wayside condition monitoring equipment and data management systems to the rail industry. Track IQ’s rolling stock condition monitoring products include our Bogie Geometry Monitor (BGM), Bearing Acoustic Monitor (RailBAM), Wheel Condition Monitor (WCM) and our suite of vision based systems to monitor and inspect wheel profile and surface condition, bogie components, brakes, wagon sides, undercarriage and couplers. These complimentary systems provide a holistic view of rolling stock and their relative health and safety. The powerful and customisable FleetONE database and visualisation tool presents, prioritises, alarms and reports to meet each customer’s specific requirements, driving down the cost of rolling stock maintenance, whilst increasing safety.

Track IQ works with industry specialists to integrate a wide range of other wayside sensors into the FleetONE database. These include, Hot Bearing Detectors, WILD, Bogie Geometry, Wheel Profile, Brake Shoe Wear on asset monitoring ‘Supersites’ where sensor data is integrated into the Track IQ wayside monitoring system database, FleetONE. Based on over 25 years of experience in Condition Monitoring our detailed
understanding of the rail industry enables Track IQ to provide a robust technical and commercial offering that adds value to our customers business. With continuous investment in both organic growth and acquisition, Track IQ continue to develop sustainable solutions targeted to meet the challenges of operating an efficient modern railway.

Name: INDUSTRI | Roller Blinds and Mirrors for Trains & Coaches
Description:
INDUSTRI is a leading national company dedicated to the manufacture of coach and train accessories. Our over 60 years of manufacturing experience allow us to provide top quality products. 

We dedicate ourselves to developing and manufacturing customized components as per the client’s requirements. Our processes are based on innovation and attaining good results carrying out comprehensive quality controls. 

We offer a wide range of spare parts: roller blinds, interior and exterior rear-view mirrors, hubcaps, roof windows, hinges, exhaust pipe extensions, footrests, etc.

Name: La Falco Srl
Description:
Founded by Enzo Giuberti in 1977, LA FALCO s.r.l. has always been involved in the design, manufacture, sale, and overhaul of machines for the construction, maintenance, and renewal of the railway infrastructures.
The constant research for new cutting-edge technologies that has characterized our work for over 40 years, has let us be one of the most renowned designers and manufacturers of railway machines on the national field.
Our technical department is always looking to find the best solutions to make our machines competitive both in terms of productivity and ease of use and reliability on construction sites.
In addition, La Falco has a spare parts warehouse always available for repairs and assistance.

Name: Italy Rail - Manutenzione Treni
Description:
L'azienda Italy Rail è specializzata nelle manutenzioni, nelle riparazioni e nelle revisioni generali e periodiche su locomotori, mezzi d'opera e rotabili in genere, essendo sempre attenti alla formazione e alla professionalità del proprio personale. L'azienda vanta collaborazioni con primarie aziende di settore. Siamo presenti sul territorio con una rete di squadre mobili che riescono a coprire tutto il nord Italia fino alla Capitale.

Italy Rail è specializzata nel revamping completo di mezzi di manovra lavorando in proprio le parti di carpenteria e provvedendo alle sostituzioni delle parti motoristiche affidandosi a fruppi leader come Iveco, Mercedes, Caterpillar e tanti altri.

L'azienda effettua anche manutenzioni ordinarie e straordinarie su rotabili, e preparazioni alle revisioni generali e periodiche su locomotori, motoscale, carri betoniera, ferro cisterne e qualsiasi altro tipo di carro ferroviario. inoltre dispone di un efficace magazzino ricambi, in grado di soddisfare le esigenze di tutti i clienti grazie ai numerosi contatti con case motoristiche e di elettronica.

Servizio fondamentale che offre l'azienda è quello di essere in possesso di un raccordo ferroviario di proprietà che facilita il trasporto dei mezzi in manutenzione. Garantendo così un servizio "completo" provvedendo in autonomia al trasporto, anche laddove non fosse possibile movimentare il mezzo su rotaie, tramite propri automezzi.

L'azienda effettua anche manutenzioni ordinarie e straordinarie su rotabili, e preparazioni alle revisioni generali e periodiche su locomotori, motoscale, carri betoniera, ferro cisterne e qualsiasi altro tipo di carro ferroviario. inoltre dispone di un efficace magazzino ricambi, in grado di soddisfare le esigenze di tutti i clienti.

L'officina, nel reparto della carpenteria, svolge e realizza particolari meccanici sulle basi di disegni FS o di progetti di proprietà grazie all'ufficio tecnico ingegneristico interno.

Name: Skinest Rail Polska - part of Skinest Group
Description:
We sell and rent freight cars, provide railway spare parts for all types of railway rolling stock and materials for upper railway road building.
Due to our factories, our storages have a wide selection of spare parts. This allows us to provide the required parts in the shortest period of time.
Skinest Rail Polska Sp. z o.o. is part of Skinest Group.
