Description: DEMİRYOLU

Name: FERROVIE DELLA CALABRIA SRL
Description: FERROVIE DELLA CALABRIA SRL is a Railroad Manufacture company located in 28 Via Milano, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italy.

Name: MAÏA SECURITE FERROVIAIRE
Description:
Créée en 2016, MAÏA SECURITE FERROVIAIRE regroupe aujourd'hui toutes les activités historiques de MAÏA RAIL liées à la Sécurité Ferroviaire et opère notamment dans les domaines suivants  :

- Annonce humaine des Circulations

- Prestations fixes en lignes fermées :
   - Responsable de Zone Travaux (RZT)
   - Agent de Passage à Niveau (APN)
   - Agent Chargé du Guidage des Engins Chantiers et Routiers (ACGEC-ER)

-  Prestations TTx sur ligne fermée :
    - Agent Train de Travaux (ATTx)

MAÏA SECURITE FERROVIAIRE  se distingue par son haut niveau d'exigence professionnelle pour chacun de ses collaborateurs et cultive un fort esprit d'équipe et d'entreprise.

Name: Hebei Yongyang Steel Sales Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Hebei Yongyang Steel Sales Co.,Ltd, established in 2007, is the wholly-owned subsidiary of Hebei Yongyang Special-steel Group Co.,ltd, our products mainly include: 8Kg-30Kg light steel rail, 38Kg-75Kg heavy steel rail, QU70-QU120 Crane rail, 9-12# I-Beam for Mining, 25-36(U)Mining Arch Support steel, rail fasteners and all sizes of round bar, flat bars.

Our factory, built in 1993, is located at yongnian Special steel industrial zone, covering an area of 951000 Square meters, with 4200 employees, the general asset is 600 millions US Dollars.
https://www.yyrail.com/

Name: Columbus Castings
Description: Columbus Castings produces complex steel castings for the railroad, mass transit, and industrial (mining, construction, agricultural, power generation) industries.  We are America's largest steel foundry located in Columbus, Ohio covering an area of 90 + acres, including 22 acres under roof.  We have the flexibility and lean manufacturing expertise to produce high quality castings weighing from 100 to 70,000 pounds.

Name: Tecnologie Meccaniche S.p.A
Description:
Eccellenza, ricerca e innovazione. Dal 1972 TM è leader nel settore ferroviario.
Soluzioni meccatroniche, progettazione, realizzazione e installazione di apparecchiature meccaniche, elettromeccaniche, elettroniche e oleodinamiche in ambito ferroviario.

Name: UTCRAS
Description: UTCRAS is a wheelset, truck (bogie),  bearing, and gearbox manufacturing and overhaul facility serving the railroad industry.  We also manufacture and produce wheels, axles, brake discs, and other rolling stock components.

Name: Gmundner Fertigteile
Description:
Das Unternehmen Gmundner Fertigteile ist ein Familienunternehmen und wurde im Jahr 1972 gegründet. Gmundner Fertigteile ist Patentinhaber und Produzent des BODAN-Gleiseindeckungssystems und des BO-TRACK Gleistragplattensystems. Diese werden weltweit von Staats- und Privatbahnen bei Bahnübergängen eingebaut.

Neben dem Bereich der Gleiseindeckungen liegt das Know-How des Unternehmens in der Erzeugung von Stahlbetonfertigteilen, die für Technikgebäude für Bahnanlagen und die Elektroinfrastruktur, Fertigteilbahnsteige, Kabelstationen, Gasverteiler und Haltestellen hergestellt werden.

Name: Railcare B.V.
Description:
Railcare is een dynamische onderneming, gespecialiseerd in het ondersteunen van werkzaamheden op het spoor, in de civiele bouw en de industrie. Sinds de oprichting van Railcare in 2005 is zowel de diversiteit als ons aanbod aan machines en diensten in sneltreinvaart uitgebreid.

Railcare kan u ondersteunen tijdens de organisatie van zowel grote als kleine projecten. Tevens kunt u bij ons terecht voor bijzondere kraanwerkzaamheden, het huren van machines, het huren van machinisten en het organiseren en uitvoeren van (bijzondere) transporten. Al deze diensten kunnen wij u 7 dagen per week, 24 uur per dag leveren.

Railcare staat voor kwaliteit en betrouwbaarheid. Om het inmiddels bereikte kwaliteitsniveau ook daadwerkelijk te behouden werkt Railcare uitsluitend met gediplomeerde mensen, die tevens over veel praktijkervaring beschikken.

Railcare beschikt over toelatingen tot o.a.: metro, tram (Eurorailer & Hitachi), GVB, RET, HSL, Betuweroute, Noord-Zuidlijn, HTM, Infrabel etc.

Voor meer informatie over de mogelijkheden welke wij bieden kunt u ook direct contact met ons opnemen.

Name: Duratrack Railway Sleepers
Description:
Type approved for mainline (V/Line, MTM) and tourist and heritage railways, Duratrack is an Australian designed and manufactured composite recycled plastic railway sleeper. 

Current in-track trials are underway on both mainline and tourist and heritage railways throughout Australia.

Ongoing research is being conducted by the premier track and vehicle railway research centre in Australia, the Institute of Railway Technology (IRT) at Monash University.

Manufactured by Integrated Recycling Pty Ltd in Mildura, Victoria.

Integrated Recycling is the recycled plastic products division of Pro‑Pac Packaging Limited, an Australian public company with over 800 employees in Australia, New Zealand and other countries.

Name: Navketan Engineering
Description:
Navketan was formed in 1976 with the objective of offering state of the art products and solutions to the Indian market. Since inception, the company has been partnering with global leaders and innovators and gaining the trust of its customers.

With over 40 years of experience in delivering products and collaborating with Indian Railways, Navketan has got the acclaim of being a pioneer in the introduction of various futuristic concepts and technologies in the sector.

We deal in the following products and services:

1. Mobile Flash-Butt Welding Machinery
2. Rail-cum-Road Vehicle for various rail purposes
3. Track Lubrication Machinery
4. Rail Grinding Machinery
5. Track Tamping Machinery
6. Portable Welding Generators

Name: Sateba PREFARAILS
Description:
Prefarails is a Belgian company producing embedded rail systems, where rails are isolated with a complete packing made of recycled car & truck tyres.

Unique selling points are:
- Long lifetime of system: 35 to 40 y before track renewal is needed
- Low lifecycle cost due to almost no maintenance needed and long lifetime
- Short construction time: 2 to 10 Times faster than traditional rail construction
- Improving living quality in cities: reduction of noise and vibrations up to -20Db and even more
- Sustainable solution for waste recycling
- Recyclable again and again
- Electrical isolation of the rail up to 50 Ohms/km
- Elimination of traditional problems of sleepers and fastenings
- Direct and indirect economical benefits

From its engineering & production site South-east of Brussels, Prefarails constantly develops and improves technologies since 1998.

We integrate all steps in our organisation as we take care of product development, engineering, production, installation, after-care.

Prefarails offers a line of solutions under the system names GSF, STERO, STERO Ladder, MODULIX, X-MODULIX and most recently MODULIX 3S. Each system is adapted for every possible situation.

Clients can choose any esthetically finishing they desire, from concrete, asphalt, cobble stones and even artificial and natural grass.

We have served rail and urban transport infrastructure managers in Belgium, France, The Netherlands, Germany, Greece, Norway, Spain, Portugal, Morocco, Tunisia, Russia and more countries.

We are there to help you building transport solutions.

Name: Rail Industries Canada
Description: With over 25 years of hands-on experience in all aspects of freight cars and locomotives we are problem solvers not just a parts distributor. Rail Industries Canada sales & technical team provides great service and short delivery time to our customers.

Name: Hatch & Kirk, Inc.
Description: Hatch & Kirk Inc. is an AAR M-1003 certified global leader in the manufacture, remanufacture, sale and distribution of engines and aftermarket diesel engine parts for EMD, ALCO, Fairbanks-Morse and Cleveland brand engines. Established in 1945, we have spent the past 70 years building and maintaining one of the strongest reputations in the industry for delivery, quality, competitive pricing and outstanding customer service. H&K is so confident in our product that we offer an industry-leading two-year warranty on all of our engines and engine parts.

Name: AB Hoses & Fittings Ltd (AB Rail)
Description:
AB Hoses & Fittings Ltd (AB Rail) have been a key player in providing sander system parts, full bespoke sander systems and associated sander services for the UK Rail Industry since the 1990’s. 

AB Hoses & Fittings have also been supplying fluid transfer systems including hoses, pumps, motors, fittings & associated items to various different industries including railway, off highway, defence & marine as examples. 

We can cater to all of your sander system needs; working with all systems, from BR era fixed rate sanders to the latest, cutting edge, industry leading variable rate technology and application with our own award winning “Advanced Automatic Sander” systems, for rolling stock manufacturers, operators, maintainers and leasing companies.  

We undertake; 
- Parts supply
- Repair, Service and Overhaul
- Continuing Product support and improvement
- Engineering consultancy for sander systems
- New system design, build and installation 
- Supply Chain Management
- Obsolescence Management
 
We are RISQS registered and assured for all sander & hose related activities. 

Our products, using our own patented parts where applicable, are UK designed and manufactured and our supply chain is all local to our Chesterfield factory.

Name: Taveirne
Description: Taveirne is al sinds de jaren 1950 gespecialiseerd in het aanleggen, vernieuwen en onderhouden van sporen. Zowel in België als in Noord-Frankrijk hebben we meegewerkt aan enkele van de belangrijkste projecten op het gebied van stationsaanleg, spoorvernieuwingen en spoorwerken, en dit zowel voor trein, tram als metro. Bovendien gebruiken we onze expertise om ook projecten in industrie- en havengebieden tot een goed einde te brengen.

Name: CFF - Centro di Formazione Ferroviaria s.r.l.
Müller Technologie AG
Description:
Müller Technologie entwickelt, baut und wartet Maschinen für den modernen Gleisbau. Unser Know-How, das wir uns gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden über Jahre hinweg erarbeitet haben, setzen wir heute in innovative Techniken ein. Wir wissen, worauf es beim modernen Gleisbau ankommt und bauen unsere Überlegungen bereits von Anfang an ein – zu Ihrem Vorteil! 
Innovationen, mit denen man vorwärts kommt!

Name: Volker Stevin Kabelwerken Railinfra (VSKR)
Description:
Volker Stevin Kabelwerken Railinfra (VSKR) is specialist in het aanleggen, onderhouden en renoveren van de ondergrondse kabel- en leidinginfrastructuur langs het spoor. VSKR is een vennootschap onder firma van Hanab Distribution te Papendrecht en VolkerRail te Vianen. Bezoek onze website voor meer informatie.

www.vskr.nl

Name: CSEE-ALGER
Description: La Sarl CSEE Alger exerce dans le domaine ferroviaire. Ses activités sont orientées essentiellement vers la conception et l'installation des équipements relatifs à la Signalisation, les Télécommunications, l'Énergie et la Sécurité.

Name: Millet AFR
Description:
Depuis plus de 65 ans, notre cœur de métier est la conception et fabrication de wagons fret ferroviaire : wagons citernes pour le transport de matières dangereuses, wagons trémies pour le transport de céréales et produits pulvérulents, wagons intermodaux, wagons spéciaux et bogies.
Filiale du groupe Millet SAS, nous nous imposons comme référence nationale de la conception et fabrication de wagons fret ferroviaire. 

- 76 500 m² de surface d'atelier
- 400 wagons neufs fabriqués par an 
- 8 chaines de production modulables 
- 122 salariés dédiés à la fabrication 

Certifications :
- ISO 9001: management d'un système qualité 
- EN 15085-2 CL1 D,P,S : exigences de qualité pour le soudage des véhicules et des composants ferroviaires
- EN ISO 3834-2 : exigences de qualité en soudage par fusion des matériaux métalliques
- 6.8.2.1.23 du RID 2023 : système d'assurance qualité du soudage pour le transport international ferroviaire des marchandises dangereuses

Name: CRRC Colombia
Description: CRRC Colombia (CRRC Changchun Colombia Railway Vehicles S.A.S. and CRRC Hong Kong Sucursal Colombia) is a Chinese company specialising in design, manufacture, commissioning and maintenance of rolling stock and railway technology.

Name: TMH HUNGARY
Description:
TMH Hungary's main profile includes the production, maintenance, repair and modernisation of railway rolling-stock. Our work is supported by the professionals of TMH Group, who provide technical and management know-how. Our aim is to help the Hungarian railway industry reach international recognition. The first step is the ENR project, which involves the production of 680 railway coaches for the Egyptian National Railway Company in Hungary.

A TMH Hungary profiljába tartozik a személyszállító kötöttpályás járművek gyártása, felújítása, átépítése, javítása és karbantartása. Munkánkat a TMH Csoport nemzetközi munkatársai műszaki és menedzsment támogatással segítik. Célunk, hogy nemzetközi megrendelések megszerzésével járuljunk hozzá a magyar vasúti járműgyártás újjászületéséhez. Ennek első lépcsője az ENR-projekt, melynek keretében 1300 vasúti személykocsit gyártunk az Egyiptomi Nemzeti Vasúttársaság megbízásából.

Name: Trovon Group Pty Ltd
Description:
Trovon Group’s Mission is to provide our global customer base with the very best in Innovation, Design, Materials and Operational & Environmental analysis tools in support of maximising the Lifetime Extension of your most valuable assets - your rolling stock. 

Our unique approach can significantly reduce both the cost and waste involved in producing new parts or products, which in turn leads to a measurable reduction in input energy and emissions required to produce replacement equipment. 

The resultant outcome is a Win/Win for both your bottom line and the environment? 

Our highly skilled Design Team are always eager to discuss any complex issue you may have when it comes to keeping your rolling stock well-maintained and moving. Please feel free to contact us for a confidential discussion.

The Trovon Group was born as a result of the private equity backed management buyout of Sabre Rail Australia from Sabre Rail Services UK.

With our strong multi disciplinary engineering capabilities, we have been providing OEM grade MRO services for critical sub systems to the A/NZ rolling stock industry since 2015.

Now, with the PE backing, we are expanding to new geographical locations, & introducing our asset life extension services.

Asset life extension is a unique offering that blends our OEM grade, customised repair and overhaul service with a detailed analysis of reliability and availability objectives to deliver significant maintenance cost savings, and improvements in equipment reliability and availability to asset owners and operators. 

Whilst rollingstock continues to be Trovon’s primary focus, our rigorous approach is equally applicable to defence, marine and other transport and heavy equipment industries. 

Contact us at info@trovongroup.com to begin a discussion about your specific needs, & how we might be able to add value to your operation, or solve your reliability problems.

Name: Backtrack Railway Services Ltd.
Description: Backtrack Railway Services Ltd. is the one-stop railroad equipment solution. Sales, maintenance, training, and repairs focused on the needs of an ever changing railway and transit industry.

Name: Penn Machine Company
Description:
Penn Machine offers the most durable and reliable rolling stock wheelsets and locomotive aftermarket and industrial gearing solutions for customers looking to simplify their supply chains. Penn’s equipment is used for OEM and aftermarket applications in the transit, railroad, industrial, mining, and oil & gas sectors.

Our 103 years of experience and superior service have established Penn as the leader in its field by meeting or exceeding customer expectations for safety excellence, improved asset utilization, and the lowest operating cost per mile. Supported by our industry’s largest customer service team, we focus on communication and project management to provide what you need when you want it.

Penn is a subsidiary of Marmon Holdings Inc., a Berkshire Hathaway company (BRK-A, BRK-B), with $10B in revenue, 400 production facilities in the U.S. and 22 countries, and 23,000 employees.

PRODUCTS:
> Wide selection of solid and resilient wheels with noise and vibration damping properties for mass transit vehicles.
> We're a leading supplier of OEM and replacement transit gearing for transit authorities.
> With in-house heat-treating capabilities, industry-leading quality processes, and core manufacturing work cells Penn Machine can control the manufacturing inputs and produce a product that is reliable and durable to meet the needs of our customers.
> We use large computer-controlled gear hobbers and related equipment to provide customers with quality gears and pinions in large and small quantities.
> Authorized source for gearbox rebuilding and new Ljungström air preheaters. We optimize productivity at power generation or natural gas plants.

ENGINEERING: We have the expertise to evaluate your requirements and develop the drawings for your specific wheels, axles, wheelsets, trucks, gearboxes, gears, pinions, and sub-components. We're also able to reverse-engineer parts and components.

Name: Kaptronics
Description:
Kaptronics is a Railway Product Company, based in Bangalore. With over four decades of rich manufacturing legacy, we have proven track record in manufacturing and supplying Railway Products to the highest accord. 

Our Product Range includes: 

-- Dynamic Braking Grid Resistors

-- Motors and Alternators  

-- Locomotive Transformers 

For more information kindly write to us at info@kaptronics.com

Name: ENTREPRISE JEAN LEFEBVRE LORRAINE
Description:
Acteur spécialisé des travaux publics routiers, l'Entreprise Jean Lefebvre Lorraine est une filiale du Groupe Eurovia, leader mondial pour les infrastructures routières, ferroviaires et urbaines. 
Nous participons activement à l'entretien et au développement, pour des projets publics ou privés des voiries ou des réseaux.

Name: Almar Railinfra
Description: Almar Railinfra is een familiebedrijf gespecialiseerd is seinwezenwerkzaamheden, LSR en laswerkzaamheden in de railinfra.

Name: LinkUp Corporation
Description:
On January 1, 1996, LinkUp International began providing professional sales, engineering, manufacturing, and distribution services to the railway industry. Since that time, our capabilities have expanded to include a wide variety of railway products and equipment.

LinkUp presently serves railroads in thirteen different countries. Throughout our rapid growth, one thing has remained constant: our ongoing commitment to providing high-quality products, on-time delivery, and competitive prices to each individual customer. LinkUp’s experienced railroaders know first-hand the demands of maintaining rolling stock and right-of-ways. We understand the cost of holding locomotives and cars for materials and commit our full attention to satisfying your requirements.

Name: Coop. Progresso e Lavoro (cplscrl)
Description:
La “PROGRESSO E LAVORO” s.c.r.l. è nata nel 1974, continuando l’attività della riparazione carri ferroviari che la SIDELM S.p.A aveva nel frattempo cessato. Avvertendo la necessità di disporre di un proprio stabilimento la Società ne realizza uno, moderno e razionale, nell’area industriale di Brindisi, che entra in funzione nel 1986.
Collocato a ridosso del porto commerciale, è servito da raccordo ferroviario, è inoltre collegato con la stazione ferroviaria BRINDISI centrale, ed insiste su un’area di 40.000 mq. Dal 1986 ad oggi si sono susseguiti costanti interventi tesi ad ampliare, organizzare e migliorare sistematicamente le lavorazioni. Attualmente l’Azienda sviluppa la propria attività su 8000 mq di capannoni, magazzini ed uffici e su 25.000 mq di piazzali attrezzati per le lavorazioni, tutti dotati di binari.

Sino alla metà degli anni 90 le attività erano concentrate sulla manutenzione dei carri merci, successivamente le attività sono state ampliate ai rotabili adibiti a trasporto passeggeri.

Successivamente a tale data, la PROGRESSO E LAVORO, estende la propria attività agli interventi manutentivi e di revamping su rotabili adibiti a trasporto passeggeri acquisendo numerose commesse, anche con Clienti diversi da Trenitalia.

Name: Emre Ray
Description:
Hedeflerini ve projelerini hep daha iyisi için planlayan EMRERAY, bu doğrultuda “yüksek teknoloji, yüksek kalite ve yüksek memnuniyet” politikası ile hareket etmek- tedir. İleriye dönük hizmet anlayışı ve her biri kendi alanında uzman kadrosu ile dün olduğu gibi bugün de en üst takdire hitap etmektedir.
Yoluna büyüyerek ve güçlenerek devam eden EMRERAY, yurt içinde olduğu gibi uluslararası arenada da adını en üste yazdırmayı öngörmektedir.

Name: ASCO RAIL Sp. z o.o.
Description:
ASCO RAIL since the beginning of its activity in 1988 is considered one of the leaders on Rail sector for the Maintenance and Operation of railway vehicles.

The main activity of the company is the design, manufacture and distribution of all diagnostic instruments and devices needed during the process of repair and operation of railway vehicles.

The experience gained by the company and our valuable engineers over the years and comparing it with all different markets we are present, allow us to guarantee a professional and comprehensive service to all our clients based on their needs.

We design and produce devices which gives a technical support during the processes of inspections, repairs and maintenance of railway vehicles and all their components (i.e. Coil-Leaf-Air spring testing stand, Bogie test stand, Damper test stands, Pantograph testing Bench, Wheel mounting machine, Wheelset cleaning machine and many more devices..).

Our involvement in Rail life and the understating of the importance in the community allow us to constantly improve our technology and service to be able to offer to the final client an ad-hoc solution and an excellent product. 

Knowledge, Passion, Quality and Durability...this is our motto, this is what makes us unique.

Name: Ozark Mountain Railcar.
Description:
Ozark Mountain Railcar is a full-service railroad equipment brokerage firm
specializing in the sale of a wide range of railroad rolling stock, including
locomotives, freight and passenger cars, cabooses, MOW equipment, Hy-Rail
trucks, and luxurious private passenger cars. 

With over 26 years of experience in the railroad industry, we have built a
reputation for delivering exceptional results for our clients. Whether you're
looking to buy or sell railroad equipment, need expert advice on appraisals or consulting, Ozark Mountain Railcar is your trusted partner.

Visit our website at www.ozarkmountainrailcar.com or contact our office at
417.336.2401 to learn more about our services and to explore our current
inventory of railroad equipment.

Name: STROJÍRNY SVIADNOV
Description:
Výroba železničních zařízení, lokomotiv, speciálních drážních vozidel a vagónu. 
Manufacture of railway equipment, locomotives, special railway vehicles and wagons.
Nabízime komplexní řešení kolejových vozidel a vagonů. Naše práce je založena na tradičním strojírenství za použití nejmodernějších technologií. Díky tomu jsme schopni dodávat vozidla v nejvyšší možné kvalitě a jsme považováni za předního výrobce lokomotiv a speciálních drážních vozidel.
Firma Strojírny Sviadnov s.r.o. se zaměřuje na strojírenskou výrobu a to na kovoobrábění, svařování, soustružení, frézování a dělení materiálu formou pálení či řezání laserem nebo plazmou. Dalším souvisejícím oborem je strojírenská kovovýroba strojních dílů, oprava kolejových vozidel, železničních vagónů nebo výroba železničních podvozků.

Strojírenská kovovýroba, tedy výroba strojních dílů u nás probíhá na zakázku a jsme schopni díky dlouholetým zkušenostem nabídnout vysokou kvalitu o velkém množství a v krátkém období. Strojírenství vyžaduje volbu kvalitního materiálu, který často dělíme laserem nebo plazmou a tím dokážeme zajistit vysokou jakost nejen pro Českou republiku, ale i Evropskou unii.

Name: LB Foster Produtos Ferroviários do Brasil
Description: Planta de fabricação de Juntas Isoladas Coladas.

Name: GPX Engineering Ltd
Description:
GPX Engineering Ltd is an established railway contractor specialising in providing welding resource for the railway industry, working directly for Network Rail, Transport for London and key contractors to improve the UK’s rail infrastructure.

 

GPX is a preferred supplier of welding services to Network Rail across all territories and delivers on a national scale.  Leading the field in performance and innovation within the rail welding sector GPX offers a wealth of experience and technical knowledge gained from working within the rail industry for the past 13 years.

 

Our head office/depot at Northfields Industrial Estate in Wembley is also the home of our training centre, licensed to provide training to both our own technicians and external candidates. Our Senior Welding Trainer has over 25 years’ welding training experience and offers courses in:

Aluminothermic welding – Thermit and Railtech

Manual metal arc welding and flux core wire welding

Weld inspection

Plant proficiency

Manual handling

Gas cutting

Gas safety

Grinding

Name: E-RAIL PTY LTD
Description: Our company offers a number of highly skilled employees who provide important procedures to maintain our railways to keep them safe and compliant. Our consultants provide Railway NDT Ultrasonics, Electronic Straightedge, Protection Officers, Safe working, Labouring, Rail Certification and Verse Testing under the WHS and the Rail Safety Act. We ensure precise and detailed digital reports for your convenience as well as 24/7 support.

Name: RB Solutions
Description:
RB Solutions offers a complete line of services in the field of pre-owned railway machines. We are highly dedicated in helping our customers to acquire, deliver, train, customize and maintain pre-owned railway machines all over the world. Our extensive network within the railway industry sector ensures that we can find the right machines for our customers needs. We work together with the main brands in the railway industry, Plasser & Theurer, Matisa and Robel.

Please contact us for more information about our services, or if you have used railway machines that you would like to sell and extend the lifecycle of. For a more sustainable railway industry.

Name: C.S.F. Cronos Sistemi Ferroviari Spa
Description:
Cronos è una giovane realtà specializzata nella progettazione, installazione e manutenzione di impianti di trazione elettrica ferroviaria, tramviaria e metropolitana e nell'esecuzione di lavori di piazzale e di linea per impianti di segnalamento ferroviario.
L’azienda, forte delle competenze e dell’esperienza del proprio staff, si pone sul mercato come una nuova e valida alternativa all'interno di uno scenario altamente specialistico.
La direzione della società è affidata a professionisti con notevole esperienza nel settore ferroviario, evidenziamo nella sezione "case history" alcune attività portate a termine.
L'aggiornamento continuo del personale consente di proporre servizi sempre in linea con gli ultimi update tecnologici e normativi, con particolare attenzione anche alle tematiche di sicurezza, impatto ambientale ed efficienza energetica.

Name: TRE
Description:
Traction Rail Electrical Ltd. provide a range of solutions that include design, engineering, consultancy, installation, supervision and management, to the undertaking of complete packages of works. 
We have a team of highly skilled, professional and motivated people, with a rich blend of youth and rail experience from key roles, skills, competencies and qualities to ensure that works are constantly installed and delivered safely, on time and to the standard our clients expect, every time.
Our team has the expertise to deliver a wide variety of E&P services within the Railway Substation, TP Hut and Along track environment. This also includes within Depots, Sidings and Switch rooms throughout the DC Electrified Rail Network. Our team is experienced in undertaking E&P works in varying types and sizes of singular and multidisciplinary projects and schemes, such as:- 
 Re-signalling Schemes

 Negative Return and Advanced Plate Replacement

Name: ElektroRail b.v.
Description:

Name: ELFI Electronics
Description:
ELFI Electronics is a company that designs and manufactures cutting-edge electronic equipment. We provide innovative and eco-sustainable solutions to our customers’ needs

MISSION 
Elfi Srl was founded in 2004 in Pistoia as a laboratory for the design and production of electronic equipment for the railway and tramway sector.
We are a cutting-edge company that produces highly specialized technology with industrial quality, maintaining in its processes the care of an artisan workshop: focused on detail and careful to find innovative solutions customized to the needs of its customers.

VISION
Thanks to investments in cutting-edge machinery, the constant training of our staff and the adoption of effective management tools, Elfi Srl aims to consolidate its position on the railway and tram market and to expand its presence in the other sectors that can benefit from its solutions. Our goal is to continue to combine high quality production for our customers with the research and development that is the beating heart of our technological passion.

VALUE PROPOSITION 
We like to find solutions to the challenges facing our customers. We love to approach our projects with versatility, sure to find creative and reliable solutions even to unconventional needs. We have know-how and experience and we always seek absolute quality: we preserve the agility of the small business, but combined with production capacity with industrial standards. We are a laboratory of innovation, an artisan technological workshop.

Name: GrayBar Ltd
Description:
GrayBar is a UK based specialist manufacturer of products for the rail industry, with an impressive portfolio of products that have received PADs approval from Network Rail.

We have collaborated very closely with Network Rail and leading Contractors to be the only UK supplier of Self Regulating Points Heating Systems, coupled with cutting edge Signalling Distribution Systems and the largest range of Rail Approved Cable Accessories in the industry for use on UK, Irish and European rail, Underground and Tramway infrastructures.

GrayBar have successfully designed and manufactured many innovative products to support both Network Rail and TFL in their pursuit of working towards a safer and cost effective Rail Network.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/graybaruk

Name: Kovis Livarna d.o.o
Description:
The company Kovis Livarna has a long tradition in the field of foundry work.

The production of castings from grey and nodular cast iron is our competence, combined with tradition and continuous development. Development and innovativeness design our pace and open an increasing number of new opportunities, therefore we also designed a slogan – good ideas create the future.

Expertise, extensive knowledge of foundry work, years of experience, innovative approach, and the use of modern technologies enable us to offer our customers highly demanding technological solutions, as well as quality castings upon their request, which are used in different industries across Europe. Our castings are provided to customers from various industries, namely, in the production of railway vehicles, agricultural machinery, construction machinery, machine building, in the production of pumps, taps and valves, castings for construction, etc.

Description: Provider of railway products catering to the Canadian rail industry. The company offers a range of concrete railway ties and ballastless track systems for urban transit as well as high-speed rail lines in Canada.

Name: Harvest Rail
Description:
Harvest Rail is building a team of Rail People who have a passion for the industry, dedicated to improvement by offering solutions delivering a safer, more efficient and sustainable Railway.

An Edilon Sedra company we are committed to harvesting the best talent, processes and products for the Rail and Crane Rail industries in three key maintenance spheres where we offer world leading expertise and service solutions. 

In an industry where resource is scarce Harvest Rail has a team of highly qualified experts ready to work on maintenance projects. By combining full time employees with a large cadre of external experts, often semi-retired, we can offer our customers a flexible service in areas where specialists are hard to fine, particularly in these times of budget squeeze.

SFT/NT+: Stress free / Neutral Temperature Management – Reducing the risk of breaks and Buckles with a team of Engineers with world class reputations. A measurement and improvement implementation service

SARR: Semi-Automatic Rail Repair – A bespoke and unique Crane Rail Repair service for Marine and Port infrastructure saving significant process time by a factor of 4 whilst improving safety, quality and longevity of the repair.

Track QA: Track Quality Assurance – Rapid roll out and low cost are the key elements of this maintenance service directing ever scarce resource to areas requiring investigation from the safety of the train.  Combining data, local and Harvest Rail expertise.

DS Rail Mobility Sdn Bhd is committed to product world class railway engineered product and services at competitive price and top most quality.

Name: Madison Railroad
Description: The Madison Railroad provides rail transportation via CSX as well as railcar service and train storage operated by the City of Madison Port Authority in southeastern Indiana. We also provide bulk transloading services at our new transload facility serving Indiana, Ohio, and northern Kentucky.

Name: Davanac Inc.
Description:
Davanac ‘s roots date back to 1920 when the W.K. Davidson Co. was founded as a railway supplier. The Davanac name first appeared in 1969 with the merger of W.K. Davidson Company and Adanac Co. Unity Railway Supply Co. acquired Davanac in 1976.

Davanac is an industry leading distributor of abrasives, AREMA track tools, work equipment wear parts, shop tools and related items. We are dedicated in meeting the needs of Engineering and Maintenance of Way departments as well as the Mechanical, Signal and Bridge departments across Canada.

Our commitment is to provide quality and approved products matched with reliable and knowledgeable sales and service. 

/

Les racines de Davanac remontent à 1920, lorsque le W.K. Davidson Co. a été fondée en tant que fournisseur de chemins de fer. Le nom de Davanac est apparu en 1969 avec la fusion de W.K. Davidson Company et Adanac Co. Unity Railway Supply Co. ont acquis Davanac en 1976.

Davanac est un distributeur leader dans le secteur des abrasifs, des outils de voie AREMA, des pièces d'usure des équipements de travail, des outils d'atelier et des articles connexes. Nous nous engageons à répondre aux besoins des départements d'ingénierie et d'entretien des voies, ainsi qu'aux départements de mécanique, de signalisation et de pont du Canada.

Notre engagement est de fournir des produits de qualité et approuvés, associés à des services de vente et de service fiables et compétents.

Name: Fuji Semec
Description: Design, create and deliver innovative products and engineering services to enable vital transit systems worldwide.

Name: ULTIMATE Taşımacılık Ekipmanları A.Ş.
Description:
ULTIMATE, yaklaşık 1800 çalışanı olan ve dünya çapındaki Avusturya, Türkiye, Brezilya, ABD, Çin ve Avustralya lokasyonlarıyla çok başarılı bir uluslararası şirketler grubudur.

Name: Railroad Tools and Solutions, Inc.
Description:
Railroad Tools and Solutions, or RRTS, was founded in 2003 in Cincinnati by Wayne Cash and Bill Bear. The company services Class I, regional and shortline railroads, as well as steel manufacturers, grain and paper mills, and a number of other industries. It also has an established warehousing and distribution operations and a highly experienced customer service team led by Wayne Cash. It supplies quality rail products and components in the maintenance-of-way, railcar, locomotive, signaling, and track safety arenas.

Railroad Tools and Solutions joined the Railway Supply Group based in Elmhurst Illinois in 2023. The Railway Supply Group of companies has served the railroad industry for well over half a century and supplies products and services that cater to all markets of the railroad industry including maintenance-of-way, railcar, locomotive, signal and bridge departments throughout North America.

Name: Direct Track Solutions Ltd
Description:
DTS continues to offer a quality alternative for the supply of Permanent Way products and services.

Our philosophy is to provide a personal approach to our customers setting us apart from other supply chain distributors. Our ethos for quality, innovation and service is underpinned by our supply partners.

DTS remain focused on continuous improvement and remain fully committed to providing excellent quality and service going forward to support the rail infrastructure.

Name: Key Source Rail
Description:
Key Source Rail is a well established, 100% Rail Focused Company. 

Our staff have the knowledge and experience to provide the information and support you require.

Key Source Rail are the Exclusive Australian/ NZ Distributor for GEISMAR Rail Equipment, Ballast Tools Inc and Rosehill rubber road crossing.

Key Source Rail can offer complete wheelset overhaul, reprofiling and wheelset assembly services for wagons, locomotives and track machines with full bearing inspection.

Through our Rollingstock partners Meshian CRRC  we are able to offer complete bogies, all components and recondition Chinese manufactured brake valving. We carry a large range of parts and have the latest in brake valve testing equipment.

Our warehouse stocks a wide range of Spare Parts and Rail Maintenance Equipment.

Name: Spoorwerken Peeters / Vanormelingen-Stas
Description: VANORMELINGEN - STAS is al meer dan veertig jaar actief in de aanleg en het onderhoud van de spoorwegen. Wij bouwen mee aan een duurzamer milieu met onze ervaren medewerkers en ons modern machinepark.

Name: Mirai Rail
Description:
At Mirai Rail Corporation, we're at the forefront of the African rail industry, with expertise in Rail Infrastructure health, rolling stock refurbishment and maintenance, component manufacturing, repairs and services, and Rail Operations. Our company guarantees the seamless operation of railway infrastructure and rolling stock assets.

We are committed to excellence and we strive to meet and exceed industry expectations, positioning ourselves as the leading rail partner in Africa.

•	Railway Track Infrastructure: We own a majority stake in voestalpine VAE SA (Pty) Ltd, manufacturing and supplying permanent way (per way) materials, including rails, turnouts, steel sleepers and signalling equipment. Our two state-of-the-art facilities set industry benchmarks.  

•	Rolling Stock Services: We provide comprehensive overhaul and refurbishment services for locomotives, wagons and coaches, providing both scheduled and unscheduled maintenance services. Our services encompass the refurbishment, rebuilding, and maintenance of rolling stock including electric and diesel locomotives and wagons, alongside various rolling stock components.

•	Wheel Repairs and Maintenance: Our advanced CNC wheel lathe and sophisticated maintenance equipment supports precise wheel repair and reliability across all locomotive, coach, and wagon fleets.

•	Component Manufacture and Repairs: We supply essential spares, source and upgrade components, and provide expert repairs for locomotive parts.

•	Consultancy and Engineering Services: Our consultancy and engineering services offer expert management solutions for freight and passenger rail operations.

•	Rail Operations: We drive railway project innovation through strategic private-sector partnerships, which ultimately bolster economic growth.

As an ISO 9001:2015 certified company, Mirai Rail Rolling Stock operates from a Rail Safety Regulator-approved siding in Elandsfontein, Germiston.

Name: Valsecchi Armamento Ferroviario srl
Description:
Valsecchi Armamento Ferroviario srl è l’espressione di una tradizione di famiglia che da ben quattro generazioni impiega la propria capacità tecnica e imprenditoriale per la costruzione e manutenzione delle linee ferroviarie.
STORIA
L’attività di armamento della famiglia nasce nel 1911 al servizio di FerrovieNordMilano, con denominazione IMPRESA ALFONSO DE PAOLI.
Negli anni Quaranta prosegue con l’IMPRESA VALSECCHI COMM. ETTORE, specializzata in appalti pubblici del Gruppo Ferrovie dello Stato, diviene azienda di riferimento nella trasformazione delle allora esistenti linee con rotaie di modello leggero con le innovative rotaie da 60 kg/m ancora oggi in uso.
Negli anni ’70 la ditta assume il nome IMPRESA VALSECCHI GEOM. ALBERTO passando da un’impostazione prettamente manuale ad un processo automatizzato in linea con i tempi.
Nel 1982 viene costituita l’attuale Valsecchi Armamento Ferroviario srl, con Amministratore Unico il Geom Alberto Valsecchi; l’assetto gestionale cambia nel luglio 2019 con l’inserimento definitivo della quarta generazione: Andrea e Mara Valsecchi rispettivamente Amm. Delegato e Dir. Finanziario dell’azienda nella quale il Geom Alberto mantiene la carica di Presidente del CdA.
Valsecchi Armamento Ferroviario Srl opera principalmente nel compartimento di Milano in appalti relativi a interventi di manutenzione sistematica all’armamento (MSA), manutenzione e rinnovamento tratti di binario, rinnovamenti e modifiche al Piano Regolatore Generale («PRG») di Stazioni ed alla costruzione di raddoppi/quadruplicamenti di linee ferroviarie, binari e deviatoi in linea o in scali ferroviari. Conta un organico medio di ca 130 dipendenti e un parco mezzi d’opera di ca 190 unità. 
Nel corso degli anni, acquisendo FER80 srl che si occupa di costruzioni, noleggio e trasporto conto terzi di merci e rifiuti e Nuova Ralfo srl che si occupa di manutenzione e revisione di mezzi ferroviari, Valsecchi Armamento Ferroviario ha di fatto formato il “Gruppo Valsecchi”

Name: Birmingham Rail
Description: Birmingham Rail has been a trusted partner to the railroad and industrial markets for over a century.  With more than 125 years of experience, we provide a comprehensive range of products and services, specializing in new and relay rail, track materials, crane rail, and accessories.  From our 40-acre manufacturing facility in Lipscomb, Alabama, and our distribution center in Houston, Texas, we serve customers nationwide.  Our Bessemer, Alabama location is dedicated to manufacturing high-quality switch material for distributors, contractors, and industrial clients.

Name: TENSOL RAIL SA
Description:
In addition to being a national leader in the production of railway equipment, Tensol Rail SA is a world leader in the sector from production of cog railway. 
- Tensol Rail SA was founded in 1904 as a repair shop and metalwork shop. 
- After being part of Von Roll Infratec from 1996 to 2000, Tensol Rail SA became a partner of EFSA, creating the TrackNet Holding SA group. 
- In 2005 the new production facility of Tensol Rail SA was inaugurated in Giornico. On an area of approx. 70'000 m2, formerly belonging to the Monteforno steelworks, a new and modern warehouse was built, renewing the production infrastructure with the latest generation of machinery.

Name: Rail King
Description:
Rail King | Purpose-Built Railcar Movers Backed by Over 100 Years of Manufacturing Expertise
Rail King is a dedicated railcar mover manufacturer with a long-standing reputation for performance, reliability, and durability in railcar switching operations. Every unit is engineered and built in the United States by Stewart & Stevenson, a company with more than a century of experience in heavy equipment manufacturing.

Unlike converted trucks, Rail King movers are purpose-built from the ground up to handle the unique demands of railcar movement. Our patented crab steering, dual-direction cabs, and rugged steel construction deliver the power, control, and safety industrial operators depend on every day.

Rail King railcar movers are used in a wide range of industries including manufacturing, agriculture, and logistics. We sell exclusively through a trusted network of authorized dealers across the United States, Canada, and Mexico. These dealers manage all sales, rentals, service, and parts, providing localized support to keep your operations running smoothly.

When your business depends on moving railcars efficiently and safely, Rail King delivers. Visit www.railking.net to learn more.

Name: Ma‘anshan Tianjun Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
Description:
Ma'anshan Tianjun Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was established in 2005 and has been committed to the production and research and development of railway wheels. Our company has a production area of 19,000m², 20 production managers, 120 CNC operators and 10 production support staff.
The company integrates R&D production, sales, technology,warehouse and logistics as one of the state-level High-tech enterprises.
Tianjun Machinery was approved as a national high-tech enterprise in 2021. It has passed ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001 and other quality management system certifications, and obtained IRIS (International Railway Industry Standard) AAR (American Association of Railroads certification) TSI ( EU Railway Technology Certification), and has 8 invention patents and 10 utility model patents. Our products have won the trust of customers around the world with their excellent quality and exquisite craftsmanship, and are exported to Germany, the United States, South Africa, Mexico, Turkey, and India. , Netherlands and other countries.

Name: MP Rail AB
Description:
MP Rail AB är ett bolag som utgår från höglandet i södra Sverige. 
Vars ambition är att vara en stabil leverantör med en kontraktleverans präglad av säkerhet, robusthet och tillförlitlighet.
MP Rail AB inriktning är resursuthyrning till drift och underhåll av järnväg likaså investerings-/nybyggnationsprojekt inom järnväg. 
MP Rail´s arbetssätt grundar sig på framåtanda, tillit, ansvar och frihet.
MP Rail AB erbjuder resurser som arbetsledning, besiktningsmän, ibruktagningsledare, tsm, htsm, TSA.

Inom mark och anläggning kan vi erbjuda lastbilar, bandmaskiner, dumpers, hjulmaskiner, trailer, hjullastare, anläggare och plattsättare.

Name: voestalpine Signaling Siershahn GmbH
Description:
voestalpine Signaling Siershahn GmbH is a a subsidiary from voestalpine Railway Systems, the global leader for railway infrastructure system solutions. Founded as SST Signal & System Technik in Germany in 1997, voestalpine Signaling Siershahn is a specialist in railway diagnostic and monitoring technologies. Our innovative checkpoint solution allows smart rolling stock monitoring, customized to individual requirements. Based on an interconnected structure of of the zentrak Modular Diagnostic System hardware and the zentrak Central Monitoring Software, we have developed a world leading monitoring suite for intelligent maintenance.

With branch offices in the Netherlands and Australia we are a reliable partner for customers all over the world. Our customers include a variety of users: train operating companies, freight operating companies, metro operators, rolling stock maintainers, mining companies, rail infrastructure managers and maintainers.

Name: Vossloh Cogifer Kloos BV
Description:
Hoogwaardige techniek op het juiste spoor
 
Vossloh Cogifer Kloos is toonaangevend in het ontwikkelen, produceren en leveren van wissels en andere bovenbouwmaterialen voor trein, tram, metro en industrie. Vanuit ons moderne, 21.000 m2 grote bedrijf in Nieuw-Lekkerland helpen wij onze afnemers in binnen- en buitenland op het juiste spoor met hoogwaardige techniek en duurzame oplossingen. Of het nu gaat om standaardproducten of maatwerk; uw specifieke wensen, problemen en eisen liggen aan de basis van al onze werkzaamheden.

 

Een sterke internationale speler

Vossloh Cogifer Kloos is het resultaat van meer dan anderhalve eeuw ontwikkeling, uitbreiding, fusies en overnames. Inmiddels gelden wij als een sterke internationale speler in onze markt. Niet in de laatste plaats omdat wij sinds 2008 onderdeel uitmaken van het Franse Vossloh Cogifer S.A., dat op haar beurt weer deel uitmaakt van het Duitse Vossloh AG. Zo kunt u bij ons dus rekenen op internationale kennis en ervaring op het gebied van spoorinfrastructuur en spoortechniek.

Name: ADTS
Description:
At ADTS, we specialize in the development of comprehensive diagnostic solutions for the automotive sector, with a strong focus on the railway industry.
All our systems are fully customized to meet the specific needs of each client.
We go beyond simple measurement — we deliver complete diagnostic intelligence, sharing our know-how and providing full support throughout the entire product lifecycle.

Name: Rolling Stock Solutions
Description:
Rolling Stock Solutions is a new leasing platform focused exclusively on delivering proven, like-new locomotive power to U.S.commuter rail agencies facing challenges to replace and improve an aging locomotive fleet.

The company was created to help commuter rail agencies meet an urgent service delivery challenge – replacing end-of-life diesel-electric locomotives with new capacity which is cleaner and more reliable than the aging locomotives in their fleet.

RSS will deliver locomotive power to commuter rail agencies from a fleet of proven-model locomotives which are completely rebuilt to a like-new condition under standard industry specifications. The initial RSS fleet will include fully overhauled F40PH locomotives.

Our locomotives will be cleaner (less NOx, hydrocarbon, and PM10 emissions), quieter, and more reliable than most of the commuter rail locomotives in service today – and, because they are standard specification, RSS locomotives can seamlessly integrate agencies’ existing fleet operations and maintenance programs.  The electronics package on RSS locomotives is fully rebuilt to enable the installation and integration of an agency’s positive train control (PTC) system.

RSS will provide rail agencies with locomotive power solutions under duration-flexible lease alternatives, giving them – in essence – immediate power on demand to address their most urgent fleeting requirements.  RSS locomotives will be 100% Buy America compliant, and RSS locomotive lease contracts will be eligible for FTA capital investment funding.

Name: AMETSIS - Brake Systems Adapted to the Train
Description:
AMETSIS provides solutions for railway brake systems adapted to the particular conditions anywhere in the world. Engineering, manufacturing, commissioning and maintenance of braking systems, providing always the highest quality based on the experience and professionalism of our great team.

AMETSIS was founded in 2004 to meet the needs of both rolling stock manufacturers and their end-users which are not covered by the existing braking systems companies.
 
Our added value is the flexibility and adaptability to the specific needs of each customer, focusing our final target in QUALITY, LEAD TIME & SALE PRICE, at a time when worldwide rail transport of people and goods is expanding.

www.ametsis.com

Name: Rail Mechatronics Pvt Ltd
Description: Rail Mechatronics is a sales channel partner, contractor and system integrator in Rail Signaling and Telecommunication technologies like interlocking, train detection, Automatic Train Protection system (ATP), Train Management system (TMS), Centralized Traffic Control system (CTC) and Electric drive train system.

Name: Tryaksh Innovations Private Limited
Description:
Revolutionizing Railway Maintenance with Tryaksh Innovations

At Tryaksh Innovations, we’ve developed the Digital Rolling Track Gauge (DRTG), a groundbreaking tool designed to improve railway safety and efficiency. The DRTG provides real-time, accurate measurements for track and train health, enabling data-driven decisions that optimize maintenance schedules and reduce downtime.
With its wireless transmission, smart interface, and instant reporting, the DRTG is reshaping how operators manage track safety. After months of rigorous testing, we’ve built a product that not only meets the highest industry standards but also enhances safety, preventing accidents and saving lives.

We’re on a mission to transform railway maintenance with innovation, precision, and efficiency. Join us in building a safer, smarter future for railways.

Name: Safelines bv
Description:
Safelines BV is een door railAlert gecertificeerd werkplekbeveiligingsbedrijf, dat opereert op het gebied van spoorwegveiligheid en advies voor bedrijven die in de spoorbranche werkzaam zijn.

Wij kunnen uw werkplek niet alleen beveiligen maar u ook de noodzakelijke ondersteuning bieden in de complete voorbereiding en uitvoering van uw werkzaamheden aan het spoor. Zowel in de voorbereiding als in de uitvoering van het werk zorgt Safelines ervoor dat alles op een juiste en uiteraard veilige manier uitgevoerd wordt. De afdeling Projectsupport beschikt hiervoor over mensen met jarenlange ervaring in de railinfra.

Bij Safelines staat veiligheid, gezondheid en zorg voor ons milieu hoog in het vaandel. Uiteraard gaat dit gepaard met een goede, transparante en flexibele opstelling naar onze opdrachtgevers. Dit uit zich in het feit dat maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen een onderdeel is van onze dagelijkse bedrijfsvoering.

Name: Smartwagons
Description: As soluções existentes no mercado para o transporte ferroviário de mercadorias são na maior parte dos casos soluções já com várias dezenas de anos, com um reduzido nível de incorporação de conhecimento e novas tecnologias. Deste modo, a possibilidade de produção nacional de um produto diferenciador para o transporte de mercadorias, com alta incorporação tecnologia, repensando os materiais e respetivos processos de fabrico, visando a sua maior sustentabilidade, consubstancia a ideia disruptiva da Agenda SMART WAGONS. Esta iniciativa, estruturante para a economia portuguesa, visa modernizar e simplificar as operações de transporte de mercadorias, aumentar a fiabilidade dos ativos, reduzindo custos de operação através da monitorização em tempo real dos movimentos de mercadorias e permitindo filosofias de manutenção preditiva. As iniciativas a promover permitirão criar as bases necessárias para a produção e comercialização de smart wagons para a indústria do transporte ferroviário de mercadorias.

Name: RailCom AS
Description:
RailCom AS er et privat entreprenørselskap med fokus på nybygging og vedlikehold av jernbane, trikk, t-bane og telekommunikasjon. RailCom har som målsetning å levere prosjekter av høy kvalitet, til meget godt fornøyde kunder. Bedriften ble stiftet i 2009 og leverte i 2024 en omsetning på ca. 300 millioner kroner. Selskapet sysselsetter i dag ca. 100 ansatte og er også sertifisert lærebedrift. Hovedkontoret er lokalisert i Lillestrøm, mens prosjektene hovedsakelig finner sted i Østlandsområdet.

Selskapet har høyt kompetente ansatte, hvorav mange med lang erfaring innad i bransjen. Det er sterkt fokus på det faglige og sosiale miljøet og å ivareta en godt kvalitetssikret HMS-politikk.

Name: Superior Sales & Service
Description:
At Superior Sales, we engineer and manufacture custom MOW railroad equipment and supply tools that support Class 1 railroads. We provide the best quality equipment and tools at competitive prices. Our core values of integrity, teamwork, trust, and customer commitment guide us in creating a family-friendly work environment and delivering outstanding customer service.

We manufacture custom Maintenance of Way equipment for the BNSF, Union  Pacific, CSX, Norfolk Southern, MARTA, Kansas City Southern and the  Canadian Pacific.  Some of our manufactured work equipment includes; mag cranes, profile grinder,  tie marking machines, pushcarts, toilet carts, concrete clip carts, war wagons, hydraulic tool carts, hydraulic personnel carriers, tow bars, hitch pins and much more.  

We  carry almost every accessory and tool you may need for the railroad,  including the Master 35/40 gasoline impact wrench, Husqvarna K1270,  Racine gasoline rail saw, Hougen gasoline and hydraulic rail drill, and a  complete line of hydraulic tools.

Please contact us for all your custom railroad equipment and tool needs.

Name: FS GROUP
Description:
Le groupe FS est une communauté, une famille composée de 5 entreprises « unis, uniques et utiles ».

Unis par une mission et une ambition commune ; « Ensemble, concevoir et produire en sécurité pour garantir des infrastructures ferroviaires sûres et performantes au service des Hommes ».

Ce qui nous rend uniques, c’est justement d’être unis par la complémentarité de nos compétences, c’est notre indépendance et c’est l’esprit d’initiative laissé aux équipes pour remplir la mission et atteindre les objectifs.

Aussi, ce qui nous unis, c’est la fierté d’être utile parce que nous sommes au service d’un projet de société ; celui d’une mobilité plus propre, plus performante, plus sûre et au service des Hommes.

Name: Armee de Terre - France

Name: Tokyu Corporation
Description: The Tokyu Corporation (東急株式会社, Tōkyū kabushiki gaisha, a contraction of and formerly Tōkyō Kyūkō Dentetsu kabushiki gaisha (東京急行電鉄株式会社, "Tokyo Express Electric Railway Share Company") until 2 September 2019) is a Japanese multinational keiretsu (conglomerate) holding company headquareted in Shibuya, Tokyo. Aarsleff Rail

Name: VIAS CANADA inc.
Description:
VIAS CANADA is a VIAS Y CONSTRUCCIONES subsidiary in Canada.
It was incorporated on the 28 July 2011. 

VIAS is born on the 14 January 1928 as a company exclusively devoted to the railway industry, one of the first in Spain. It is now a company within the ACS Group and is one of the leading construction companies in Spain by turnover and profitability. Within the Service Industry, the VIAS Group executes important contracts in the fields of installation, corporate image and transportation.

In July 2011, VIAS, in association with Dragados and Flatiron, was contracted as a qualified, experienced and innovative railway contractor for Phase I of the Mary River Project, in Baffin (Nunavut).

The Project consisted of the development of the concept, preliminary design, construction design, planning and cost estimate of a 150 km railway line between the mine and the port.
In August 2012, VIAS was pre-qualified by Metrolinx as railway contractor for Major Projects in the Metrolinx public domain. A year later, in 2013, this qualification was extended for minor and intermediate projects.
From the very beginning, VIAS has actively participated in bids and tendering processes for, among others, METROLINX, the Waterloo Region, VIA RAIL, CN and CP.

VIAS is focused on those railway projects being developed within the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario and other provinces of Canada

Name: BR Railparts Comercio de Materiais Ferroviários LTDA
Description: Our company is focused on  sales of products applied in the construction and maintenance of railways: steel rails,  tie plates, screw spikes, elastic clips, joint bars,  bolts, nuts ,  washers,  welding sets and  turn-outs.Since 2004, we’ve been supplying railway products to Brazilian and South American construction companies and railways. We act as  trading company,  importing and exporting,  and  also as  a representative (or agent  company), depending on the line of products or the client´s needs.

Name: Metal Locking Service Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1942, the focus of MLS has always been in providing the best cast iron repairs in the world.  Our pioneering effort in the development of metal locking has led to world-wide recognition and our current customer list exceeds 2,000 companies.  With service completed on 6 of 7 continents, it’s a safe bet that we will be there when you need us:   On-site, On-time, Anytime

A specific core compentancy lies in our repair of Locomotive Engines.  O.E.M. approved repairs include the following:

- Crosshead Guides (standard, high-style and top-deck)
- Crankcase Windows (standard and extended)
- Side Walls
- Pan Rails
- Interior Walls and Ribs
- Lube Oil Headers
- Cam Bores
- Power Assembly Seal Bores (upper and lower)
- Mounting Feet & Generator Horns

We supplement our cast iron repair and in-house machining efforts with on-site and in-situ machining and inspection. 20 years of focused effort and equipment acquisition has increased our market share to the point that we are a top-5 national supplier of services.  We utilize our FARO Laser Tracker ION for verification of condition pre and post machining and/or repair.

Name: Hanjes d.o.o.
Description:
HANJES - Vaš učinkovit partner za komponente u željezničkoj konstrukciji i izradu proizvoda po mjeri za industriju. 
Mi smo uslužno puduzeće koje od 1992. proizvodi sofisticirane komponente za proizvodnju vozila, izradu aparata i izgradnju postrojenja, od prototipa do serijske proizvodnje.
 Većina naših proizvoda pripada industriji željezničkih vozila.
Raduje nas  što možemo pomoći podržati prijenos mobilnosti  robnog prometa  na željezničcu.

HANJES kombinira kvalitet, znanje, najnovije metode proizvodnje, fleksibilnost i ravnu hijerarhiju s inovativnim idejama.

Naša tvrtka certificirana je prema sustavu upravljanja kvalitetom ISO 9001, zahtjevima zavarivanja prema ISO 3834-2, za zavarivanje šinskih vozila i dijelova vozila prema DIN-EN 158085-2 i prema DIN 6701-2 o lijepljenju šinskih vozila i 
dijelova vozila.

Austrijski ured na jugu Beča primarno se bavi strateškim upravljanjem grupa poduzeća, kao i područjima nabave, upravljanja narudžbama, prodajom i tehnikom.

Proizvodnja naših proizvoda, te tehnička priprema i izgradnja smješteni su u Hrvatskoj, u blizini Varaždina.

Najvažniji izvori našeg rada su naši zaposlenici. Podsticanje, motivacija i obuka jačaju kvalitetnu svijest, kompetentnost i timski duh naših zaposlenika i kolega.

Ulaganja u moderne proizvodne metode osiguravaju neprekidno visoki standard naših proizvoda. Politika kvalitete sastavni je dio našeg sustava upravljanja kvalitetom i, zajedno s priručnikom za upravljanje kvalitetom, obvezujuća je za upravljanje tvrtkom i sve zaposlenike.

Name: Aldridge Railway Signals Pty Ltd
Description:
Over the years, our team has accumulated a wealth of knowledge across every aspect of the Railway Signalling business.This includes; Shunting, Mainline, Branchline, Turnout and Railway Crossing Signals. Suburban, Rural and Freight Systems.In addition to designing and manufacturing our own proprietary product on-site, we are also fully versed in the operation and maintenance of both existing control systems.All backed up by full Engineering Support (Electrical, electronic, mechanical, optical and photometric) Production Support (Electrical, electronic, injection moulding – plastic and aluminium, non ferrous die-casting, sheet metal, fabrication and assembly) as well as complete Turnkey Solutions for even the most complex of projects.Today and due in no small part to the diligence and commitment of our team, we are not just supplying the Australian market, but also Bangladesh, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, New Zealand, Singapore, Sri Lanka, Taiwan and Thailand.Frankly, if it’s signal related, it’s this kind of overall knowledge that gives us the power to make the magic happen.
A large part of what we are about at Aldridge revolves around our ability to meet any challenge head on.
And as anyone who has worked with us will tell you, it’s an area in which we have yet to fail.
Be it supplying major signalling project in Malaysia or a one off Shunting Signal for a remote Outback location.

Our extensive experience with both existing control systems and the fact that we manufacture on site, means there isn’t a single component we can’t quickly replicate and integrate into any system, right down to the oldest component.
And in an industry where time and precision are of the essence, we are proud to be the ‘go to guys’ for the quick, meticulous fixes our current clients have come to depend on.
It’s just how we roll.

Name: Innovative Parts & Solutions Ltd.
Description:
Our Mission: The IPS team is dedicated to quality and service, manufacturing an extensive range of parts and designing innovative solutions for rail and industry to increase our customers’ productivity and safety.

Our Commitment: We employ a comprehensive inspection process to ensure that our products meet or exceed exacting specifications. For example, every IPS rail tong is tested at each stage of the production process and undergoes an initial visual inspection, a magnetic particle test, a load pull test, and a further magnetic particle test by an independent testing company. We also perform periodic ultimate destructive tests which are reviewed to maintain product consistency. As part of this process, each tong is stamped with a serial number to ensure future traceability.

At Innovative Parts and Solutions every day is an opportunity for us to tackle new engineering challenges, to design, to innovate, and to impress our customers with quality and responsive service.

From the tools our company designs to lay and maintain track to the parts that keep locomotives and freight cars operating, IPS is here to help you get the job done.

At IPS the scope of work includes servicing equipment for track maintenance and replacement parts for freight and passenger cars and diesel locomotives. We specialize in rebuilds and repairs. Our team has the expertise needed to help you solve engineering challenges quickly and to deliver the tools and parts needed to keep you on track. Customers openly share their feedback on how impressed they are with our speed, quality and design – all at a competitive price.

dagli studi iniziali di fattibilità, alla progettazione, alla

a seguire le varie fasi di produzione presso l’officina. Siamo in
grado di effettuare processi di “reverse engineering”
realizzando l’ottimizzazione e l’implementazione definitive del
progetto partendo da quanto presente in officina.

Name: Reloc S.A. Craiova Company
Description:
RELOC  - ELECTROPUTERE VFU Craiova is  the largest company in Romania and Central and South Eastern Europe specialised in the production, development and repairs for diesel and electric locomotives.

With a history spanning over 50 years, the brand  RELOC- ELECTROPUTERE VFU has developed into international recognition for quality and reliable locomotives that operate in all parts of the word.

RELOC  means highly skilled jobs, production, design, construction and reconstruction, research, as well as developing new technological concepts for the railroad industry. 

RELOC hosts a R&D Centre  for railway traction, which will further develop the features of the well known ELECTROPUTERE locomotives, while also bringing new and innovative products and concepts.

Our mission is to “keep locomotives on tracks” and thus to facilitate the development of rail transportation. 

RELOC - Electroputere VFU translates into more than 6000 designed, built, rebuilt, repaired or modernized locomotives, subways, trams and over 20 design patterns for creating innovative locomotives, trams or subways.

Tutto questo grazie al supporto di un team esperto, dinamico e affidabile, alla disponibilità di una sede che garantisce capacità operative e logistiche ottimali e ad un ampio e variegato parco macchine. Soceb è in grado di offrire un ampio pacchetto di servizi nei settori ferroviario ed impiantistico grazie alla pluriennale esperienza maturata con clienti pubblici e privati sul territorio nazionale.

Tranz Global supplies high quality GE, EMD, and ALCO parts from OEMs and Class One Railway approved manufacturers, which are also AAR certified.
Your locomotive is only as reliable as the parts you put in them, and those parts are only as reliable as the company that stands behind them. We offer a complete line of services to meet the needs of the export market, and we can source over 200,000 from regular consumption up to hard-to-find locomotive parts.
Following this honorable history, we added some other line of products to our portfolio:
Springs for railcars.
Parts for the industrial mining truck industry as well as Belliss & Morcom and Gardner Denver PET compressor valves.
Bearings for the steel industry including Steel Mill Cylindrical Roller bearings, the big angular contact, TQO (4 row taper roller bearings units), the screw down Mechanism, Support rollers, bearings for crankshafts in cold pilger rolling mills (Split). For this line, your industry does not need to care about inventory. We manage a large amount of inventory, being able to provide short time delivery to our customers.
Your enquiries or requests for quotes are always welcome through email: admin@tranzglobal.com.

WINDHOFF IN SINGAPORE

Name: ITE ISOLANTI INDUSTRIES SRL
Description:
Produciamo sistemi di isolamento termoacustico per il comfort e la sicurezza.
Con l’ausilio di sofisticati sistemi automatizzati siamo in grado di produrre manufatti tagliati su misura a controllo numero, di forma semplice o complessa, costituiti da uno o più strati di materiali differenti accoppiati tra loro e con una o più superfici rivestite con tessuti di varia natura, con alluminio o semplicemente adesive in modo da facilitarne l’installazione in opera.
Il nostro team tecnico è a disposizione per ascoltare le Vs. esigenze e proporre le soluzioni più adatte al fine di raggiungere il miglior rapporto prezzo/prestazioni. Offriamo una vasta gamma di soluzioni personalizzate, ottimizzate sulle singole esigenze, sia per piccole che per grandi serie.
La ITE Isolanti si avvale di un software avanzato di disegnatura e modellazione 3D mediante il quale poter effettuare studi di progettazione, sia che si tratti di implementare progetti esistenti o di elaborarne di nuovi, mettiamo a disposizione il nostro know how, la nostra esperienza e professionalità. Siamo quindi in grado di sviluppare dei prototipi, di realizzare delle campionature e di effettuare dei test funzionali.
Mettiamo a disposizione la ns. squadra di operatori specializzati per rilevare le misure che saranno poi utilizzate da noi per la realizzazione del disegno con l’ausilio del ns. software avanzato di disegnatura 2D e modellazione 3D in modo da ridurre al minimo il rischio d’errore, soprattutto quando le specifiche di disegno sono assenti, poco comprensibili oppure quando hanno un indice di revisione troppo datato.
Grazie alla collaborazione con Laboratori di prova certificati Accredia (L’ente Italiano di Accreditamento) e riconosciuti dal Ministero dei Trasporti quali il LAPI e l’Istituto Giordano, la ITE Isolanti offre la possibilità di certificare e validare il prodotto o compound al fine di soddisfare i requisiti richiesti dal cliente finale.

Name: DALIAN CRRC CONTAINER CO.,LTD
Description:
Dalian CRRC Container Co,. Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as Dalian CRRC) affiliated with CRRC Qiqihar Rolling Stock Co,. Ltd. -the leading company in railway freight equipment under CRRC Corporation Limited (CRRC). The main business of Dalian CRRC includes R&D, manufacturing, sales, leasing, maintenance of containers and containerized equipment. 
Dalian CRRC locates in Dalian Lvshun Economic Zone, Liaoning province of China, which covers an area of 296,000㎡. It has two manufacturing bases of tank container and dry bulk container, with annual production capacity of newly built tank containers and dry bulk containers 10,000 units respectively. 
Dalian CRRC had passed Quality, Environment, Occupational Health Safety Management Certification and National Safety Quality Standardization Certification. It gained the recognition of  Competent Manufacturer from CSQA and LR, and the design and manufacture qualification for pressure vessels from AQSIQ and ASME.
Dalian CRRC has a professional R&D team with 200 designers, includes 108 designers with Doctors and Master Degree titles, 52 professor level Senior Engineers, 85 Senior Engineers, 5 Auditors for C3 movable pressure vessels in China, 2 CRRC Scientist, and 16 designers enjoy the government subsidy of the state council. Dalian CRRC is oriented by the market and customer requirement, considers the special container R&D as the core, focuses on providing customers with personalized containerized equipment. The product design adopts CREO 3d design software, supplemented by Hypermash and Ansys software for finite element simulation analysis. Dalian CRRC uses the container special test bed, impact test line and fatigue test bed for test verification to ensure the reliability of the product structure. 
So far, Dalian CRRC has independently developed more than 90 kinds of container products, covering various types of containers, such as tank containers, dry bulk containers, thermal containers, frame containers, offshore containers

De kernactiviteiten van Heatpoint zijn het leveren en installeren van wisselverwarmingssystemen en het leveren van kunststof kabelgoten. 

Wisselverwarming, in verschillende technische uitvoeringen, houdt spoorwissels sneeuw- en ijsvrij en is uitgerust met een intelligent besturings- en monitoringssysteem. Name: DTEC GmbH
Description:
DTEC GmbH offers you turn-key solutions for railway wheelsets flaw detection and train condition monitoring. Based on advanced ultrasonic testing and machine vision technologies, we provide various products for railway safety at wayside, maintenance and manufacture workshop.
Flaws and cracks in wheel and axle could be detected with our wheelset ultrasonic testing systems in workshop. Wheel profile could be measured by our optical system and wheel tread surface condition could be monitored by our camera system at wayside. More than that, our advanced detection and measurement knowledge together with automation and artificial intelligence technologies makes condition-based maintenance possible.

DTEC GmbH always stays at your side for a safer and smarter railway!

 Tver Carriage Works 


Tver

Established in 1898.

Tver Carriage Works (TVZ) is the principal developer and producer of locomotive-hauled main line passenger cars in Russia: compartment passenger cars with couchettes or seats, coaches and open-plan cars, various types of freight cars, and special-purpose rail cars.

In 2007, the Tver Carriage Works manufactured and sold:

922 various passenger rail cars, 
7,344 freight wheel sets.

rail cars, models 61-4170, 61-4188, and 61-4189 for the high-speed Nevsky Express train; 
bogies of bolsterless type, models 61-4095 and 61-4096, for speeds of up to 160 km/hr.
The enterprise employs approximately 9,600 people.

Wir bieten Ihnen Präzision, Flexibilität und Prozesssicherheit – von der Einzelanfertigung bis zur Serienproduktion. Name: RailTech SA
Description:
Fortes d’une collaboration fructueuse, à l’acquisition d’une nouvelle génération de véhicules ferroviaires, entre 2013 et 2015, les entreprises vaudoises de chemin de fer Lausanne-Echallens-Bercher SA (LEB), Transports de la région Morges – Bière – Cossonay SA (MBC), Transports Montreux – Vevey – Riviera SA (MVR), Compagnie du Chemin de fer Montreux-Oberland bernois SA (MOB), Compagnie du chemin de fer Nyon – St-Cergue – Morez SA (NStCM), Transports Vallée-de-Joux – Yverdon-les-Bains – Sainte-Croix SA (TRAVYS), les Transports publics du Chablais SA (TPC) et les transports publics fribourgeois Holding SA (TPF) ont recherché de nouvelles perspectives de coopération dans le cadre de leurs activités.

La maintenance et l’entretien des bogies étant une compétence présente au sein des entreprises MOB/MVR, TPF et TPC une mise en commun de ce savoir-faire est apparue comme essentielle et s’inscrit dans cette volonté de collaboration.

Sur la base de ces constats et après analyse des enjeux, les entreprises LEB, MBC, MOB, MVR, NStCM, TPF, TRAVYS, TPC et TL (Transports publics de la région lausannoise SA) ont conclu que le maintien de l’indépendance vis-à-vis de l’industrie et le maintien des compétences au sein des compagnies passaient par la création d’un consortium en Suisse romande, doté d’une infrastructure ad hoc, permettant un entretien des bogies à des coûts concurrentiels, sous la forme d’un site unique de maintenance.

Name: Hot Switch Heating Systems
Description:
At Hot Switch Heating Systems, we partner with railroads of all sizes—Class I, short lines, and metro transit agencies—to transform their winter operations. Our induction-based switch heating targets the rail from within, drastically cutting energy usage and minimizing switch failures in icy conditions.

Here’s what makes us different:

Induction Innovation: We apply electromagnetic fields to heat rails internally, delivering more efficient, uniform warmth compared to outdated systems.

Modular Reliability: Each induction head operates independently, so if one component needs service, the rest keep heating. That means less downtime and more consistent winter performance.

Energy Savings: Operators regularly report up to 60% lower power consumption compared to traditional heaters—helping meet both budget and sustainability goals.

Dedicated Support: From pre-installation planning to post-launch maintenance, our team ensures you have a smooth, reliable experience every step of the way.

Our mission is simple: Keep trains moving through the harshest winters by providing a smarter, more efficient approach to switch heating. If you’d like to explore how induction heating can elevate your railroad’s winter readiness, reach out or visit our website for more information.

Contact us today to learn how we can help your network save costs, reduce downtime, and enhance safety—no matter how cold it gets!
