Name: Locologix
Description:
About
Locologix (“LLX”) offers rolling stock solutions to the rail industry across Africa. 
We leverage our customer-centric passion, and the Gear Rail group footprint of existing regional offices and resources, to provide our customers with world-leading EMD locomotive solutions and OEM-parts from Progress Rail, backed up by LLX’s inhouse technical and maintenance services.

LLX was founded in 2022 as a venture between Gear Africa (Mauritius) and ITSRAIL (Canada). The company’s objective is to increase the regional availability of high-quality rolling stock for Africa’s railway renaissance.

In 2024, Progress Rail South Africa (“PRSA”) closed their SA office and appointed LLX as a regional partner. LLX took on the dynamic PRSA staff, enhancing our highly knowledgeable, experienced, and skilled team of EMD locomotive specialists.

Parts and Inventory Management
We supply EMD OEM parts to fleet owners, assisting with parts planning to reduce lead times and improve parts availability. Long-term Spare Parts Agreements (LTPA) and OEM-standard maintenance, including onsite warehousing, enhance locomotive performance and fleet availability.

Why EMD locomotives?
EMD has a long and successful history of supplying diesel-electric locomotives to railways in Africa and continues to provide technology advancement including emissions compliance, leading fuel efficiency, reliability and maintainability. EMD locomotives are extremely well suited for SADC freight rail operations, having: 
•	Correct gauge
•	Correct weight (tonne/axle)
•	Suitable horsepower

We advocate our “Rebuilt as New” Repower and Modernisation solutions, which optimise capital deployment, saving 35-50% of the replacement cost of a new locomotive, while extending asset-life by 20 years or more.

At LLX, we are dedicated to ensuring Africa’s rail renaissance and growing the EMD brand and market share on the continent.

Graham-White is the global technology leader in the drying of compressed air for locomotives and rail transit vehicles. Such as, the Classes 10E1, 15E, 19E, 43D, 44D and 45D. The units on the Class 44D and 45D locomotive were assembled by Vanrail at our Centurion factory and a large number of their internal machined parts were produced at our Montagu factory.

Name: DSRailTech
Description:
Innovative tech company located in Czech Republic with operations since 2015
Team of 14 highly skilled and experienced professionals.
Specializes in delivering diagnostics and safety systems to the railway industry with a huge scalability potential.

DSRT solutions bring more reliable results compared to existing solutions as well as a broader range of metrics and rail coverage with a single system.

DSRT SOLUTION - disruptive deep-tech safety and diagnostics system helping railway operators  and infrastructure owners to monitor train movement and detect precursors present or developing in the tracks increasing railway safety.
Rolling stock: location detection (segment or installation point), arrival time, rolling stock basic and advanced statistics (number of rolling stock, direction, speed, type, number of axles, wagons), support for atypical rolling stock movements.
Flat wheels: detection of flat wheels and severity identification, location
Rails health: rail separation alarm, estimated location of separation or crack, severity of crack, time until full separation.
Track obstruction: alarm including severity, distance estimation of the event, cause of obstruction.
Axles: derailment alarm, rolling stock basic and advanced statistics, severity.

Name: MIPIRAIL
Description:
Le cluster Mipirail regroupe les entreprises de la filière ferroviaire en Occitanie. Il favorise le développement et la visibilité de cette filière au niveau local, national et international.
Mipirail a fait le choix de la spécialisation sur 4 thématiques techniques :
    gestion de l’énergie embarquée,
    gestion de l’énergie au sol,
    services aux usagers,
    systèmes connectés,
ainsi que sur 3 compétences métiers :
    rénovation,
    fabrication industrielle,
    ingénierie.

A l’échelle régionale, Mipirail est à la fois vitrine du savoir-faire de ses adhérents, pôle d’attractivité dans ses domaines de compétences et acteur engagé dans l'interclustering « Transport Terrestre Intelligent » avec ses partenaires : Automotech, Primus et Robotics Place.
Au niveau national et international, Mipirail coordonne ses actions en complémentarité avec les trois autres clusters français du ferroviaire (l’Association des Industriels Ferroviaires, Mecateam cluster et Neopolia). Depuis 2013, les quatre clusters du ferroviaire ont initié une démarche d’interclustering baptisée Railway Business Clusters, réseau animé par la Fédération des Industries Ferroviaires.

Orienté business, Mipirail est une caisse de résonance pour ses membres à qui il offre une large visibilité en France et à l’international sur les sujets porteurs du ferroviaire.

    Dans une période où l’accélération de l’évolution des usages, l’environnement et la sécurité sont des valeurs essentielles pour les citoyens, où la circulation urbaine est saturée et la fréquentation du transport ferroviaire en continuelle croissance, notre filière est un acteur incontournable des Transports Terrestres Intelligents de demain.
    L’activité régionale de la région Occitanie, reconnue pour ses compétences dans les systèmes embarqués et pour son pôle de compétitivité AEROSPACE Valley, dispose aussi d’une forte activité industrielle dans le secteur ferroviaire. Ainsi, l’offre du cluster repose sur les compétences de ses membres autour de la gestion de l’énergie, des services aux usagers et des systèmes connectés.
    Le développement de la filière ferroviaire régionale, raison d’être du cluster, passe par la visibilité de ses membres, sa capacité d’innovation et de vente sur le territoire national et international.
    L’ancrage local favorise la dynamique collective et valorise les savoirs faire inter-filières au sein des projets structurants et démonstrateurs régionaux, la gare et l’aéroport du futur, la smart city, …
    Le cluster permet de lier l’innovation des entreprises à la connaissance collective des besoins du marché, et aux opportunités de partenariat.
    Enfin la présence des clusters nationaux dans de nombreuses manifestations internationales et la dynamique d’export et d’implantation internationale de nos entreprises sont des atouts pour réussir le développement hors de nos frontières.
    Dans ce contexte, la dynamique collective des entreprises au sein de clusters comme MIPIRAIL est indispensable pour faire face aux enjeux issus des bouleversements des nouveaux usages des citoyens et participer ainsi à construire un bel avenir de notre industrie !

Name: CROSSING SAFETY
Description:
Welcome to CROSSING SAFETY AB on LinkedIn!

At CROSSING SAFETY, we are committed to assuming global social responsibility by saving lives through our innovative safety solution designed for unprotected level crossings. Our groundbreaking innovation significantly enhances road safety and accessibility by alerting drivers and pedestrians about approaching trains. What sets our solution apart is not only it's efficiency but also it's affordability and independence from existing rail systems.

Key Features:

Improved Safety: Our system acts as a proactive warning, ensuring that both drivers and pedestrians are informed about approaching trains, thereby minimizing the risk of accidents at unprotected level crossings.

Cost-Effectiveness: CROSSING SAFETY offers a cost-effective alternative, reducing installation costs while maximizing safety measures.

Independence: Our solution operates independently of existing infrastructure systems, providing a seamless integration process.

Data-Driven Decision-Making: We provide a digital, climate-smart solution that generates valuable data for informed decision-making, precise follow-up, and rapid status acquisition. Crossing Safety's aim is to save lives.

Impact beyond safety:

Our primary goal is to prevent accidents at unprotected level crossings, creating a safer environment for pedestrians or road users. Additionally, our solution leads to significant cost savings for insurance companies by minimizing personal injuries, train damage and vehicle damage. Furthermore, it promotes a safer and more efficient work environment for employees in these areas.

Join us in our mission to revolutionize the safety of unprotected level crossings worldwide. Together, let's make the world safer, one intersection at a time.

Get in touch with us to learn more about our groundbreaking solution and how we are reshaping the future of rail safety.
E-mail: ir@crossingsafety.com

Description:

Emergency Response Vehicles (ERV’s) designed and manufactured by emergency responders and staff at DCL were deployed following the tragic events of 7th July 2005. They were deployed in both the response and recovery phases.

The 7/7 Review published: ‘The trolleys provided by the RART project for travelling along tube lines, worked extremely well at Russell Sq. Intended for single journeys, the trolleys were used to ferry staff and equipment for 39 consecutive hours, covering a distance of around 280 miles.’   

The ERV has been superseded by a more versatile, technologically advanced and flexible platform, which can be tailored to meet the changing needs of emergency service and industry responders. 

Please contact us at enquiries@consillia.com should you require further information about our service, or products.

Nossa visão é o resgate da malha ferroviária, que hoje se encontra insuficiente equiparado a sua total capacidade e baixo risco. A SUL FERROVIA garante aos seus clientes e colaboradores a excelência, qualidade e dedicação no exercício das suas funções dentro dos trabalhos em que realiza, certificados pela experiência de 40 anos de serviços e três gerações de ferroviários, realizando trabalhos zelando a malha ferroviária, além de periódica integração, qualificação e capacitação de toda equipe de funcionários, obtendo o melhor quadro de profissionais, para de tal forma, prestar objetivamente os serviços necessários para a garantia o desenvolvimento do setor ferroviário. A SUL FERROVIA trás no nome a alegria constante na realização do seu trabalho, motivo pelo qual a qualidade e excelência no atendimento e serviços prestados aos seus colaboradores e clientes é o reflexo daquilo que motiva quando se faz o que se sabe e se gosta, esse é o maior êxito profissional da família SUL FERROVIA.

Name: Southern Locomotives Limited
Description:
Since the inception of the Port Line Locomotive Project in 1983 and its successor, Southern Locomotives Ltd, we have restored a Barry scrapyard wreck on average every four years, along with the occasional overhaul. This has been accomplished with a very small team but a very large and loyal group of shareholders.  

We're now very proud to have run one of our locomotives on a mainline charter, the first time the locomotive had run on the national network since 1964.

Hopefully, if not already a shareholder, you will consider joining us as we still have a considerable amount of work to do, and money to raise, to fulfil our objectives.  

We have always treated our shareholders on an equal footing whether buying one share or a hundred, or whether they physically help or are armchair supporters (as most are). Everyone has the opportunity of having a drive and fire once a year and to help restore the locomotives if they wish.

If you do decide to join us you will have a real sense of Ownership and can get as involved as you like; we are not a ‘closed shop’ and we really appreciate your help.

Please do not hesitate to email us if you would like any further information.

Simon Troy
southernlocos@btinternet.com

www.southern-locomotives.co.uk

Kadee was founded on the simple principals of finding a need, and filling that need with the absolute best possible product made entirely in house. Therefore, any challenges can be rectified internally and decisions made by the owners, board members, managers or supervisors can be made in a timely and productive manner.

Kadee has modified and made machines to meet our needs all the while still manufacturing and distributing over 600 different products all made entirely in our plant in White City, Oregon. This includes our packaging, printed materials, and final finished goods. This facility actually houses a die-cast department, plastic injection depatment, paint/tampo print department, machine shop, full print shop, graphics department, R & D department, warehouse, shipping & receiving and sales office all under one 22,500 Square ft building. Truly, we do EVERYTHING IN HOUSE.

Kadee currently serves over 1,100 registered Authorized Dealers, and 34 Distributors worldwide.

Name: Artra Mühendislik
Description:
Artra Mühendislik, demiryolu sistemlerinde uzmanlaşmış bir mühendislik ve danışmanlık firmasıdır. Faaliyetlerimiz, özellikle raylı sistem araçları olmak üzere raylı sistemler kapsamındaki tüm disiplinlerde bakım yönetimi, yerlileştirme çözümleri ve teknik danışmanlık hizmetleri olmak üzere üç ana başlıkta toplanmaktadır.
Uzun yıllara dayanan saha deneyimi ve yöneticilik birikimiyle, özellikle demiryolu araçlarının periyodik ve ağır bakımları konusunda kurumlara özel çözümler sunuyoruz. Bakım süreçlerinin etkin yönetimi kapsamında; kurumların mevcut periyodik bakım, arıza yönetimi ve ağır bakım yapısı analiz edilerek, iyileştirme alanlarını belirliyor ve sürdürülebilir bir sistem kurmalarına destek oluyoruz. Ayrıca ağır bakım kapsamında ekipman bakımları, periyodik bakım ve kronik arıza çözümleri konusunda da fiili hizmet verebilecek kapasiteye sahibiz.
Demiryolu araçları (lokomotif, metro, tramvay, demiryolu bakım araçları..) tedariği kapsamında TSI ve EN, UIC gibi standartlar çerçevesinde gerekli doküman hazırlığı ve hazırlanan dokümanların kontrolleri / incelenmesi, imalat süreçlerine refakat edilmesi, test devreye alma süreçleri, araçların geçici-kesin kabul aşamalarında teknik destek ve danışmanlık hizmetleri sunuyoruz. 
Ayrıca demiryolu hatları, elektromekanik sistemler, katener sistemleri ve sinyal-haberleşme sistemleri bakımı ve bakım yönetimi, kronik arıza çözümleri konularında da hizmet vermekteyiz. 
Kritik öneme sahip yedek parça ve alt sistemlerin yerlileştirilmesi süreçlerini teknik ve stratejik bakış açısıyla ele alıyor, paydaşlarla iş birliği içinde, TSI ve EN, UIC gibi uluslararası standartlara uygun, sonuç odaklı çözümler geliştiriyoruz.
İlkelerimiz; güvenilirlik, sürdürülebilirlik, yenilikçi ve mühendis odaklı çözümler üzerine kuruludur. Hedefimiz, ülkemiz ve bölge ülkelerinde demiryolu sektörüne katma değer sağlayan, güvenilir bir mühendislik şirketi olmaktır.
Hizmetlerimiz hakkında daha fazla bilgi için bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz..

Name: HS2 East
Description:
HS2 East represents many of the UK’s ‘powerhouse’ cities and industrial heartlands across the Midlands, the North and Scotland – and also important emerging rural economies where excellent transport links are vital to future growth.

We are campaigning to secure the delivery of the eastern leg of HS2  at the same time as the western leg, so our towns and cities can enjoy the economic, connectivity and capacity benefits much sooner than is currently proposed by the government.

HS2 East’s mission is to make the case for the eastern leg of HS2 to the National Infrastructure Commission, ensuring it is included within the Integrated Rail Plan for the Midlands and North.

At the same time we will be calling for the Integrated Rail Plan to commit to delivering Northern Powerhouse Rail, East Midlands Engine Hub, and the full Trans-Pennine Rail upgrade. 

It is this once-in-a-generation transformational change to rail infrastructure that will boost growth and unlock potential for people and businesses across the Midlands and the North.

Name: NaKorid GmbH
Description:
Nakorid entwickelt und vertreibt nutzerfreundliche Isolierstoß Reparatur Sets für Bahnschienen. Isorail ist ein einfaches und kostengünstiges Reparaturverfahren von abgenutzten und defekten Gleisstößen. EBA und DB Netz Freigabe seit 2020 und bereits 10000 Mal eingesetzt.
Nakorid entwickelt und vertreibt nutzerfreundliche Verbrauchsüberwachungssysteme.
Nakorid optimiert Instandhaltungsprozesse durch eigens entwickelte Repararturverfahren für die Schienentechnik.
Nakorid ist ein innovatives und erfahrenes Team aus Energiespezialisten, IT-Experten und Ingenieuren mit mehrjähriger Berufserfahrung.

Der entwickelte Nano-Komposit-Hybrid-Verbundstoff NaKorid hat eine besonders hohe Druckfestigkeit und eignet sich deshalb ideal als Isoliereinlage. Durch den Austausch der bisherigen Plastikisoliereinlage mit NaKorid können in der Schienentechnik enorme Ressourcen gespart werden. Durch die gewonnene Expertise können weiterentwickelte Produkte im Bereich Leit- u. Sicherungstechnik hergestellt und so in Zukunft die Dienstleistung zur Durchführung des Reparaturverfahrens selbst angeboten werden.

Durch Produkt- u. Verfahrensentwicklung im Bereich der Messtechnik und den damit eigens entwickeltes Entstör- u. Reparaturverfahren für Isolierstöße schafft unser auf Nanotechnologie basierter Komposit-Hybrid-Verbundstoff NaKorid die Basis für schnelle Instandhaltungslösungen im Bereich der Eisenbahnschieneninfrastruktur und dadurch die Reduktion zahlreicher Verspätungsminuten.

Name: Railway Research, Inc.
Description:
Manufacturer of the Time-O-Test Locomotive Air Brake Test Device.

Railway Research, Inc. continues its proud tradition of engineering a superb product for the railroad environment. We continually improve our products, building on the accomplishments of the people who originally came up with the concept. Many of our Air Test Brake devices are still working every day... after 30 years in the field, and our improved parts we design will fit those devices. All design changes are made with an eye toward interchangeability with those devices and services.

The Time-O-Test Locomotive Air Brake Test Device is a proven device designed to be used where yard air is available. Every day hundreds of devices are simplifying the performance of terminal air brake test by using the available yard air to charge the train, to release and apply the brakes, and to lap the brakes for leakage tests. The gauge allows the inspector to read the train line pressure in all handle positions.

Name: The T1 Trust
Description:
The Pennsylvania Railroad (PRR) T1 Steam Locomotive Trust is a non-profit organization that believes in thinking differently about preservation. Through hard work, dedicated volunteers and the financial support of many generous donors from around the globe, the T1 Trust is constructing PRR T1 5550. Slated to become the fifty-third locomotive of its class when complete, 5550 combines stunning art deco design with a unique 4-4-4-4 wheel arrangement. 

The PRR T1 represents the pinnacle of steam locomotive design in the United States. These locomotives had the capability of achieving speeds in excess of 120 mph, and anecdotal reports indicate that speeds of up to 140 mph were attained. In all, 52 class T1 locomotives were produced, 25 at the PRR's Altoona shops and 27 at the Baldwin Locomotive Works in Philadelphia. Sadly, not a single example of this magnificent machine escaped the scrapper's torch. We aim to right that wrong.

We value preservation, education and history. The United States has a long and integral history with railroads and specifically, steam locomotives. The production of PRR T1 5550 will fill a large gap in that essential history.

Name: Corry Contract, Inc.
Description:
Corry Contract Inc. is a precision sheet metal fabricator that specializes in the manufacture of sheet metal components and assemblies in several major markets.

Our products include office furniture, sortation frames, electronic control cabinets, mass transit components, locomotive parts and much more. We can make small brackets all the way up to enclosures 10' x 10' x 20'. We can process sheet steel up to 1/2 inch thick, coils, structural angles / channels, round and rectangular tubing and aluminum extrusions. Parts can be punched, laser cut, formed, spot / MIG / TIG welded, painted with liquid or powder paints, silk-screened, and assembled to customer specifications.

Our engineering department can design a product to meet your needs or help refine your existing product. We have 2D and 3D CAD/CAM systems to process your drawings electronically. Our CNC equipment allows us to prototype your design with minimal tooling. Once your parts start through production they are cut and formed with state of the art Laser cutters, NC Punching, CNC bending machines and Press Brakes. Parts are welded together with Spot, MIG, and TIG processes to AWS specifications. Liquid or powder paints can be applied as well as silk-screening for logos and markings. Weldments can be assembled to the level that fits your needs, from adding gaskets through electrical wiring. The whole process is monitored by our ISO9001:2008 registered quality system.

Our goal is complete internal and external customer satisfaction by being a world class supplier of products and services. This requires continuous commitment to: Communication, Cooperation and Integrity, with our partners and associates, and continuous improvement in: Total cycle time, Quality and Management of our products and services. We take pride in our reputation for quality, service and dependability, yet recognize that this reputation must be earned every day, on every order.

Dynastes is an engineering company specialized in the railway-signalling sector. 
Dynastes started in 1991 on the initiative of its founding partners, Silvio Chiacchiararelli and Paolo Mazzei, who merged within the company different professional experiences and skills: a purely railway one and the other which is computers science and electronics. 
The synergistic combination of those skills and professional experiences has given life to a company that is specialized in designing railway-signalling systems and in the development of devices and software tools for the railway safety and the railway signalling. 
The Mercuri’s shareholding of the Eredi G. Mercuri SpA, a leading company in the railway market, has further strengthened Dynastes. This has allowed to boost up the sector of the innovative services for the development of safety critical systems, both hardware and software, in the railway-signalling field, in which Dynastes has been achieving a solid market position over time.
RFI (Rete Ferroviaria Italiana) has enrolled Dynastes in the RFI's Registers as accredited company to perform specific activities related to railway safety. In particular, RFI has authorized Dynastes to perform auditing of the railway signalling designings and technical verification and commissioning of the railway signalling systems. 
The Dynastes’s staff consists of about 20 collaborators, including internal and external staff. 
It is a highly skilled and qualified staff according to the standards identified in the Italian railway sector by RFI. The company staff I enrolled in the RFI’s Registers. 
Ongoing training guarantees knowledge and skills growth, so to adapt to the continuous changes both technologic and of the regulatory framework.

Description:
We make onboard retail a fast, easy, and personalised experience. Rail passengers get food and drinks quicker with our state-of-the art software and hardware.

The easy-to-use software can be tailored to your workflows, so we adapt it to your way of working, speeding up adoption and acceptance by the hosts. The comprehensive reporting console keeps track of your stock levels in real time so you can easily manage all aspects of pre and post journey sales. 

Your staff will get full training on the software as well as round-the-clock access to support. 

Once you’re all set up – which we can do in as little as four weeks – there’ll be no need for costly development. Our intuitive systems are user-friendly and available on Android tablets, smart phones and dedicated all-in-one payment terminals. 

We partner with global payment providers including Worldpay, Ingenico, Elavon and Square, with Evo Payments and STS providing secure offline payment apps. As for payment terminals, we work with many global providers such as Sunmi, PAX, Ingenico, Square, and Miura. 

Are your onboard retail systems no longer fit for purpose? Are you tired of juggling different systems to manage your service centre, payments, and reporting?

It’s time for a fully integrated system to manage your onboard retail, from end to end. 

Visit https://www.onboard-retail.com/ to find out more.

Name: Tri-City Railroad
Description:
The Tri-City Railroad (TCRY) established in 1999, is a common carrier railroad and defined by the United States Surface Transporation Board as Class III.  
 
As the Union Pacific Railroad (UPRR) agent and handling carrier in Richland, Washington we originate and terminate rail freight daily to and from destinations across the United States, Canada, and Mexico for UPRR customers.
 
We operate and maintain the railroad line owned by the Port of Benton (POB), under a long term lease agreement. The POB's purpose is to foster economic development and trade by providing quality infrastructure and multimodal transportation throughout Benton County, Washington. The POB has and continues to play an instrumental role in the overall economic growth of Eastern Washington and Benton County. We value our relationship with the POB and enjoy working with the POB on some of its many local economic development projects.  We maintain investment interest in other railroad properties also.
 
TCRY along with the International Union of Operating Engineers (IUOE) Local 280 and the Hanford Atomic Metal Trades Council (HAMTC) together have a Collective Bargaining Agreement (CBA) embracing a strong commitment to safety, mutual fair dealing, employee welfare, efficiencies, growth and defense of TCRY's railroad operations included in the CBA and the associated Union jobs the CBA generates. 
 
We transload, truck, fabricate, repair, construct new track, maintain existing track, consult for railroad customers, provide technical expertise when requested and provide industrial property to customers for their use that create local jobs and stimulate local economic development.

Name: Lynxrail
Description:
Technology with Vision

Lynxrail designs, manufactures and installs high technology video imaging equipment for the efficient and continual monitoring of rolling stock.  Our Automated Train Examiner (ATEx) systems use high quality optics and electronics along with sophisticated software to capture, analyse and report on the condition of rolling stock components such as wheels and brakes.  Our ATEx systems can capture images at up to 160 km/hr on trains in revenue service and customized reports are produced on fleet and wagon condition. The ATEx technology allows rail companies to predict their maintenance needs and identify problems in the early stages which delivers significant financial and safety rewards.  Lynxrail ATEx systems operate in the climatic extremes from northern Australia to Canada.

The Lynxrail ATEx modules are: Brake Pad Examiner, Wheel Profile Monitor, Bogie Side Frame (end caps, spring nest and friction wedges), Bogie Geometry, Tracking and Hunting, Under-carriage.  AEI is integrated so that defects can be attributed to the correct vehicle. The Lynxrail Asset Protection Team operates 24/7 to ensure the highest level of safety and support for your rollingstock.

Nasze realizacje obejmują nie tylko wyposażenie pojazdów szynowych i miejskich, lecz także projekty infrastrukturalne – m.in. oszklone wiaty dworców kolejowych.

W 2015 roku, jako jedyny producent szkła giętego, podjęliśmy się wyjątkowego wyzwania: dostawy szyb reflektorów czołowych giętych w dwóch płaszczyznach do jednych z najnowocześniejszych pojazdów kolejowych w Polsce – PESA Dart.


Since 2014, we have been building our company on the experience of Bohamet S.A. Group, which has been successfully operating for over 20 years in industries such as marine windows and doors manufacturing, steel structures, and aluminium joinery.

Leveraging this know-how, we successfully entered the railway glazing market, supplying both flat and curved windows as well as glass partition elements for vehicle interiors. Our portfolio includes not only projects for rail and urban vehicles, but also infrastructure developments, such as glazed canopies for railway stations.

In 2015, as the only manufacturer of curved glass, we took on the challenge of delivering double-curved headlight glass for one of the most advanced railway vehicles in Poland — PESA DART.

Name: Green Digital Systems
Description:
Sistemi di ingegneria dei trasporti, industrial automation e gestione energetica di plant produttivi. 

Importanti settori industriali mostrano una crescente necessità di soluzioni tecniche in grado di gestire in modo affidabile asset localizzati o in movimento in vaste aree senza aumentare l'impronta energetica.  Ne sono esempio i trasporti (ferroviari, autostradali e marittimi), la consegna delle merci, l'agricoltura, il monitoraggio di alluvioni e frane, ecc.  Inoltre, il PNRR si rivela in molti casi un potente acceleratore di queste necessità.
Dal punto di vista della tecnologia, cioè l'elettronica e la ICT, è facile vedere che i dispositivi, i servizi, le tecnologie di base, le competenze di progettazione e di ingegneria esistono, e anzi non sono certo una risorsa scarsa, soprattutto in alcune aree.
La domanda e l'offerta, tuttavia, a volte incontrano difficoltà nel combinarsi. Ciò è dovuto in parte alle diversa cultura delle due parti, ma ancor più al fatto che le soluzioni, per essere efficaci, richiedono sempre più spesso apporti multidisciplinari e convergenza di tecnologie diverse in una soluzione coerente. Invece non di rado il lato dell'offerta, soprattutto la più avanzata tecnologicamente, è disperso in molte PMI, fortemente concentrate sulla propria tecnologia ma spesso inconsapevoli di come questa possa contribuire, combinandosi con altre, ad applicazioni intelligenti ed efficaci sul lato della domanda.

Name: Hollandse Aannemings Service BV
Description:
U zit bij ons op het goede spoor!

De Hollandse Aannemings Service bv, "HAS bv", is voor veel opdrachtgevers de ideale partner gebleken wanneer het gaat om werkzaamheden op, aan en rond het spoor.

De HAS bv is ISO 9001/2000- en VCA**-gecertificeerd en heeft voor het werken in de risicogebieden railinfra-structuur het certificaat 'Branchegerichte Toelichting Railinfrastructuur'.Ook is al ons personeel reeds in het bezit van het DVP(Digitaal Veiligheids Paspoort)

De HAS bv is een bedrijf dat het de opdrachtgever zo makkelijk mogelijk maakt.Door het aanbieden van een totaalpakket bestaande uit spoorwerkzaamheden, spoorweg-veiligheid en/of spoorleggers heeft u maar 1 aanspreekpunt die voor deze zaken verantwoordelijk is. Dus niet drie partijen, geen drie contracten maar alles in 1.

De HAS bv is 7 dagen in de week, 24 uur per dag voor u bereikbaar.

Duurzaam energie gebruik en CO2 uitstoot.

Binnen Wisselwerk bv, waar de HAS bv onder valt, staat duurzaamheid hoog op de agenda. In dat kader heeft Wisselwerk bv het bedrijf Energie Consult Holland bv gevraagd, dit bedrijf levert onafhankelijke adviseurs en inspecteurs voor energie en milieu, om onze CO2-uitstoot te toetsen. Onderzocht en getoetst is volgens de NEN-ISO 14064-1 en 7.3.1. “GHC Report Content”, dit ten behoeve van de Prestatieladder ProRail. Eind april 2010 heeft deze toetsing geresulteerd in de afgifte van een verklaring. 

Wanneer u een flexibele partner zoekt, dan zit u bij ons op het juiste spoor.

De Hollandse Aannemings Service bv heeft een ruime ervaring in het zelfstandig uitvoeren van werkzaamheden aan of rondom de railinfra. Deze werkzaamheden kunnen worden uitgevoerd als hoofdaannemer of als onderaannemer, zowel hoofdsporen, bedrijfssporen, museumlijnen en kraanbanen behoren tot onze specialiteit.

De HAS bv is een bedrijf dat graag meedenkt met de opdrachtgever om een werk zo efficiënt mogelijk uit te voeren, innovatie staat hoog in het vaandel.

Name: Copalite
Description:
Copalite brings innovation to the platform coper market. The design has all the benefits of a concrete coper but due to it’s unique waffle arrangement and concrete spec, is much lighter than traditional units.

Furthermore, the tactile plate is cast into the concrete with threaded anchors so can be simply/quickly removed and replaced if necessary.

The reduced weight and unique waffle arrangement greatly simplifies transportation, lifting and bedding operations. This speeds up activities on site, reduces health and safety risks and increases quality of installation.

Copalite is available in a range of surface finishes to suit specific requirements and comes with a Rail Standard tactile plate pre‑installed.

Patent pending

Name: Mineral Products, Inc.
Description:
The MPI 6260 is a patent pending Active Track & Yard Cleaner with rubber tires, four-wheel drive, with four-wheel steering and a friction drive hi-rail system. 
•	Designed with Multiple Quick Change Processing Heads as well as Multiple Quick Change Discharge Attachments. 
•	Track Cleaning Head is designed to remove any type of spillage from active tracks or yards such as coal, iron pellets, sawdust, etc.
•	Snow Clearing Head with the rear snow blower attachment will handle up to 2000 tons of snow per hour and throw the snow up to 150 feet. 
•	200hp Cold Air Blower mounted above the Snow Clearing Head uses 9,500cfm and 250mph wind speed at the nozzle discharge point to clear snow from switches.
•	Sand Removal Head and long reach discharge swing conveyor makes short work of removing sand from rail yards or active tracks.
•	The 6260 can clean active tracks & yards all year-round but can also get on and off the track without having to go to a road crossing or siding to allow a train to pass.
•	With minor changes to any processing head, the 6260 has the capabilities of preforming the same work off the track such as beside a track, on parking areas, streets or highways.

Name: Werkgroep Spoor in Fryslân
Description:
De Werkgroep Spoor in Fryslân (WgSiF) is in het leven geroepen om lokale overheden in het noorden van Nederland te adviseren en te stimuleren om efficiënter en duurzamer te investeren in de noordelijke spoorlijnen. Op deze wijze kan het spoor bijdragen aan een verbeterde bereikbaarheid en duurzame economische ontwikkeling van Noord-Nederland. 

De Werkgroep bestaat uit een team van vrijwilligers met elk zo z'n eigen expertise. Zij volgen de ontwikkelingen in de spoorse vakwereld met interesse en denken daarbij mee over de mogelijkheden voor toekomstige ontwikkelingen of beleid. Onze adviezen worden gedeeld met stakeholders, overheden en andere geïnteresseerden of belanghebbenden. De spoorvisie 'Fryslân op het juiste spoor' is het resultaat van een door de werkgroep uitgevoerde analyse van het huidige spoorgebruik in Fryslân, de reeds bestaande plannen voor de toekomst en realistisch mogelijkheden om het spoorgebruik in de toekomst verder te stimuleren.

Description:

We provide traction & rolling stock operators, owners, infrastructure maintenance providers and all associated industry suppliers with the opportunity to maximise the value of their underutilised, surplus and obsolete machinery, plant, equipment, materials, rolling stock and inventory through our comprehensive recovery services, industry leading online marketplace and forward thinking asset management solutions.

Railbroker understands that most companies are busy searching for ways to manage obsolete inventory and equipment but lack the resources to focus on this area of the business. As your trusted expert, we will help unlock and realise the potential value of your surplus assets.

Complementing our online marketplace and comprehensive selling processes, we also offer a full range of value-added services, such as equipment sourcing through our buyer brokering services, secure storage and logistics, service advertising and cost recovery consulting with site assessments of surplus inventory and equipment. Name: CBG Company
Description:
CBG Company was founded in 1976. In the early years of its operation, this company performed general construction operations such as construction of roads, stations, airports, stadiums, etc. Afterwards, by laying the foundation for Bafq-Bandar Abbas railway, it officially began its career in the railway industry. The year 1990, when this company established the first concrete sleeper production factory, was the beginning of the activity of the private sector in the field of railway pavement. This company has produced more than 9 million concrete sleepers and fastening equipment with three concrete sleeper production factories and two railway fastening system manufacturing factories. Moreover, having access to complete set of special track-laying machinery including railroad cranes, tamping machines, switch tamping machine, ballast distributors, stabilizer, wagons and locomotives, this company is capable of conducting railway projects from the production of basic materials (including ballast, various kinds of concrete sleepers, concrete slab tracks, fastening systems, etc.) to the end. Moreover, having a complete rail welding service and our company performs welding of rails in its projects in different methods (Thermite, Flashbutt and Enclosed Arc Welding/EAW systems). 
It has delivered its products to the following strategic railway projects launched by RAJA Company: Tehran-Mashhad, Bafq-Mashhad, Bam-Zahedan, Bafq-Bandar Abbas, Khaaf-Harat, Gorgan-Inche Boroon, Tehran-Hamedan, Hamedan-Sanandaj, Golgohar Mining and Industrial Company, Qazvin-Zanjan, etc.

Name: SHSrail-Roestrijden.nl
Description:
Doel en aanpak van de Stichting Holland Spoor 
 
Het doel van de Stichting Holland Spoor bestaat uit twee delen.  
1.Een fonds ten behoeven van het herstel en behoud van railerfgoed creëren en beheren.
2. Dienstverlening aan de railbranche bij voorkeur uitvoeren met Nederlands historisch materieel

 Voor iedere concrete rit, met inzet van operationeel historisch materiaal wordt bij de Stichting Holland Spoor een project gedefinieerd. 
Voorbeelden van die concrete ritten zijn onder meer:
-	het rijp- en ijzelrijden voor bovenleidingen;
-	inzet voor detectiecontroles;
-	controleritten na updates van beveiligingssoftware;
-	samen met universiteiten en hogescholen praktijktesten voor  wetenschappelijk onderzoek;
-	in de herfst bestrijding van gladheid door vallende bladeren;
-	roestrijden.
De Stichting Holland Spoor verzorgt voor dit soort ritten het beschikbaar stellen van adequaat spoorwegmaterieel, de aanvraag van de dienstregelingen voor aan- en afvoerritten, informeren en eventueel instrueren van de treindienstleiding, het beschikbaar stellen van veiligheidspersoneel en de inzet van (bevoegde) machinisten. 
 
De ritten worden uitgevoerd in opdracht van professionele derden.
 
Door de coördinatie van (al dan niet rail gebonden) professionele partijen, de Railmusea en de Stichting Holland Spoor ontstaat een win-win situatie alle partijen. 
Tot de kosten van de Holland Spoor projecten horen onder andere het huren van het gebruikte historische materieel.  
De netto-opbrengst van projecten worden gedoneerd aan Museumorganisaties, ook die, die geen goedgekeurd, operationeel spoorwegmateriaal hebben, als ondersteuning bij lopende goedgekeurde projecten van de individuele museumorganisaties.

Products include Hopper Car Gate Openers; Hopper Car Pocket Vibrators; Connector Chutes for the safe, pollution-free transfer of material from hopper cars to undertrack-conveyors; Bin Aerators and Vibrators to aid material flow; Lubricants for gate openers and vibrators; Motor Starters for vibrators; Time & Sequence Event Controllers for Vibrators, Air Cannons and Aerators; and Vibrator Mounting Systems. Our products help Customers operate more safely and efficiently, increase the lifespan of production critical equipment, and decrease operating and maintenance costs of equipment used in some of industry’s most dangerous, difficult, and dirty jobs.

Name: VUZ Slovakia s.r.o.
Description:
VUZ Slovakia, s.r.o. je 100% dcérskou spoločnosťou Výzkumného Ústavu Železničního, a.s. (VUZ). Ponúkame vysoko špecializované služby a komplexné riešenia v oblasti posudzovania a certifikácie železničných vozidiel a všetkých štrukturálnych subsystémov železničnej dopravy. Radi vám zabezpečíme nielen všetky činnosti, ktoré poskytuje VUZ, s výhodami sídla v Bratislave, ale aj ďalšie činnosti v oblasti výskumu a vývoja v doprave, prieskumu trhu, spracovania dát či poradenskej činnosti pri spracúvaní projektov na čerpanie finančných zdrojov EÚ.

Skupina VUZ ponúka služby NoBo, DeBo (CZ a SK), AsBo, ISA a certifikácie ECM.

VUZ je autorizovaným orgánom č. AO 258 a notifikovaným orgánom č. 1714, ktorý posudzuje štrukturálne subsystémy infraštruktúra, energia, koľajové vozidlá, traťové a palubné riadenie a zabezpečenie a to vrátane príslušných prvkov interoperability v železničnom systéme Európskej únie.

COV VUZ SK je akreditovaným orgánom na základe rozhodnutia SNAS č. 788/10008/2022/1a právnickou osobou poverenou k posudzovaniu zhody subsystémov železničného systému s vnútroštátnymi predpismi Slovenskej republiky č. 35801/2022/SŽDD/92408.

VUZ Slovakia, s.r.o. tak prináša najmä na slovenský trh bohaté skúsenosti, vysokú kvalitu a lepšiu dostupnosť služieb VUZ, európskeho lídra v oblasti železničného testovania a certifikácie.

Name: Hubei Srida Heavy-duty Engineering Machinery Co., Ltd

The company is committed to build the strong innovation strength. They treat technological innovation as the motive power, forming the products advantage according to the technical staff advantage. Srida designs and manufactures the products on his own, aiming to set up the national independent brand. Srida pays more attention to the research and development of new products and new projects, thus improving the core   strength of the company. The special bogies with small curvature radius of 19m play a leading role in the world, and the bogies are used for unban rail transit construction & maintenance vehicles and researched and developed by Srida. At present, the company owns more than one hundred technical staffs, and has owned more than 60 technical patents. The technical center of the company is elevated as the Urban Rail Transit Enterprise Technical Center and Technology Innovation Enterprise.

Name: CH2M
Description:
La société CH2M a été créée en 2015 afin de réintroduire sur le marché français les produits Rosehill Rail.

Rosehill Rail est le concepteur et fabricant de système de platelages de type caoutchouc le plus important du Royaume Uni et s'appuit sur plus de 30 ans d'expérience dans la technologie du polyuréthane et du caoutchouc.

Rosehill Rail a accumulé une riche expérience au court de sa longue histoire dans le secteur ferroviaire, en travaillant avec différentes sociétés à travers le monde.

Tous les produits proposés sont homologués depuis plusieurs années par la direction de l'ingénierie de la SNCF.

Au delà de la vente de ces produits, CH2M est en mesure de vous apporter toute son expertise technique en conseil pour les travaux et la maintenance des passages à niveau.
Soucieux de notre empreinte écologique CH2M est également en mesure de collecter vos dalles déposées.

Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec une société, qui retraite par broyage vos produits en fin de vie. C'est pour vous la certitude de recycler et d'éliminer vos déchets dans des conditions environnementales optimales.

L'équipe CH2M a pour motivation la sécurisation des infrastructures dans une démarche écologique, dynamique et innovante, à l'écoute de nos clients.

Plus qu'un simple fournisseur, nous serons le partenaire vous ouvrant de nouvelles voies.

Name: TempSense
Description:
TEMPSENSE: Safety through real-time track temperature monitoring
TempSense from RailSense Solutions Ltd, is a system to measure rail temperature remotely. It provides warning alerts as well as scheduled measurements for Critical Rail Temperature monitoring – all remotely without the need for track side intervention.

TempSense is designed to be installed on a rail network track to monitor temperature of the rail from –20 to +85 degrees C.

Track temperatures are typically 20 degrees higher than the ambient temperature. For example the UK rail network has been designed to operate at a ‘stress free’ temperature of 27 degrees.

Cost effective and safe remote measurement and collection of rail temperature information.
Intelligently plan train speeds, help prevent buckling, and keep the railway running as reliably as possible with improved passenger safety.

By combining temperature, weather and solar radiation data, TempSense can build a picture and provide analytics to assist in the design and maintenance of the rail network.

The devices are built for zero-maintenance and ultra-low power consumption, backed with solar charging.

Network Rail Approval PA05/07797

Technical Specification

* Measures rail temperature to an accuracy of 0.75 ºC
* Measuring temperature range -20 to +80 ºC
* Operating Temperature -20 to +60 ºC
* Battery powered
* Cellular connectivity via 2G/NB-IoT/LTE-M.
* Up to 3 years continuous operation
* Weight 0.6kg
* Sealed to IP67

Name: NeeStaNan
Description:
The NeeStaNan Utility Corridor Project will be led by First Nations. Prairie commodities such as oil, wheat and potash are landlocked in Western Canada. Current methods of transporting these resources are costly and inefficient, involving transporting resources via rail or pipelines to the west through the Rocky Mountains to reach international markets..

SOLUTION – THE NEESTANAN WAY:
The NeeStaNan Utility Corridor will provide rail transportation for Potash to be shipped out of Port Nelson, Manitoba. Currently, potash is being railed to Port Moody, Vancouver. This is a longer more difficult route with mountains and a crowded port to contend with. NeeStaNan Utility Corridor will create opportunities by reducing rail by over “630 km” and shipping route by “3800 km”.

The NeestaNan Corridor would reduce the distance by over 4400 km – making it over 30% shorter.

New railway capacity
Connecting Canada’s agricultural products and minerals to international markets.

New international trade routes for Canada’s commodities.

Nos preocupamos com o amanhã!

A Elétrica CBS Engenharia tem a consciência e essência em mudar o mundo para melhor. O presente é importante, mas preservar e garantir o futuro é melhor ainda. Pensando nisto, a empresa coloca em prática sua responsabilidade social planejando e se empenhando em transmitir esta essência e a importância da solidariedade para seus colaboradores e clientes.
O objetivo da Elétrica CBS é gerar pequenas atitudes que contribuam para um mundo melhor e mais digno para todos.
A desigualdade no Brasil ainda é uma realidade atual, e é um problema que afeta grande parte da nossa população. Pesquisas da PNAD (Pesquisa Nacional por Amostra de Domicílios) e do IPEA (Instituto de Pesquisa Econômica Aplicada), em 2011, revelaram que a pobreza e desigualdade social diminuíram, mas a luta continua.
Junto com uma equipe de voluntários, a Elétrica CBS realiza atividades como entregas de cestas básicas, brinquedos de Dia das Crianças e Natal.
Juntos fazemos a diferença.

Jesteśmy prawdopodobnie jedyną firmą, która produkuje wszystko z materiałów typu sandwich – lżejszych niż materiały tradycyjne.

Dzięki bogatej wiedzy i doświadczeniu zdobytym na rynku krajowym i zagranicznym, oferujemy produkty i usługi najwyższej jakości.

Klient może zaproponować zarówno własne rozwiązania konstrukcyjne i design lub też zlecić ich przygotowanie naszej firmie. W dopasowaniu do potrzeb klienta jesteśmy bardziej elastyczni niż materiał, z którym pracujemy. W dodatku mamy strukturę płaską jak arkusz blachy, więc działamy błyskawicznie.

Co więcej, jeśli Klienci nie mają możliwości przechowywania produktów, oferujemy powierzchnię magazynową i dostarczamy towar zgodnie z zapotrzebowaniem.

Posiadamy atesty i świadectwa, które gwarantują naszym Klientom produkty zgodne z obowiązującymi normami i certyfikatami.

Name: TBESZ Ltd.
Description:

Market situation of the Kft. 

The main activity of the Company is the construction, conversion and expansion of railway communication and railway safety systems. As regards our market position, we are market leaders in Hungary. 
We also deal with the construction of various cable networks (optical fiber and copper conductor cable) and of substructures, furthermore with fitting, measuring, replacing cables.
In the frame of these activities we perform pre-assembly, production and planning tasks as well. 
We usually work on a turnkey basis. 
Our activity covers the entire country and we perform safety installations abroad (Czech Republic) as well.
Our primary business partner is MÁV but we work also for other rail-guided transportation sectors, like: BKV HÉV, Metro, Underground.
We participated in the installation of the electronic safety installations as the sub-contractor of Siemens or Alcatel.
This problem rises mainly in case of MÁV projects, railway rehabilitation works financed from EU funds (ISPA) in which our Company undertakes a considerable part as well. 
We had to draw down loans several times to finance our expenses and the payments to the sub-contractors. But the fact that we do not own any real property makes the application for loans rather difficult.
We dispose of all the professional references, which are stipulated in the public procurement tenders however we cannot individually participate in larger tenders because of the lack of the financial background.
The utilization of EU Cohesion Funds, with the involvement of a financial or rather professional investor, may mean a brighter future for the Company with better perspectives.

Wij werken voor opdrachtgevers in de railinfra-branche, spoorgerelateerde bedrijven en het openbare energienet. Duteq adviseert en ondersteunt. Wij verzorgen de organisatie en technische uitvoering van het energietransport rondom het spoor. Samen met onze opdrachtgevers streven wij naar veilig en verantwoord spoorwegvervoer. Met oog voor duurzame technologische en digitale ontwikkelingen. 

Zoekt u een betrouwbare partner voor het vernieuwen en onderhouden van de energievoorziening, draagconstructies en civiele werken? Een bedrijf met organisatorische en technische kennis en vakkundig personeel dat de veiligheid rond  deze werkzaamheden waarborgt? Neem dan contact met ons op.

Name: WagonFit
Description:
WagonFit is a railway engineering software company focused on solving complex clearance and gauging challenges through practical, engineering-driven tools.

WagonFit develops advanced clearance-verification software that goes beyond traditional gauging methods. The platform enables engineers to analyse real-world railway infrastructure, generate limiting envelopes and deformation-based profiles, and export results directly into CAD environments for design, validation, and optimisation workflows.

The software is designed for complex infrastructure scenarios involving curves, cant, platforms, tunnels, and combined constraints, where conventional approaches often become inefficient or ambiguous. By working directly with geometric constraints and real operational conditions, WagonFit helps reduce uncertainty, minimise design iterations, and support safer, better-informed engineering decisions.

WagonFit is used in projects related to rolling stock design, infrastructure compatibility, and clearance assessment, supporting engineering teams in achieving reliable integration between vehicles and infrastructure.

Open to collaboration with railway professionals, engineering teams, and organisations working on innovation in clearance analysis and railway design.

Name: VoidSense
Description:
VoidSense from RailSense is a void meter (RTVMD) and track temperature monitor. It is designed to be installed on a rail network track to monitor both temperature and movement of the rail, allowing under-track voids to be detected remotely and before occurrence of failure.

The VoidSense measures with a high degree of accuracy.

* Replaces mechanical void measure devices
* Avoids staff on tracks to take and record the readings – saves cost, errors and risk
* Temperature monitor for track to monitor temperature of the rail from –20 to +85 degrees C.
* Intelligently plan train speeds, help prevent buckling, and keep the railway running as reliably as possible with improved passenger safety.
* Network Rail approval PA05/07792

Continuous detection of void conditions provides cost savings during maintenance cycles by allowing voids to be identified long before a settlement or encroachment becomes an issue. The trending of the displacement data enables predictive maintenance, or imposing safe speed limits on the relevant sections of the rail network.

By combining temperature, weather and solar radiation data, RailSense can build a picture and provide analytics to assist in the design and maintenance of the rail network.

The devices are built for zero-maintenance and ultra-low power consumption, backed with solar charging.

Name: Railway Brake Services
Description:
Railway Brake Services specialises in train brake systems overhaul and brake servicing for rolling stock across the UK. We support freight operators, train operating companies, heritage rail organisations, and preservation groups with expert vacuum and air brakes maintenance.

Why Customers Choose Us

Since 2006, we've built our reputation in rail engineering on delivering quick turnaround times and reliable brake servicing. We offer faster service than many larger companies, with the capacity to overhaul large rolling stock fleets effectively and minimise your downtime.

What sets us apart is our unrivalled access to OEM parts and thorough working knowledge of both Wabtec-Faiveley (Davies & Metcalfe) and Knorr-Bremse (Westinghouse) train brake systems. We specialise in both vacuum and air brakes, understanding the development and modification of these systems over decades.

Our Heritage

Founded by Keith Nicholson, whose rail engineering career began in the 1960s, our company preserves decades of knowledge in brake servicing and rolling stock maintenance. Keith's expertise has been passed down to our close-knit team, ensuring you benefit from insights not available elsewhere.

What started as a service for heritage rail communities now sees us as approved suppliers to some of the UK's largest rail operators, including Northern Rail, Network Rail, Great Western Railway, and ScotRail.

Our Commitment

Whether you're managing heritage rail operations or one of the UK's largest rolling stock fleets, we're here to serve you. Every overhaul includes thorough testing and a 12-month warranty, backed by RISQS verification and UKAS accreditation.

Services: 
Train Brake Systems Overhaul | Brake Servicing | Vacuum and Air Brakes | Rolling Stock Maintenance

Name: Rail Security Alliance
Description:
The Rail Security Alliance exists to support and encourage the adoption and enactment of policies, procedures and laws that ensure the U.S. and North American railroad system is secure and free from foreign threat.

Background
Since its founding, RSA has provided testimony to lawmakers on Capitol Hill about the need to safeguard the U.S. and North American railroad systems in light of the threats it faces from Chinese state-owned enterprises seeking to dominate critical industries including rail.

RSA has worked for greater rail security in the U.S. by supporting the enactment of the Transit Infrastructure Vehicle Security (TIVSA) and the Infrastructure and Investment Jobs Act (IIJA), which included a bipartisan amendment, the Stopping America's Foreign Enemies Through Rail and Infrastructure National Security (SAFE TRAINS) Act.

Why is rail security important?
With nearly 140,000 miles of railroad covering the United States and the inter-connectedness of our North American neighbors, freight rail is a security lynch pin that regularly transports everyday necessities, key commodities, sensitive U.S. military equipment, hazardous waste, potentially toxic and hazardous chemicals, and flammable liquids every day. On the passenger side, millions of Americans rely on commuter rail systems each day as well. 

Because today's rail system is relies on a constantly expanding network of technology and digitization that dramatically increases its risk to cyber-attack and hacking, it must be secure at every point along the way. Unfortunately, foreign investment in this industry — notably investment from Chinese state-owned enterprises — jeopardizes the security of our railroad systems and infrastructure.

Name: Erriate
Description:
517 people were injured or killed in level crossing accidents in the EU in 2017. Erriate was built to prevent these accidents. 

Erriate monitors the area in level crossings in order to determine any potential dangerous situations. Artificial intelligence can detect patterns that represent risky situations, such as a stuck car or injured cyclist.

In case of dangerous situations, the train operators in trains that are approaching the level crossing receive a warning accompanied with a live stream. The train operator can analyze the situation and stop the train or adjust its speed to prevent an accident.

Erriate informs emergency units about possible accidents. This ensures the emergency team can be immediately on its way in order to rescue any injured people or remove any barriers from the level crossing in order to eliminate train delays.

Name: Norsk Jernbanesikkerhet
Description:
Når det skal arbeides på eller nær ved jernbanen, må man ha en hovedsikkerhetsvakt som er ansvarlig for at bestemmelsene i Banenors trafikkregler for jernbanenettet overholdes. Dersom personer, utstyr eller maskiner skal benyttes innen en radius på 6 meter fra kl anlegget, må en egen leder for elsikkerhet vurdere sikkerhetstiltak.

Norsk Jerbanesikkerhet As har godkjente ledere for elsikkerhet med lang erfaring fra forskjellige prosjekter. Vi utfører blant annet befaringer, planlegging, bestilling av el-sikkerhetsplaner og mye mer. Alle våre ledere for elsikkerhet er godkjente hovedsikkerhetsvakter i tillegg.
Våre hovedsikkerhetsvakter og leder for elsikkerhet står til din disposisjon når du trenger det. Kontakt oss tidlig i planleggingsfasen for å få en trygg og god gjennomføring av jobben.

Alt arbeid nærmere 2,5 meter fra nærmeste skinne eller hvor det er fare for at maskiner eller materiell kommer innenfor beskyttelsesavstand skal det være hovedsikkerhetsvakt eller lokal sikkerhetsvakt til stede mens arbeid foregår. Ved disponering av strekning for arbeid i spor og ved opprettelse av anleggsområde skal det oppnevnes en hovedsikkerhetsvakt.

Hovedsikkerhetsvakten skal ha kontakt med toglederen eller togekspeditøren og eventuelle lokale sikkerhetsvakter. Norsk Jernbanesikkerhet AS har hovedsikkerhetsvakter med lang erfaring ved både små og store prosjekter og er også godkjente for arbeid på ERTMS strekninger.

Leder for elsikkerhet skal ved arbeid hvor det er fare for at utstyr eller mennesker kommer i nærheten av Banenor sitt kontaktledningsanlegg ta en vurdering eller være til stede mens arbeidene pågår.

Når det strømførende anlegget må være frakoblet, krever regelverket at det skal være to personer tilstede. Før det gis tillatelse til frakobling må det i forkant av arbeidet sendes inn en el-sikkerhetsplan til gjeldende elkraftsentral.

Name: Rail Connected
Description:
The Green Deal has the objective of transforming the EU into a climate-neutral and circular economy. The railways, being environmentally friendly and energy-efficient, play a key role in the shift towards a sustainable and climate-resilient EU. By 2030, train traffic is expected to have grown 40%. Only by digitizing the European railways can such growth be managed. 

Today’s railway infrastructure features quantities of mechanical and electrical trackside equipment requiring cables for power supply and data transfer. The future of train traffic is digital and wireless. New technologies will change the rules completely. In a few years’ time, digital advancements will allow rail infrastructure operators to dispense with most of their trackside equipment and create a centralized digital train control and traffic management system. Any remaining trackside equipment such as axle counters will be wireless. Not having to dig for cables will not only substantially cut the cost of implementation and maintenance, but more importantly, will significantly speed up the roll-out of ERTMS in Europe.

The wireless axle counter developed by Rail Connected will replace legacy rail technology and will lead to a higher density of measuring points in the railway track, resulting in greater efficiency, higher capacity and lower cost.

Name: TRANSLAMATIC
Description:
All over the world, trains are transporting every day millions of travelers and millions of tons of freight. This heavy traffic is generating wears and impairments due to the contact between the rail and the wheels. For this reason, various defects appear even on the most recent and the best maintained railway networks.
The repairs of those defects through the replacement of damaged rails and two thermite welds are an expensive and not really advisable process. Another technique of repairs is electric arc surfacing. This method has been used for decades in railway networks all over the world.

The surfacing quality depends directly on the welding operator abilities. One issue is then to give the welding operators high enough skills to be able to guarantee a repairs execution following the international standards. If not, the repairs can create internal defects such as porosities which can turn out to be more dangerous than the original defect.

At CTF FRANCE SAURON, we answer to this problematic with automatism. Our range of robotic welders TRANSLAMATIC allows to ensure the constant quality of surfacing operated by our devices. We also offer all the necessary equipment for railway repairs and maintenance.

Partner of SNCF since 1978, our know-how in the surfacing field is well recognized in France. Today, CTF FRANCE SAURON has also grown as an international actor with a presence in more than 20 countries all over the world. We are looking forward to becoming your partner in a close future.

Name: Form - Thermit
Description:
Form-Thermit, spol s r.o. is part of the Goldschmidt Group. 
Goldschmidt is a family-owned group of companies operating worldwide in the field of rail infrastructure.

Together with our customers and partners, we are shaping the rail-bound mobility of tomorrow with products and services for the joining of rails, modern construction of railway tracks as well as inspection and maintenance of track infrastructure.

Since the invention of the Thermit process by Hans Goldschmidt in 1895, we have been a pioneer in the field of rail joining. Today, trains and railways of all kinds worldwide run on continuously welded tracks from Goldschmidt. This is because our Original Thermit welding process enables an excellent connection of almost every type of rail.

The smart inspection solutions from Goldschmidt enable a detailed diagnosis of the track condition as the basis for predictive maintenance – for sustainably economical and reliable track infrastructure and rail vehicles.

We also set standards in the area of maintenance: With advanced products, digital solutions and proven services from worldwide project experience, Goldschmidt restores rail networks to top condition.

By working closely with our customers on new developments, we gain important insights to refine and optimise them. This is how we develop products and services that offer real solutions.

Whether rail network operators, track construction and railway companies or municipal transport companies - our customers can always count on us. With worldwide production, service and sales locations, products and services are available locally, as is the support of local contacts.

We're focused on driving ongoing safety, innovation, efficiency, reliability, and productivity. With best-in-class manufacturing facilities, unmatched digital expertise, always-on global services delivery, and unrivaled product breadth and performance, Wabtec is the rail industry’s one-stop shop.

We focus on providing customer support for passenger transport (transit service) in Austria and the Balkan region, thereby ensuring the supply of spare parts for vehicle maintenance.

Our field service team carries out maintenance, repairs, and overhauls/modernizations of vehicle components in the workshops of vehicle maintenance companies.
The service team specializes in electrical, electronic, refrigeration, pneumatic, hydraulic and mechanical systems and components.

We design next-generation solutions using AI/ML, Industrial IoT, Machine Vision, and advanced analytics, transforming physical infrastructure into smart, connected, and insight-driven assets.
With a strong in-house, multidisciplinary engineering team and close collaboration with Indian Railways R&D bodies, metro rail corporations, academic institutions, and global technology partners, our focus is on scalable, deployment-ready innovation, not experimentation.
Patil I-Labs bridges proven engineering with digital transformation, shaping the future of intelligent infrastructure where reliability, data, and execution converge.

Name: SELF PROP RAIL
Description:
SELF PROP RAIL will bring to the market self-propelled bulk carriage designed for resource-efficient (re)construction of railway infrastructure.

SELF PROP RAIL contributes to enhancing resource-efficient (re)construction of railway infrastructure. The project will bring to the market a new, innovative self-propelled bulk carriage that does not need a locomotive for shuffling and moving during cargo unloading processes and at the same time can discharge required amounts of construction materials precisely where needed.

The carriage saves energy, human resources and shortens the time of transportation and unloading. It is cost and time efficient, it enables point-to-point transportation, and there is no need for cost-intensive cargo manipulation machinery for freight handling or time-intensive coupling and reloading processes.

During the project it will be obtaining all certificates needed for the carriage’s market penetration, to develop the market strategy for the introduction of this innovative product, and to demonstrate the carriage’s efficiency and qualities in various situations via tests.

The consortium consists of 5 project partners that have expertise in key aspects of the project: technical solutions, testing, life-cycle analysis, marketing and project management. The project will be implemented in Croatia and its neighbouring countries, and the entire EU-28 is considered as the potential market.

Name: RAIL SAFETY REMINDERS
Description:
STOPPERS -  Safe Train Preparation Reminders  -  are a new, innovative and easy to apply 'visual reminder device' to reduce the risk of operational incidents.  

STOPPERS are used within rail sidings during train preparation, rail wagon loading or discharge operations, and during rail vehicle maintenance.  They can also be used inside locomotive cabs for out-of-course situations or en-route. 

STOPPERS assist in reducing the risk of: -  
wheel flats, running over scotches, loading defective wagons, opening defective doors, overloading rail wagons due to contamination/residue, releasing rail wagons in an unsafe condition.    

STOPPERS are being used successfully within the UK rail industry as a: -
 * visual reminder device * safety warning * risk assessment control * training aid * method of work enhancement * quality control *
  
Designed and IPO registered by Rail Safety Reminders Ltd, STOPPERS are manufactured in Great Britain and are extremely easy to spot during train preparation/roll-by checks  -  raising awareness that a handbrake might still be applied.    STOPPERS can be easily attached to handbrake wheels, door levers, drawbar hooks, or to the sides or ends of rail wagons. They are highly visible during daylight, during the hours of darkness or in poor visibility.  They are manufactured from high visibility EN20471 fabric with reflective strips, glow-in-the-dark tape and a wipeable plastic cover. They can be supplied with a selection of wording on the labels including BRAKE, SCOTCH, DO NOT LOAD etc.   STOPPERS are securely attached by using an adjustable hook and loop fastening (on the Tag design), or an adjustable elasticated cord and toggle (on the Cross design).   Designs can be ‘tweaked’ to meet your requirements    e.g., alternative colours, wording or languages, adding magnets, etc. 

STOPPERS aren't just restricted for use on trains, they can be used within any industry where personnel require an easy to use, highly visible safety reminder device.

Name: RT TORAX RAILS, s.r.o.
Description:
RT TORAX RAILS, s.r.o. is a Czech company and a proud member of the RT TORAX Group – a strong industrial holding with a long-standing tradition in automotive, development, real estate, sport and charity, modern vending solutions and the railway industry since 1994. Our vision is to combine top-level technical know-how with innovative solutions, providing comprehensive services that support the growth of modern logistics and freight rail transport across Europe and beyond.

Since 1998, we have been delivering a comprehensive range of high-quality railway components, including axles, wheels, wheelsets, axle boxes, and complete bogies for freight and passenger wagons as well as locomotives. All our products comply with the highest industry standards and are certified according to TSI and EN regulations, ensuring exceptional safety, durability, and reliability. We work exclusively with premium manufacturers, guaranteeing that every component meets the highest European quality and safety requirements. Our portfolio also includes a wide range of new and refurbished freight wagons, delivered directly to the final destination with full technical and logistics support.

Another key pillar of our business is engineering – providing end-to-end services from design and construction to prototyping, testing, and homologation. Our experienced team of engineers and technical experts has successfully completed numerous high-profile projects. With FEM analysis, 3D/2D design, and cooperation with accredited labs, we ensure project excellence.

RT TORAX RAILS stands for professionalism, technical precision, and long-term partnerships. As a Czech company and part of the RT TORAX Group, our mission is to foster international relationships and collaborate with leading carriers and manufacturers to make freight and passenger rail transport more efficient, safer, and sustainable. We are recognized as a trusted partner for railway solutions spanning Europe and the rest of the world.

Name: PhaseTec
Description:
https://phasetec.fr/

At PhaseTec, we are committed to elevating railway safety and reliability with solutions ranging from SIL2 to SIL4. Our services span essential areas, including signaling, control, and power supply—each designed to meet the highest standards of safety for efficient railway operations. With advanced technology and a customer-centric approach, we tailor solutions to reduce risks and optimize performance for every client.

Why Choose Us?
Railway operations demand precision and reliability. Our safety systems address these needs by reducing operational hazards and increasing efficiency. By combining custom control systems with power management strategies, we ensure your project is ready for both immediate and future challenges.

Key Solutions
Our offerings encompass:

Signaling: Advanced systems for safer, smoother traffic flow.
Control: Efficient train coordination for safe operations.
Power Supply: Reliable, high-performance solutions to safeguard against outages.
Traction Power Supply: Comprehensive solutions for traction power, including control, protection, and monitoring systems that ensure the seamless and safe delivery of energy across the network.
Platform Screen Doors (PSD): We provide PSD solutions that improve passenger safety and streamline operations by ensuring controlled access to the rail track, reducing risks and enhancing station efficiency.
Our Commitment
With a team of experienced engineers, we bring decades of expertise across diverse railway projects. Our commitment to industry standards and compliance ensures each solution is innovative, effective, and future-proof, supporting sustainable railway infrastructures.

Innovation & Collaboration
We believe in collaboration at every project stage, refining solutions to exceed expectations and build lasting partnerships. Our goal is to integrate quality and safety into every aspect of rail transport, setting new standards in the industry.

Name: Rail Link Lock (Railinklock System)
Description:
Railinklock System is a secondary safety device that is installed on the nuts securing the bolts that hold joint bars and frog bars in place. The unit locks two joint bar or frog bar nuts together, creating resistance between the two nuts minimizing their ability to move/rotate.

Railway track sections are connected either by “Joint Bar Systems” or they may be welded together. The “Joint Bar System” requires a series of bolts to hold the joint bars in place at a railway track joint and are designed to keep both vertical and horizontal movement to a minimum while maintaining clamping pressure at the joint. Frog bars are used at track junctions where the train can be diverted to another section of track. These joints must withstand substantial forces as the train is diverted to the alternate track. Misalignment of the rails can lead to both rail and train damage and the potential for a derailment. Each time a train passes over a joint that has been connected by a joint or frog bar system, significant vibration, vertical and some horizontal movement of the track is generated by the on-and-off weight of the train cars. Loose joint or frog bars allow significant movement of the railway tracks when railcars pass over, resulting in various levels of damage to the rails themselves or potentially causing the tracks to separate and trigger a train derailment. “Joint and Frog Bar Systems” require a continuous schedule of preventative maintenance to ensure the railway tracks function as designed. Frog bars experience additional stresses and pressure when compared to joint bars because the train is being forced sideways on the track to a new track; making preventative maintenance even more crucial.

Name: Pandrol Rahee Technologies
Description:
Pandrol Rahee Technologies (PRT), formed in 2005 as a joint venture between global rail leader Pandrol and India’s long-established Rahee Group, has played a defining role in advancing India’s railway engineering landscape. Combining Pandrol’s worldwide expertise with Rahee’s seven-decade legacy in track products, bridges, viaducts and ballastless systems, PRT has become a key contributor to modern rail infrastructure.
Over the past two decades, PRT has supplied over three million fastening assemblies and metro track systems spanning 1,000 km across India and the Far East. Its solutions power major metro networks, high-axle load routes, USBRL and NFR tunnels, platform modernisation projects, and India’s first High-Speed Rail corridor meeting Shinkansen standards.
Aligned with ‘Make in India’, PRT operates a world-class clip manufacturing facility in Hyderabad and an SGCI foundry in Durgapur, together supporting Indian and global rail projects. Through continuous innovation and strong manufacturing capability, PRT remains committed to building safer, more resilient rail networks.

Name: Unique Rail
Description:
Unique Rail is a 100% Australian-owned manufacturing and engineering company specialising in pantograph manufacturing, refurbishment, and maintenance for the light and heavy rail industry.
Based in Melbourne, Victoria, we support tram and railway networks across Australia and internationally by supplying high-quality, reliable, and cost-effective pantograph solutions.

With more than 38 years of rail engineering experience, our Managing Director, Fabian Borgonha, leads the business with a commitment to precision workmanship, industry knowledge, and trusted long-term relationships with operators and suppliers.

Our core expertise lies in:

Pantograph manufacturing

Pantograph refurbishment & overhaul

Component fabrication and rebuilds

Maintenance, repairs, and testing

We provide operators with a sustainable and efficient alternative to full replacement — extending the life of critical rail assets while meeting strict safety and performance requirements.

Unique Rail is proud to contribute to Australia’s rail industry capability. We continuously invest in research, technology, and global rail insights to ensure our services remain ahead of industry demand.

Name: Glover Industries, Inc
Description: Glover Industries, Inc. was founded in 1997 by Oscar J. Glover.  It grew out of his original company Railroad Car Service Corp. in Indianapolis, Indiana in 1972.  Mr. Glover subsequently founded Glover Group, Inc. opening four different railroad car maintenance facilities over the years to include shops in Corbin, KY; Bridgeport, NE; and Hastings, NE.  In 1980, he built the Sidney and Lowe Railroad (reporting mark SLGG) a short line switching railroad located north of Sidney, Nebraska, and connects the BNSF Railway at Huntsman, Nebraska with the Union Pacific Railroad at Bronson, Nebraska.  It was founded to service a railroad car maintenance and repair facility that Mr. Glover had built in the area near the U.S. Army's Big Sioux Depot.  Mr. Glover later jointly built a grain storage and transfer facility that is still serviced by the Sidney & Lowe Railroad.  It became a common carrier in 1982.  In 1996, Progress Rail Service purchased Glover Group, Inc. and the Sidney & Lowe Railroad.  One year later Mr. Glover founded Glover Industries, Inc. headquartered in Sidney, NE.
