Name: Dnieper Railway Switch Plant
Description:
Joint Stock Company "Dnieper railway switch plant" is a machine-building enterprise with 100 years of production experience and a full production cycle. The plant operates foundry shops for carbon and high-manganese steel, as well as a metalworking shop with the capability to extrude switch rail heels and an assembly shop for switch products capable of welding rail ends to crossings.
The enterprise produces turnouts and spare parts of the P65, P50, UIC60, 54E1, 49E1, P33 and P24 types for the track gauges of 1524mm, 1520mm, 1435mm, 1000mm, 900mm and 750mm. Turnouts are made for main lines, industrial, port and mining enterprises, as well as for urban transport (metro and trams). The product range includes common, symmetrical and curved turnouts, diamond crossings, access and connecting tracks, as well as different types of gauntlets for 1520mm and 1435mm gauges.
Various types of railway baseplates and spare parts for mills of mining and processing plants are also manufactured as related products.
Specialists in the design and engineering departments are able to fulfill any requests of the customer and adapt the turnouts to the required operating conditions.
Manufactured products are certified according to ISO and OHAS standards.

Name: MultiSense
Description:
MULTISENSE: Mixed application sensing from up to 8 sensors in an array
MultiSense from RailSense Solutions is a system to measure or monitor rail infrastructure remotely from up to 8 sensors. It can provide warning alerts as well as scheduled measurements for rail infrastructure monitoring – all remotely without the need for track side intervention.

Based on a small cluster local area network, each MultiSense measuring head, called a Node is battery powered and completely self-contained. The Nodes are available with temperature, humidity, tilt, 3 axis accelerometers, giros, magnetometers, isolated voltage or current sensors. The type of sensors connected to a single hub can be mixed and matched to suit the application.

The Nodes connect via a low power radio link to the MultiSense Hub. The Hub stores the measurements from the remote Nodes and forwards them to the RailSense Cloud Database. The Hub contains an Hi-gain cellular antenna and can be pole mounted to provide extended coverage even in low signal level areas.

The MultiSense Hub has built-in a solar charging system for the internal battery, under most circumstances this can provide sufficient power to run the Hub indefinitely, thus reducing maintenance costs and help to keeping track-side workers safe.

Technical Specification
* Remotely configurable alert settings
* Operating Temperature -20 to +80 ºC for Nodes
* Operating Temperature -20 to +60 ºC for Hub
* Operating range Node to Hub typically 30m
* System Battery powered
* Cellular connectivity via 2G/NB-IoT/LTE-M.
* 2.4GHz Low Power Radio Node to Hub
* Up to 3 years continuous operation
* Sealed to IP67 (Node & Hub)

Name: MRA Services
Description:
MRA Services, Inc., provides customized product support systems to the manufacturing sector, with a primary focus on satisfying the complex support requirements in procurements of light and heavy rail passenger vehicles and their component systems. MRA’s established, field-validated applications also have extensive potential for all large and medium scale electro-mechanical systems.

MRA Services, Inc., was formed in early 1986 to enable vehicle manufacturers to effectively respond to the rail transit industry’s demand for better system support in new vehicle orders. Professionals with extensive Department of Defense and aerospace experience in all facets of systems support - logistics, documentation, maintenance analysis and planning, and technical training - joined with rail industry professionals to create a core group capable of providing complete support services to carbuilders and equipment suppliers. Since then, MRA personnel have provided support to most major carbuilders and suppliers for projects on transit systems throughout North America.

To meet the continuing demand for better – and faster – support, MRA has developed unique applications that enable instant access to all information required to maintain and operate equipment at design levels of safety and performance. This is the core concept of MRA’s Vehicle Support Network Interface (VSNi) and Product Support Network Interface (PSNi). These systems assure the manufacturer that its products are fully supported to its customers – and that the support data is kept current.

MRA develops all of the basic components of the product support system, custom designed for your product and to meet all specifications. These can include everything from spec analysis and proposal preparation, maintenance planning, full parts cataloging, and integrated schematics, to technical training on the equipment and on the supporting VSNi or PSNi installation.

Name: TrackWater
Description:
An Internet of Things approach to rail surface water management.
TrackWater from RailSense is a sensor and data-driven product designed to reduce the incidence of flooding on the rail network and improve safety for passengers and operatives.

TrackWater includeds IoT sensors and data modelling to better manage and predict the maintenance of railway assets. By proactively managing drainage assets, your maintenance costs, flood events and delay minutes are reduced – improving safety for passengers and operatives.

Utilising technologies pioneered on the highways, TrackWater was developed through a consortium including Network Rail, Lancaster University and Connected Places Catapult. It was co-funded by the Department of Transport and Innovate UK. The TrackWater technology has now been adapted to meet the need to manage surface water within rail
and reduce the impact of flooding on the network and is Network Rail approved.

TrackWater is designed to be user-friendly, with an intuitive interface that makes it easy to monitor the status of drainage assets and predict maintenance needs. By using advanced data analytics, TrackWater can also provide real-time alerts and predictive maintenance recommendations, allowing rail operators to take proactive measures to reduce the impact of flooding on their network.

Name: Potential Energy Group
Description:
Our product Rail Power enables us to take a familiar sound and determine the health of rail infrastructure. PEG founders Steve Dunn and Gy Harness have the credibility and capability to deliver Rail Power. Dunn, has previously secured ~£1.8 million of innovate funding leading to licensed patentable technology. Harness, through Network Rail, is experienced in partnering with SMEs providing access to track enabling new device testing and development. This has delivered breakthrough technology to the rail network.
 
Rail Power combines paradigm shifting materials engineering with the latest machine learning. We take vibration from the rail and analyse it forecasting failure. This enables us to recognise failure earlier than current systems, providing opportunity for early intervention. Uniquely, we can identify the failure mechanism at play, isolating if a ‘squat’ or void is forming and report that geolocated event. Having completed Phase 1, a TRL 4 system, we are now running pilot studies to ensure fidelity of laboratory results in the real-world. We will provide early notification and accurate determination to reduce costs and increase safety.
 
Potential Energy Group is a University spin out that resulted from a Transport Research Innovation Grant in 2023 (TRIG 2023).

Name: M&EE Early Careers Subgroup
Description:
Welcome to M&EE Early Careers Subgroup - the group supports railway Senior Professionals & Technical Heads, Operators, and Stakeholders in sharing information regarding operational and technical safety of plants (on-track machines (OTM), on-track plant (OTP) and portable and transportable equipment) to improve the reliability, availability, sustainability and safety across Britain’s railway infrastructure.


M&EE Main Group 
•	Facilitate collaboration and knowledge sharing among UK railway professionals responsible for infrastructure plants,  new track and renewals, and operations in related disciplines.
•	Promote safety, competence, and best practice in plant engineering, operations in-possession, Operation of Track Machines (OTM/OTP), and all interface with railway infrastructure.
•	Develop and maintain Codes of Practice (COPs) and Posters that set minimum competencies and operational standards for in-possession and mainline work for publication.
•	Share experience and insights on incidents or operational challenges to help prevent future accidents and improve safety outcomes.
•	Support compliance with railway safety regulations (including Railway (Safety Case) Regulations, ROGS etc.), and partner with industry bodies to align statutory law, railway group standards, industry standards, and company practices.


Membership
Membership is open to organisations who hold mainline safety certificates and are active operators of OTM/OTP, infrastructure managers, manufacturers, trainers, consultants, and similar technical and operational stakeholders within the rail.  We are structured with both permanent members and co-opted experts from across the industry.

Name: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation
Description: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation (Wabtec), doing business as Wabtec Corporation, is a provider of technology-based equipment and services for the global freight and transit rail industries. The Company's segments include the Freight Segment and the Transit Segment. The Freight Segment primarily manufactures and services components for new and existing freight cars and locomotives, builds new switcher locomotives, rebuilds freight locomotives, supplies railway electronics, positive train control equipment, signal design and engineering services, and provides related heat exchange and cooling systems. The Transit Segment primarily manufactures and services components for new and existing passenger transit vehicles, typically regional trains, high speed trains, subway cars, light-rail vehicles and buses, builds new commuter locomotives, refurbishes subway cars, provides heating, ventilation, and air conditioning equipment, and doors for buses and subways.

Name: Shanghai Modern Rail Transit Co. Ltd.
Via Mineral
Description:
Via Mineral is een innovatieve methode waarbij organisch bindmiddel op waterbasis gebruikt wordt voor het aanbrengen van minerale deklagen op zowel nieuwe als bestaande oppervlakten. 

Het gebruik van het bindmiddel is voor diverse doeleinden van toepassing zoals;
– boomspiegels
– recreatieve routes
– fixatie van oppervlakten

De reactie wordt in tegenstelling tot vele andere verwerkingsmethoden koud en gewoon met water tot stand gebracht. Via Mineral wordt verwerkt bij nieuwe oppervlakten door het aanbrengen van een mengsel van bindmiddel en granulaat (mineraal) op een gestabiliseerde onderlaag en kan ook ingezet worden d.m.v. sproeien van het bindmiddel over een reeds bestaand oppervlak. Denk hierbij ook aan stofreductie op bouwplaatsen etc. De samenstelling qua dikte en type granulaat wordt per project bepaald.

Deze innovatieve oplossing vervangt oppervlakten gemaakt uit beton en asfalt en draagt derhalve bij tot het reduceren van CO2 uitstoot.

De technology van deze innovatieve methode gecombineerd met de juiste mineralen is in Frankrijk door INMS ontwikkeld en wordt daar reeds een aantal jaren succesvol toegepast. MechMatic in Maastricht is de exclusieve distributeur van deze produkten voor de Benelux en heeft met Parcum een exclusieve samenwerking gesloten voor het uitvoeren van alle projecten.

Via Mineral kan op meerdere soorten ondergrond worden toegepast en is kleurloos waardoor het te behandelende product zijn authenticiteit behoud. 

– duurzaam, veilig en esthetisch verantwoord
– circulair, volledig herbruikbaar

Name: Feld- und Eisenbahnmaterial KG Eilers
Description:
Zu unseren Leistungen gehören nicht nur die Lieferung von Schienen und Schienenmaterialien, sowie die Bevorratung dieser Stoffe auf unserem Lagerplatz, sondern auch die Herstellung, Reparatur und Bearbeitung von Gleisbaustoffen, wie die Herstellung von Kurven und Drehscheiben, die Reparatur und der Bau von Weichen, die Montage und Lieferung von Feldbahn- und Krangleisen sowie die Montage von Gleisjochen.
Selbstverständlich führen wir auch die Bearbeitung von Schienen wie z. B. biegen, bohren, sägen, hobeln, strahlen, primern und verzinken aus, bieten unseren Kunden Schrägschnitte mit 30° oder 45° an und erfüllen auch Schienenzuschnitte auf Fixlängen.

Ebenso selbstverständlich sind für uns eine kompetente technische Beratung sowie die Bereitstellung statischer Berechnungen, die wir, bei entsprechendem Auftragsvolumen, kostenlos zur Verfügung stellen.

Zu guter Letzt verfügen wir über langjährige Erfahrungen im Im- und Export der von uns angebotenen Gleisbaustoffe sowie in der Abwicklung von Exportgeschäften und Zollangelegenheiten.

湖北航天飞行器研究所
Description: 湖北航天飞行器研究所是中国航天科工集团下属的飞行器研究单位，主要承担航天飞行器的研制和配套任务。拥有一支从事相关技术研制的高端专业人才队伍，相继成功研制和配套多型航天产品，具有丰富的研制经验和雄厚的技术实力。设置有飞行器总体、飞行力学、流体力学、机械、化学、控制、工程力学、弹药工程等专业，拥有多个专业试验室，在建占地面积约30万平方米的综合试验场，配套了较完整的具有国际先进水平的试验与测试设备。 研究所以“人才强所”为指引，秉承“创新、开拓、团结、求实”的企业理念，以国家需求为牵引，注重技术、管理创新，通过营造“人尽其才、才尽其用、用必有成”的工作环境，为有志于献身国防的人才提供了广阔的发展空间，为优秀人才施展才华提供了宽广的舞台，造就了一批航天科技青年专家，先后有11人获准享受国务院政府特殊津贴，5人获得省部级以上有突出贡献的专家称号，6人入选省部级以上新世纪学术技术带头人，8人获航天基金奖。获得国家科技进步一等奖等国家和省部级技术成果奖百余项，拥有国防等专利近100项。作为国家航天飞行器技术研究的核心力量之一，研究所为职工提供了优厚的薪酬待遇，建立了完备的职工养老保险、失业保险、工伤保险、医疗保险、生育保险体系及住房公积金、企业年金、职工意外伤害保险等福利制度。研究所倡导“快乐工作，健康生活”理念，积极营造和谐向上的工作氛围，成立羽毛球、篮球、足球、游泳等各式各样职工协会，不断丰富职工业余生活。

Name: Testing Simply
Description:
This is the one song everyone
would like to learn: the song
that is irresistible:

the song that forces men
to leap overboard in squadrons
even though they see beached skulls

the song nobody knows
because anyone who had heard it
is dead, and the others can’t remember.
Shall I tell you the secret
and if I do, will you get me
out of this bird suit?
I don’t enjoy it here
squatting on this island
looking picturesque and mythical
with these two feathery maniacs,
I don’t enjoy singing
this trio, fatal and valuable.

I will tell the secret to you,
to you, only to you.
Come closer. This song

is a cry for help: Help me!
Only you, only you can,
you are unique

at last. Alas
it is a boring song
but it works every time. 
-Margaret Atwood

Name: Ceramic Pro Sweden
Description:
CERAMIC PRO TRANSPORTATION
A Complete Line of Industrial Protection

Ceramic Pro surface protection products are continuously developed and tested to continue raising the bar and take the industry to new heights. Our ceramic coatings, paint protection films, and window films work in conjunction with each other to create comprehensive protection for all industrial assets.

Ceramic Pro Strong and KAVACA films are arguably the most diverse protective products we have ever created. When applied and installed, our products create a durable barrier that is resistant to solvents, acids, alkalis, UV rays, harsh weather conditions, and corrosion. Our products will protect the surfaces of structures, machinery, equipment, and so much more.

ADVANTAGES

Corrosion and Rust Prevention - Prevent corrosion by forming a tight barrier against moisture and corrosive agents, preserving the integrity of your assets.

Wear and Abrasion Resistance - Serve as a protective shield against corrosive forces, allowing for prolonged durability.

UV and Weather Defense - Effectively counteract fading, cracking, and deterioration caused by prolonged sunlight and weathering.

Stain Resistance - Repel stains, facilitate easy cleaning, and ensure surfaces remain visually appealing.

Chemical Shield - Prevent chemical reactions and safeguard your assets from chemical-induced damage.

Anti-Icing - Create a non-stick hydrophobic surface that deters ice formation.

Graffiti Resistance - Form a barrier on surfaces that diminishes the need for abrasive removal techniques.

Temperature and Heat Resistance - Withstand extreme temperatures from -45 degrees Celsius to 1200 degrees Celsius.

Name: Euro Invest LTD
Description:
Наши убеждения

Порядочность - является нашим обязательством о том, как мы ведем дела. Это наше обещание, которое заставляет нас прислушиваться больше к обществу и нашим партнерам. Это помогает нам превратить наши ценности на действия и четко определить, кто мы и что мы отстаиваем.
Добросовестность - является основой всего, что мы делаем. Добросовестность включает в себя честность, порядочность, последовательность и мужество. Опираясь на эти ценности, мы являемся сторонниками:

- диалога
Мы внимательно прислушиваемся я к различным точкам зрения и принимаем участие в содержательных диалогах. Мы будем расширять наше понимание, чтобы лучше удовлетворять потребности и интересы наших клиентов и наших партнеров .

- прозрачности
Мы будем обеспечивать наличие, доступность и понятность информации.
- ответственной деятельности для достижения результатов
Мы будем обеспечивать ясность направлений, ролей и ответственностей; строить прочные отношения с нашими клиентами и внешними партнерами; принимать мудрые решения; добросовестно управлять ресурсами нашей компании; брать на себя ответственность за достижение согласованных результатов.
- создание прекрасного места для работы
Мы будем обеспечивать разнообразие людей и точек зрения; поощрять инновации, креативность и обучения; практиковать командную сотрудничество; вознаграждать и отмечать наших сотрудников.
